Name: AYA Foundation Dance Theatre
Description:
Danstheater AYA creates bold and accessible dance theatre for young people and children. Combining contemporary and urban dance, acting, singing, and live music from diverse youth cultures, AYA fearlessly tackles taboo subjects. Their performances are direct and honest, exploring themes such as cultural identity, racism, displacement, gender, friendships, and peer pressure.

AYA believes dance is a language that speaks directly to young people. The dancers and actors bring their personalities to the stage to move and captivate audiences, showing both strength and vulnerability. The company offers young people the opportunity to make dance an important part of their lives through performances that are daring and thought-provoking on topics that matter to them.

Since March 2024, AYA has been led by artistic director Ryan Djojokarso and managing director Nicole Rust. They are developing a new program of performances that are impactful, socially relevant, and sometimes even activist in nature. AYA performs in theaters, schools (from VMBO to HAVO/VWO levels), and on location—regionally, nationally, and internationally.

Founded in 1990 by choreographer Wies Bloemen, AYA has focused on young audiences since the success of its 1996 production Bronsttijd. The core values of AYA are Artistic, Bold, Multicolored, and Current. The company continues to inspire young people with performances that amaze, challenge, and connect.

Psst!
AYA stands for As You Are.

Name: Bal Viennois de Genève
Description:
The tradition of the Viennese Ball is known throughout the world. In many cities such as New York, Brussels or Paris – and now also in Geneva – this annual tradition is an integral part of social life from an early age. I observe that the respect for this tradition based on exchange and sharing through music and dance continues to grow.

The concept of the Viennese Ball is not only a means of “networking”. It is also a way to convey a message. According to the latest surveys launched by the Vienna Chamber of Commerce, about 80% of the participants say they “like to spend this evening with their partner”, of which 35% also want to meet business partners.

A traditional Viennese Ball is a whirlwind par excellence. After the opening show with the beginners’ waltz, the dance floor welcomes all guests. The latter wander from table to table, while sharing a drink and some appetizers. Some take the opportunity to talk business, others find the love of their life. The riders are proud of their elegant partners and the ladies enjoy being the “queens” for a night. A ball also unites generations and society as a whole.

The great success of the Viennese balls abroad is due to their democratic components: openness to the public; mixing of generations and social backgrounds; introduction of young people to music, dance and etiquette; possibility of professional and private exchange.

Name: Vincent Dance Theatre
Description:
Vincent Dance Theatre produces the work of choreographer / director Charlotte Vincent, who conceives, directs and designs productions on stage on film and online. Vincent works closely with Artistic Associates Janusz Orlik, Robert Clark, Aurora Lubos, Film Maker Bosie Vincent, Lighting Designer Nigel Edwards, Production Manager Mat Ort and Composer Jules Maxwell.

VDT’s programme of activity represents a unique offer for its home city of Brighton and across the Sussex region, creating opportunities for professional and non-professional performers to work together, for audiences and participants to explore contemporary themes and for audiences to engage in dialogue and debate around contemporary practice.

From 2023- 2027, five strategic aims drive our work:Creating and sharing live work; expanding reach via film and online platforms; deepening engagement through a new online interactive resource; enabling agency for people new to creative practice, sector leadership and support for progressive practice.these aims are underpinned by the guiding principles care around people, financial resilience, equity, diversity and inclusion and environmental responsibility.

Vincent is a vocal advocate for improving conditions for parents and carers working in the performing arts sector.

In 2024/25 Vincent is developing Vincent Works, a new online resource and archive of 30 years of Vincent’s feminist practice.

Based in Brighton, VDT is a National Portfolio Organisation funded by Arts Council England. VDT is an Associate Company at Brighton Dome and Festival and works in partnership with the Sidney de Haan Centre for Arts and Health at Canterbury Christ Church University and Dr Cath Lambert Director of Education in the Dept of Sociology at Warwick University.

Name: Ismo Dance Company
Description:
Ismo Dance Company is the brainchild of the award winning Finnish choreographer Ismo-Pekka Heikinheimo, known for inventive and ground-breaking performances. 

Ismo-Pekka blends art and performance with new concepts and artistic methods. His social agenda touches on body politics and the aesthetics of movement. His work is multidisciplinary and transformative, exploring the spectrum of visual culture. For him dance is a way to perceive, to describe and to be within the world.

Ismo-Pekka is known for artistic bravery in breaking the boundaries of dance in his collaboration with performance and visual artists, scenographers, architects, philosophers, musicians and voice artists, fashion and light designers. He has created over 60 choreographies presented in 15 countries from Iceland to Namibia.

Ismo-Pekka has danced in works by numerous international choreographers: Carolyn Carlson, Andrew Degroat, Sylvie Guillermin, Kilina Kremona, Didier Deschamps, Andrew Degroat, Lea Anderson, Jessica Iwanson, Jorma Uotinen, Nanna Nilsson, Christine Meldahl and Ólöf Ingólfsdóttir.

Ismo-Pekka is a graduate in Contemporary Dance and Choreography from London Contemporary Dance School (1989). He has a Master of Arts (2014) from Aalto University School of Arts, Design and Architecture. He was senior lecturer for Contemporary Dance and member of the faculty at the Theatre Academy of Finland from 1996 to 2001.

Ismo-Pekka is the founder of Tanssin Aika / Time of Dance Festival which became the largest festival of Finnish contemporary dance during his five years as Artistic Director.

Description: Artistry Youth Dance is a London based youth dance company that supports young people of African and Caribbean heritage, aged 12 -19 years. Name: URBAN DANCE
Description:
The concept of Urban Dance Academy was formed from the desire to offer children a safe and creative environment in which to express themselves while teaching them to work collaboratively as a team. At UDA we value individuality and collaboration. 

We implement these values by having a place where children can learn and grow within an environment that promotes creativity, independence, self-discipline and teamwork

WHY URBAN DANCE IS SO POPULAR?


 

Because we absolutely, positively love what we do. We live dance, we breathe dance and we get to share dance with the world. We help make people’s day and forget their troubles… even for a moment. We work and play alongside our friends and family all day and evening long. We allow adults and kids show off who they really are and embrace their uniqueness and self-expression. We encourage pushing individual comfort zones, but we respect everyone’s individual pace. We support all dance levels, and help everyone discover their inner-superstar.

 
We have earned the trust of our community… which is invaluable to us. We are the very best, no question… and have earned our bragging rights. In addition to having won multiple competition across the country, we work relentlessly to be an organized, professional and responsible local adult and youth dance studio, while maintaining the core values of our world famous brand. 

 

Thankfully… Different TV Channels  and many companies as Propaganda , Ulysson …  have entrusted us to be the #1 provider of dance and choreography talent for movies, concerts, TV shows, commercials and award shows.

 We take this responsibility very seriously. Labeled as “The Academy of the Stars”… we are frequented by industry talent scouts, agencies, managers, casting directors, production crews and celebrities regularly. We guess this helps our continued popularity a little bit as well!

Name: Balletto Teatro di Torino
Description:
Fondato da Loredana Furno nel 1979 il BTT - Balletto Teatro di Torino ha festeggiato recentemente, 40 anni di attività continuativa, 40 anni di danza, di ricerca, di sperimentazione, di relazioni e collaborazioni e dal 2016 è diretta da Viola Scaglione. Attualmente la compagnia è composta da 5 danzatori provenienti da importanti esperienze internazionali. Oltre all’attività in Italia, in particolare a Torino, dove è riconosciuta come un organismo stabile di produzione, sostenuto dal MiC - Ministero Italiano della Cultura, Regione Piemonte e Comune di Torino, ha svolto numerose tournée all’Estero (tutta l’Europa, USA, Cuba, Argentina, Brasile, Colombia, Egitto, Turchia, Taiwan, Cina, Corea).
Dopo i primi storici vent’anni e la decennale collaborazione con il coreografo Matteo Levaggi, dal 2014 il BTT allarga il suo percorso artistico aprendosi ad importanti autori nazionali ed internazionali, diversi per stile e identità come Itzik Galili, Antonello Tudisco, Marco de Alteriis, Yin Yue, Andrea Costanzo Martini, Ella Rothschild, Manfredi Perego, Laura Domingo Agüero e ancora Jye-Hwei Lin, José Reches, Renata Sheppard, Matteo Marziano Graziano, Nicoletta Cabassi, Manfredi Perego, Silvia Gribaudi, Simona Bertozzi, Alessio Maria Romano e Mauro De Candia.

Name: Ecole des Sables | Association Jant-Bi
Description:
The International Centre for Traditional and Contemporary African Dances, commonly known as “École des Sables” and managed by the Jant-Bi Association, is a professional school with theoretical and practical teaching, a research laboratory and is a space for meetings and exchanges, conferences and artistic residencies for dancers from Africa and all continents. 
Recognized worldwide, it has become a global dance village, based on the richness of dances and cultures from all over Africa, a place where dancers from all over the world come together to create new dances with new energies. 

The founders, Germaine Acogny and Helmut Vogt, founded the Jant-Bi Association in 1994. In 1996, they laid the foundation stone of the École des Sables de Toubab Dialaw, Senegal, a small fishing village 50 km south of Dakar. After 6 years of construction, the Centre was inaugurated in June 2004. It is a real dance village with its two dance studios of 400 m2 and 280 m2, its conference room, 24 bungalows as accommodation, its own restaurant, kitchen and offices, spread over 4.5 hectares of land, whose architecture is adapted to the environment.

Description:
SHIAMAK is the world's largest dance movement, fostering a vibrant environment through the spirit of dance and performing arts. With a reach across India, Canada, the USA, and the UK, we offer a creative outlet for enthusiasts to express themselves through movement.

Our flagship program, Summer Funk, invites dancers of all ages—from 4 to 84—to learn diverse dance styles, perform live, and experience the thrill of the stage. It emphasizes global dance techniques, costume design, stage performance, and personal growth in confidence, discipline, and teamwork.

Since our first show in Mumbai in 1994, we’ve celebrated 30 years of inspiring joy and inclusivity with our motto, “Have Feet. Will Dance.”

Our mission is to inspire and connect individuals through the transformative power of dance, fostering a welcoming and inclusive community for dancers of all levels. Join us at Pulse Latin Dance Company and let the music move you!

Name: Maï(g)wenn et les Orteils
Description: Compagnie création, production et tournée en gigue et danse contemporaine, travaillant avec des artistes professionnels marginalisés issus de la neurodiversité ; autisme, déficience intellectuelle. Chacune des pièces est créée intuitivement, utilisant comme unique matériau les interprètes, leur vécu, leur bagage, produisant des œuvres vraies et sensibles. L’approche ludique et sans prétention confère à chaque création une esthétique brute, organique, sans chercher la perfection du mouvement, mais bien l'authenticité de celui-ci. La rencontre d’artistes neurotypiques/atypiques est au cœur de chaque processus. C’est le moteur qui nourrit la chorégraphe et lui permet de pousser plus loin sa réflexion sur les rapports humains en les abordant au-delà du handicap intellectuel et/ou social. Au fil des ans, la compagnie a forgé sa réputation de créations de « feel good » spectacles qui donnent envie de plonger en nous même et qui modifient le regard que l’on porte ensuite sur les autres.

Name: Outta Puff Daddys
Description:
We are the Outta Puff Daddys...a  bunch of Dads that get Outta Puff dancing, from Brighton, UK, and a social media sensation!

First formed in 2012, our camaraderie and friendship go far beyond just dancing. Over the years, we’ve supported each other through personal tragedies and challenges - our bond has become a genuine lifeline for our own mental wellbeing.

Together, we’re breaking down stereotypes around traditional masculinity, showing that strength comes from honesty, vulnerability and connection. We believe it’s not just about encouraging men to talk, it’s about creating communities and environments that enable men to talk more openly. We need to break the stigma and normalise conversations, so no one feels they have to face their struggles alone.

Via our social media, live performances and keynote talks (by our crew leader Paul 'JUKEBOX' Jukes) we share our stories openly, combining joyful dance with powerful mental health messaging. The result has been transformative.

Our content has amassed millions of views and followers from all corners of the globe. Our profile and message is well and truly being heard and supported around the world.

Our story has been featured globally on various broadcasts including BBC, ITV, NBC, Channel10, Capital Radio and more.

Dad Dancing has never looked so good!

Name: dance and the Child international
Description:
Every child has the right to dance.
We believe that all children and young people should be able to express themselves through dance. Our aim is to create possibilities for children and young people around the world to experience dance as creators, performers and spectators. Through dance they can be physically engaged in the world and connect with others across boundaries of culture, language, age, or socio-economic status.

We work on our mission daily, by 

1. Engaging people who are interested in dance for children and young people:

Dance teachers
Dance groups
Artists
Researchers
Educators
Artistic directors
Choreographers
Dancers
Philanthropists
And all those who are moved by dance in any way. 

2. Developing activities and projects: 

Create a worldwide network for dance education and research
Provide a newsletter; 'daCi in Print', in May and November of each year. 
Organize a conference every three years. 
Organize events supporting the 'One Billion Rising' movement annually in February 
Offer funding to our members for projects that relate to the aims of the association, to new countries who wish to create a daCi Chapter, and support for collaborative research initiatives. 
Offer access to all Conference keynote presentations and papers 

3. Keeping our goals clear: 

Increase and develop opportunities for young people to experience dance as creators, performers, and spectators and to do this both within and between countries;
Ensure that the dance interests of young people are recognized and developed;   
Preserve the cultural heritage in all forms of dance by advocating for its inclusion in both general education, community programs, and life activities;   
Facilitate exchange and collaboration related to young people's dance both within and between countries;  
Urge all countries to ensure that dance as an art form is included in both general education, community programs, and life activities.

Name: UC CREW
Description:
De Breaking- en hiphopgroep Utrecht Connaisseurs Crew (afgekort tot UC Crew) is opgericht begin 2018. In hetzelfde jaar won de crew de eerste plek bij de Nederlandse Breaking League. De crew bestaat uit dansers tussen de 15 en 28 jaar uit Utrecht en omstreken. Elk met een unieke achtergrond en een daaruit voortvloeiende stijl van dansen. Wat de crew kenmerkt is de passie voor Breaking, de wil om het beste uit henzelf te halen, en om Utrecht op de kaart te zetten in de danswereld. 

De crew kreeg een boost na het winnen van de NBL finale. Sindsdien hebben zij zich zowel individueel, artistiek en als collectief sterk ontwikkeld. In 2019 stond UC Crew in de kwartfinales van het NK Breakdance. Daarnaast wordt de horizon actief verbreed. Verschillende leden verdiepen zich in nieuwe dansstijlen en zetten stappen in de theaterwereld, onder leiding van gevestigde makers of in eigen producties.

UC CREW wil haar passie en kunst delen met de rest van de wereld. De laatste jaren heeft de crew spectaculaire showcases ontwikkeld, waarmee ze op congressen, privéfeesten en festivals in binnen- en buitenland hebben opgetreden. 

Naast het ontwikkelen van hun eigen dans, is teruggeven aan de community een belangrijke waarde voor de crew. Een van de belangrijkste pijlers in de hiphopcultuur is het “each one teach one” principe. Dat houdt in dat kennis altijd gedeeld wordt en dat we van elkaar leren. Daarom is de crew met het UC EDUCATION PLAN bezig om alle scholieren in het basis- en voortgezet onderwijs in de provincie Utrecht in aanraking te brengen met Breaking en hiphop. Dit wordt gedaan door op iedere school workshops en lectures aan te bieden, om de cultuur die hen zoveel gegeven heeft te delen met iedere jongere in de regio.

Een andere manier van community-building ligt in de evenementen die UC CREW organiseert. Dance battles, workshopdagen en programmablokken op festivals worden actief ingezet om de cultuur te verspreiden.

Name: Linaje Peruano
Description:

Name: vloeistof
Description:
vloeistof is dance company run by anja reinhardt and yuri bongers. with recognizable movements and poetic images vloeistof gives a reflection on human behaviour in urban modern life.
vloeistof has its own way of working: we take space as a starting point. the dance evolves from this spatial context. vloeistof´s working field goes beyond the blackbox of the theatre. we often work in pubic space or on location.
by remolding and commenting on human actions and behaviour, we make dance movements: a body-language that unifies abstraction and everyday actions into an entity. this form of theatrical communication is at the same time challenging and accessible.

Name: We Speak Dance
Description:
We Speak Dance is the Netflix TV Series that has turned into a Social Impact platform, using the power of dance to connect people, celebrate diversity and support solutions for our planet.

While you can watch the TV Series and dance with us on Social Media and at our Live Performances around the world, we are creating the ultimate We Speak Dance App, where you can learn the moves of your favorite dancers, for a quick daily moving meditation, to self-express, or to dive in deeply through our masterclass-style of dance content. 

Through our movement "We Dance for The Planet", we raise awareness to select solutions to our planet's greatest problems, from organization partners all around the world.

Join us in making this world a better place for us humans and for our nature. 

#wespeakdance #wedance4theplanet

Name: Ivgi&Greben
Description: Ivgi&Greben maakt als dansgezelschap expressieve, rauwe dansvoorstellingen van internationaal niveau. Urgente maatschappelijke thema’s worden vertaald naar menselijke beelden die je raken en niet meer loslaten.

Name: Espaço AME
Description:
Âme é uma palavra francesa que significa Alma.

Foi essa pequena palavra, de significado imenso, que nos inspirou a abrir nosso espaço e dividir nosso sonho com você.

O sonho de fazer a dança tocar almas. 

Nosso maior objetivo é transformar os pequenos momentos do seu dia no mais lindo movimento.

Pensamos em cada detalhe, para você descobrir através da dança o ritmo do seu coração.

Sempre com um único propósito: Dançar para ser feliz!

Missão: Desenvolver através da dança, equilíbrio emocional e qualidade de vida. Incorporar a arte na vida de nossos alunos de forma lúdica, educativa e divertida. Ensinar as possibilidades de movimento, trabalhando em conjunto o corpo e a mente. Dançar para ser feliz!

 Visão: Crescer junto com nossos alunos, formar uma família e resgatar valores através da arte. Transformar o espaço em um local onde a dança seja forma de conhecimento, aprendizado e expressão.

Valores: Ética, profissionalismo, qualidade, companheirismo, respeito e dedicação.

Name: Moving Souls
Description: Moving Souls the most eclectic and best-known dance academy in the capital city of Delhi and NCR region is fired by a single belief that – Dance is the essence of a beautiful life and everyone who dances is enriched by it for a lifetime.

Name: Silent in the Wild
Description:
Op zoek naar een unieke activiteit met collega's, vrienden of familie? Ga dansen! Of beter nog: ga dansen in de natuur. Dansen is een gemeenschappelijke taal en verenigt mensen van alle leeftijden. Al ben je nog zo verschillend, muziek en ritme zorgen voor een gezamenlijke deler. Wat denk jij: samen dansen, samen werken, samen leven?

Met Silent in the Wild dans je de zon op, of onder. Je viert de volle maan  en op zondag dansen je met de hele familie. Maar je kunt ook dansen met je collega's. Aan het begin, in het midden of juiste aan het einde van de dag.

Ik kom naar jullie toe, neem koptelefoons mee en zorg voor een lekkere muzieklijst. Ik begeleid jullie van het eerste tot het laatste nummertje en samen bouwen we op van 'landen' naar 'helemaal los'. 

Wil jij dansen met collega's, klanten of gasten? Bel of stuur een mail!

Liefs,
Clarisse
info@silentinthewild.nl
0652381919

www.silentinthewild.nl
instagram/silentinthewild

Name: Nest School of Kathak Dance
Description: Nest School of Kathak Dance, led by Dr.Nipa Thakkar, symbolizes a perfect fusion of classical tradition with modern innovation. From nurturing young talents to delivering grand productions, Nest is rooted in storytelling through movement. Led by a visionary who is scholar, performer, and educator, the school fosters excellence, provides global visibility to its artists, and strengthens community ties through dance. Whether you’re a beginner seeking expressive exploration or an institution seeking cultural collaboration, Nest is a vibrant destination for Kathak.

Name: MAKOVELI STUDIOS
Description: MAKOVELI STUDIOS was created to encourage those wanting to join the dance community in a safe space environment. We offer unique services dedicated to your dancing desire and we pride ourselves in delivering quality workshops, teachers and collaboration. Makoveli Studios are proud to be apart of the Fitness, Health & Well Being Community.

Name: Project T
Description: Founded in 2022 by Filip Rönnblad, Viktor Karlsson and Miika Hurnainen. The concept arose as a consequence of the void of dance events and communities in Turku. We organize events, workshops and parties for dancers and people interested in streetdance or the culture surrounding it, uniting people in the process.

Name: Rapid Felicities
Description:
Let us bring the ball to you!
Dance instruction from the Nothern Virginia area

Name: Birmingham Dance Network
Description: Birmingham Dance Network is artist-led and part of its community. We advocate for our community and for the betterment of the dance sector. Led by a team of independent dance artists based in Birmingham, we strive to make dance artists in the region feel held, heard and nurtured.

Name: Spirit Studio
Description:
Spirit Studio is a new dance studio in Tallinn specialized in shuffle dance. Shuffle dance is a footwork based dance style that is danced mostly to electronic dance music. 

Shuffle dance began in the 80s in London UK in underground house music raves (cutting shapes) as well as later on in Melbourne, Australia (melbourne shuffle). Later on these two substyles merged into one style - shuffle dance. Spirit Studio is here to honour the roots, culture and community.

Name: Siddhidatri Natya Shale
Description:
*Bharatanatyam Dance Weekend Class*
 
Unlock the Beauty of Bharatanatyam
Join our weekend class to explore the ancient Indian classical dance form of Bharatanatyam! This traditional dance style from South India emphasises intricate hand gestures, precise footwork, and expressive storytelling.
 
What to Expect
- *Beginner-friendly*: No prior experience necessary
- *Technique-based learning*: Focus on mastering Bharatanatyam fundamentals
- *Cultural immersion*: Learn about the history, mythology, and cultural context of the dance form
- *Performance opportunity*: Showcase your skills in a final performance
 
Benefits
- *Physical fitness*: Improve flexibility, strength, and coordination
- *Cultural enrichment*: Deepen your understanding of Indian classical dance and culture
- *Creative expression*: Develop your artistic voice and confidence
 
Join Us!
- Every Weekend
- *Time*: Evenings
- *Location*: Kanakpura road
- *Registration*: Free only monthly fees applicable
 
Connect with Us
- *Contact*: 7829710600
- *Follow us*: @siddhidatrinatyashale
 
Let's embark on this enriching journey together! #Bharatanatyam #ClassicalDance #WeekendClass #DanceLearning #CulturalEnrichment

Name: JK Afro Dance
Description: Using a yearly syllabus streamlined for each school term, we teach dance histories and routines particular to West, Central, and South Africa. We provide international school students a medium for learning about Africa in a fun, creative, and exciting way.

Name: Baigali and Dancers
Description: We want to bring dance closer to people's lives and ignite the hidden enthusiasm for dance in everyone. To us, dance is not only an innate universal language that connects each and every human being, it is also a means to bring healing to the body and soul. Dance Director Baigali, a graduate of New York University's Steinhardt school, and award winning dancer and choreographer, looks forward to share her passion of dance with you. Join us today and let's take this journey together!

Name: Steffen Dance
Description:
Steffen Dance Studio is an established, much-loved dance studio located on the Mount Pearl/St. John’s border in Newfoundland. The studio has a stellar reputation for dance training and a staff who are fully committed to inspire and nurture every student.

Welcoming: We strive to be bring joyfulness and beautiful connections to our students and their parents.

Professional We expertly balance a high-quality, respectful, well-run environment with a family friendly focus.

Holistic: We teach our student not only how to dance but how to build a team, how to support each other, how to respect their teachers, how to fail and keep going, how one needs to work hard to improve. We have a strong sense of supporting the full child.

Superb Facilities: Behind our cheery bright yellow door you will find a beautiful custom designed facility which is full of natural light and radiates warmth from everyone inside. Our studios were designed with not only the dancer but their families in mind. Viewing windows extend the full walls of each studio and we have play areas for siblings and lots of seating for parents.

Name: Dance Your Heart Out LLC
Description: At Dance Your Heart Out, we help absolute beginners feel confident, joyful, and connected through the power of social dance. Our classes and workshops focus on presence, not perfection—because it’s never too late to rediscover the joy of movement and the magic of human connection.

Name: Pole Academy
Description:
Pole Academy er et poledance-studie, hvor der er plads til alle. Al vores træning tilpasses den enkeltes niveau.
Poledance er en træningsform, hvor du træner med din egen kropsvægt. Hos Pole Academy fokuserer vi på styrketræning, smidighed og dans. Her vil du lære din krop bedre at kende og flytte dine grænser.
Vores team består af en gruppe friske og kompetente instruktører, der alle har erfaring inden for sporten og andre træningsformer, og som har dyrket poledance i flere år.

Name: The Swaert 's Dance Company
Description:
The Swaert's Dance Company - Web Dance Services

Qui sommes-nous?

" The Swaert's Dance Company " est une compagnie de danse contemporaine, subtilement métissée de danse jazz, créée par Julien Swaerts en 2013 à un moment précis dans son parcours artistique où il ressentit le besoin de partager, de communiquer, de s'exprimer et d'aller à la rencontre du public de manière plus personnelle. Avec [Re-Birth] la première pièce solo chorégraphiée et dansée par Julien Swaerts, vous pourrez découvrir une autre manière de voir la danse contempo-jazz.

Who are we?

" The Swaert's Dance Company " is a contemporary dance company, subtly mixed with jazz dance, created by Julien Swaerts in 2013 at a specific time in his artistic career when he felt the need to share, to communicate, to express himself and to go to meet the public in a more personal way. With [Re-Birth] the first solo piece choreographed and danced by Julien Swaerts, you can discover another way of seeing contemporary-jazz dance.

Name: Funk In Motion
Description:
Funk in Motion (FIM) is the official Western Dance Team of MAIT Delhi, established in 2012.
We've performed at 200+ stages across India, blending creativity, precision, and passion through various Western dance forms.

 Open for collaborations, workshops, and cultural showcases.
 funkinmotion.fim@gmail.com
#AaoKhelein |  Delhi

Name: Escola de Dança Stylo Country
Description: A Stylo Country é o lugar onde você aprende a dançar de maneira eficiente, divertida e por um precinho que cabe no seu bolso! Somos uma das maiores escolas de Dança de São Paulo. Buscamos proporcionar um estilo de vida saudável em nossos alunos por meio do ensino da dança, mantendo sempre um padrão de excelência no ensino e nas relações humanas.

Name: Holmes Dance Academy
Description:
We are a friendly, family-run academy based in Baildon, offering dance, fitness and theatrical classes for children of all abilities, as well as adult classes. 
We offer an exciting environment to learn new skills and have plenty of fun along the way!
The classes are taught by a team of highly qualified teachers and our principle Francine, who has a wealth of experience and skills in dance and performing arts. Always giving 100% to her pupils, she makes each class fun and engaging and loves getting to know every student. The children will also be able to show off their skills in our annual summer shows. 
Most of our classes are held at the Baildon Methodist Church in their lovely new studio. If you’re bringing your children, there’s a handy little cafe next door where you can grab a coffee if you want to wait on-site. Or, alternatively, head home and come back after the session has finished knowing your children are in safe hands. We also hold classes at St Huges Church in Baildon on a Wednesday.

Name: Vanshaw Academy of Irish Dance
Description: We are Calgary's ONLY Open Platform Irish Dance school offering classes for ages 4+ with a focus on creating a fun, and supportive environment. Students learn proper dance technique, solo and ceili dancing, and group choreography.

Name: The Blitz School of Dance
Description: Our The Blitz school of dance is home to all the students who want to explore more and be the best version of themselves irrespective of their age. We believe in offering you world-class training in various art forms especially dancing. We strive to bring to you a positive environment for our students to grow and have an unforgettable learning experience.

Name: Swingout.pl
Description: Studio tańca SWINGOUT.PL od 2009 roku prowadzi w Warszawie regularne zajęcia swingowych tańców z pierwszej połowy XX wieku: Lindy Hop, Collegiate Shag, Balboa i Solo Jazz oraz jest zaangażowane w organizację warsztatów i imprez propagujących taniec oraz muzykę swingową.

Name: Boitsov Classical Ballet Productions
Description:
Boitsov Classical Ballet Productions is a nonprofit organization that seeks to produce artistic performances and special events with an emphasis on Russian Classical Ballet that is professional while still being accessible and affordable.

Boitsov Classical Ballet Productions seeks to promote education and involvement of local families in classical arts and culture through performance and advocacy.

Name: Jitterbug Movement Studio
Description: Jitterbug is a comprehensive movement studio, located in the heart of downtown Oakland (an Arts & Entertainment district) in Garrett County, Maryland. We will offer a diverse range of movement classes, workshops and intensives, including various styles of dance, yoga and wellness classes, and movement as it relates to theatre arts. Jitterbug will be open and available to all people, regardless of age, size, gender, race, or orientation.

Name: Interim Dance Collective
Description:
Interim Dance Collective is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to supporting professional performing artists—especially dancers—through transitional phases in their careers. Whether navigating gaps between gigs, shifting career paths, or rediscovering their artistry, Interim provides a space for dancers to move, grow, and connect without the financial burden.

We offer free, high-quality dance classes led by esteemed professionals, alongside creative opportunities like choreography labs, performance showcases, and community events. Our model removes financial barriers while prioritizing excellence, safety, and artistic fulfillment.

 Why we exist:
Dancers in New York City often pay $25–$30 per class just to stay in shape for their next opportunity. For working artists, this can mean spending hundreds per month just to maintain their careers. At Interim, we believe artistic access should not depend on financial status.

 How we serve:

Weekly free professional-level classes

Opportunities for choreographers to develop work with skilled dancers

A nurturing, collaborative community of artists

Occasional mentorship, performance opportunities, and industry partnerships

 Our impact:
Each month, Interim provides 1,000+ free class spots to dancers. Every $60 donation unlocks a 2-hour studio session that can support up to 45 dancers.

We’re proud to be artist-run, community-driven, and fueled by generosity. Everyone on our team donates their time because we believe in this mission—and the dancers we serve.

Join us. Support us. Dance with us.
www.interimdance.org

Name: ARchive Dance Collective
Description: Preserving the Voices of Dance Artists in Central Arkansas

Name: DanceAbel Ballroom Studio
Description:
Welcome to DanceAbel Ballroom Studio - Where Dance Comes to Life!

At DanceAbel Ballroom Studio, we believe that dance is more than just graceful movements; it's a journey that transforms lives and creates beautiful connections. Step into our world of rhythm, grace, and passion, where we welcome you with open arms to experience the joy of ballroom dancing.

Name: The Dream Academy
Description: The Dream Academy offers tuition in many dance styles from pre-school through to adult, beginners to advanced. The studio also offers vocals & music lessons, as well as an industry-standard recording studio.

Name: Blues Dance Minsk
Description: We are a blues dancing family in Minsk.

Name: Debbie Felton's Academy of Dance LLC
Description: Dance academy educating ages 3 through adult beginners through advanced in a variety of dance forms.

Name: Salsa Nativa Academia de Baile Temuco
Balletstudio Nomé
Description: Dé dansschool voor klassiek ballet en moderne dans in Driebergen-Rijsenburg. (vlakbij Utrecht).

Name: Sissonne Dance Art
Description:
Welcome to Sissonne Dance Art, where excellence meets passion in the world of dance education. As a universal dancing school proudly affiliated with the Commonwealth Society of Teachers of Dancing (CSTD) and Royal Academy of Dance (RAD), we uphold rigorous standards that have shaped global dance education for over 80 years. Comprehensive syllabi and internationally recognized Examination Standards span a wide array of dance disciplines, including classical ballet, modern jazz, tap, contemporary, lyrical, hip-hop, demi-character, song and dance, and more. Our commitment to these standards ensures that students receive a well-rounded education rooted in technical proficiency and artistic expression.

At Sissonne, we boast a diverse faculty of esteemed instructors, both locally and internationally sourced, dedicated to nurturing competitive dancers for the local and global stage. Our guest teachers hail from prestigious dance communities in the USA, Russia, Switzerland, and beyond, enriching our students' experiences with a global perspective and invaluable expertise.

We take pride in preparing our students for excellence through participation in esteemed competitions and intensive programs such as YAGP, CSTD, Joffrey Ballet School Summer Intensive Courses, Juilliard Summer Intensive courses in Switzerland, USA, and more. Our aim is to cultivate young dancers who not only excel technically but also thrive in the international dance arena.

Join us at Sissonne Dance Art and embark on a journey of growth, discipline, and artistic achievement. Discover your potential in an environment where dedication and passion for dance are celebrated and nurtured.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studio of Franklin
Description: At the Fred Astaire Dance Studio of Franklin, Massachusetts learning how to dance is always easy and fun! In your very first lesson, you'll learn the basic elements of which all dance patterns are based and within hours, you'll be ready to dance! Don't put it off for another moment - walk into Fred Astaire Dance Studio Franklin MA and dance out!

Name: Compagnie Éphémère
Description:
Éphémère est née en 1997 à Lyon et vit depuis 2007, en milieu rural dans le Nord Isère à Revel Tourdan.

Association loi 1901, la compagnie de danse  a pour objet la promotion de la danse, de la musique, et des arts.

Elle vise à l’émergence de nouvelles pratiques culturelles à travers l’organisation de manifestations, de rencontres et d’échanges.

Elle développe la création, la diffusion, l’information et la transmission pédagogique.

Name: Affinity Swing
Description:
Affinity Swing: Origins
2022: The year it begins

Founded in the summer of 2022 by Harold, Affinity Swing is on a mission to get people dancing in the south of England. With its sights set also set on Bournemouth and Southampton, Affinity Swing is beginning classes in Bath in August. 



Affinity Swing is providing classes that focus on learning technique, but also ensure you have good time doing so. We want you to finish work and look forward to an evening learning something new and fun! When you book on to a course with us, you are joining a class that not only has a syllabus, but is tailored to how the students on the course progress. We will be taking feedback during and at the end of each class, and adjusting for what you want to learn.

Name: RumbaLatinaUK
Description:
We bring rhythm, science, and joy into the workplace.
Through Latin dance-based well-being seminars, we help companies energise teams, reduce stress, and build connection — one step at a time.

Trusted by LiveWell Health, Nuffield Health, and more.

Name: Maryann Michael Studios
Description:
Maryann Michael Studios offers a diverse range of dance classes for all ages, including Bollywood, Hip-Hop, Bhangra, Bharatanatyam, and more. Our focus is on building confidence, fostering community, and celebrating different cultures through dance.

We're actively working to expand our offerings to include dance styles from various cultures around the world, ensuring inclusivity and representation. From beginners to experienced dancers, we provide a welcoming environment where everyone can learn, grow, and express themselves.

In addition to classes, we offer performance opportunities, workshops, and community events. At Maryann Michael Studios, our goal is to use dance as a way to connect people and cultures in a meaningful way.

Name: The Hub Dance Studio
Description:
The Hub Dance Studio is an inclusive dance space that covers different styles of dance from Afro Fusion to Hip Hop to Contemporary and many more. 
We aim to create a community where dancers of all ages and levels can come together to inspire and push forward the dance scene in Cape Town.

The Hub provides the community with the unique ability to be able to drop in to classes, allowing you to take your dance journey at a speed and convenience that fits your schedule.

Name: Dance Line Coalition
Description: DLC is the premier organization for collegiate auxiliary teams focusing on current members, alumni members, auxiliary directors, amd adjudicators.

Name: Illusion Majorette and Twirling Company
Description: Az Illusion MTC 2003-ban alapult sportegyesület amely hobbi és verseny sportolókat nevel mazsorett és twirling sportágakban.

Name: Chumma Dance
Description: Chumma Dance is a dance collective dedicated to creating an inclusive, welcoming space where dancers of all levels can connect, learn, and express their passion for movement. Through diverse popup sessions led by different sharers, we foster a sense of community and creativity, making dance more accessible to everyone. Our mission is to celebrate the artform and inspire dancers to grow, explore, and share their love for dance in a supportive environment.

Name: Kettly Noël Dance Laboratory
Description:
Le KN Dance Laboratory regroupe tous les projets, actions et activités artistiques et culturels élaborés par et avec Kettly Noël au niveau international ◂ 

A côté de ses créations (danse et performance) et des nombreux workshops qu'elle dispense dans le monde (formation et transmission), Kettly dirige des événements chorégraphiques internationaux avec depuis 2018, une forte présence dans les Caraïbes et à Haïti tout particulièrement ◂

Name: On Your Toes Dance Academy
Description: Established in 2009 with only 6 dancers, On Your Toes has grown into a truly unique, family environment to learn to dance. From our kind and caring atmosphere to our can-do attitude, it is a wonderful place to learn and develop skills. From confident walkers to adults and every age in between, we’re sure that we have a class to suit everyone. On Your Toes Dance Academy offers dance classes in ABD Examination work in; Ballet, Tap, Contemporary, Modern Jazz, Freestyle & Streetdance, Musical Theatre and Acro

Name: Cantarella School of Dance
Description: Cantarella School of Dance is a marketing and advertising company based out of 116 Fenn St, Pittsfield, MA, United States.

Name: Dance Social Finland
Description:
Dance Social Helsinki is the newest Latin Dance school and club, opened in March 2025, and we hope to be also the coolest one! 

We focus on Bachata, Salsa and other Latin American dance styles, organizing regular weekly classes, social parties and events in Helsinki – Pasila, the location with comfortable commute from any part of Helsinki.

Did you know that in Helsinki hundreds of people dance bachata or salsa every week, at tens of classes and parties? Why don’t you also join us and the community of social dancing?!  Learn several basic moves, and you will be able to dance whole night!

Name: Ballet Anna Pavlova, DR
Description:
Somos una escuela de danza ubicada en el centro de Santo Domingo, con una trayectoria artística que comienza en 1966, fundada por la gran maestra Eladia de Cuello, pionera y una de las fundadoras del ballet clásico en la República Dominicana.

Ofrecemos clases de danza para todas las edades, desde los 2 años hasta adultos, porque creemos que el baile no tiene límite de edad, solo pasión y movimiento.

Nuestra academia de danza en Santo Domingo imparte las siguientes disciplinas:

Ballet clásico (y sus variantes)

Jazz
Hip Hop
Barré
Flamenco

Además, contamos con clases privadas de:

Salsa
Bachata
Merengue
Ballet

También ofrecemos servicios profesionales de coreografía para eventos, ya sean:

Eventos sociales
Coreografías grupales
Coreografías de pareja
Eventos corporativos

Si buscas una escuela de ballet o danza en Santo Domingo con experiencia, legado y excelencia artística, estamos aquí para servirte y acompañarte en cada paso de tu formación.

Name: Kitia Academy
Description: We are a dance academy specialized in latin dances.

Name: My Dance Marketing and Apparel
Description: Custom apparel and marketing services for Dance Studios

Name: Dansschool Reniers
Description:
Dansschool Reniers is een dansschool in de Brabantse stad Helmond. 
Wij zijn een echt familiebedrijf. 

Dansen kun je bij ons al vanaf een leeftijd van 4 jaar.

Niet alleen kun je bij Dansschool Reniers clublessen volgen maar worden er ook op onze 3 dansvloeren wedstrijddansers opgeleid en traint mening ander wedstrijddanser ook voor zijn of haar droom op de wedstrijddansvloer. 

Openingsdansen zijn een specialiteit van eigenaresse Irene Koene-Reniers. 
Samen met een stel dat van plan is te gaan trouwen worden wensen en muziek tesamen gebracht tot een helemaal persoonlijk aangepaste openingsdans die menig bezoeker van het feest zal verassen ! En dat allemaal al mogelijk met slechts een paar privé lessen!

Door diezelfde privé lessen en wedstrijdtrainingen hebben Anton en Irene Reniers de afgelopen decennia al menig topresultaat op de (inter)nationale wedstrijden behaalt.
De prijzen kast van deze succesvolle trainers kent inmiddels al vele tientallen Nederlandse titels erkend door NOC/NSF. 

Het zalencomplex van Dansschool Reniers kent 3 zalen van verschillende omvang waardoor er tal van mogelijkheden zijn voor evenementen. Met een (gratis) parkeerplaats voor de deur, is Reniers is een van de top evenementen locaties van Helmond , waar de eigen horecavoorziening en de prachtige aankleding van de zalen , compleet met licht en geluid, uw bruiloft , bedrijfsuitje of ander feest zullen zorgen voor de complete ervaring die u wenst voor uw evenement.

Interesse gewekt ?
Neem contact op met Irene via mail@dansschoolreniers.nl voor een vrijblijvend advies.

Name: Ground One z.s.
Description:
Jsme taneční studio založené v Praze v roce 2024. V GROUND ONE se zaměřujeme na styly pouličních tanců, známé hlavně jako Street dance. Od oldschool hip-hopu až po nejmodernější urban choreografie – v každém vystoupení se snažíme spojovat oba světy, posouvat hranice a přitom ctít kořeny, které tuto uměleckou formu vytvořily.

BE THE ONE

Name: Pilates for Performers
Description:
Pilates Artists United is a nonprofit organization on a mission to serve the rich and lively NYC Dance community! We are providing Pilates Training Courses at a minimal cost as a way to offer professional dancers a complimentary career option, as well as supplementary income. 
We are hoping to launch our pilot program this summer and are looking forward to receiving the loving support of our arts community!

Name: flow. Dendermonde
