Description: LVHaitianKonpa is dedicated to introducing the vibrant Konpa dance to Seychelles. We specialize in dance classes, team-building activities, and consulting services for businesses seeking to incorporate Konpa into their events. Let us help you create unforgettable experiences that connect people through movement and music.

Name: W.I.S.&.R.
Description:
Breakdance:
Danslessen & Workshops

Name: WeDance.be
Description:
Salsa en Bachata dansen in België op een leuke en gezellige manier. 
Ontdek een wereld vol dansplezier. WeDance heeft als doel mensen mee te nemen in een danswereld vol sfeer, plezier en passie waar geen plaats is voor zorgen. Dansen is een taal zonder woorden en creëert onvergetelijke momenten die we samen kunnen beleven. 
Het WeDance team is gepassioneerd om de liefde en ervaring in dans aan iedereen door te geven. Zo willen we jouw en ieders danservaring verbeteren!

Naast onze wekelijkse danslessen doen wij ook dansworkshops/dansinitiaties op teambuildings en bedrijfsevents.

Name: Goldies Dance Team
Description: Goldies is a Northeastern University based dance team focused on exposing students in the Boston area to open style dance culture and opportunities. Our main goal is to provide opportunities for students to perform and grow as dancers in a productive but judgment-free environment. Ultimately, we hope to inspire dancers to involve themselves in the greater East Coast dance community.

Name: Savage Dance Company
Description:
SAVAGE Dance Company is a multi-faceted performing arts center and dance studio.  SAVAGE is home to hundreds of youth in the local area, and serves as Maryland's core, dance educational facility for it's national award winning competition team. Whether your dancer is looking for a structured, positive learning environment at the recreational level, or desiring an advanced level of education, SAVAGE Dance Company is your next step in helping your child prepare for a successful future!  Our studio and staff promotes a healthy environment which (filled with joy) focuses on the child.  Centered on a shared love for dance and the arts, our curriculum prepares our dancers for life. SAVAGE takes pride in providing the highest degree of professional dance training in the tri-state area. Moreover, we take pride in developing great human beings! It is "more than just dance" at SAVAGE Dance Company.

JOIN THE ULTIMATE DANCE EXPERIENCE  AT SAVAGE DANCE COMPANY!
With the best instructors and most talented dancers, we promise you a fun-filled time while perfecting your dance moves. You don't want to miss out on this!

Name: High Studio de Danza
Description:
High Studio de Danza es una academia de danza ubicada en Lomas de Zamora, provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina. Fundada en 2020, nuestra misión es promover la danza como una expresión artística y una forma de vida saludable.

Ofrecemos clases para todas las edades y niveles de experiencia, desde principiantes hasta avanzados. Nuestros profesores están altamente capacitados y tienen una gran pasión por la danza.

También ofrecemos cursos de formación docente para quienes desean convertirse en profesores de danza.  Brindamos a los participantes las herramientas necesarias para impartir clases de danza de manera efectiva con todos los conocimientos pedagógicos.

En High Studio de Danza, creemos que la danza es una actividad que puede enriquecer la vida de las personas de todas las edades. Por eso, nos esforzamos por ofrecer clases y cursos de alta calidad que promuevan el aprendizaje, la creatividad y la expresión personal.

Name: The Vill Dance Co.
Description: The Vill Dance Co. is a new dance company that offers affordable dance classes, dance teams, and events for dancers in Honolulu and Waipahu, HI. Led by passionate volunteers, the company fosters a supportive environment for dancers to develop their skills through three choreography-based teams: Da Guppies, Contra-Flow, and The Bounty.

Name: THE ART SCHOOL CENTER
Description: THE ART SCHOOL CENTER is an education management company based out of 102 CHEMIN DE GRAFENBERG, PRINGY, France.

Name: EDCDance Limited
Description:
We are an inclusive dance company, teaching dance in primary schools, running dance clubs, and also teaching dance exercise classes in care homes and charities. We passionately believe that Everyone Deserves The Chance To Dance.

Our Managing Director and founder, Kayleigh O'Connor, is a professional dance coach and facilitator, with a background and specialisation in working within the community, and focusing on inclusion.

Name: Half-Sole Dance Co. (Formerly Zouave) - Gettysburg College
Description: Gettysburg College's all-contemporary dance company!

Name: VINCiFY, Inc.
Description:
VINCiFY is a dance company dedicated to the discovering & honing of everyone's talent, passion and love for dance. Offering quality classes of exceptional up-to-date dance instructions, sensational performances and an accessible space & platform for all.

VINCiFY, Inc.
President: RJ Vince Uriel R. Cunanan

A Proud Member of the United Dancers Association of the Philippines, Inc. (UDAPI), United Dance Organisation (UDO), World Artistic Dance Federation (WADF), and the International Dance Council CID - UNESCO.

A Member/Organizer of the World Dance Organisation (WDO).

Name: Nachda Punjab Bhangra Academy
Description: Learn bhangra in calgary. Bhangra classes in calgary. Calgary bhangra. Bhangra classes

Name: Mixstyle Dance School
Description: Mixstyle Dance School is a modern dance school for children and adults.

Name: Eastern Suburbs Physie
Description:
Meet Eastern Suburbs Physie: a vibrant and empowering physical culture club that's ready to bring out the best in you! 
With an undeniable passion for fitness, our team of dedicated professionals is committed to fostering a supportive and inclusive environment for women and girls of all ages.
As the leading physie club in the Eastern Suburbs, we understand the importance of blending exercise with fun, making every session an unforgettable experience.

Our classes uniquely combine five dance genres – ballet, jazz, contemporary, hip-hop, swing – with elements of gymnastics and Pilates, creating a dynamic and exhilarating workout that challenges and invigorates. 
Our talented instructors are the heart and soul of Eastern Suburbs Physie, sharing their knowledge, expertise, and zest for life with each and every member. They'll help you channel your inner strength, boost your flexibility, and master the graceful movements that define the art of physie. You'll leave each class feeling rejuvenated, self-assured, and ready to take on the world!

But Eastern Suburbs Physie is more than just a fitness club – it's a family. We believe in the power of community and strive to create lasting connections between our members. Through our regular social events, workshops, and friendly competitions, we foster an atmosphere where every member is encouraged to shine, grow, and achieve their personal best.

So whether you're a seasoned dancer or a newbie just discovering the joys of physical culture, Eastern Suburbs Physie is the perfect place for you to embark on a transformative journey. 
Let's make memories, break boundaries, and celebrate the power of movement together. Come join our tribe and unlock your full potential – we can't wait to meet you!

Name: Dance Step
Description: Our goal is to help each student reach their potential by leading them through a carefully designed curriculum. This curriculum trains the students' bodies in dance technique and engages their minds in a life-long appreciation of the art of dance. We provide students with a caring and nurturing environment as they pursue a progressive program of study in their dance education. Through this study, our students health benefits and build self-esteem and respect for others. Dance Step strives to encourage growth and instill enthusiasm and dedication in each student through the art of dance. Private lessons and classes are available and span levels from beginner to advanced.

Name: Central Florida Choreographers Collaboration
Description:
Central Florida Choreographers Collaboration (CFCC) provides a platform for artists to collaborate, network, and explore the process of making art in a positive, safe, and neutral environment. Local artists are encouraged to develop their craft even as they train the next generation of dancers in a grassroots and organic environment. Essentially, CFCC makes it possible for homegrown Florida dance artworks to emerge from the ground up. 

Passion with Vision
Founded in 2019, CFCC has already provided dozens of emerging artists a place to choreograph, perform, and experience art, transforming lives and opening doors to new creative collaborations and job opportunities. Our vision is to expand and positively impact thousands of local artists. 

We exist simply to provide freedom and opportunity in the creative process. Our goal is to create opportunities to meet up and collaborate with other artists, choreographers, and dance professionals by providing a group of bodies to set work on. Choreographers will also have the opportunity to show their work in small to large functions as well as film. 

A big part of this vision is choreography and compositional education by exposing all collaborators to different processes by which a piece is composed, not only for the choreographers but the dancers and other artists involved. Though not required, feel free to bring your own dancers and students so that they may become familiar with the incredibly elaborate and involved process of making dances. Exposure to other choreographers, teachers, & artists fosters a more holistic education for the dancer. 

While we all have our own local hub where we work and play, CFCC aims to remain flexible in different spaces throughout the Central Florida area frequenting places such as Orlando, Tampa, Ocala, the Villages, Gainesville, and beyond.

Name: Federation of Dance Sport South Africa
Description: The Federation of Dance Sport South Africa is the official controlling structure and sole custodian of DanceSport and related dance styles in South Africa, issuing Provincial and Protea colours in South Africa.

Name: Virtuous Dance Center
Description:
Here at Virtuous Dance Center, our main goal is to inspire our students. Inspire them to express themselves using dance. Inspire them to achieve the virtue of excellence through dance. And inspire them to continue to strive for excellence in all they do.
 We believe in leading by example. To meet these goals, our instructors are committed to transmitting that level of excellence to our students. By personally witnessing and experiencing the natural pleasure that comes with dancing, we hope our students will strive to become Virtuous Dancers.
 Our Dance Classes in Fredericksburg, VA, are Perfect for Everyone
 Dancing is not limited to a select few; people of all ages and backgrounds can benefit from the joy of dancing. From classic to modern, we have a dance class to meet your needs.

Name: Sienna Dance Project
Description:
Our team at SDP is not just a group of instructors; we are a collective of passionate individuals committed to nurturing and expanding your dancer's experience. For more details about our exceptional staff, be sure to explore our website!

At Sienna Dance Project, we strive to be a positive force that transforms the dance world. We invite you to join us and become part of a community where dance dreams come alive. The stage is set, and we look forward to seeing you soon at Sienna Dance Project!

Name: PROGETTO DANZA PRATO A.S.D.
Description:
Progetto Danza è il progetto culturale nato dalla volontà di Cecilia Mazzanti, una realtà che oggi continua ad operare secondo gli obiettivi e le finalità sulle quali la sua fondatrice aveva costruito una vera e propria Mission: «educare alla bellezza, al rispetto, agli impegni», educare alla danza nella forma di una vera e propria devozione a quest'arte e nella meraviglia che può regalarci «nel farla, nel vederla, nel viverla». 
Progetto Danza Prato oggi intende perseguire quegli stessi obiettivi, con passione, entusiasmo e professionalità.
Nella nostra sede sono attivi corsi di danza classica, modern, contemporaneo, teatro danza e balli caraibici. 
Durante l’anno sono inoltre previsti stage, seminari ed esami volti ad approfondire lo studio della danza.

La scuola oggi è seguita da un gruppo di ex-allieve che hanno deciso di portare avanti il progetto di Cecilia: Irene Bettazzi, Silvia Favero, Elettra Gattai, Beatrice Lenzi, Morena Magni, Cecilia Rossi, Laura Sciortino, Sara Siciliani, una parte di quelle persone che «avranno sempre danza dentro di sé e una parte di Te a farci compagnia».

Name: Le Dance Studio
Description: Le Dance Studio will serve as a hub for dance industry professionals to teach, train, rehearse, create content and access therapeutic support, while empowering dancers to embrace their unique talents, promote inclusivity, achieve artistic excellence and foster a lifelong love for dance.

Name: Pole dance studio Destiny
Description: Jsme taneční studio, které nabízí  lekce pole dance pro dospělé a děti. Zakládáme si na osobním a individuálním přístupu. Lekce jsou vedené v menším, ale stálém kolektivu. Kurzistky učíme základním, lehkým prvkům, až po ty těžší. Jedná se o zábavnou formu posilování, která je určená opravdu pro každého.

Name: Mirror Image Dance Academy
Description: Welcome to Mirror Image Dance Academy of Valparaiso! We are a Christian-based dance studio, applying Christian morals and principles to the world of dance education. Our focus is on creating a positive environment, fostering self-esteem and love for each other, as well as a love of dance.

Name: VERBAND DER TANZSTUDIOS ÖSTERREICH
Description:
Der Verband der Tanzstudios Österreich ist im Jahr 2020 durch die starken wirtschaftlichen Herausforderungen während der Corona-Krise entstanden.
Als Schnittstelle zwischen Kunst, Sport und Bildung braucht es eine Interessensvertretung, um dem Tanz und dessen Vermittlung in all seiner Vielfalt Entfaltungsfreiraum zu ermöglichen. Die Tanzstudios und der Tanzunterricht sind sozialer Treffpunkt sowie ein wesentlicher Bestandteil der Kulturvermittlung und Gesundheitsförderung. 
Daher setzt sich der Verband für die Aufwertung der Branche ein, engagiert sich für wirtschaftliche Angelegenheiten und unterstützt die Vernetzung. Uns ist es ein Anliegen eine Plattform zu schaffen, damit der Tanz als Kunstform & Sport für alle Menschen erlebbar und zugänglich ist.

Name: Triangle Music Agency
Description:
Our Passion

Triangle Music Agency is a booking agency that specializes in afro house, melodic house, and tribal house music, proudly representing artists from all over the world. Our dedicated team ensures that every artist receives maximum exposure and opportunities through strategic collaborations, innovative outreach, and tailor-made support.

With a broad and well-established global network, built on years of experience at major international agencies, we bring a high level of professionalism and industry insight to every partnership. Triangle Music Agency is the result of a collaboration between diverse agents, each bringing their own strengths and expertise, all with a shared passion and full focus on the afro house scene.

We are driven by one mission: to empower artists to thrive in today’s competitive music industry and to elevate the unique sounds of afro and tribal house to audiences worldwide.

Name: CDCA Academy
Description:
CDCA Academy is a 5 star dance school based in the city centre of Leicester. 
The academy is guaranteed to get young people moving, having fun and making friends, boosting their self-esteem and confidence, participating in shows, carnivals, competitions and events. 
We give all young people the opportunity to get involved no matter their ability.

Name: A.L.O.E. Dance Fitness
Description:
A.L.O.E. stands for "A Little of Everything" and is exactly what we do!

Danielle Fenenga, the founder of A.L.O.E. Dance Fitness, has been teaching dance fitness classes for over 7 years. She enjoys a wide variety of dance styles and music genres, so she felt it was important to come up with a name that could allow her to do it all! She believes that dance fitness is the best, most fun way to get in an incredible cardio workout.

A.L.O.E. Dance Fitness offers a variety of dance fitness classes and more! Register for a class or reach out about your next event/fundraiser on our website!
https://www.aloedancefitness.com

We currently offer monthly in-person, pop-up classes at Midwest Dance Center, but you can reach out about booking a time for an event, fundraiser, bachelor/bachelorette party, etc. that can either take place at MDC or wherever you’d like!

Currently Offering: 
• In-Person Classes
• Zumba
• A.L.O.E. “A Little of Everything”
• Themed Dance Parties

Other:
• Reach out about choreographed dances for weddings and other events!
• Do you have a fun idea? Reach out and let’s see if we can make it work!

Coming Soon:
• Virtual Classes
• Zumba Gold
• Zumba Kids/Kids Jr.
• Birthday Parties
• Family Zumba

Looking forward to dancing with you!

Name: DanceUp
Description: DanceUp is a social network to connect dancers and schools across the globe. The site provides a comprehensive set of tools to manage and discover dancing events in different cites and with an interactive map for ease of engagement.

Name: Pumps & Pirouettes
Description: We offer dance classes designed for adults in a variety of genres for beginner through advanced dancers.

Name: Palmetto Dance Starz
Description: We are a dance studio located in Myrtle Beach, SC. We offer tap, jazz, ballet, hip hop, lyrical, contemporary, and musical theatre to dancers ages 2 and up.

Name: Cia. Pé na Tábua
Description:
Somos uma Cia. especializada em sapateado, fundada em 2008 por Renata Defina, na cidade de Ribeirão Preto, SP. Estamos há 14 anos criando e nos reinventando e por isso, ousamos dizer que também somos especialistas em sonhos. Em sonhar novas possibilidades, projetos e processos criativos.
Agimos em busca de difundir o tap dance como uma arte não elitista, preocupando-nos com o acesso democrático aos bens culturais que produzimos – espetáculos, oficinas, processos criativos, videodanças e o que mais a criatividade permitir.

Name: Ballet Folklorico Tierra Flor Y Canto de San Bernardino
Description: Folklorico Dance Group, we specialize in teaching the dance of folklorico, sharing and inspiring others to connect with their cultural traditions through the art of dance.

Name: DancebyChance
Description:
Welcome to Sanskar & Ayush Dance Hub!

Hello everyone, we are Sanskar and Ayush, two aspiring software engineers who share a burning passion for dance, drama, and choreographies. Currently pursuing our engineering degrees at Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology.

On our YouTube channel, we aim to be more than just dancers. We strive to be educators, inspirers, and collaborators in the world of movement and rhythm. With a good understanding of various dance forms including hip-hop, breaking, contemporary, bollywood, locking, popping, and robotics, we are here to share our dance and insights with you.

Our mission is simple to empower individuals to express themselves through movement. Whether you're a beginner looking to learn the basics or a seasoned dancer seeking to refine your skills, our channel offers something for everyone.

Stay tuned, stay inspired, and keep dancing!

With love,
Sanskar & Ayush

Name: Dance Fusion Studios
Description: Dance Fusion Studios opened in 2006 and is proud to provide fun dance classes in a safe and welcoming environment to youth and adults. Beginning with just one studio and two teachers, Dance Fusion Studios has grown into a large family of teachers and students – and into a bigger space. We began the studio because we saw how much it was needed - we knew that every body deserved to find a dance family that respected them, welcomed them, and taught them at every level. A lot of our dancers (and teachers!) have felt like outsiders in their previous dance experience, and we wanted to give everyone a space to belong

Name: Studio Dance For Life
Description: Um studio de dança focado em seu bem estar

Name: Underground Groovers
Description:
Underground Groovers – Dance Beyond Limits! 

We are Underground Groovers, a powerhouse dance team blending passion, creativity, and energy into every performance. With a unique mix of freestyle, classical fusion, and raw stage presence, we’re here to make an impact—both online and offline.

 What We Do:
 High-energy performances that captivate audiences
 Creative reels and dance content that stand out
 Storytelling through movement, redefining dance culture

 Based in Bangalore | Open for collaborations, performances & brand partnerships

We don’t just dance—we inspire. 
Let’s create something unforgettable together!

Name: Zeibekiko Dance  Katounas!
Description:
Hello and welcome to Dance Zeibekiko Katounas! I'm Christos Katounas, and I am excited to have you here. No matter where you're located in the world or what your background or dance level is –  I wholeheartedly welcome you with open arms.

At Dance Zeibekiko Katounas, I am committed to helping you unlock your full potential!  Let’s shatter barriers, defy expectations, and tap into your purest form of self-expression. Pushing beyond the limits and comfort zones you may have set for yourself and step outside self-restricted boundaries.  With my guidance, love and support, you'll be dancing fearlessly in front of others in no time.

My commitment to you is to always ensure a safe and judgment-free environment. This is a space where you can freely express yourself, explore your creativity, grow as a dancer and as an individual. 

The doors that begin to open is magical. 

Together, we will discover the profound beauty of Zeibekiko dance, we will explore the depth and power this dance form holds within you. 

Dance Zeibekiko Katounas is not just about learning dance steps; it's about connecting with the music, immersing yourself in the culture, and creating lasting memories. I can't wait to witness your growth and to hear what Dance Zeibekiko Katounas does for you! 

Together, let's dance, let's connect, and let's embrace the transformative power of Zeibekiko. 

Welcome, from the bottom of my heart, to Dance Zeibekiko Katounas!

I am waiting for you! Christos Katounas

Name: K-Pop-Up
Description:
Founded by Patrick Santos and Francesca Balagtas in July 2017, K-Pop-Up is a San Francisco-based dance class and cover group that strives to bring diverse groups together through the magic of our shared interest in Korean Pop music. Our classes are inclusive for all ages, all dance levels, and all backgrounds. 

Through our bi-weekly dance classes, we work to promote inclusivity and support everyone, wherever they may be in their dance journey. As a cover group, we are a team of passionate individuals who carry on the mission of the class by creating positive and uplifting dance content for our YouTube channel, and performing at both cultural and entertainment-focused live events. 

We are a volunteer-run organization that has now expanded to dozens of members across the San Francisco Bay Area, and we maintain an active and thriving online community to help organize and share our love of K-Pop dance.

Name: AMMO Dance Industries (ADI)
Description: At ADI we strive to exceed the industry standard. We want our students to feel fulfilled and well rounded in their training so we do our best to provide them with everything they need to succeed. Online tutorials, community meet ups, informational worksheets, in-person classes and more! Moving with intension and integrity are integral parts of how we approach our artistry and passion with our students.

Name: Dancecloud Studio
Description: "Welcome to "Dancecloud Studio" A great place for dreamers to start their dance journey, Step into the world of dance, learn a variety of dance styles under one roof "dancecloud" we will present you everything from Bollywood to Hip Hop, Choreography to Freestyle and various Western dance genres. With a commitment to excellence, our exceptional faculty fosters learning from beginner to advanced levels, creating a supportive environment for all. Director, Amit Sharma with over 10 years of experience in the dance industry, from underground to professional, has been teaching for the last 7 years and has trained hundreds of dancers to date. So what are you waiting for? Start your journey with us today."

Name: Streetlove Dance Academy
Description: Streetlove Dance Academy is a company based out of Adolf-Kolping Str 10, Munich, Bavaria, Germany.

Name: DANCE By Lyne Gandour
Description: GET TO KNOW US! LYNE GANDOUR DANCE ACADEMY caters for hundred of students from all ages (starting from 1.5 years to late 70s) today, and offers a large portfolio of dance classes (from classical to street) including SPECIALIZED non discriminative classes (down syndrome, kids on wheel chairs, veiled women), breaking the stereotypes and making DANCE a passion for ALL! "Dance is not our end goal, it is our TOOL to transform our people's lives. This is what we are passionate about"-Lyne Gandour. We call it our DANCE HOME for a reason!

Name: Alaix'andrie
Description: Association de danse orientale de Sciences Po Aix

Name: Brown Ballet Company
Description: Brown University's student-run ballet company, open to all Brown & RISD students.

Name: The Joanne Banks Dancers
Description: The Joanne Banks Dancers are a Dance and Performing Arts School based at Top Hat Studios in Spennymoor, Co. Durham. We have been delivering outstanding coaching in Dance, Singing & Acting since 1990.

Name: Belly'N'Move
Description: Cours et spectacles

Name: Fundación Cultural A4 Urban
Description: La fundación Cultural A4 URBAN es una academia que trabaja con NNA (niños y niñas), en pro de la buena utilización del tiempo libre, enfocados hacia el aprendizaje y práctica de la danza urbana y popular, junto a la alternativa de entrenar deportes no convencionales , de esta manera, brindamos un espacio seguro ,en el que los NNA aprovechen de una manera sana y productiva el tiempo libre y así evitar malas compañías y situaciones que en estos tiempos aquejan a nuestros jóvenes.

Name: Salsa Club
Description:
Follow us on Instagram to join the movement.  @ksu_salsaclub

Bringing people together through dance, rhythm, and shared culture. At the KSU Salsa Club, we create a space where students from all backgrounds can connect, grow, and express themselves — no experience required, just good vibes and open hearts.

Name: UNITY CENTER OF DANCE
Description: Unity Center of Dance is a dance and arts education studio located in Syracuse Utah. Founded in 2010 as Ellensburg Community Dance it later became Unity Center of Dance in 2016. Now located in Utah, we are happy to serve Davis County as one of the top 3 best places to dance (Best of Davis County 2025).

Name: Hips & Dips Studio
Description: Hips & Dips Studio is a premier dance studio specializing in belly dance and other movement-based classes that foster creativity, fitness, and self-expression. Our mission is to provide high-quality instruction in a welcoming environment where students of all levels can enhance their skills and confidence. Through personalized teaching and community-driven workshops, we aim to inspire a deeper connection to dance, promoting both physical and mental well-being.

Name: Corps der Majoretten 1980 Gießen e.V.
Description:
Wir sind ein Twirling-Kindertanzverein aus Gießen.

Unser Verein hat mehr als 300 Mitglieder und neben der Aufführung von Tänzen bei regionalen Auftritten nehmen wir an nationalen Turnieren des Deutschen Twirlingsportverbandes teil. 

Twirling kommt von dem englischen Wort „twirl“, was so viel wie wirbelnd, drehend bedeutet. Dies erfolgt mit einem ca. 90-110 cm langen Metallstab, der beim Twirling ständig in Bewegung gehalten wird. Twirlingsport ist eine Art des Tanzes, bei dem die Stabtechnik mit gymnastischen Übungen des Körpers zu Musik und Rhythmus verbunden wird.

Name: Association TOP DANSE EVENT
Description:
Présentation :
L'association "Top Danse Event" est un groupe amical de danse dont le but est d'animer des soirées, participer à la vie communale, intervenir dans différents établissements et organismes pour effectuer des représentations.

Entrainement /recrutement :
Le groupe se réunit de manière hebdomadaire, le mercredi soir, à partir de 20h45, à la salle Polyvalente d’Abondant afin de créer et répéter des chorégraphies sur des musiques variées avec des costumes en tous genres. Il ne s'agit pas d'un cours de danse ; convivialité, plaisir et bonne ambiance sont les maîtres mots de nos rassemblements.

Si vous êtes motivé(e), prêt(e) à faire preuve d'esprit d'équipe et surtout à passer de bons moments, n'hésitez pas à venir assister ou tester nos séances pour rejoindre notre groupe dynamique et passionné !
Pas besoin d’être une danseuse de base, tout s’apprend dans la bonne humeur :-)
Chaque membre de l’association apporte ses idées, son dynamisme et son savoir-faire, tant pour le choix et la réalisation des costumes que pour l’organisation des manifestations (affichages, décoration, repas…).
Une participation de 20€ pour l'adhésion annuelle est demandée pour l'assurance.

Prestations :
La troupe réalise des prestations pour animer tous vos événements, quelle qu'en soit la nature :
- particulier/privée (anniversaire, mariage, repas de famille etc...)
- public (fête d'entreprise, comité des fêtes, associations, maison de retraite...)
Nous adaptons nos interventions selon vos projets, vos souhaits et votre budget.
Nous sommes également ouverts aux demandes des autres associations qui souhaiteraient faire appel à notre équipe pour animer leurs événements.
N'hésitez pas à faire appel à nous pour enjouer vos manifestations !
L’argent récolté sert à l’achat, la fabrication et l’amélioration des costumes de la troupe.

Nous nous tenons à votre disposition pour toute information complémentaire :
Tel : 06 35 48 15 60 / 06 23 03 51 15
Mail : top_danse_event@yahoo.fr

Name: Estudio Dance Bragado
Description:
Uso terapéutico y/o psicoterapéutico del movimiento y la danza.
La danza movimiento terapia puede ser utilizada para todas las edades, situaciones y capacidades diferentes.

Name: Abhishek Roy's Dance Company
Description:
Abhishek Roy is an artist, choreographer, and dance educationist, who created Abhishek Roy’s Dance Company, to offer training in Salsa, Rhumba, Bachata, Cha Cha, Pasodoble, Kizomba, Jive, Samba, Waltz, Zouk, and other Afro, Dominican and Lyrical dance forms. Born in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh and raised in Andhra Pradesh, Abhishek now calls Bangalore his home.

Abhishek has been dancing since his childhood. He started his initial training at Shiamak Davar Institute of Performing Arts in Indo-Jazz, Rock n Roll, Salsa, Waltz, Jive, and Swing. Post this; he explored several other dance forms like Broadway style, Theatre Jazz, old school and Lyrical Hip Hop, Salsa and Bachata under the guidance of Mr. B.R.K. Prasanna Kumar and Mr. Jagdish at Swingers Dance Academy.

He has acquired advance level training from Lourd Vijay, John Anthony, Arif Tasleem, Vidya Prabhakaran, Minoti Ramachandran and the likes in Cha Cha, Foxtrot, Waltz, Merengue, Zouk, Jive, etc.

Abhishek has been an actively associated with many national and international dance forums like the India International Salsa, from 2008 to 2011, Just Dance Season 1, Dance India Dance Season 3, India Hip Hop Dance Festival, etc.

Name: Ballarte Escuela de Ballet
Description:
Ballarte, escuela de ballet, se fundó el 14 de junio de 1994 en la ciudad de Bogotá, Colombia. Desde sus comienzos se fijó la meta de convertirse en una organización que contribuyera al desarrollo social y artístico del país. En aquel entonces, Mónica Pacheco, actual directora artística, estaba convencida de que luchar por lo que amaba no era una misión vana. Al lado de un gran equipo de trabajo, Mónica ha sido testigo, con el paso de los años, de que Ballarte no solo ha conquistado escenarios y públicos, también ha aprendido a conquistar los más profundos sueños colectivos.

Para nosotros, la formación de público, la formalización de los programas, la proyección internacional, la calidad del servicio, amor por nuestros estudiantes son preocupaciones por las que trabajamos todos los días.

Name: Iowa State Dance/Drill Team Association
Description:
Iowa State Dance/Drill Team Association (ISDTA) holds the annual Iowa State Dance Championships. As a valued leader in the sport of dance, we cultivate student growth and achievement through the art and athleticism of dance. The organizations core values are:
-Promoting integrity
-Providing credibility
-Focusing on students first
-Demonstrating and encouraging sportsmanship
-Fostering leadership
-Promoting the art and athleticism of dance
-Providing dance education and training
-Providing coach support and continuing education
-Offering students opportunities beyond dance
-Honoring our tradition of excellence

Name: UGA Asura
Description: UGA Asura is the University of Georgia's premiere co-ed Bollywood Fusion dance team. Last year, we competed at the Legends Dance Championship with our Game Night set. We are looking forward to the 2022-23 year! Stay tuned.

Name: EKStone Dance Company
Description: Founded in March 2022, EKStone brings K-pop dance to the stage, showcasing our passion and talent on various social media platforms and live performances. We celebrate the diversity and vibrancy of K-pop culture, connecting fans worldwide through dance.

Name: Wee Movers
Description:
Wee Movers run playful and energetic children’s classes and Holiday Clubs in east London and beyond. Combining contemporary dance with yoga, Wee Movers classes are an open space for children of all ages and their grown-ups to explore and connect through dance…and mostly to have fun!

Not just for kids...treat your team to a bespoke workshop - curated by Wee Movers!

Want to add something a little different to your away days or office party? Wee Movers isn’t just for the wee ones – we teach grown-ups to move too. 

The ethos of our grown-ups workshops is the same as our Wee Movers classes - to create an open and inclusive space for people to explore and connect through dance, but mostly to have fun!

Our team have over twenty year’s experience in teaching people of all ages and abilities. Your workshop is curated in consultation with you to meet your team’s needs. Our top priority is to create a safe space for everyone to feel comfortable to join in.

Every floor is a dance floor! Don’t worry about transporting your team to another location, wherever your team are based, we’ll come to you.

Examples of workshop activities include
•	Contemporary dance class with guided dance improvisation
•	Yoga & relaxation
•	Pop and / or hip-hop routines - movement to build up a sweat 
•	Ceilidh dancing - yes, we are Scottish and run ceilidh’s too!
•	A regular 45 minute lunchtime or after work class to break away from your desk (this could be any style, even ceilidh dancing!)
•	And of course we can arrange children’s activities for family days

Name: Ubdaf Academia (Clases de baile)
Description: En UBDAF Academia ofrecemos clases de alta calidad, promover la salud física y emocional a través del baile. Nos comprometemos a fomentar un ambiente sano y celebrar las tradiciones del baile popular, inspirando así a nuestra comunidad a descubrir, aprender y disfrutar del poder transformador del baile.

Name: Halo-Halo Dance
Description: A Filipino cultural dance company dedicated to enriching the community through vibrant performances, engaging summer dance classes, and dynamic pop-up fundraising events—all with the mission of giving back and making a positive impact.

Name: TYPErend DansDuet
Description:
TYPErend DansDuet is een luchtige maar inspirerende locatievoorstelling bij  u op kantoor die in overleg aangevuld kan worden met verschillende type workshops.
Deze bieden uw team nieuwe perspectieven binnen een creatieve benadering aan.
We werken op het gebied van non-verbale communicatie en kansen zien. Daarnaast delen we graag een moment van plezier en inspiratie.

TYPErend DansDuet is een initiatief van Silke Dekker en Shania Vandenbranden. Zij  studeren beiden aan de Academie voor Danseducatie op Fontys Hogeschool voor de Kunsten, Tilburg.

Humor, verbinding en kansen staan centraal binnen deze locatievoorstelling waardoor deze toegankelijk is voor iedere doelgroep.

We willen graag aansluiten bij de wensen en de mogelijkheden van de klant en bespreken daarom altijd in overleg het programma en bijkomend tarief. 
We verzorgen o.a. een performance, maar deze kan uitgebreid worden tot een volledige team ochtend/middag. Net waar de behoefte ligt.

TYPErend DansDuet speelt in België en Nederland.

Name: Xpress-Yourself Dance CIC
Description:
Xpress Yourself Dance CIC – LinkedIn Overview
Empowering people of all ages and abilities to express themselves through dance.

Xpress Yourself Dance CIC is a not-for-profit community interest company dedicated to promoting physical and mental wellbeing through inclusive dance experiences. We believe that everyone deserves the opportunity to move, express, and connect, regardless of age, background, or ability.

Founded on the principles of creativity, inclusion, and empowerment, we deliver tailored dance sessions in schools, community centers, care homes, and mental health settings across the West Midlands and beyond.

 What We Offer:
Inclusive dance sessions for children, young people, and adults

Dance for mental health and wellbeing

Community dance projects and performances

Intergenerational and dementia-friendly dance

CPD and training for staff in education and care sectors

 Our Mission:
To inspire confidence, encourage expression, and improve wellbeing through accessible, joyful dance experiences that make a real difference in people’s lives.

 Who We Work With:
Schools & colleges

Local authorities

Care homes & supported living

Mental health and community services

Arts & health partners

Join us as we bring movement, connection, and self-expression to communities that need it most.

 Let’s connect, collaborate, and dance for change.

Name: Linden Dance Company
Description:
Linden Dance Company is an innovative professional dance company based in Birmingham, creating passionate and exciting new works. Directed by Christopher Radford and Sara Macqueen, the company champions positivity, individuality and free expression and blends positive physical and mental wellbeing training throughout all areas of its work.


Positivity. Individuality. Empowerment.

Name: Freedom Dance Studios
Description:
Freedom Dance Studios is a high energy, award-winning dance school in Wallasey (Wirral), United Kingdom. We provide dance classes in both modern and traditional styles to bring elite training and opportunities to the Wirral, at affordable prices, so that dance is accessible to all families, regardless of social status.

Freedom was won awards for being the "Best Dance School in Wirral" in 2025, 2024 and 2023, and prides itself on breaking the mould of traditional dance schools.

Name: SwingDiversity
Description: A 501(c)(3) diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging (DEIB) nonprofit.

Name: assOciatiOn grOup
Description: L’association grOup a pour but de favoriser la pratique amatrice de la danse contemporaine.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Muskego
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Muskego is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Muskego, Wisconsin!

Name: CPSalsa
Description:
We are a Recognized Student Organization at California Polytechnic State University (Cal Poly) in San Luis Obispo dedicated to spreading our love of Salsa and other kinds of Afro-Latin social dancing to Cal Poly students, San Luis Obispo, and the rest of the Central Coast.

Our main goal is to share our passion for salsa dancing and music to people of all backgrounds and ages. We provide high-quality social activities, instruction, and entertainment, all while striving to maintain an environment that is safe and welcoming.

Name: Leap 4 Fun
Description: Leap 4 Fun has been bringing fun, active, and educational enrichment programs to preschools and elementary schools since 1979. Specializing in gymnastics, dance, karate, cheer, and yoga, the company helps children develop motor skills, confidence, and teamwork in a supportive, on-site environment. With expert-designed programs and engaging instruction, Leap 4 Fun inspires kids to stay active, build self-discipline, and enjoy movement in a fun, inclusive way.

Name: The Company
Description:
Our mission is to grow together as dancers and people, while spreading the power of purpose-based dance.

We are a collective of artists who love to dance and are united by our motto, "Never Settle, Always Forward". This expression has driven our constant evolution throughout the years and has allowed us to use dance as a means to inspire, connect with, and positively impact one another and our greater community.

Dance is the glue that binds us, but "who we are" and "what we do" comes to life in a variety of ways: performances within our community, workshops through our dance school, the annual showcase we host called "Good Times", the merch we design for dancers, music videos we create with musicians, and the next project "always forward" takes us to.

Name: Exeter Legion Dance Society
Description:
Hi everyone! Welcome to the official LinkedIn page for Legion Dance 2024/25! 

We are a diverse hip-hop/commercial based dance society that is focused on empowering individuals. We pride ourselves on celebrating diversity, and push for a more collaborative environment in Exeter, within and outside the university.

We’re excited to announce that we’ll be hosting scheduled classes and socials throughout the year. This page is here to keep you updated and to answer any questions you may have, so feel free to ask away. Let’s make this year unforgettable - see you on the dance floor!  

Linktree : https://linktr.ee/legiondanceexeter?fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAabnvz4xLGYiZGySwx1_DoOALDAaPPbH-oMPK4qlpyxxGJs-uplczA-XcH0_aem_AYvD4LFYNkQPhzggxGlgUKpXxiNbXlI-50pk4-DO-5XT9fg_eOTu4uggS4QyHoxoYf_MBuLXpFCY93cJ0gnI6Rb3

Description: UGA Ballroom Performance Group is a company based out of 263 Dance Building University Of Georgia, Athens, Georgia, United States.

Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Kansas City
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Kansas City is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Missouri! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: The Edge School of Performing Arts
Description: The Edge School of Performing Arts is a company based out of Canada.

Name: Dance Innovation
Description:
Dansschool Dance Innovation staat voor dansen, plezier & jezelf zijn. De dansschool in het Westland biedt leuke, creatieve en uitdagende danslessen aan in De Lier, ‘s-Gravenzande en Poeldijk. Er is voor ieder wat wils. Wil jij plezier hebben en leren tegelijk? Dan ben je hier aan het goede adres!

Dansen is leuk voor iedereen van elke leeftijd. Er worden verschillende dansstijlen aangeboden zoals Kids ballet, Kidsdance, Streetdance, Urban, Klassiek ballet en Modern. Deze lessen worden aangeboden op verschillende dagen, tijden en locaties vanaf 3 jaar.

Neem snel een kijkje op onze website voor alle informatie over de dansschool en welke les bij je past! De dansschool heeft locaties in De Lier, 's-Gravenzande en Poeldijk. Ook organiseren we kinderfeestjes, activiteiten op de BSO, basisschool, middelbaar onderwijs en nog veel meer!

Bekijk www.danceinnovation.nl voor meer informatie!

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Denver Cory-Merrill
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Denver Cory-Merrill is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Colorado! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: Move With Manisha
Description:
MOVE is a dance company that aims to provide quality training in dance and fitness and work on the development of our students all around.
From kids in their formative years to young teens, Move focuses on giving a quality dance education with an unparalleled experience, wrapped up in light-heartedness, joy, and fun. Sincerity, authenticity, and sensitivity are the core values that we abide by, which are reflected in the way our classes are structured to work on the holistic development of students.

In our dance classes, we focus on fitness, dance education, and movement exploration. Fitness comprises working on the 3 major components viz. strength, stamina and flexibility. Dance education involves choreographies, freestyle and dance grooves. The purpose of introducing movement exploration to kids is to push their power of creation and confidence further. 
Dance will always be a part of students' lives. Hence, we believe everyone should be able to dance freely to any music and make their own steps in the process, and that is the direction of our classes.

Name: Dansschool Amara
Description: Bij Dansschool Amara bieden we verschillende dansstijlen aan zoals jazz, ballet, modern, showdance, theaterdans, dancemix en kidsmix. De dansschool is onder leiding van Deanne Groenenberg en is gestart in 2023. Dansschool Amara bestaat uit 3 docenten die allemaal een grote passie voor dans hebben en van iedere les een feestje maken. Iedereen vanaf 4 jaar kan lessen volgen bij Amara!

Name: Rangeela Dance Company
Description:
Rangeela Dance Company (RDC) is one of the nation’s leading South Asian dance companies, founded in 2016 by Priyanka Jain Vora, a trained classical Indian dancer and Bollywood dance choreographer.

RDC is based largely on the West Coast including Seattle, LA, SoCal, Bay Area, and Phoenix - but can provide dance services virtually. Our mission is to cultivate a community that celebrates and shares South Asian culture through the form of Indian dance. RDC prides itself has being the first full-service Bollywood dance company to exist in the Pacific Northwest and ahs been recognized by prestigious platforms such as the Smithsonian Institute.

Rangeela’s vision is to make dance accessible to all individuals through group and private dance classes for kids and adults, performing & visual arts for special events, and private choreography services. Our talented group of instructors and dancers have professional expertise in a variety of styles ranging from Bollywood, Bhangra, Bharatanatyam, Kathak, Kuchipudi, Kuthu Hop, Semi-Classical, Hip-Hop, Contemporary, Garba, and more.

If you’re interested in our dance workshops, booking us at your next event, or if you’d like to audition for our performing arts company, contact us at info@dancewithrangeela.com.

Name: UpTop Dance School
Description: UpTop Dance School offers a well-rounded education through dance, prioritizing children’s skills, confidence, and physical fitness in a safe and personalized environment. By learning discipline, teamwork, and creative expression, children’s lives can be positively impacted, while staying active and healthy, improving their coordination, balance, and flexibility. It’s a great choice for parents who want a unique approach to their child’s education.

Name: Ordway Conservatory of Classical Ballet
Description: Ordway Conservatory's mission is to provide a world class ballet education in a safe and nurturing environment focused entirely on its students ensuring that each dancer feels confident, accomplished, and beautiful while developing exceptional dance, health and leadership skills.

Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Greater D.C. is the newest area of premiere ballroom dance studios for the counties of Prince George's, Anne Arundel, Calvert, Charles, and St. Mary's in the state of Maryland & the District of Columbia! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: WADPA Studio 1 ltd
Description: Whangarei Academy of Dance & Performing Arts (WADPA) is Northland’s only dance school with over 40 years’ experience. We offer all genres of dance from beginners to professional level and are known for nurturing developing dancers in a safe and progressive way. WADPA’s students develop self-esteem, self-discipline, and a strong fitness level that will provide a powerful edge in any future endeavour.

Name: UCRaas
Description:
UCRaas is a competitive Garba-Raas team at the University of California, Riverside, that aims to promote and preserve traditional Indian dance and culture. Each season, UCRaas puts together a new set and travels to competitions nationwide to earn points and advance to the Raas All-Stars National Championship.

For Business Inquiries: riversideraas@gmail.com

Name: ZuGABe e. V. - Zusammen geht alles besser
Description: Wir wollen Menschen, die Assistenzleistung brauchen bei der Teilhabe am gesellschaftlichen Leben unterstützen. Gemeinsam mit ihnen wollen wir, ergänzend zu den bisherigen Berliner Hilfen, Angebote entwickeln und Projekte schaffen, die sich an den Bedürfnissen der Assistenznehmer und deren Familien orientieren.

Name: Svitanok Ukrainian Dance Society
Description:
The Svitanok Ukrainian Dance Society strives towards professionalism in the training, performance, instruction, renewal, and promotion of Ukrainian character dance as a viable and developing art form on the Canadian dance scene.

The Svitanok Society is made up of the Ottawa School of Ukrainian Dance and the Svitanok Ukrainian Dance Ensemble.

Name: Cie Art All School
Description: Cie Art All School est une association qui existe depuis 2010 au nom de All School et s'est légalement constitué en 2022, dans le but d'entreprendre légalement ses projet et accomplir ses différentes missions.

Name: Soni's School of Garba Dance
Description: World's biggest Garba School and pioneers of authentic Garba class in India.

Name: Zeina Studio
Description: Zeina Studio is a professional bellydance academy located in Santa Ana, dedicated to empowering women through the art of bellydance. With 13 years of experience, we offer classes that blend cultural expression, creativity, and physical activity. Our mission is to boost confidence, relieve stress, and inspire through dance and meditation. We organize shows, workshops, and provide a welcoming space for dancers of all levels to explore their potential in a supportive community. Join us in celebrating art, culture, and movement!

Name: PRYNTSEV BALLET ACADEMY LLC
Description: PRYNTSEV BALLET ACADEMY LLC is a company based out of 23541 Calle De La Louisa STE B, Laguna Hills, California, United States.

Name: Ascension Competitive Dance Team
Description: With each new season, we strive to be a better version of ourselves as dancers and individuals while maintaining the core of who we are as a family and living out our motto: "Ascension doin' work!"

Name: Spirit of the Creative
Description: Spirit of the Creative (SoC) is Tufts’ hip hop choreography team dedicated to creating and executing entertaining dance pieces. As a student run group, their shows are all fully choreographed, produced, and performed by the members themselves. They are constantly striving to elevate their own style and technique through collective training and mutual exchange.

Name: Melbourne University Dancesport Club
Description:
A welcoming club for all who want to learn how to dance!
Open to beginners and experienced dancers.

Find us through these links!
www.mudc.org.au
www.facebook.com/groups/melbournedancesport
www.facebook.com/unimelbdc
www.instagram.com/unimelbdc

Name: Arthur Murray Dance Studio of Crofton
Description: Arthur Murray Dance Studio of Crofton is a company based out of 1119 MD-3, Gambrills, Maryland, United States.

Name: Dance Dynamics NE
Description: At Dance Dynamics our mission is to provide a positive atmosphere for our dancers to grow as technicians, artists, and performers. We aim to instill confidence and character in our students. We live to dance and thrive on sharing our passion with our students. Passion, hard work, and dedication is what we pride ourselves on!

Name: RUSH IN BALLET
Description: Our school offers a unique combination of Russian and English classical ballet approaches, giving students well rounded training. The school welcomes students of all ages and levels, from beginners to advanced students.

Name: Canadian Dance Company Burlington
Description: Canadian Dance Company Burlington is a company based out of 3410 Mainway, Burlington, Ontario, Canada.

Name: SA Dance
Description:
SA Dance was established in 2008 in Ealing, West London. With a wonderful international faculty and student body, we offer a range of options across styles, age groups, and abilities. Whether you want to be a professional dancer or simply explore artistic expression, we have a class for you.
Our teachers have vast experience across various disciplines. Through the years, our dancers have performed at several venues across London, including the Royal Albert Hall, Her Majesty’s Theatre, Westfield, Regent Street Festival, Trafalgar Square, and Big Dance Youth Day at the Greenwich and Docklands International Festival. We also hold Annual Dance Shows that bring everyone together to share the pleasure of music and the joy of dancing.
We are committed to providing a safe and positive environment where all students feel welcomed, empowered, and free to express themselves. We have witnessed firsthand how dance improves well-being, builds character and confidence, and brings joy to our lives.
At SA Dance, we believe that lessons learned in dance are life lessons:
•	Health and Well-being: We are committed to providing a safe environment where dancers learn the importance of taking care of their developing bodies and minds
•	Passion: We strive to inspire a love and appreciation of dance and the arts by teaching and working with enthusiasm and love
•	Artistic Expression: We encourage our dancers to transform into artists by finding their voice through self-expression
•	Positive Approach: We empower our dancers to believe they are capable of anything by instilling a positive mindset
•	Kindness: We foster a friendly, welcoming, and supportive environment among our dance families, teachers, and the community
•	Excellence: Professional and high standards of training empower our dancers to excel as artists
Join us at SA Dance and experience the joy, passion, and community that dance brings to life.

Name: Dance With Celeste
Description:
Dance With Celeste is celebrating over 2 decades of dance excellence. Celeste Wissman began dancing at age 3 and continues to keep learning and loving the art. After graduating from Temple University in 1999 with a Bachelor of Fine Arts in dance, Celeste opened Dance With Celeste, a place where she could pass on her love of dance to young children and adults who share the passion.

The studio is located right outside of Northeast Philadelphia just past the city line, in Bensalem. Classes are offered for students ages 18 months to adult. All of the staff at Dance With Celeste are highly trained and experienced in dance performance and education. We offer a safe and fun environment for children and adults to learn the art of dance.

Name: Bertram Studios
Description:
Started out as a dance videography channel, now we're a renowned dance school

WE'RE ACTIVELY RECRUITING DANCERS! More info on our website

OPEN FOR COLLABORATION WITH DIFFERENT PEOPLE AND COMPANIES!

2X WINNER OF NATIONWIDE MYHITS CHALLENGE!

20+ active dance groups
200+ dance videos on different platforms
Experience abroad (competitions, camps, conventions etc)
Countless epic memories

Check out our Youtube channel - https://www.youtube.com/@BertramStudiosTV

Name: Escola de Dança Ary Feitosa & Silvinha
Description: Escola de Dança Ary Feitosa & Silvinha : Rua Teodoro Sampaio, 833, sala 11-Pinheiros São Paulo, Brazil.

Name: FRBdans
Description: FRBdans is a company based out of Jens Jessens Vej 16, Frederiksberg, Hovedstaden, Denmark.

Name: Star Magic Dance School Cambodia
Description:
In 2020, Star Magic Dance School Cambodia was founded by Ms Esther Lau and Mr Michael Macabidang in Phnom Penh.

Star Magic Dance offers comprehensive Classical Ballet and Modern Jazz classes through progressive curriculum based on the Commonwealth Society of Teachers of Dancing (CSTD - COMDANCE) syllabi. Classes are available for ages 3 years old and up to the professional levels such as Performer and Teaching career.



Star Magic is committed in inspiring the students to achieve dance excellence in International Dance Certifications, Dance Competitions and Theatre Performances.

Name: Elite Dance Lab
Description: At Elite Dance Lab, we believe in giving dancers of all levels the best training possible. From our tiniest tapper to our oldest pre-professional dancer, quality technical training is always at the forefront of our dance curriculum. Not only do we train our dancers to be technicians, but we have a variety of programs that give performance opportunities, extended dance education, and future career training should they choose to remain in the dance industry. The Lab is not just a studio, it's a second home for our dancers!

Name: Duniya Dance and Drum Company
Description:
For nearly two decades, Duniya Dance and Drum Company has stood at the vibrant intersection of traditional arts and social change, weaving together the rich cultural tapestries of Punjab, India, and Guinea, West Africa. Founded in 2007, our company has become a cornerstone of cultural preservation in the Bay Area community.

Through our performances, workshops, and community engagement, we continue to demonstrate how traditional art forms can serve as powerful vehicles for social change and cultural preservation in the modern world.

Name: Le Labo De La Danse
Description: Le Labo de la Danse is a dance school and creative hub in Ashrafieh, Beirut. We offer classes, workshops, and intensives in ballet, contemporary, hip hop, oriental, tango, and more. Guided by local and international instructors, our mission is to strengthen dance education in Lebanon and foster a vibrant community of creativity, collaboration, and cultural exchange.

Name: Taneční škola Hes
Description: Jsme jednou z největších tanečních škol v Česku. Nabízíme taneční kurzy pro předškoláky, děti, mládež a dospělé.

Name: JAC Ballet
Description: Escuela profesional de Danza y Ballet Clásico. Único centro en Madrid con Metodología Vaganova.

Name: KemKids Dance Studio
Description: KemKids Dance Studio is the largest Dance organization in Palm Beach County with over 700 students enrolled in our Studio at 39+ school and recreation center locations. We have been teaching our students the love of Dance since opening in May of 2010.  We offer ballet, tap, jazz, hip hop, pom and acrobatics classes.

Name: GROOVE - The Dance Club of BITS Pilani Dubai Campus
Description:
GROOVE, the official dance club of BITS Pilani Dubai Campus, is a team of aspiring and passionate dancers who represent the university on the big stage.

We conduct and participate in two major events during the academic year, namely, Sparks (intra-university) and Jashn (Inter-university) and inter-university competitions held by other universities in UAE.

we consist of 2 dance teams. The western dance team (WSB) and the eastern dance team (YBC).

The club actively seeks curious and passionate members who are willing to give it their all for the passion of dance and represent their university on the big stage.

Name: PUSH FOLD
Description: push/FOLD is the vision of the multi-disciplinary artist and composer-choreographer Samuel Hobbs created as a platform for arts advocacy and to promote Art, Health, and Movement education throughout our community (local and abroad). Specializing in contemporary choreography, sound design, film and education, push/FOLD's body of work and programming center community power and education. The immersive athleticism of push/FOLD's productions range from full evening-length performances to an eclectic range of shorter works, pop-up performances, installations, virtual and film creations, and our Union PDX - Festival of Contemporary Dance.

Name: Kailani Dance Company
Description: Kailani Dance Company has a mission to ignite passion, strength, self love and let freedom flow to anyone who sets foot into our dance studio. We strong believe that dance is an accessible art, for anyone, no matter how their journey, and no matter how they identify. Kailani is a safe space to express, be seen, and feel valued. We love authentically, without prejudice and champion dancers of any technical ability to dive deeper into their soul, and let their self expression shine.

Name: Ballee
Description: Centralized platform meant to empower the dance community through connectivity, collaboration, and support.

Name: Howell Dance
Description: A renowned, award-winning dance school in Howell, New Jersey, offering a diverse range of dance classes, including Ballet, Tap, Jazz, Hip-Hop, and more. We provide a nurturing yet disciplined environment for students of all ages to discover the magic of music and dance. With a legacy of excellence and year-end recitals, our students have gone on to become college instructors and professional performers. Our state-of-the-art facilities, spacious waiting areas, and observation windows ensure a comfortable and engaging experience for our young dancers and their families.

Name: KUT Dance Team
Description: Established in 2019, KUT "Kpop Undefined Training" aims to combine Kpop and Undefined choreography to form a unique dance team.

Name: District K
Description:
District K is a GWU-based k-pop/hiphop dance team that aims to provide a community for dancers of all experience levels with interests in k-pop music and/or hiphop dance styles. 

Throughout the year, we film covers of k-pop songs and various studio choreographies (1million, Millennium Dance Complex, Just Jerk Dance, etc.) that we post on our Youtube channel (GWU District K). You can also catch us performing at various events on campus, such as our annual Spring Showcase, and elsewhere across the DMV!

At auditions, which we hold at the beginning of every semester, we teach two short k-pop choreographies -- No prior dance experience or preparation is required to audition or be accepted into the org! We also have a myriad of non-dancer positions in the organization, such as publicity, videography, and editing. Please email us if interested: gwu.districtk@gmail.com

For more information on auditions, performances, covers, and events, check out our Instagram (@gwu_districtk)

Name: Tradasyn UIN Jakarta
Description:
We are a passionate traditional dancer specializing in Ratoeh Jaroe, a dynamic and synchronized dance rooted in the rich cultural heritage of Aceh, Indonesia. With years of experience performing on national stages, we are dedicated to preserving and promoting Indonesian traditional arts through performance, education, and cultural exchange.

Ratoeh Jaroe has taught us discipline, teamwork, and the power of storytelling through movement. I’ve had the privilege of training and performing with talented teams, participating in cultural festivals, and representing Indonesian heritage to global audiences.

Beyond dancing, we are committed to cultural advocacy and believe in the importance of keeping traditional arts alive for future generations. I am always open to collaborations, workshops, and opportunities that celebrate and elevate cultural diversity.

Name: Centre Stage Dance Studio Oro Valley
Description: Revolutionizing dance education, creating a brighter future, and changing the world. We are shaping the future by teaching our dancers to strive for excellence, be all that they can be, and make the world a better place

Name: Hamilton Community Dance
Description:
Accessible. Inclusive. Fulfilling.
Intergenerational dance classes open to all, based in Winchester.
Classes starting September 2022

Name: Bona Dance
Description:
Founded in December 2023, Bona Dance is a unique and growing movement dedicated to bringing the healing power of dance to adults of all ages and backgrounds. Bona Dance has already launched in Lisbon, Varese (Italy), Zurich, Berlin, and Munich, and we’re growing! We aim to expand across borders, creating an international network that invites people everywhere to experience the joy of dance and connect within a vibrant community.

Our distinct method supports individuals within intimate, close-knit groups, allowing participants to share a profound journey. Together, each group taps into the power of shared energy and support, creating an experience that is deeply personal yet enriched by the collective journey.

Join Us in Expanding Bona Dance to New Communities!
Are you passionate about movement, driven to create change, and equipped with business acumen? We’re looking for visionary partners to help us bring Bona Dance to more communities. Let’s connect!

Name: Sri Hiranmayi Nrithyalay
Description:
Sri Hiranmayi Nrithyalay is one of the leading Kuchipudi Dance institutions in Hyderabad which has trained 500+ dancers performing for over the last 10 years. Our performances are tailormade according to the language, audience, occasion, budget and theme. We are specialized in dance forms of India from which cater to all kinds of audience and represents Indian Cultural dance to foreign audience also.

Name: Bay Area Independent Chinese Dancers
Description:
Bay Area Independent Chinese Dancers is a collective of Chinese dancers, choreographers and allies who use traditional arts to tell our original stories firmly rooted in our own experiences in the Bay Area and throughout the world. Our conservative art forms introduce traditional audiences to new ideas about belonging in the larger community, while our engagement with local history and current issues bring new audiences to Chinese dance. We are the Bay Area’s premier home for Chinese dancers to pursue independent, boundary pushing, solo and small group work that doesn't fit in conventional studio environments.

Our goal is not to replicate the traditional studio model, but to focus on original choreographies and solos that fit better around a working adult’s schedule. We believe that after 20 years, our dancers have the technical skill to tell their own stories, and if they base it on their lived experiences in the Bay Area, that voice will shine all the brighter. While our product was designed with working adults in mind, we are proud to work with anybody of any age or background who’s excited to take advantage of our unique artistic freedom and commitment to kindness and innovation in tradition.

Name: HKUD Ziva Grana
Description:
Passionnés par la richesse culturelle de la Croatie, nous sommes une association folklorique basée à Genève depuis 2008. 

Notre mission est de préserver, promouvoir et célébrer l'héritage folklorique croate à travers la danse, la musique et les traditions. Nous offrons à nos membres une expérience immersive dans la culture croate, en proposant des cours de danse traditionnelle, des ateliers de musique folklorique et des événements communautaires. 
En tant qu'ambassadeurs de la culture croate, nous sommes fiers de représenter notre pays lors de festivals et d'établir des liens culturels avec d'autres communautés. 

Rejoignez-nous pour explorer la beauté et la diversité du folklore croate, tout en tissant des liens au sein de notre communauté à Genève et au-delà.

Description:
Ascendance is a charity organisation working in the Dance for Health sector, delivering outstanding participatory programmes, performances & films, based in Leeds, UK

Ascendance has launched an exciting new venture with an Over 50's community dance company, which combines a professional and an integrated cast of people with Parkinson's. To date we have performed at The Age Proud Festival, World Disability Day at Leeds City Museum, The Riley Theatre, Parkinson's UK St Chad's Jubilee and The Orchard, Headingley with a new site specific dance for film work "The Orchard".

With a team of experienced instructors specializing in a wide range of dance styles — from ballet and jazz to hip-hop and ballroom — Plaza Production One ensures a fun, engaging, and educational experience tailored to the specific needs of each group. Name: AFJ Cardiff ( Afro Jam Cardiff)
Description:
AFJ CARDIFF-WHO WE ARE :

AFJ offers Afro Dance classes in Cardiff as a way of sharing and embracing African culture. We represent dance styles and moves from all over the continent and share this in inclusive environments where everyone feels welcome. Our approach in classes is to merge education with fun, fitness and culture. Our workshops introduce the opportunity to dig deeper into specific Afro Dance styles and the opportunities to combine other styles with Afro Dance. Since its roots, AFJ has grown significantly and is recognised as Wales’s first Afro Dance dedicated organisation.

 WHAT WE CURRENTLY OFFER : 

-	Weekly Open Classes at Ardour Academy, Cardiff
-	Monthly collaborator workshops at J1 studios
-	Performance Group Class (invite only)
-	Performances at community and cultural events
-	Private 1-1 classes

OUR VALUES

We see dance as a vehicle to share the African Culture and through that to encourage others to embrace their own culture as well. Behind every move there is a story, history and so it expresses identity. Whether you have African and/or Caribbean roots or not, we invite everyone to share their love of Afro Dance, grow as dancers and learn more about the historical significance of different moves and styles, thereby creating a sense of belonging for all. Our values are shaped around:

-	Unity: Connecting different people from diverse backgrounds
-	Community: Making the joy and heritage of African dance available to all
-	Knowledge: Educating and sharing African culture.
-	Inclusivity: Creating safe spaces that are welcoming and non judgemental

 OUR MISSION

That the AFJ community creates unity and respect, which do not readily arise from ‘knowing’, but from ‘experiencing’ the African culture. We aim to break down barriers between people and connect through the joy of dance. For us, dance is a creative tool to educate and share African culture.

Name: The Rosin Box Project
Description:
Our mission is to elevate and enrich the arts in the San Diego community and beyond through uniquely curated contemporary ballet performances. The boutique contemporary ballet company aims to encourage artistic growth and exploration by creating a platform where professional artists can amplify their voices, permitting audiences new access to the transformative power of dance. Made up of top-tier versatile classical and contemporary professional dancers, TRBP delivers exceptional fine-art performances in an approachable and accessible way.

 

A rosin box is unique to dancers. We have them in our rehearsal studios and backstage at the theater, used most often on pointe shoes to create more friction to prevent slipping. To Step Inside a rosin box is to step into our home and our world. TRBP continues to raise the bar and push the limits of how dance is experienced for audiences and artists alike, inviting audiences to Step Inside an inspiring and creatively charged world they call home.

 

Founder and Artistic Director, Carly Topazio, created TRBP in May of 2018 to present an innovative, authentic, and artist-driven view of contemporary ballet. The small team is undyingly devoted to their craft which has blossomed the company into being San Diego's premier Contemporary Ballet Company.

Name: India International Institute Of Kathak Dance & Music
Description:
In our collective endeavor, a group of dedicated individuals unites with a singular purpose: the global promotion and propagation of the sublime art form known as Kathak Dance. Our unwavering commitment is anchored in the preservation of Kathak's pristine essence, meticulously developed over centuries in diverse regions of India. We stand as custodians of its authenticity, striving to safeguard the sanctity of this cultural treasure.

Within our small yet resolute community, we ardently work to foster an appreciation for Kathak Dance worldwide. It is our collective aspiration to ensure that this ancient dance form remains untarnished, existing in its original, unadulterated state. Kathak, with its intricate footwork, graceful movements, and emotive storytelling, transcends cultural boundaries, offering a universal language that resonates with the human spirit.

Emphasizing the significance of Kathak's integrity, our mission extends beyond mere instruction. We serve as advocates for the preservation of its traditional roots, resisting any dilution or distortion that may compromise its inherent beauty. We believe that Kathak's enduring appeal lies not only in its technical brilliance but also in its ability to evoke profound emotions.

As torchbearers of this cultural legacy, we invite kindred spirits to join us in our noble pursuit. Together, let us weave a tapestry that transcends time, where the pure and enchanting rhythms of Kathak Dance reverberate across the global stage, fostering a deep appreciation for its historical significance and cultural richness.

Name: Ballet de Danse Physique Contemporaine
Description:
Nouvelle Création : Exodus 
Inscription spectacle 9 et 10 mai au Centre chorégraphique de Strasbourg : https://www.helloasso.com/associations/ballet-de-danse-physique-contemporaine

Le ballet de danse physique contemporaine a été créé en 2015 par l’auteur chorégraphe David LLARI.

La danse physique contemporaine est un langage qui repose sur l’intention derrière le geste. Le mouvement dansé, habité avec authenticité, s’émancipe de toutes formes de danses déjà existantes. Le danseur, dans sa pleine ipséité, peut alors servir les pièces de l’auteur.

Résultat d’une chorégraphie d’anticipation et de recherche, les chorégraphies du BDPC posent un regard singulier sur le monde et la société. Au-delà des scènes spécifiques à la danse, le BDPC se déploie sur des lieux comme l’espace public, les monuments, les musées ou les zones urbaines les moins habituées à recevoir des manifestations culturelles. Le BDPC a recruté ses danseurs à l’international : France, Angleterre, Allemagne, et Italie. La compagnie dispose de ses compositeurs, d’une équipe de techniciens audiovisuels, de son personnel administratif et d’un réseau de collaborateurs ponctuels, issus de diverses disciplines artistiques.

Name: M.A.D.D. Rhythms
Description:
What started as Bril Barrett & Martin Dumas III’s formula for giving back, is now a full-fledged performing arts company, quickly gaining a reputation for representing the true essence of tap: RHYTHM! The company is composed of young, versatile tap dancers from all over Chicago. Their ages range from 18 to 47, and their backgrounds are equally diverse. The one thing they all have in common is a love for “the dance”.

M.A.D.D. Rhythms’ mission is to preserve, promote and contribute to this art form called tap.

We will teach its history, represent its culture and advocate for its future. We will use this beautiful dance/music form to make a difference in the underserved communities of this world by connecting and caring for the youth of this world. We believe that having access and options gives a child a greater chance at a positive life. Therefore, we will spread the joy, love, discipline and expression of tap to as many children as we humanly can!
Our Mission M.A.D.D. Rhythms’ mission is to preserve, promote and contribute to this art form called tap. We will teach its history, represent its culture and advocate for its future. We will use this beautiful dance/music form to make a difference in the underserved communities of this world by connecting and caring for the youth of this world. We believe that having access and options gives a child a greater chance at a positive life. Therefore, we will spread the joy, love, discipline and expression of tap to as many children as we humanly can!

In an effort to continuously give back to their communities they have also worked with many public and private schools, and volunteered performances for various community affiliated organizations including A.C.E.S. (Athletes Committed to Educating Students), Children Affected by AIDS Foundation, Nikola Tesla Alternative High School for Girls, TCA Health and Nutrition Fair, Sigma Gamma Rho Sorority, Inc. and Rainbow House. M.A.D.D. Rhythms Truly is MAKING A DIFFERENCE DANCING

Name: Bolly Dancing Studio
Description:
Bolly Dancing Studio
Singapore(2008) | Mumbai(1992)

International Dance & Fitness Studio Bolly Dancing is Singapore's Specialist in Beginners Bollywood dance & Zumba Fitness classes.

After success in Mumbai, where we established our Bollywood Dance Studio in 1992, we decided to reach out to absolute beginners in Singapore in 2008 with specialist classes for all ages, fitness levels and dance experience. Our aim was to introduce the most authentic Bollywood Dance to Singapore through easy-to-follow, and fun fusion dance classes that were modern and totally different from anything else.

Bollywood Dance Studio - Singapore
Since then Bolly Dancing Studio has run regular dance & fitness classes, workshops, team-building sessions & wellness programs for Corporate, Singapore Government Departments & Educational Institutions. Over 15,000 participants from all parts of Singapore & big corporate names have became part of this growing community and culture, joining in festivals and events.

Founder and Artistic Director Anjali Savla is the inspiration behind our Bollywood Dancing Studio in Singapore. She familiarised Singaporeans with Modern Bollywood dance just like one would learn in Mumbai.

We introduced Modern Bollywood Dance as a mainstream, fun and fitness based way for everyone living in Singapore - locals and expats, to keep fit and de-stress no matter what's your age or fitness level. Bollywood Dance is very easy to learn and it brings unmatched excitement through it's upbeat music and easy-learning techniques used by our trained and experienced instructors at Bolly Dance Studio!

Our Students have participated in number of international dance festivals held under the auspices of UNESCO in various countries like Thailand, Denmark, France, UK, Spain and Germany.

Name: Soul-Xpressions
Description:
Soul-Xpressions is a non-Government youth development Organization based in Uganda, East Africa. 
Legalized on 20 July 2015, Soul-Xpressions was founded by Sebulime Elisha Davis an artist and creative facilitator together with his students Mugisha Frank, Edgar Kanyike, Musiime Ivan and Hamza Primo.
The Organization’s grand objective is to explore, create and share an education model that uses arts and sports tools to recognize, nurture and develop skills and intelligence in the physical, mental, spiritual and emotional faculties of our human experience, and bridge the gap between the formal and non-formal learning to facilitate positive social change and economic development.

Name: Body Politic
Description:
