Body Politic is passionate about bringing cultural experiences to those facing significant barriers. We tackle big themes and challenging subjects, and strive to create meaningful experiences for audiences and participants. 

As well as professional touring, Body Politic provides vital life-changing work to young aspiring artists from diverse communities through an enriching programme of training, mentoring, paid opportunities and internships.

We strive to ensure that true representation of community, people and place are reflected in the organisation from board level to the young people we work with.

Name: ArcTangent Dance
Description:
ArcTangent Dance is a professional dance company based in San Jose, CA. We strive to challenge the conventional wisdoms of our beloved medium, dance.

Our work facilitates empathy between humans through unique audience experiences, as well as providing exhilarating modes of expression for our movement artists through performances, community outreach and online platforms.

We are fiscally sponsored by Local Color, a 501 (c)(3).

Name: Joy Dance Lab
Description: Dance School

Name: Denisse Ballet School
Description:
Școala de balet "Denisse" din Timișoara s-a înființat în anul 2014 și a avut o creștere continuă atât ca și rezultate din partea elevilor cât și a cursurilor pe care le oferă. Școala se remarcă atât prin prestația elevilor pe scenele din Timișoara cât și prin rezultatele excelente obținute de aceștia la cele mai grele concursuri atât din țară cât și din afara țării.

În momentul de față oferim cursuri de dans clasic, dans de caracter, dans modern contemporan pentru copii cu vârste cuprinse între 3 și 18 ani. Pentru cei care doresc există posibilitatea de a studia intensiv dans clasic și contemporan, la care se adaugă și un program special pentru condiționare fizică, flexibilitate și întărirea musculaturii.

Condusă de Denisa Imbrea, „Școala de balet Denisse” a adus în Timișoara, un spectaculos palmares prin rezultatele frumoase ale copiilor. La cursuri, Denisa Imbrea le împărtășește micilor balerini secretele succesului: munca, perseverența și pasiunea. Copiii care frecventează aceste cursuri susțin numeroase spectacole la evenimentele din Timișoara, două spectacole pe an pe scena Teatrului Național Timișoara și participă la concursuri atât în țară cât și în străinătate.

Începând cu anul 2021, cei mai silitori elevi au posibilitatea să adere la ansamblul Asociației Cultural Artistice ART GENERATION care urmează să presteze spectacole atât în Timișoara cât și în afara ei.

Name: Victoria Ballet Theatre
Description: Founded in 1984, Victoria Ballet Theatre is a non-profit, non-discriminatory organization with the purpose of promoting dance for the cultural benefit of Victoria, Texas and surrounding communities. The goals of the organization include training local talent to higher levels of technical and artistic ability, educating youth through exposure to live theater, and achieving excellence in dance performance through collaboration with guest artists, choreographers and instructors.

Name: Compagnie Les Cils
Description:
Créée en 2018, l'association de loi 1901 Les Cils est une compagnie de danse contemporaine qui propose des rencontres artistiques pluridisciplinaires avec les publics.

Marie Simon oriente sa direction artistique autour de l’humain. Elle convoque différentes disciplines artistiques : la danse, le dessin, la musique originale, les arts plastiques, la vidéo et la voix qu’elle considère telles des matières premières avec lesquelles interagir et rebondir. 
C'est ce tissage entre les corps, l’espace, et les différents arts qui lui permet de souligner ce qui est à l'origine de son écriture chorégraphique : la relation.

Depuis 2020 la compagnie s’adresse au très jeune public afin de semer une écoute et une ressource intérieure qui grandiront avec le tout petit.
La compagnie souhaite intégrer toutes les personnes qui gravitent autour de l’enfant : les parents, la famille, les professionnels de la petite enfance, l’éducation et la culture.
En s’adressant au très jeune public la compagnie agit au cœur de la société actuelle et de demain pour créer des moyens de se rencontrer.

Name: MAZELFRETEN
Description:
Lui est danseur électro, vice-champion du monde de la discipline, Brandon Masele.

Elle est danseuse hip-hop, Laura Defretin.

Ils sont connus dans le monde des battles sous les pseudonymes Miel et Nala. Ils écumaient les scènes chacun de leur côté, travaillant respectivement aussi bien avec Christine and the Queens qu’avec Stromae ou encore Angèle jusqu’à cette rencontre fortuite dans un studio de danse autour d’un show de quelques minutes.

    Leur rencontre a eu l’effet catalyseur de vouloir mettre en commun un bout de leur histoire entre cultures électro et hip-hop. Duo d’une extrême sensibilité ils dansent une relation fusionnelle, symbiotique, bouleversée par l’envie de se redécouvrir à travers la danse. Ils créent à eux deux un langage distinctif, une gestuelle propre à leur univers chorégraphique, gestuelle qui emmène la danse électro et le hip-hop vers un public plus large. 

La création de leur compagnie en 2016 est la suite logique de cette rencontre. Leur intégration en 2017 dans l’incubateur d’artistes en danse urbaine (IADU), crée par La Villette, marque un tournant important dans leur ascension et leur reconnaissance en tant que chorégraphes.

Name: Cie Samuel Mathieu
Description: Compagnie de danse contemporaine basée sur Toulouse, créatrice du NEUFNEUF Festival

Name: Feel The Beat
Description: Feel The Beat is a Colorado-based registered 501(c)(3) charitable organization and dance studio. Our mission is to bring the expressive world of dance and music education to the lives of those who are Deaf, Hard of Hearing, Hearing, as well as those with/without disabilities. We do not want anyone to miss the opportunity to experience the joy of music, dance, and expression! Our organization has developed a curriculum that incorporates a vibrational dance floor, sign language, and specially constructed tools to aid in the experience of music and dance.

Name: McKoy Dance Project (MDP)
Description:
McKoy Dance Project (MDP) is a dynamic 501(c)(3) contemporary dance organization rooted in equity, advocacy, and artistic excellence. As an inclusive dance company and service organization, MDP exists to break down barriers to access in dance by amplifying the voices of BIPOC and LGBTQIA+ communities. The company champions opportunities for people of diverse backgrounds to connect and grow through performances, youth and adult education, and public cultural events. Led by Founding Artistic Director & CEO Derick McKoy, Jr., MDP uses bold storytelling, community engagement, and high-impact performance as tools for healing, visibility, and systemic change.

Since its first performance in 2019—a collaboration with the Opus 87 Piano Quartet on the evening-length ballet Looking Out: A Stonewall Memorial—MDP has premiered original works, produced dance films, launched the Collective Voices Dance Festival, the Choreographer's Institute, Black Dance Series, and several school residencies through their Community Grooves program, and performed across New York City. In just five years, the company has served over 2,000 individuals across the NYC metro area.
In 2021, MDP was honored with a special invitation to perform on Juneteenth, the newest U.S. federal holiday and the first in 38 years. With each project, the company fosters connection and critical reflection by confronting societal inequities and amplifying underrepresented histories.

MDP artists and staff are community leaders—educators, collaborators, and cultural curators—who archive and elevate queer and BIPOC dance legacies. We are not just a company; we are a movement, reclaiming space and rewriting what dance can look like—from the street to the stage.

Name: Sreejaya's School of Classical Dance (SSCD)
Description:
The art form of Bharatanatyam inspires us to propagate the dance form and change lives.

Established in 2004 by the legendary Smt. Sreejaya, the dance school has gained a reputation for excellence. Rooted in tradition in imparting the art form but with a contemporary approach in the quest for merit. The dance school is working towards engaging patrons in social and cultural aspects of everyday life.

Name: NATyA Dance Collective
Description:
We are an ensemble of dancers with extensive training and performance experience focused on bringing meaningful and invigorating performances to our many communities. We are currently working on a new suite of dances focused on collective healing, the environment, and the interconnectedness of all life forces. We also have many traditional Bharatanatyam pieces in our repertoire that we have choreographed and arranged for ensemble performance. We are available to perform as an ensemble for your personal, corporate and community events. NATyA Dance Collective aims to bring joy and authenticity to every audience.

Our primary dance form in Bharatanatyam, which Collective members have studied for a minimum of two decades. We have an extensive repertoire of contemporary and traditional dances that we perform as an ensemble. Many of our pieces feature English narrative, poetry, contemporary music, and contemporary themes. While our core dance form is Bharatanatyam, the members of our collective bring experiences in Indian contemporary and folk forms, other classical forms such as Mohini Attam and Kuchipudi, and experience with yoga and martial arts.

Name: New England Dance Academy
Description:
Your child needs community more than ever and parents need support more than ever. We partner with you to help grow confident, independent children through dance classes. For over 30 years, our DANCE studio has created a community of positive, enthusiastic, and supportive families.

Our mission centers around making sure your child has the very best support, guidance, training, and encouragement possible. It’s true, not all children will aspire to a career in the performing arts, but ALL children reap the rewards of a dance program that builds character, independence, accountability, teamwork, and friendships. Discover the New England Dance Academy Way!

At New England Dance Academy, we don’t have cookie-cutter programs. Our Signature dance program for ages 2-Adult “Dance Done Different” empowers children to Grow, Learn, Listen, and Dream, so they can grow up and CHANGE THE WORLD! If this resonates with you, if you are looking for A Dance Studio “unlike all others”, then start your journey with New England Dance Academy today.

Name: Div n Dee dance company
Description:
Div n Dee is a Bangalore based dance company, founded by the immensely talented sister duo, Divya and Deepti Vinod, a remarkable institution that has carved its place in the world of dance with unparalleled grace and artistry.

What began as a humble YouTube channel with millions of views has now blossomed into a thriving dance company that transcends borders. DivnDee Dance Company founded as an institution in 2021 boasts more
than 100 students from various corners of the world, and 1000s of participants from their exclusive events. Offering a comprehensive curriculum, the company conducts classes in classical, semi-classical, western, Latin, and other dance styles, allowing students to explore the vast tapestry of dance.

But DivnDee Dance Company's vision extends beyond merely imparting technical skills. Their profound philosophy is rooted in spreading joy through dance and embracing one's true self.

In their tireless efforts to foster the growth of dance enthusiasts, DivnDee Dance Company conducts workshops and training sessions across the city, empowering individuals to unleash their hidden potential and discover the joy of movement. Divndee Dance Company currently operates in 2 branches in Bangalore, online and in collaboration with prominent venues across the city.

Name: Beyond The Stars Dance Competition
Description: Beyond The Stars is a family owned company built on strong moral values and a love for dance. Now in our 19th year, we promise that our focus will never change; the dancers will always come first! We’ll keep working to provide a positive competition experience for dancers and their families. We are constantly striving to improve by reevaluating everything from our rules to our trophies each and every year.

Name: Global Dance Open
Description:
Global Dance Open is one of the fastest-growing international dance competitions, uniting dancers from across the world to showcase talent, creativity, and passion on a global stage.

Founded in 2020, GDO has quickly become a global platform where dancers of all ages and styles can shine. Through our qualifiers and world finals, we connect performers with scholarships, industry professionals, and international stages, helping them take the next step in their artistic journeys.

Name: AURORA dance school
Description:
The most popular dances of the whole world in one place...
Samba, Waltz, Disco, Cha Cha, Tango, Salsa, Foxtrot, Swing, Rumba, Jive... and many more dances with the best trainers, we are waiting for you

Name: Global Performing Arts Alliance
Description: An exciting new venture for Solange Urdang and a team of exceptional individuals with an abundance of experience across dance, theatre and performing arts education.

Name: Dutch Eurythmy Dance Ensemble
Description:
Wij bewegen, wij dansen. We laten ons leiden door het ritme van nu en morgen. We werken met kennis van de traditie maar kiezen vanuit nieuwsgierigheid voor vernieuwing. Open en intuïtief gunnen we onszelf vrijheid. Vrij om open te staan voor nieuwe vormen, voor nieuwe samenwerkingen, nieuwe ontmoetingen. Waarin we iedereen welkom heten om onderdeel te worden van wij. Wij zijn docent en leerling, performer en publiek. We leren en geven door. We laten zien en kijken. We gaan voor het hoogste wat euritmie ons en ons publiek geven kan: beweging. Wij zijn DeDae, Dutch Eurythmy Dance Ensemble.

Wij bieden workshops, opdrachten op maat en voorstellingen aan. Ben je nieuwsgierig geworden en wil je hier graag meer over weten? Neem een kijkje op onze website of stuur een e-mail naar info@dedae.nl

Name: NOCTURN
Description:
LATER LIFE DANCERS.
DIGITAL ADVENTURES.

NOCTURN shines a light on later life dancers with an invitation to co-create interactive digital dance adventures.

CREATING DANCE FOR AN INTERACTIVE AGE.

Our darkly cinematic and deeply woven stories immerse you in our hands-on experiences which aim to reveal what is often hidden in plain sight.

ONLINE & 
LIVE DIGITAL ART CREATED THROUGH PARTICIPATION. 
OUR WORK IS UNIQUE AND RELEVANT.

We place community participation and co-creation at the heart of our creative process. 

We utilise everyday technology i.e. social media, apps, gaming etc to explore the impact of technology and our dependence on it, mental health issues and the challenges faced by our LGBTQ+ community.

WHAT WE OFFER?

Showcasing the best of adult dance.
Storytelling using technology.
Co-creation and participatory dance.
Today's issues made accessible.
Mental health awareness.
An LGBTQ+ ally.

DANCE STORIES INNOVATIVELY TOLD.

With over 15 years of transmedia storytelling our online, live and installation experiences utilise everyday technology.

Name: Furteelay Dance
Description: Spread our love for Bhangra by providing structured, thorough, and fun in-person & online Bhangra classes that push our students beyond their limits.

Name: The PAC Collective
Description: Welcome to The PAC Collective, a circuit of kids' dance competitions where you learn as a competitor, find inspiration as a dancer, and are applauded as an artist.

Name: Arthur Murray Bucharest
Description:
Primul studio Arthur Murray din România este deschis din aprilie 2014 la et. 2 al clădirii din str. Nicolae Caramfil nr. 87 (zona Herăstrău).

A doua cea mai veche franciză din Statele Unite, brandul Arthur Murray este renumit în întreaga lume și este cea mai extinsă rețea de școli de dans de societate, cu peste 300 de studiouri deschise în 22 de țări. 

Fondată în 1912 de către Arthur Murray, un simbol american al succesului în antreprenoriat și al dansului de societate, școala de dans a crescut rapid în popularitate în anii '20 și '30 și a devenit un punct de referință pentru dansul social. Astăzi, studioul de dans Arthur Murray continuă să fie recunoscut pentru calitatea și profesionalismul său, fiind unul dintre cele mai populare studiouri de dans din lume. Numele Arthur Murray este legat de coregrafii celebre precum cele din "Dirty Dancing", "Parfum de Femeie" sau "Frumoasa si Bestia".

Name: The Change Dance
Description:
At The Change Dance Studio, also known as The Change, we give young artists the tools to make their emotional and physical wellness the priority; which in turn creates passionate, confident, healthy dancers. Our educators try to create a body positive, supportive space where dancers feel safe expressing themselves through art but also communicating their basic needs. The educated staff at The Change is here to help your dancer safely learn their own limitations while listening to their own needs. The Change will also implement multiple injury prevention methods: 

- Less Demanding Schedule
- Fuel Breaks
- Attendance List
- Personalized prevention programs (Artist Division Classes) 

The Change Dance offers a wide variety of styles for dancers ages 2- adult including: Creative Movement, Classical Ballet, Contemporary Ballet, Progressing Ballet Technique,  Jazz, Lyrical, Contemporary, Acro, Hip Hop, Tap, and our Competition Collective.  Our dance classes are broken down into different programs based on age and ability, but can also be signed up for individually.

Visit www.thechangedance.com for more!

Name: Diversity in Dance
Description:
Dance studio in Friendswood, Texas with a unique full mind-and-body approach to dance. Our experienced teachers are trained to work with students of all ages and abilities. We offer recreational classes for children and adults and a competitive dance team.

Some of the offerings you will find at Diversity in Dance that you will not find in other local studios include a dedicated homework room, a licensed dance therapist on staff, mommy-and-me postpartum recovery classes, a large variety of adult classes offered in both day and evening, drill team prep classes, community service requirements for our competitive dance team, and so much more. 

Visit us today to learn more about the DiD Difference and find out why we say we are so much more than a dance studio!

Name: Kizztalk Dance Academy
Description: In der KizzTalk Dance Academy dreht sich alles ums tanzen.

Name: ABCD Dance & Fitness Club
Description: Get Fit with Fun

Name: Time To Dance vzw
Description:
A CELEBRATORY DANCE GALA
Curated by Wim Vanlessen
February 9, 2026 - @koninginelisabethzaal

Name: New Baltic Dance / International Contemporary Dance Festival
Description:
As the largest event of its kind in the Baltic States, New Baltic Dance carries a threefold mission: to inform, educate, and bring together people interested in the art of dance. The festival is visited by more than 7,000 spectators each year. It has become a place that unites artists, nurtures a new generation of dance professionals, and builds audiences by offering the opportunity to experience world-class works and premieres alongside creations by Lithuanian artists.

Festival organiser: Lithuanian Dance Information Centre.

Name: Pacemakers Dance Team
Description:
We are a groovy senior-citizens dance team in our 60s, 70s, and 80s! We perform all over and audiences love us! Hire us to bring laughter and joy to your next event!  
* We perform at sports arenas, conferences, movie premieres, community festivals, corporate events, parades, fundraisers, senior centers, and private parties. We also lead lively dance workshops at community centers. 
* We organize and manage fun and inspiring dance routines to rousing audience applause!
* We produce entertaining videos on social media.

Name: Move Dance Family
Description: Move Dance Family formerly Move Dance & Fitness is a family-owned dance studio. The Marion family started the studio in early 2013 with two students and two toddlers of their own. The focus of the studio was to create a family-centered dance studio and a second home for students, where they could feel loved, inspired, and express themselves in a healthy way. Fast-forward almost five years later the Marion family has now five kids. MDF has over 400 students, is the #1 Google rated dance studio in Fort Bend County and is the home of Movement Dance Company an award-winning competitive and performing group of 69 dancers ages 5-18.

Name: Oyo Dance Company
Description:
Oyo Dance Company is a non-profit professional dance company that embodies community inclusion, cooperation, and cultural awareness. Oyo promotes appreciation of the art of dance through public performances and outreach, educational programs, and community activities. The Company maintains a diverse repertory through work with guest choreographers, master classes, and technical workshops. 

Oyo Dance Company is focused on celebrating diversity within the art of dance, and features dancers of all backgrounds, ages, and body types. Rather than focusing on a certain aesthetic, Oyo brings out the beauty and joy in each individual performer. Oyo dancers train in many styles of dance, and productions are lively and varied. Oyo promotes access to the arts for everyone through their free ticket program, Oyo Access, and a variety of community outreach programs.

Name: La CLAP
Description:
Troupe de danseuses swing, la CLAP vous emmène en Amérique dans les années folles, sur des rythmes swing et charleston.

Basée à Angers, la troupe de la CLAP fait le show durant vos soirées avec un répertoire varié de danses charleston, blues et Lindy Hop !

Name: VM Dans
Description:
VM Dans blev grundlagt i 2006 af Mads Vad.

Vi er en danseskole for børn, unge og voksne på alle niveauer. Vi har danseskoler i Aarhus, Skanderborg, Horsens, Randers, Silkeborg, Aabenraa, Sønderborg og Tønder. 

Her er plads til alle, lige fra eliten til nybegynder - vi vil gerne give alle den bedste tid. 

Du kan altid booke en gratis prøvetime på vores hjemmeside: www.vmdans.dk

Hvis du bor lidt for langt fra vores danseskoler, kan du danse sammen med os på vores onlinedanseskole VM Dans PLAY: https://play.vmdans.dk.

Name: Cie Zutano BaZar
Description:
Implantée en Sarthe depuis 2005.

En amenant la danse à s’unir dans la recherche avec plusieurs disciplines artistiques – musique, théâtre, arts visuels, arts numériques, photographie – Zutano BaZar utilise la pluridisciplinarité comme vecteur de lien et de sens.

Cette identité s’inscrit dans un mouvement allant du local à l’international et inversement, dans un incessant et nécessaire aller-retour entre le territoire où elle est implantée et des rencontres avec l’étranger.

La compagnie se fonde sur un principe de partenariats, d’échanges de réseaux, de connections et de circulations des informations, des idées artistiques et des humains qui les créent.

Favoriser les échanges entre créateurs et, d’une façon plus large, tous ceux qui s’investissent poétiquement de loin ou de près à produire du lien social, de la rencontre avec toutes les populations. 

Florence Loison invite et accueille des artistes dans une temporalité et une fabrication libre. Elle multiplie les manières de rencontrer les publics afin que la création soit pérenne, diversifiée et qu’elle soit accessible au plus grand nombre.
Location: Le Mans, Pays de la Loire

Name: Love and Dance
Description:
At Love and Dance, we are passionate about enriching lives through the art of dance. Based in Kosovo, we specialize in teaching a variety of social dances, including salsa, bachata, kizomba, rumba, cha-cha, waltz, and merengue.

Our mission goes beyond classes—we aim to cultivate a thriving dance culture in Kosovo. We bring world-class artists to our region, host vibrant festivals, and organize exciting trips to connect our community with global dance experiences.

As event organizers, we create unforgettable moments through professional dance performances, social animations, and cultural celebrations. Whether you’re a beginner discovering your first steps or a seasoned dancer seeking new inspiration, Love and Dance is your gateway to a world of rhythm, movement, and connection.

Join us as we elevate the spirit of dance and community in Kosovo!

Name: Dance Company Twenty
Description: Dance Company er etableret i 2017 og åbnede 1. juli 2017. Ambitionen med DCT (Dance Company Twenty) er at establere en danseskole med et sundt og godt miljø for unge som ældre.  Eleverne skal føle sig velkommen, og der skal være plads til at være ligepræcis den man er. DCT ønsker at udvikle og styrke sine elever indenfor en bred skare af dansestilarter.

Name: Collectif Art Metz
Description: Association messine qui promeut la danse hip-hop et la capoeira depuis 25 ans.

Name: ŻfinMalta National Dance Company
Description:
ŻfinMalta National Dance Company is a talented and adaptable dance ensemble, with a diversity of creative voices reflecting the many influences that are part of today’s Malta. 

Established in 2014, the company has quickly become one of the country’s leading Public Cultural Organisations, at the forefront of Malta’s contemporary art scene.

For eight years, the company has pioneered fresh thinking about contemporary dance in the Maltese Islands and raised the profile of dance exponentially. We work with the best dancers and choreographers from Malta and around the globe to create productions that are bold and current and of a world-class standard.

ŻfinMalta provides a space for artists to develop and take risks, contributing to an open and expansive dance ecology in Malta and internationally, and providing opportunities for aspiring, emerging and established dance professionals to realise their potential.

ŻfinMalta productions are always collaborative, engaging choreographers, set and costume designers, composers and visual artists from Malta and internationally, and partnering with other organisations in theatre, opera, music and the visual arts.

Our work invites audiences to contemplate and question our contemporary world, with the ambition to enrich the lives of all who interact with the company – audiences, collaborators and participants alike.

Artistic Director Paolo Mangiola joined the company in its third season, and has been instrumental in establishing its place in the region and further afield in the international dance community. Mangiola’s vision for the company is supported by his own credentials and profile as a choreographer, dance educator and performer.

Name: Dance Network Association
Description: Dance Network Association is a dance organisation that supports people to live more connected, joyful and aspirational lives through dancing.

Name: Fundamentally Dance
Description: Leading the way in independent dance production, Fundamentally Dance is revolutionising the art form through innovative audience experiences and the delivery of end-to-end dance services on a global scale.

Name: Dans- sport- en evenementcentrum Swing-inn
Description: Naast het feit dat wij reguliere danslessen geven, is het bij Swing-inn tevens mogelijk om de sfeervolle zalen per dag, dagdeel of zelfs per uur te huren. Onze dansruimtes zijn perfect om in alle rust trainingen en presentaties te geven of vergaderingen te houden.

Name: World Folkfest
Description: 5 Night Festival featuring over 250 International folk dance performers from all over the world, an array of cultural food truck cuisine, a photo op station, kids activities, craft booths, giveaways, and incredible preshows. Since 1986, this outdoor festival has been dedicated to promoting and preserving global folk history and folklore heritage and offers a unique opportunity for people of all ages to learn about and interact with diverse people from all over the globe. - Volunteer-based nonprofit organization.

Name: For The Love Of Dance
Description: At For The Love of Dance School we help children to pursue their dreams of dance by providing them with a quality and well-rounded dance educational experience through leadership and the arts.

Name: Viva La Danse
Description: A Viva La Danse é uma escola de dança, nascida da antiga escola CDJ, existente no mercado há mais de 19 anos, atuando no segmento do ensino da dança na região de Jacarepaguá.

Name: Compagnie par Terre / Anne Nguyen
Description:
Fondée par la danseuse, chorégraphe, auteure et metteuse en scène Anne Nguyen, la Compagnie par Terre présente depuis 2005 des spectacles de danse et de théâtre-danse en France et à l’international. 

Nommée Chevalier de l'Ordre des Arts et des Lettres en 2015, lauréate du Prix Nouveau Talent Chorégraphie SACD en 2013, Anne Nguyen a été artiste associée à Chaillot – Théâtre national de la Danse de 2015 à 2018. En 2022/2023, la Compagnie par Terre / Anne Nguyen est associée au Théâtre Molière -> Sète scène nationale archipel de Thau (34), à L’Auditorium Seynod (74) et au Centre d’Art et de Culture de Meudon (92). Elle est complice de l’Orange Bleue d’Eaubonne (95).

Les spectacles d’Anne Nguyen ont été présentés sur de nombreuses scènes et dans de prestigieux festivals comme le Holland Festival à Amsterdam, le Festival Tanz im August à Berlin, le festival Crossing The Line à New-York, le Festival OzAsia à Adélaïde, le Festival URB à Helsinki, le Festival Tanz Bremen, le Festival de Huê au Vietnam, le Festival Dies de Dansa à Barcelone ou encore le Festival d’Avignon.

Name: Newport Contemporary Ballet
Description:
Overview

Newport Contemporary Ballet (NCB) is a non-profit, professional, contemporary ballet company with a long history of enriching the cultural fabric of communities throughout Rhode Island, the region, and the world. The company creates and presents, relevant, visceral, and engaging dance works by a diverse group of the worlds’ leading choreographers and collaborating artists.  In addition to works created for traditional stages, NCB is widely known for its unique approach to experiential and site- specific performances. NCB also runs The Academy at Newport Contemporary Ballet, a pre-professional school offering adult, youth and core ballet programs, and provides an arts-integrated, in-school learning program called Dancing Through Boundaries serving 4,500 kids across Newport County annually.

Name: Le Carré des Lombes / Danièle Desnoyers
Description:
Figure incontournable de la danse canadienne, Danièle Desnoyers est directrice artistique du Carré des Lombes, compagnie fondée à Montréal en 1989. Son répertoire, constitué d’une vingtaine d’œuvres, notamment Discordantia, Concerto grosso pour corps et surface métallique, Duos pour corps et instruments, Là où je vis, Dévorer le ciel, Paradoxe Mélodie et Unfold | 7 perspectives, témoigne d’une pratique profondément ancrée sur le mouvement et d’un dialogue riche et constant entre le langage du corps, la musique, le son et l’espace. Depuis plus de 30 ans, son travail, présenté principalement sur les scènes canadiennes et européennes, est traversé par l’idée de rencontres avec de multiples collaborateurs et interprètes parmi les plus marquant.e.s de la scène montréalaise.

Plus récemment, la chorégraphe décloisonne sa propre discipline et réalise de multiples projets atypiques tels que le cycle Les Scénographies-Paysages, réalisées dans des environnements naturels. Elle œuvre également sur des cocréations ainsi que sur des commandes chorégraphiques, comme celle qu’elle réalise pour la compagnie italienne Aterballetto en 2022. L’enseignement et la transmission sont indissociables de la démarche artistique de Danièle Desnoyers. Parallèlement à ses activités de création, cette artiste-pédagogue enseigne au Département de danse de l’Université du Québec à Montréal — son alma mater —, dont elle a été directrice de 2019 à 2022, en plus de concevoir des dispositifs de recherche destinés à des créateurs, interprètes et chorégraphes, intitulés Compagnonnage.

Name: Rapty.app
Description:
Rapty.app is a mobile dance game where users can share their dance moves as digital collectible emotes to be used in the game itself and in the metaverse. (Imagine: Travis Scott show in Fortnite done in web3 metaverse with unlimited number of dance moves available for the users at a click of a button).

A 50 seconds video worth a 1000 words: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T-5vmYJ0uQ4 

Rapty.app is being created by experts in digital products, Web3 and game industry.

Each of our co-founders have more than 17+ years of experience in their fields.

Let's make web3 dance revolution together!

     

Pre-seed stage, fundraising.

#gamefi #play2earn #move2earn #dance2earn #socialfi #web3

Name: Swell Dance
Description:
Swell Dance essaie de redonner un accès très simple au plaisir de danser tous ensemble, au quotidien, sans attendre 2h du matin ni le prochain Burning Man.

Aujourd'hui nous organisons des événements de danse à Paris, et aimerions plus tard avoir notre propre lieu dédié à la danse libre.

Name: Latin Groove
Description:
At Latin Groove, you can learn the different Latin dances, as well as other dance styles related to Latin American culture. Classes are taught by professional and experienced instructors, and provide basic classes for beginners and advanced classes for more experienced dancers. 

Classes are offered in groups or privately, and students can learn to dance in a variety of styles, including in pairs or in groups. Latin Groove also offers dance events, dance parties and competitions for students to practice their skills and meet other Latin dance enthusiasts. 

Latin Groove is a place where people can learn and practice dance, meet new people, and immerse themselves in urban and Latin American culture through dance.

Name: Compagnie S'Poart
Description:
L’histoire de la compagnie est avant tout une aventure humaine et collective qui débute en 1996. Suite à de nombreuses collaborations artistiques avec les compagnies Käfig et Accrorap, elle devient professionnelle en 2001 avec son spectacle "Extra Luna", qui fut joué plus de quatre-vingt fois en France et à l’étranger.

Fort de ce succès, le travail de la compagnie S’Poart évolue de création en création, alternant entre créations et shows : "Etre Ange" (2005), "Vibrations" (2005), "Toi et Moi et Moi et Toi" (2007), "In Vivo" (2007), "Na Grani" (2010), "Instable" (2012), "Rock it Daddy" (2013), "Una" (2013), "Rouge" (2014), "Traces" (2015), "R" (2015), "Crossover" (2017) et "Butterfly" (2019), "Les yeux fermés" (2020), "Rage, the Flower Thrower" (2020), "Vivantes" (2023).
Le travail de la compagnie évolue au fil du temps et se nourrit des collaborations de chacun avec des artistes du cirque, du théâtre, de la musique et bien évidemment de la danse.

Name: L.A. Dance Project
Description:
L.A. Dance Project (LADP) expands the boundaries of dance as an art form and redefines how we interact and relate with movement in the modern world. Informed by collaborative partnerships with traditional and emerging artists, performance work, commissions, residencies, and community programming, our mission is to inspire, create, educate and change perspectives through the accessible and transformative power of dance in Los Angeles and around the world.

“LA is where our work is created and where it is first presented. LADP is a live art experience, it is now, more than ever, an antidote to our society.” - Benjamin Millepied

Name: Hollywood Vibe Dance Convention
Description:
Founded in 1998 Hollywood Vibe continues it’s mission to bring you the most knowledgable and inspirational Dance Educators touring today! They also just happen to be some of the busiest working choreographers and dancers in the Dance Industry!  We are thrilled to bring you a faculty that will exceed your expectations and give you a convention experience like no other.

They have worked and are currently working on top rated shows such as Dancing with the Stars, Ellen, America’s Got Talent, So You Think You Can Dance,The Goldbergs, and have appeared in Wicked, Bunned Heads, Shake It Up, Grease Live, Teen Beach Movie, Glee, Mobbed, Good Morning America, The Tonight Show, Scrubs, She’s All That, That Thing You Do, General Hospital and more.

They have also choreographed for the biggest stars including Justin Beiber, JLo, Nick Jonas, Backstreet Boys, Madonna, Michael Jackson and appeared in the latest movies, music videos, national tours, and live stage productions.  Even though our faculty continues to work with some of the biggest stars in the entertainment industry they have not forgotten how to inspire and educate all dancers to be the best they can be.

Hollywood Vibe is here to encourage tomorrow’s professional dancers and give every attendee, regardless of their goal, inspiration to keep dancing!

Name: École Feeling Danse
Description:
L’école de danse Feeling Danse est une école présente à Nantes Est.
Nous nous adressons aux adultes et enfants souhaitant pratiquer les danses de salon standard ou latines, la Salsa, le rock’n roll, le Jive et le West Coast Swing dans une ambiance chaleureuse et conviviale.

Name: SalsaRehab
Description:
Welcome to Salsa Rehab, where every step is a step towards inclusivity, fun, and wellness in physical activity! Salsa Rehab is not just a salsa dancing school; it's a vibrant community that celebrates the joy of Latin dancing and culture across Canada. With thriving locations in Thompson, Manitoba, Ottawa, Ontario, and our exciting new hub in Timmins, Ontario, we're spreading the love for salsa from coast to coast.

At the heart of Salsa Rehab is our mission to create a fun and safe environment for everyone to dive into the world of Latin dancing. Our lessons are infused with energy, passion, and a genuine respect for the arts. We're more than just a dance school; we're advocates for bringing people together to share in the beauty of Latin culture.

Leading our dynamic team is a remarkable Colombian-Canadian physiotherapy student who not only brings authenticity to our lessons with firsthand knowledge of Latin dance and culture but also applies their expertise as a kinesiologist/physical activity specialist to ensure that all movements are safe, accessible, and health-promoting. This unique blend of skills ensures that our classes are not just about learning salsa but also about embracing an active lifestyle in the most joyful way possible.

Salsa Rehab is built on three core values:

Respect for the Arts: We honor the rich traditions of Latin dance and music, ensuring they're represented authentically and passionately.

A Sense of Community: Salsa Hubs is more than a dance studio; it's a family. We foster a supportive atmosphere where friendships blossom, and everyone feels welcomed.

Openness to Learn: Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned dancer, we believe there's always something new to discover. Our classes encourage curiosity and growth, both in dance skills and personal development.

Join us at Salsa Rehab, where every dance step is a celebration of culture, health, and community.

Name: Rendez-Vous Dance
Description:
Rendez-Vous dance is the contemporary dance company led by award-winning choreographer Mathieu Geffré. Our core mission is to engage with LGBTQIA+ themes and voices throughout our activity.

Rendez-Vous is a vessel for the expression of a choreographic voice articulating values of equity, diversity and representation with great physicality, intricacy and virtuosity. 
 
Our practice of dance has no specific age ,gender, ethnicity or cultural boundaries: it is universal.

Name: Breath of Life Dance Ministry
Description: Dance is the instrument God gave us to reach youth, so that they can come to know Jesus, His love, and His salvation. We are missionaries focused on reaching at-risk youth, trapped in drugs and alcohol, marginalized, and looking to be involved in positive activities. We serve in the communities God calls us to in order to offer these Christian opportunities in the arts, where no other options seem to be present. These youth are hungry for guidance, hope, belonging, and growth in their talents.

Name: Danceport
Description: Located in Yarmouth Port, MA - Danceport is Cape Cod’s newest destination for dance. Our modern studio offers high-quality training for youth, teen, and adult dancers in a welcoming, professional environment. Its features include a state-of-the-art sprung marley floor, full-wall mirrors, and professional barres for safe, technical growth.

Name: KINISI
Description:
KINISI is a dance and choreographic project with embodied sensemaking at its core. The practice of dancing and organizing movement, informs the activities and works that KINISI develops and engages with.

KINISI operates with the belief that moving teaches us about ourselves in this world, where dance and choreography create the frame for that knowledge to be viewed, shared and experienced.

Curiosity to unfold the experiences and knowledge produced by moving, framed and presented as works, events and happenings, drives the project.

The project has an investigative approach allowing the logic making that occurs when engaged with movement, dance and choreography to create the aesthetics, concepts and audience relations that define each work.
KINISI believes and practices a holistic approach to creation and production, where all parts and all members of production are seen as integral, necessary and interconnected in relation to each work.

KINISI does not differentiate in its approach, but operates within, but not limited to, a contemporary dance and cross-disciplinary context.

KINISI is organized as an association, founded in 2022. KINISI’s board consists of Bente Larsen, Marie Mors and Mads Holten Bonke and is administrated by Astrid Gravsholt. Tim Matiakis is the artistic director of KINISI.

KINISI is supported by The Danish Arts Foundation, Bikuben Foundation, William Demant Foundation, Augustinus Foundation, Wilhelm Hansen Foundation, Beckett Foundation and Knud Højgaards Foundation.

Name: STUDIO CONECTARTE
Description:
STUDIO CONECTARTE 
Un espacio con accesibilidad a la danza y al entrenamiento físico, que brinda calidad, profesionalidad, técnica y disciplina. La mayor parte de nuestros alumnos nos eligen para la preparación de ingreso a las universidades, becas de estudio, festivales y competencias nacionales e internacionales.
 
La accesibilidad económica hace que formarse y adquirir conocimientos sea posible.
Location: Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires, CABA

Name: Studio 22: A Ballroom & Social Dance Club
Description:
Our expert pros are here to coach, teach, encourage, motivate - whatever you need to meet your goals.  With over 120 group classes each month, weekly socials, master classes & workshops, private & wedding lessons, showcases, & outings, there's something for everyone.

Every day, our students dance to build confidence, meet new people, burn calories, release stress, get inspired, and transform their lives.

Our 90-minute adult partner classes are offered in beginning through competitive levels, and include Salsa, Swing, Tango, Country Western, Ballroom, Latin, & more styles. You don't need a partner or experience to get started - come as you are, and we'll have you out on the dance floor in no time.

Get connected, learn to dance, and bring movement to your life!

Name: SDS Star Dance Studio
Description:
Star Dance Studio es la única escuela de Cornellà de Llobregat autorizada por el Departament d’Ensenyament de la Generalitat de Catalunya,
en la modalidad de danza. Instalaciones con más de 1.000 m2 de adaptados a cada una de las disciplinas de baile donde podrás aprender y bailar. En Star Dance Studio contamos con un fantástico equipo de profesores que te enseñarán las mejores disciplinas de baile.

Name: DanceMakers Inc
Description: We're a dance convention and competition, but we are more than that. We are a movement. We want you to feel at home. A part of the family. Everyone who comes through our doors should feel the love of every person on our faculty and staff. It is our mission to create an atmosphere that promotes creativity. self-awareness, individuality, discipline, inspiration and love. We teach dance classes, but more importantly we teach life classes. Our goal is for young people to go home as better versions of themselves. It is not about looking good. It is about making people feel like they are worth looking at.

Name: elev8.dance
Description:
elev8.dance is the most comprehensive cloud-based competition management software designed for the dance industry.

Competition owners using elev8.dance will save time and money after switching from paper entries or using spreadsheet software like Excel to plan dance competitions.  With elev8.dance, a conflict free schedule can be created and competitions can generate additional revenue by using our app. elev8.dance is simple to use and dance competition organizers are guaranteed to save time.

elev8.dance offers a free mobile app allowing participants and audience members to receive live updates while attending elev8 events.

Come explore how elev8.dance can make dance festivals and competitions even better by booking a demo at www.elev8.dance

Name: Phoenix Arts
Description:
DANCE CLASSES FOR EVERYONE!
Phoenix Arts is an all inclusive, all ability dance studio located in
Blue Bell, Pa. 
We offer a wide range of classes for all ages.

Name: Beat Breakers
Description: BTBS, the BeatBreakers, is the official dance club of NIT Jamshedpur. This dynamic group is dedicated to exploring various dance forms, from hip-hop to classical, and showcases their talents in cultural festivals and competitions. The club fosters creativity, teamwork, and a passion for dance among its members, contributing to the vibrant campus life at NIT Jamshedpur.

Name: Ladies of Hip-Hop
Description:
Starting in 2004, this annual Hip-Hop festival puts the focuses on women and their relationship with Hip-Hop culture. Ladies of Hip-Hop Festival exists to develop and provide women with positive roles that are present and represented within the Hip-Hop culture. Traditionally, men have dominated all facets of the hip-hop scene, but Ladies of Hip-Hop Festival changes this tradition and puts women center-stage for the entire event.

The festival is an event given by women, for women. Each year an elite group of female artists from around the world are selected to exhibit work, teach, and perform as part of the festival. The artists have extensive experience and understanding of the Hip-Hop culture and are qualified to pass on the traditions of Hip-Hop culture with accuracy and authenticity. Through education, performance and community exchanges this annual Hip-Hop festival puts the focuses on women and their relationship with Hip-Hop culture. Traditionally, men have dominated all facets of the hip-hop scene, but Ladies of Hip-Hop changes this tradition and puts women center-stage for the entire event.

Name: Indiscernable - Spectacle vivant & films de danse
Description:
Indiscernable est basée à Rennes en Bretagne. Son ambition principale est de sortir la danse contemporaine de son cadre scénique. C’est à la fois une structure de production et de création, ainsi qu’une compagnie.

Indiscernable développe des projets où la danse s’allie avec d’autres formes artistiques telles que le cinéma, la musique, la photographie, ou encore l’architecture. L’une de ses spécialités est la valorisation du patrimoine par le biais de créations chorégraphiques adaptées à chaque espace. Sortir la danse du cadre de la scène, l’amener dans des espaces particuliers ou la présenter à travers des films permet de porter un autre regard sur la création chorégraphique, tout en allant à la rencontre de nouveaux spectateurs.

Name: Rave Festival
Description: Rave Festival

Name: One-O-One
Description: The Dance club of Plaksha features 3 amazing departments: Western, Indian Classical and Bhangra. Stay tuned for more updates!

Name: Svendborg BalletTeater
Description:
Store ballet oplevelser for alle
Svendborg BalletTeater er det eneste professionelle klassiske balletkompagni udenfor København.

Vi producerer professionelle ballet forestillinger af høj international klasse, specielt lavet til mindre scener og mere utraditionelle scener, som ellers aldrig vil kunne få besøg af professionelle klassiske balletforestillinger.

Det er vores vision at ballet som kunstart skal ud til et bredere publikum, end dem der normalt har adgang til denne kunstart.

Name: Indy Dance Council
Description: We exist to collect and grow all things dance in the greater Indianapolis region. Our work connects dance students, professionals, educators, and supporters from all disciplines, age groups, cultures, and abilities through their common passion. We want to let everyone know about all of the wonderful ways and places they can experience dance in Indianapolis and make great dance easier to find and support.

Name: Muévete Dance Studio
Description:
Muévete Dance Studio es una escuela de danza que imparte danzas urbanas y baile moderno. Con varios grupos de competición de danzas urbanas.

Nuestro objetivo es fomentar la práctica de la danza como deporte y que todo el mundo tenga acceso a una formación de calidad en el mundo del baile.

Name: Elite Diamonds Cheer & Dance
Description: Elite Diamonds, LLC is a locally owned and operated company that offers classes in cheerleading, dance, and tumbling. We also are available for camps and private lessons. Our services are open to boys and girls ages 3-15. We are now servicing Charlotte and all surrounding areas. Our main goal is to provide quality services at affordable prices. Elite Diamonds' primary focus is to promote positive attitudes, teamwork, and physical fitness as well as overall fun through our classes!!

Name: Early Era Collective
Description: Early Era Collective’s mission is to present multiform art featuring diverse perspectives for diverse audiences. We believe that professional creative work is strongest when collaboratively made by artists with a variety of training, expertise, lived experience, and world views. Early Era is comprised of dancers (trained in contemporary, hip-hop, tap, and more), filmmakers, spoken word artists, actors, and singers. Our social justice art emphasizes personal stories over politics.

Name: Bella Ballerina of Longwood
Description:
Orlando's premier dance studio offering ballet, jazz and tap with storybook themes! Tiny toes are our passion! Watch your little one glow and giggle with delight as storybook adventures come to life on the dance floor! Bella Ballerina's classes offer a delightful and educational experience like no other! Classes are structured around storybooks and fairy tale themes, allowing our ballerinas the freedom to explore dance through imagination, movement, and fun! From our littlest ballerinas to our big girls, each class is engaging, age-appropriate, light, and high-energy. Your child will be awestruck when they step into our space...
It's a child's dream come true! Come see what all the fuss is about...

Name: La Planke
Description: La Planke est la première école de danse ELECTRO, fondée conjointement par les danseurs Brandon Masele (Miel) et Achraf Bouzefour (HFLOW). Le parcours scolaire dure deux ans à la suite d'un examen d'admission. 2 promotions ont déjà bénéficié de l'enseignement de la Planke.

Name: BeatLoop - Flow Seamlessly
Description:
Onbeat is a looping tool specifically for dancers, choreographers, and dance teachers. 
The app addresses the inefficiencies of using general music players for repetitive dance practice in live classes and the goal is to provide a more efficient and improved way to practice and teach choreography

Name: KC Bhangra
Description:
Bhangra is a traditional folk dance that originated in the Punjab region of India and Pakistan. Initially performed during the harvest season to celebrate the farmers' hard work and the arrival of the harvest, Bhangra has evolved into a lively and energetic dance that is now performed at various celebrations, including weddings and festivals.

Over time, Bhangra has also gained international recognition and has been adapted into various forms, including fusion styles that blend traditional Bhangra with other dance genres.

Name: Dance Lab
Description: No frills elite dance training with an edge. Stay on trend, in demand, and at the top of your game, wherever you choose to compete or perform. Whether you are looking to prepare for your high school dance team, tryout for an all star program, go for the goal of dancing in college or if you simply want to learn new skills... Dance Lab is your go to training experience.

Name: Alborada Spanish Dance Theatre
Description: Through dance, drama, and music, Alborada's passionate artistry reveals the diverse and historical threads comprising the multicultural fabric of Spanish culture. Both entertaining and educational, the variety of its repertoire runs the artistic gamut from Spanish Gypsie Flamenco and Spanish classical and regional dances to cross cultural program celebrating Hispanic, Celtic and Moorish cultural influences and beyond.

Name: Mind & Move Academy
Description: Mind & Move versterkt de mentale weerbaarheid en zelfvertrouwen van jongeren. Ontwikkeld door A Nin Movements.

Name: Compagnie TERPSICHORE
Description:
La Compagnie TERPSICHORE est une association située à Rosny-sous-Bois (93110), créée en 1992 par Valérie WATREMEZ (chorégraphe) qui depuis partage sa passion de la danse, sa créativité et sa bonne humeur avec les Rosnéens.

 𝘛𝘌𝘙𝘗𝘚𝘐𝘊𝘏𝘖𝘙𝘌 : 𝘔𝘶𝘴𝘦 𝘥𝘦 𝘭𝘢 𝘋𝘢𝘯𝘴𝘦 𝘥𝘢𝘯𝘴 𝘭𝘢 𝘮𝘺𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘭𝘰𝘨𝘪𝘦 𝘨𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘲𝘶𝘦, 𝘧𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘦 𝘥𝘦 𝘡𝘦𝘶𝘴 𝘦𝘵 𝘥𝘦 𝘔𝘯𝘦́𝘮𝘰𝘴𝘺𝘯𝘦. 𝘚𝘪𝘨𝘯𝘪𝘧𝘪𝘦 « 𝘲𝘶𝘪 𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘳𝘦́𝘤𝘪𝘦 𝘭𝘢 𝘥𝘢𝘯𝘴𝘦 » 𝘦𝘯 𝘨𝘳𝘦𝘤.

 La Compagnie TERPSICHORE compte une centaine d’adhérents chaque année (102 en 2023). Ils sont répartis en 3 sections : 
 DANSE - Créations chorégraphiques. 
 Enfants dès 5 ans, ados et adultes.
 EVEIL à la danse et aux rythmes.
 Enfants de 3 à 5 ans.
 FITNESS - Maintien et remise en forme.
 Ados dès 16 ans, adultes et seniors.

Les adhérents sont répartis en différents groupes mixtes, d’âges et de niveaux différents, qui se réunissent chaque semaine pour danser et/ou se défouler sur des musiques rythmées ou pleines d'émotions.

 La Compagnie TERPSICHORE présente chaque année un spectacle auquel participent tous les adhérents de la section Danse (dès 5 ans) et certains adhérents volontaires de la section Fitness.

Name: NRITYANGANA  DANCE ACADEMY FOR BHARATNATYAM
Description: Typically,a Class Begins With Warm-ups Exrcises That Students Body To  Learn Movements Of Dance .

Name: GC Dance Company
Description: Established in 2017, GC Dance Company is a leading institution in dance education, located in San Marcos, California. Specializing in tailored technique classes for ages 2-19, our mission is to provide a secure, positive, and personalized learning environment. Guided by core values such as honesty, commitment, communication, and loyalty, we offer a dynamic platform for personal and professional growth.

Name: Phaymus Dance Entertainment
Description:
Founded in 2004 by Kevin Owens, Jermaine Curtis, and Laura Ononibaku.  Phaymus Dance Entertainment is a co-ed hip-hop based dance company known for their high energy performances on Boston College's campus.

Phaymus has appeared on BET's 106 & Park, New York City's Blaze the Stage, Ne-Yo's Up Close & Personal Tour, and even placed 1st in 2013 at Boston College's Showdown!

Catch us performing on campus throughout the year at events such as SEASA Dance Showcase, Week of Dance, ALC Showdown, and more!

Name: RC Latin Dance Club
Description: As the RC Latin Dance Club, we learn bachata and salsa, perform, and compete in various festivals.

Name: Hip-Hop Dance Club CSU
Description:
A recreational hip-hop dance club from Colorado State University, we seek to educate and inform students about Hip Hop culture, history, fundamentals, dance skills, and community. We strive to create an inclusive and welcoming environment where club members can learn to communicate and express themselves through the art of dance.

Instagram: @hiphopdanceclubcsu

Name: MARCAT DANCE
Description: Compañía de danza contemporánea dirigida por Mario Bermúdez y Catherine Coury con sede en Vilches (Jaén).

Name: STREET ART STUDIO BAYONNE / ANGLET
Description:
École de danse, Évènementiel, Location de salle

L’Association Street Art a été créée en 2009 par Tony Le Guilly danseur, chorégraphe, et professeur professionnel formé en culture chorégraphique hip hop par une des plus grandes compagnies française de danse hip hop.

Son objectif est de promouvoir la culture hip-hop à travers l’organisation de projets, de spectacles, d’ateliers d’initiation, ainsi que de stages d’apprentissage et de perfectionnement. 

Leur indéniable talent dans cette discipline leur a permis de remporter un grand nombre de récompenses.

Afin de pouvoir partager cette passion et d'avoir la possibilité de l'entretenir, les danseurs et passionnés de cette culture ont fait le choix de se constituer en association (loi 1901). 

Ils dispensent des cours à plus de 200 élèves de 4 à 55 ans.

L’association a également participé à diverses manifestations organisées par la ville de Bayonne, telles que la journée des enfants des fêtes de Bayonne, fêtes de la musique, ateliers à l’espace social municipal, représentation match de l’aviron Bayonnais Top 14, intervention dans les écoles, Agenda 21, Galas au théâtre de Bayonne, marché de noël, marché médiéval, divers évènements autour de la culture Hip Hop...

Ce que Street Art met en place :
Depuis plus de 15 ans, Street Art met en place des cours, des stages et des spectacles de hip hop qui regroupent à la fois de la danse mais aussi des arts urbains.

Depuis peu de temps Street Art a ses propres salles de danse à Bayonne et Anglet dans lesquelles elle accueille ses élèves pour les cours et stages délivrés par les professeurs de l’association et des danseurs internationaux.

Suivez-nous sur les réseaux :
Insta : @streetartstudio64
Facebook : Street Art Studio

Name: Nayika School of Dance
Description: At Nayika School of Dance, we believe in the transformative power of dance. Our school, founded by Raveena Singh, is committed to introducing the timeless beauty of Indian classical dance to everyone. We offer a range of courses that aim to make the rich cultural heritage of India accessible through the art of Kathak dance.

Name: United States Dancesport Championships
Description:
Top Teacher cash prizes total $100,000 AND are spread amongst all Top Teachers—you don’t have to be 1st place to take home money.

Home of the Jane Chiang Scholarship: we are the only event world that rewards Top Pro-Am students with a cash prize of $20,000.

The ONLY place in the world where you can be a US National Dancesport Champion.

Name: UofT Jhalak Student Club
Description: UofT Jhalak is a dance team specializing in South Asian classical and folk dances, Bollywood, Hip-Hop and more!

Name: Noreste Ballet Company
Description:
Noreste Ballet Company’s motto is “A Classical Ballet Company Without Barriers.” Everyone at all experience levels is welcome to join NBC. We are a resource for anyone interested in Classical Ballet who wants a way to perfect their technique and perform. NBC makes Classical Ballet accessible to those who could not continue or have never begun.

We hold no-cut auditions for performances at the end of each semester. These performances are derived from Ballet pieces such as The Nutcracker, Swan Lake, Aurora, Giselle, and more. 

Our dancers perform en pointe and en flat depending on previous experience.

Name: Bring It To C.I.C
Description:
Bring It To C.I.C is a Birmingham-based Community Interest Company using dance, fitness and creative storytelling to build confidence, wellbeing and community connection. 
We design and deliver high-quality training, school and youth programmes, and public productions that create safer, healthier pathways for children, young people and adults.

What we do:

Education & Youth Programmes: curriculum-aligned workshops, after-school clubs, safeguarding-led mentoring and holiday provision.

Community Productions: city-wide casts, paid roles for creatives, low-waste sets/costume and accessible ticketing.

Industry Training: elite training groups, weekly classes, career mentoring and performance opportunities.

Wellbeing & Prevention: mental-health informed practice, positive identity, physical activity, and diversion from risk.

Impact snapshot (2025)

79 community performers trained across Birmingham, Manchester, London, Coventry & Northampton

200+ audience members reached through Set It Off: Empower Her with civic/media stakeholders in attendance

Inclusive casting, mixed-ability training and paid commissions for local creatives

Safeguarding partnerships that signpost participants into support and progression routes

Who we work with:
Schools & colleges, Local Authorities, Children’s Trusts, youth services, arts venues, brands and funders who share our belief that dance can be a pathway to skills, health and opportunity.

Governance & safety:
CIC with Board oversight, enhanced DBS-checked staff, risk assessments, and GDPR-compliant data practices.

Let’s partner:
Commission workshops, co-create a programme, or sponsor a production. Email: info@bringitto.co.uk

Name: Nottingham Lindy Hop
Description:
Nottingham Lindy Hop hosts regular Lindy Hop, Vernacular Jazz, Charleston, and Balboa classes and events in Sneinton, Nottingham.  

You can find more details about our classes and events at our website or our main socials, Facebook & Instagram, and we also have a small presence on TikTok, ‘Twitter’ and Threads. 

We also have a diary page sharing details of relevant live music and swing events in Nottingham and further afield.

Name: Académie de Ballet Christy
Description:
Nous sommes une école de ballet classique à Québec offrant plusieurs styles de danse : ballet, contemporain, claquette et jazz.
Nous offrons également un programme de loisirs dès l’âge de 3 ans et un programme Intensif de ballet dès l’âge de 6 ans. 

L’Académie de Ballet Christy est membre du Réseau d’Enseignement de la Danse (RED) ce qui assure la qualité des formations et des cours qu’elle offre. 

Ayant près de 200 danseurs et danseuses, nous présentons deux spectacles par année utilisant un grand répertoire de ballets classiques connus tels que Casse-Noisette, La Belle au Bois Dormant, Cendrillon, Coppélia et le Lac des cygnes.

Au plaisir de vous rencontrer!

Name: Arthur Murray Lakeview
Description: THERE’S NEVER BEEN A BETTER TIME TO LEARN DANCE – AND NEVER A BETTER PLACE! At Arthur Murray Dance Center of Lakeview, our talented instructors and proven teaching methods will have you on the floor in no time. Experience the grace and excitement of this timeless social activity with programs that are customized to fit your unique goals and schedule. Whether you’re preparing for an upcoming event, want to stand out on the dancefloor, or simply want to move with greater confidence, we are the place for you!

Name: VerbzAcademy
Description: At Verbz Street Dance Academy, we’re more than just a dance studio; we’re a community that thrives on the beat of street dance and the art of movement. Our passion for dance knows no bounds, and we’re here to ignite your love for rhythm, creativity, and self-expression.

Name: The Jam Movement
Description:
The Jam Movement a.k.a. "Jam!" ///

Dance collective est. 2009 hailing from Bristol, UK & beyond; bringing people together & taking them beyond through jams, events & workshops...

The story. ///

Inspired by the social & cultural anthropology of various underground phenomenon's - especially Hip-Hop & it's use of music, dance, art & word - "Jam!" was founded by Yoshi SBX & co-founded by Kieran 'King K' Warner in 2009, who started organising jams on the streets of Bristol, to empower & re-invigorate the local dance scene - regardless of age, race, sex, class, beliefs & so on - through the ethos of sharing, play & kinship with "each one teach one" being the main motto. Thus, a collective of dance artists were bonded, with an aim to help unite, build & sustain the heart, soul & spirit of dance culture with each other & their respective worlds.

Forever honouring the humble roots of its beginnings on the street, "Jam!" now also host jams & events in Bristol 'til this day, whilst helping other communities start-up their own projects across the country, while touring & battling at shows & events around the world, working with all who share the same passion & spirit of dance.

Love & thanks to all who've ever joined us on this ultimate journey, however long or short, in your many, many ways. We hope you enjoy this as much as we do.

One love from 2009 'til infinity, "Jam!"

Name: Bollyqueer
Description: An LGBTQIA+ Bollywood dance team available for bookings at a wide range of events. We've performed and hosted workshops for staff socials, South Asian Heritage Month, LGBTQIA+ History Month, Pride Month, Diwali, Melas, Festivals, Weddings and much more!

Name: MARKADAS Saint-Priest
Description: L'école de danse MARKADAS Saint-Priest, ouverte depuis 1982, développe son offre et ouvre des créneaux dédiés aux entreprises ! Vous souhaitez vous dépenser durant vos pauses déjeuners, organiser des séminaires et créer une cohésion d'entreprise, organiser des afterwork ? Nous saurons trouver la formule qui vous convient !

Name: Sanura Dance
Description: Welcome to Sanura Dance – where rhythm meets revolution!  Join our transformative salsa and bachata workshops in this feminist, FLINTA-focused LGBTQ+ space.  Embrace the power of inclusive dance, learn to lead and follow with pride. Let's create a world where every step is a statement. #DanceRevolution #InclusiveQueerSpaces

Name: BWDC (Brian Webb Dance Company)
Description:
Established in 1979, the Brian Webb Dance Company’s (BWDC) annual seasons of contemporary dance celebrate THE ADVENTURE OF THE NEW!
We have always been motivated by our community. Our many collaborations have always reflected our local arts community. These dance events have been performed at home, across Canada and in the United States. In 1991, the BWDC began presenting other dance artists’ creations. We have been motivated by the diversity of dance created across Canada.
The many ways that the moving body may reflect its individual aliveness in the here and now, and the many ways it may express itself without boundaries is beautiful.
Our seasons celebrate this beauty as a most multifaceted expression of life!
Whether it is in our own creative processes or in the curation of dance seasons, we work to engage people through a broad definition of community in local, regional, national and global contexts.
Our communities are diverse with many points of view, and many cultural, social and personal perspectives at play, interacting with each other. This serious play is a prime motivator for us.
The BWDC is a community player. We see dance as a very broad definition of the body moving in time and space. Every person who feels the beat of their heart knows what dancing is.

Name: MARAT DAUKAYEV SCHOOL OF BALLET
Description: Founded in 2001 by Marat and Pamela Daukayev, the Marat Daukayev School of Ballet’s mission is to provide training based on the Vaganova method, devised by the Russian dancer Agrippina Vaganova (1879–1951). It fuses elements of traditional French style from the romantic era with the athleticism and virtuosity of Italian technique. Students who study ballet at MDSB will acquire physical coordination, self-confidence, and a love for the arts that will benefit them throughout their lives.

Name: Fusion Dhamaka
Description: With vibrant choreography, traditional and contemporary elements, we captivate audiences with our energetic performances!

Name: Conflux Dance Theater
Description: Conflux Dance Theater is a local, Richmond based, contemporary dance company founded in 2022 and co-directed by Miguel Perez and Angelica Burgos.  Our company nurtures creativity and talent in one another, celebrates the diversity of our community and dancers, and creates compelling pieces that evoke emotion in our audiences.

Name: Paradox-Sal
Description: Paradox-Sal is an all-female group characterised by the diversity of the dance styles of its members, who were deliberately brought together by a choreographer, Ousmane Sy, known as Babson, on a shared music style and dance technique: house.

Name: Kinematix Dance Troupe
Description: Founded in 2006, Kinematix is a Northeastern University dance troupe. The team recognizes dance as a powerful, evolving culture and provides a channel for students to grow in that richness. Kinematix strives to deepen the talents of its members, promote social collaboration within Northeastern and the Boston community, and create a supportive and nurturing environment. Through performances and choreography Kinematix aspires to extend its horizons and to inspire others through music and “bodies in motion."

Name: Karolinka Polish Song and Dance Company
Description:
Karolinka is a large, award winning, South London based Polish song and dance company. It was established in 1978 by Maura Kutereba and Jurek Pockert as a result of a group of young people coming together, wishing to celebrate and promote their Polish cultural heritage. The current artistic director is Jolanta Kutereba, Maura's daughter. 

For 46 years, Karolinka has travelled nationally and internationally, performing at a wide variety of corporate and private events, festivals and competitions where the group has achieved wide acclaim, won awards and gained invitations to high profile events, especially in Poland. The group has made numerous television appearances and continues to be highly ambitious.

We'd love to perform at your next corporate event.

Name: Academia del Tango en Grecia
Description:
1st Tango school in Greece since 2000. 
Vaggelis & Marianna, directors & teachers are European Champions of Tango & Finalists in World Championship !

Name: Texas A&M University Maaya
Description:
Why Consider Joining TAMU Maaya?
Become a cherished member of our newly established, tight-knit team. Immerse yourself in a diverse array of dance forms and showcase your unique talents and strengths as we compete nationally. No prior experience necessary!

How can you become part of our dynamic team?
We're gearing up for Fall auditions for the 2024-2025 school year. Look out for audition videos over the summer, followed by in-person auditions and workshops in the fall. Additionally, we'll have a simple application form and social events to help us get to know you better! Stay connected with us on social media for updates.

What awaits you upon joining the team?
Embark on a year-long journey filled with practices, social gatherings, competitions, and exciting performances.

Name: Phox Dance Academy (Pty) Ltd
Description: Nestled amidst the beautiful Paarl landscape, Phox Dance Academy has been enchanting dancers of all ages since 2012. Immerse yourself in a world of rhythm and movement as you explore a wide range of dance styles, from Social, Ballroom and Wedding Choreography to Latin, Ballet and Modern. Whether you prefer the elegance of a private lesson or the camaraderie of group classes, this multi-genre studio provides a nurturing environment for aspiring dancers to reach their fullest potential.

Name: Sleepless Collective
Description: Sleepless Collective is a freestyle and choreography-based competitive dance team. We aim to connect people through dance, create innovative performances, and develop humble community leaders.

Name: Nrityashaala_offcial
Description: We provide customized dance training programs where students can choose from a list of 10 dance forms. We also provide event choreography services, blacklight shows, and projection dance.

Name: BhangraQueens
Description: India's first all females #BhangraGroup

Name: Penn Dance Company
Description:
Founded in 1975, Penn Dance Company is the University of Pennsylvania’s premier dance company and the only student-run dance group with a professional Artistic Director. With a focus in modern dance, Penn Dance is known for blending strong technical training with innovative student choreography. The company performs two full-length shows each year and regularly appears at campus and city-wide events—including a recent performance at a Philadelphia 76ers game.

Beyond that, Penn Dance is a tight-knit community where dancers grow not only as artists, but as friends, leaders, and collaborators. The company embraces dancers from a wide range of backgrounds (including ballet, jazz, tap, rhythmic gymnastics), encouraging members to push artistic boundaries while growing as both performers and leaders. Our members choreograph, direct, produce, and perform—all while supporting each other through the many chapters of college life. Penn Dance is where art meets family, and dance feels like home.

Name: Sabor Latino Dance Team at UF
Description:
Truth be told, Sabor Latino is more than just a dance team; we are a family united by the love of dance.

As a dancer, it's an opportunity to get out of your comfort zone and express yourself artistically, while simultaneously meeting some of the most talented people at the University of Florida.

We don't measure success by how many trophies we win. Being a true family has taught us to focus on the bigger picture. We cherish diversity, and we work consistently to make this an incredible experience, instead of just another extracurricular activity.

Name: ZirKuSS
Description:
ZirKuSS is your go-to production company based in San Sebastián, dedicated to bringing the excitement of contemporary circus and performing arts to life. Our team combines the creativity of circus arts with elements of dance, theater, and visual design to produce unforgettable shows and customized corporate events tailored to each client’s needs.

We offer our expertise in crafting both large-scale productions and exclusive, customized events, with a focus on innovation, artistic excellence, and impactful execution.

Name: SHARP/ArnoSchuitemaker
Description: Breaking down the boundaries between dance, performance, visual art, and club culture, the work of Arno Schuitemaker receives praise for the inventive forms and topics he explores, lying at the intersection where the intimate and the universal meet. They have been presented at renowned venues and festivals in over 25 countries around the world.

Name: Naach Dance Company
Description:
Naach Dance Company is a South Asian fusion dance academy rooted in culture, creativity, and confidence.


At Naach, dance is more than just choreography—it's a celebration of identity, storytelling, and community. Our mission is to create inclusive, energetic spaces where students grow not only as dancers, but as leaders, artists, and individuals.

From beginner classes to performance teams and competitive training, Naach Dance Company brings together tradition and innovation to inspire the next generation of movers and creators.

Name: Relevé Dance Company
Description: Relevé’s core values include positivity, kindness, & creativity, all while striving for students to remain open-minded and challenged. Our objective is to provide a safe environment where dancers and teachers are happy, well prepared, and successful. Just as vital, we ensure parents are equally as satisfied and included through great communication and transparency. We as a whole want our dancers to RISE, surpassing every goal.

Name: Alma Viva Dance Studio
Description:
At Alma Viva Dance Studio, we create spaces where individuals of all ages, can seamlessly connect with the synergy of music and dance, fostering a sense of accomplishment, joy, and self-confidence in a safe environment. Through creative expression in a socially harmonious setting, we aspire to ignite a lifelong passion for dance, crafting moments that resonate with the heart and soul of our students.

Explore our diverse array of classes tailored for non-competitive  dancers of all ages and skill levels, encompassing Ballet, Tap, Flamenco, Spanish Dance, and Latin styles. Our classes are designed to help our students develop their technique, build strength and flexibility, and express themselves through movement.

Contact us for more information at info@almavivadance.con

Name: Sylvain Émard Danse
Description: Artiste prolifique de notoriété internationale, Sylvain Émard fonde sa compagnie en 1990. Depuis son premier solo Ozone, Ozone (1987) jusqu’à son récent sextuor Les Champs Magnétiques (2025), le chorégraphe explore le territoire de la nature humaine à travers la puissance du corps. Aujourd’hui, son répertoire compte une trentaine de pièces originales dont la résonance s'étend bien au-delà du Québec. Sylvain Émard se distingue autant pour son riche vocabulaire chorégraphique, axé sur la musicalité du corps, que pour son approche inclusive de la danse.

Name: PINKFIT Dance Fitness Studio
Description: Pinkfit is a therapeutic dance fitness workout designed especially for women by renowned fitness expert Prajakta Yelwatkar. Pinkfit is scientifically designed keeping in view the hormonal combination in women's body, the body fat percentage and their liking towards dance. The uniqueness of Pinkfit comes with its offering of 16 different dance fitness flavours. These dance fitness flavours are carefully chosen and integrated in the program to achieve the overall fitness of each and every part of the body in a fun filled way. These 16 flavours are a combination of cardio, body toning and strength training dance fitness workout. Pinkfit make you feel happy, energetic, look younger and cheerful.

Name: SwingStep - We teach Swing Dances
Description: SwingStep is a dancing school for classic swing dances such as Lindy Hop and Charleston. We offer classes at our dance studio, Swingstation, in Heidelberg, and we also provide many online classes, all taught by amazing and internationally renowned teachers. In addition, we organize workshops, festivals, dance parties, and social dance events. Companies often invite us to add some spice to their events with Lindy Hop tasters for their teams or to teach an energizing team solo jazz routine as a team-building exercise. And last but not least, SwingStep is at the heart of the Rhein-Neckar Lindy Hoppers—a diverse and vibrant community of several hundred people who have fallen in love with swing dancing.

Name: Rochester Dance Fit Studios LLC
Description: A home where aspiring dance and fitness driven community members can thrive and feel alive! We are proud to offer quality and affordable dance instruction to kids, teen, and adults of Greater Rochester. From skills and technique training in our Dance Academy school to the greatest memorable performances at weddings, school pop up events and more. Whether you have two left feet or have natural talent, our dance community bring out the confidence and positive support you need to dance proudly in your skin

Name: Honey Dance Studio
Description:
Honey Dance Studio este locul unde copiii pot experimenta beneficiile sportului organizat și profesionist într-un mediu sigur și plin de entuziasm.
Cu mii de medalii, diplome, cupe si trofee castigate la concursuri nationale si internationale, scoala se numara printre cele mai bune scoli de dans si gimnastica din Romania.
