Avem antrenori dedicați și experimentați, care asigura fiecarui copil îndrumarea și sprijinul necesar pentru a se dezvolta în disciplina sportivă preferată!
Oferim cursuri profesioniste de dans, gimnastica, dans contemporan, aeryal gym si acro dance pentru copii, susținute de instructorii nostri cu colaborari la Circul Metropolitan Bucuresti si foste campioane la gimnastica.
Într-un mediu sigur și prietenos, copilul tău va învăța să danseze, să se distreze și să-și dezvolte abilitățile artistice.
Antrenamentele intensive, perseverența și munca în echipă sunt ingredientele succesului!

Name: GatoRaas
Description: UF GatoRaas is the University of Florida's premier garba-raas team who celebrates and shares Gujurati culture through dance. GatoRaas accepts students of all ages at UF and has built a culture centered around hard work and community. The team has become integral to the Indian community at UF and the competitive raas circuit.

Name: Congolese Dance Tutorials
Description: At Congolese Dance Tutorials, we bring the vibrant rhythms, dynamic movements, and rich cultural heritage of Congo to life through engaging dance classes and experiences. Our mission is to make Congolese dance and music accessible to everyone, regardless of skill level, while promoting the beauty and diversity of Congolese culture globally.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Delray Beach
Description:
Fred Astaire Dance Studios Delray Beach is more than just a dance studio; it's a community where adults of all ages and skill levels come together to experience the joy of dance.  We offer a wide range of dance styles, including:

Ballroom: Waltz, Foxtrot, Tango, Viennese Waltz, Quickstep
Latin: Salsa, Mambo, Rumba, Cha Cha, Samba, Bolero, Paso Doble
Social & Swing: Hustle, East Coast Swing, West Coast Swing, Merengue, Jive, Bachata, Country Western, Two-Step
And more!
Whether you're looking to prepare for your wedding dance, compete in ballroom competitions, or simply enjoy a fun night out, we have something for everyone.

  Step into our world!

Name: The Core Dance Company
Description:
About Us

Welcome to The Core Dance Company, where creativity and passion unite to celebrate the art of dance. Based in Market Harborough, we are dedicated to inspiring and nurturing dancers of all ages and skill levels through exceptional training and performances.

At The Core Dance Company, we believe that dance is more than just movement—it’s a way to connect, express, and transform. Our diverse offerings include a wide range of dance styles, from classical ballet to contemporary and jazz, tailored to suit both beginners and seasoned performers.

Our mission is to provide a supportive and dynamic environment where dancers can thrive. With a team of experienced and dedicated instructors, we focus on developing technical skills, artistic expression, and a love for the art form. We also prioritize building a strong sense of community, encouraging collaboration and camaraderie among our students.

Whether you’re looking to enhance your technique, explore new styles, or simply enjoy the joy of dance, The Core Dance Company is your home. Join us in our journey to push boundaries, celebrate achievements, and make every movement count.

Name: D.S.D.A. Blue Suede Shoes
Description: Blue Suede Shoes is the student association for Ballroom, Argentine Tango dancers in Delft. We are an active community of dancers of all kinds, some joining for social dancing and others focussing on competitions. We organise activities for all these different dancers, including practice hours, parties and technique classes, as well as social events where you can hang out with fellow dance enthusiasts.

Name: DanceAspen
Description:
A story of resiliency, passion, determination and generosity, DanceAspen was founded in 2021. The devastation of the global pandemic disbanded the Aspen Santa Fe Ballet performing company that had been an integral part of the Aspen community and an impactful leader in the global dance scene for 25 years. This came as a major loss not only for the community, but also the artists who had worked and trained their entire lives to build a career that allowed them to perform with a company of such prestige. This news left the dancers with two options; stay in Aspen and retire from their professional dancing careers or move and leave behind the lives and communities they built in Aspen. Stuck between a rock and a hard place, the dancers banded together to create a third option… fill the void left behind and create a new company. From here, DanceAspen was formed.

The saying “It takes a village”, is a reality for DanceAspen. We are grateful and humbled by the outpouring of support by the community that kept us all in this beautiful valley. We put our hearts and souls on the line and were welcomed with open arms. We couldn’t be more fortunate than to live in the beautiful Rocky Mountains and get to create and share our art with a supportive and enthusiastic audience. The future is bright and DanceAspen is looking forward with excitement and gratitude for this magnificent adventure!

Name: Gainesville Ballet
Description:
The Gainesville Ballet Company is dedicated to promoting the appreciation, study, and performance of dance as an art form to as wide and diverse an audience as possible in the Gainesville and larger Northeast Georgia community.

Our teachers, choreographers, and board of directors are committed to providing dance training and performance opportunities to dancers ranging in age from three years old through Brenau University dance majors. We take great pride in not only offering our dancers a world-class dance education but also in offering them a positive, nurturing environment where they can grow as dancers and as young people.

Name: Peru Fusion Ireland
Description: We are a self-taught  Peruvian folklore dance group created to show Peruvian culture through dancing in Ireland. Our aim is to create awareness of our amazing culture, colourful traditions, and beautiful country with our dance performances.

Name: Dance Ambassadors LLC
Description: Dance Ambassadors (DA) is an organization dedicated to providing quality dance training. Our program is virtual based with opportunities available to perform in-person. We believe if you have the desire to learn how to dance, then we are here to help you learn. Our classes are available virtually - which means you could be in the Pacific Northwest and still take dance classes with us on the East Coast. We offer a wide variety of programs and dance styles. We are always seeking more opportunities for our students to perform.

Name: The PURE Dance Academy
Description:
We offer quality dance education in a variety of styles and levels. We have facilities in Lakeshore-Windsor-Essex and Chatham and Wallaceburg in Chatham-Kent.  

We offer Cecchetti Ballet, Tap, Jazz, Hip Hop, Acrobatic Arts Acro, Lyrical/Contemporary and more. In addition, we provide competitive training at various levels, from novice to advanced.

Name: Danse Mode-Action
Description: Programme de danse multidisciplinaire pour tous les niveaux dès l'âge de 3 ans depuis 1994. Danse-Études pour étudiants au secondaire et agence artistique pour danseurs, chanteurs et comédiens.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Southbury
Description:
The moment you walk inside the Fred Astaire Dance Studio in Southbury, you’ll quickly realize why we’re steps above the rest. From our Beginner to Advanced customized dance programs, we set the standard of excellence in ballroom dance instruction.

Our great dance heritage began  in 1947 when one of the greatest ballroom dancers of all time, Mr. Fred Astaire, co-founded our company. He developed a practical, interrelated dance curriculum that embodied the fundamental principles of good dancing, flavored by his style and grace. Now, our studios spread throughout the United States are teaching the “ Fred Astaire way.” We offer all kinds of dance instruction - from ballroom to country western to salsa to nightclub dancing - for all ages and abilities through private, group, and practice lessons.

Learning how to dance at Fred Astaire Dance Studio is always easy and fun! In your very first lesson, you’ll  learn the basic elements of which all dance patterns are based and within hours, you’ll be ready to dance!

Name: Loudoun School Of Ballet
Description: Loudoun School Of Ballet is a dance studio based out of 305 E Market St Ste H, Leesburg, Virginia, United States. We offer a Traditional of Excellence in dance since 1977.

Name: Ilogear
Description:
With more than 20 years on the dancewear universe, hand-crafting made-to-order performance wear, our brand redefines itself as a fashion driven brand that offers multifunctional lifestyle pieces.

Our design team experience in fashion, allows us to deliver a high-end performance activewear with a sleek and trendy aesthetic.

Our passion is to research, develop, and deliver of enhanced functional apparel to be used as foundational pieces by performance artists

We deliver upgraded silhouettes and functional materials that work with the body ergonomically to enhance performance through compression, support, and comfort to maintain coverage and confidence while practicing.

At its heart, our goal is to share an optimistic direction about well-designed products that
enhance personality and deliver confidence. 

We celebrate the appeal and reassurance of designs that will be loved for the long-term.

Our brand´s team work hand to hand with coaches and studio owners to design, develop and deliver enhanced functional apparel to be used as foundational pieces by their teams.

integrating craftsmanship into performance materials, our custom and made to order pieces carry a fantasy-driven aesthetic that inspire and elevates your performances.

Name: Rhythmic Blue at Yale
Description: Rhythmic Blue was established in 1991 by a group of three Yalies, Martina Stewart, Marcy Peek Baker, and Camille X who shared a love for dance. We are an open-style choreography dance group with roots in hip hop dance. While our dancers and student choreographers are inspired by a variety of styles including jazz, heels, and waacking, we honor our hip hop roots through movement and song choice.

Name: Endicott Dance Academy
Description:
Comfort and confidence are important when you step on to the dance floor. Whether you're starting a new hobby, preparing your first dance for your wedding, competing or performing, these are among the most important components to a good dancer and dance partnership.

With over 30 years' experience teaching all levels of dance, David has mastered the art of breaking down "the moves" to teach you to truly hear the music, learn the footwork, and have fun with your partner. Whether you're interested in  dance lessons for waltz, tango, salsa, cha-cha or any of the other 18 dances we teach, we will create a plan that allows you to achieve all of your goals!

Name: Leaps Performing Arts
Description: We specialize in Ballet, Contemporary, Lyrical, Jazz, Gymnastics.

Name: Thaïs Compagnie
Description:
Compagnie de danse contemporaine fondée par Eve Thine et Linus Hartmann en 2022. 

À ce jour, Thaïs se développe autour de trois volets : (1) une programmation artistique à Paris, accompagnée de tournées à l’international, (2) l’organisation de workshops et de cours de danse en français et en allemand, et (3) un laboratoire d’expérimentations cinématographiques. 

Thaïs Compagnie est aujourd’hui associée à l’Institut Français et à la Ville de Paris. En 2025, Thaïs Compagnie a conclu un nouveau partenariat avec la revue L’Éléphant, spécialisée dans la culture générale et la transmission des savoirs. À travers un soutien à la création sous forme de don, la revue L’Éléphant accompagne le développement de les projets artistiques de Thaïs. Ce partenariat fait dialoguer deux univers complémentaires : celui de la pensée et celui du mouvement.

Association de loi 1901, la compagnie est composée de huit chorégraphes-interprètes, et présente quatre créations originales au sein de son répertoire : « Derrière Nuit », « Premier Jour », « En phases » et « Alors vidons nos mains ».

Name: NUDance (University of Nottingham's Dance Society)
Description: Award Winning Dance Society at the University of Nottingham

Name: Bella Ballerina Northern Virginia
Description:
Tiny toes are our passion! Watch your little one glow and giggle with delight as storybook adventures come to life on the dance floor! Bella Ballerina classes offer a delightful and educational experience like no other! Classes are structured around storybook and fairy tale themes, allowing our ballerinas the freedom to explore dance through imagination, movement, and fun! From our littlest ballerinas to our big girls, each class is engaging, age appropriate, light, and high energy. Your child will be awestruck when they step into our space...
It's a child's dream come true!

Name: Art In Motion Dance Studio
Description: Art In Motion Dance Studio (AIM) is Durbanville's premier destination for dancers of all backgrounds—whether you're on a dedicated professional path or dancing simply for the sheer joy of it. At AIM, our esteemed faculty boasts a rich tapestry of expertise, dedicated to delivering top-notch training within a nurturing and familial environment. Our core vision is to cultivate a deep-seated passion for dance among our young enthusiasts. Our specialty dance styles encompass Acro Dance, Tumbling, Contemporary, and Jazz Dance. Come experience Art In Motion.

Name: Move with Soul Dance Studio
Description: At Move with Soul, we strive to provide a welcoming and inclusive environment for dancers of all ages and skill levels. Our mission is to help our students develop their dance skills, build confidence, and foster a love of dance that will last a lifetime.

Name: Escola de Dança Jaime Arôxa Copacabana
Description: Escola de Danças de Salão

Name: American Swiss Ballet Academy & Company
Description:
A dance company created in 2015 in NYC with the goal to give the opportunity for  dancers to be able to express themselfs and have a place to grow in their carries. 
Also a great opportunity for young dancers to have their first experience and work along professional dancers and great choreographers.
Accepting trainees as well.

Name: AIR DANCE - Associação dos Instrutores de Ritmos
Description:
Nossa missão é unificar e profissionalizar dançarinos de ritmos, preparando-os para o mercado de trabalho, capacitando para ser um grande profissional. 

Leandro Araújo, presidente da AIR Dance, foi o responsável e escritor do projeto para regulamentação da profissão de artista dançarino de ritmos no Sindicato de Profissionais de Dança do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (SPDRJ), em anos viajando pelo mundo, vivendo na Itália e seguindo o mercado de trabalho no Brasil, percebeu a necessidade de criar uma club no qual todos os instrutores de Ritmos Dance e estudantes pudessem se unir, estudar, profissionalizar e serem reconhecidos como uma classe unida.

Name: Hallomai Dance
Description:
(pronounced ha - low - my)
 Interactive Dance & Movement

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Westerville
Description:
At Fred Astaire our teaching philosophy is simple and straightforward: learning how to ballroom dance is always fun! We work with students of all ages and abilities, and our friendly and professional instructors will help you make your ballroom journey a reality. Whether you are looking to try something new or this is something you have always dreamed of, we have something for you!

Our studio teaches using a three way system: Private Lessons, Group Classes, Practice Parties!
*Private Lessons - One Instructor per Student or Couple.  You receive 100% of the teacher's attention which helps you learn faster.  All programs and private lessons are customized to the learning style of our students, their goals, and the types of dance they are interested in.
*Group Classes - One Instructor with 3 or more students.  These group lessons are designed to introduce new patterns and help create muscle memory through repetition.  This helps you spend less time remembering and reviewing and more time learning during your private lessons. We change partners through the class which helps you learn how to lead and/or follow many different people because everyone dances a little differently.
*Practice Parties - Designed to help you practice dancing in a social setting. We provide some snacks, and turn on the music to help you learn how to dance with other people.  Our instructors are available to help you practice and will explain what music goes with what type of dance.

We also specialize in wedding dance lessons (Frist Dance, Father/Daughter, Mother/Son, Wedding Party, Flashmobs) and are now offering youth classes!

Name: Compagnie Soul City | Didier Boutiana
Description:
Existe-t-il un langage chorégraphique contemporain et universel ? Depuis sa création en 2008, Soul City ne cesse de le chercher. Emmené par son chorégraphe Didier Boutiana, Soul City est un crew de Hip-Hop devenu compagnie de Danse contemporaine. Du Port, la compagnie a su gagner la Réunion, la Métropole, le Monde. Son secret ? L’esprit d’équipe. La compagnie est soudée comme un crew à la veille d’un battle. 

L’âme de cette cité, c’est Didier Boutiana. Initié au Hip-Hop, le chorégraphe a su enrichir le style de la Rue avec la Danse contemporaine. Tour à tour Kanyar, du nom de son premier solo, Kreol, comme ses racines dont il est fier, universaliste par envie de s’élever, il tisse une chorégraphie métisse, emprunte de spiritualité et d’humilité. Pas question de donner des leçons, c’est l’exemplarité qui compte. A travers ses chorégraphies, Didier Boutiana parle de sujets qui lui ressemblent.

 Aujourd’hui, la compagnie emploie un directeur, un chargé d’administration et un chargé de diffusion. L’équipe a élaboré un projet qu’elle veut partager avec des publics, à La Réunion, dans l’Hexagone, mais aussi en Europe et dans le monde. Elle travaille sur la transmission de valeurs, notamment en direction des jeunes en difficulté. Exigeante avec elle-même, la compagnie veut changer d’échelle et davantage s’internationaliser.

Name: Steppin Out Dance & Tumbling Studio
Description:
Since 1996, Steppin Out Dance Studio has been proudly providing dance classes to children of all ages in the Monroe, Pella, Grinnell, Prairie City, Otley, Knoxville, Reasnor, Sully, Lynnville, and Newton areas.

As a parent, we realize you have a choice between several different dance schools. Not all studios are the same. We constantly strive to provide our students and parents with the best experience possible. We offer a wide variety of dance styles to choose from, including ballet, tap, jazz, hip hop, pointe, lyrical, contemporary, modern, jazz-pom, clogging, drill team prep, cheer, acrobatic dance, and tumbling. You can also join our award-winning competition team.

Our Mission
To provide students of all ages with the skills they need to enjoy dance for a lifetime.

Name: M.One Dance Hub
Description: Dance Studio

Name: Dance Ascension
Description: Specializing in Ballet, Pointe, Jazz, Tap, Contemporary, Lyrical, Acrobatics, Hip Hop, & Aerial Arts for ages 2 to adult. Offering training for recreational students to pre professional students.

Name: Katherine Manakin Studio
Description:
Katherine Manakin Studio, es un estudio creativo de Dirección de Movimiento y Cine de Danza fundado por la coreógrafa Katherine Manakin, que cruza el cine, las artes visuales, la interpretación actoral y la tecnología, con la danza y el movimiento. 

Fundada en 2021, tiene una cartera de encargos internacionales y colaboraciones artísticas en vídeos musicales, moda y publicidad; así como creaciones originales en las que se exploran distintos códigos narrativos y audiovisuales, con el movimiento como motor central.

Filial de la empresa de entretenimiento Sircomedia Group 

 Katmanakinstudio@gmail.com
MX | EU | CO

Name: JDI DANCE COMPANY
Description: JDI Dance Company is a dance studio based in Canyon Lake, CA. JDI has 850 students. They offer a strong Recital Program and top award winning Competition Program.

Name: Dance 4 People
Description: Dance 4 People is a dance group made up of dancers of various styles and skills. The project was created under the banner of the creative production company Art 4 People, which organizes large social, cultural and marketing events. Dancers from Dance 4 People offers a wide range of tailor-made dance performances for various social events, such as gala events, corporate presentations and parties, proms, celebrations, engagements, weddings and more. When creating her performances, she mainly draws on dance styles such as ballet, contemporary, jazz dance, but also on modern styles, such as street dance, freestyle, heels dance, pole dance, Bollywood and others. Members of Dance 4 People regularly participate in the filming of music and dance video clips of Czech performers and artists and act as soloists and dance companies in Czech theaters - in ballet, musicals and operas in the Karlínské theatre, the Broadway Theater or the Maniny Theater. In addition to professional dancers in Dance 4 People, we also provide the opportunity to apply to young talented artists who regularly place themselves at the top of dance competitions.

Name: Vivartana - the art studio
Description: Bharatanatyam Dance classes, Event performances, Studio Rentals, Worshops/ Lecture Demonstrations, Studio Showcases, Professional Make up and hair exclusively for dance

Name: Q Dance
Description:
Q Dance, the first Network of Dancers in the Arab Region, aims to stimulate growth, recognition, and collaboration. 

Together we validate creativity, culture, and growth, and highlight the immense importance of Dance in Lebanon and the broader Region.

Name: Ansambli Trojet
Description:
Die Initiatoren des Ensembles sind der bekannte Choreograf Arsim Berisha und Blearta Shala, umgeben von vielen motivierten jungen Menschen mit einem enormen Willen und einer Begeisterung für das Traditionelle, sowie mit der Untertützung des Ensembles Vatra aus Bülach. Eine wertvolle Rolle zur Gründung des Ensembles „TROJET“ am 17. April 2013 hat auch das Ensemble Vatra aus Bülach beigetragen. Das Ziel des Ensembles „TROJET“ ist das Erlernen von albanischen Traditionstänzen, organisieren von Aufführen der Traditionstänze über Gesang und Theater bis hin zur Vorstellungen von Kunst und Bücher.

Welche Bedeutung hat der Name „TROJET“?

Der Name selber bedeutet «Gebiete» und kommt von «Trojet Shqiptare» welches in der Umgangssprache benutzt wird, «Albanische Gebiete». Diese sind die Gebiete in denen auch heute viele Albaner leben. Da unsere Mitglieder aus allen albanischen Gebieten kommen, wurde der Name „TROJET“ ausgewählt.

Name: University of Portsmouth Dance Club
Description:
Play, Perform, Compete
 Club, RAG & Coach of the Year ‘25
 38x Trophy Winners 2025
 Home of Pompey Compey

Name: Fundación Escuela de Danza MME
Description:
Somos la Fundación Escuela de Danza MME, institución de educación informal que trabaja con personería jurídica de la Secretaría de Educación Distrital en la Localidad octava de Bogotá. Creada en el año 2008, la Fundación Escuela de Artes MME se ha convertido en una puerta abierta para que grandes y chicos se incorporen al mundo de las artes, a través de una rica formación en música, danza y artes plásticas.
Nuestro objetivo es impactar la sociedad llegando de manera directa al corazón de las familias, trabajando de la mano con un importante staff docente para brindarle a chicos y grandes la oportunidad de incorporarse en el mundo de las artes mediante una experiencia artística que lo incluya todo: clases, puesta en escena, presentaciones con públicos reales y mucho más.

Para desarrollar nuestra misión contamos con excelentes maestros, una metodología lúdica y amplios espacios físicos que permitirán a nuestros estudiantes, de cualquier edad, no sólo adquirir conocimientos técnicos en alguna disciplina artística, sino también la posibilidad de comprender y vivir el trabajo en equipo, expresar sus emociones, canalizar su adrenalina, superar la timidez y establecer nuevas y sanas relaciones. A través de nuestra labor formativa trabajamos por desarrollar valores en torno al amor propio, la sana autoestima y la disciplina.

NUESTROS OBJETIVOS

Generar un espacio de formación artística para niños, jóvenes y adultos con un nivel superior de calidad docente y enfoque profesional en todas las áreas.

Introducir a nuestros estudiantes de todas las edades y áreas en una experiencia artística completa que incluye grandes escenarios, preparación técnica y práctica, escenografía, vestuario y mucho más.

Name: The Art & Aesthetic Foundation- TAAF India
Description:
We would like to take this opportunity to introduce our organization The Art & Aesthetics Foundation (TAAF) India, which is dedicated to enhance the strength of our rich cultural heritage in the form of music, dance and innumerable traditional arts of India.

The aim of our organization is to empower and propagate the Indian art and its aesthetics not only in India, but in various parts of the world. Apart from the various beliefs including Ayurveda, the holistic approach of Yoga, the immense food cuisines, the clothing and many such areas, the most widespread of all has been the divine love for Indian Music & Dance.

Name: Arthur Murray - United Arab Emirates
Description:
Arthur Murray has made learning to dance fun, quick and easy. His teaching methods have been perfected over 100 years and are guaranteed to have you dancing in just one lesson. Arthur Murray dance instructors are highly trained in the art of dance instruction and they already know what you are about to find out…dancing makes you happy!
With more than 300 dance studios in more than 20 countries around the world, Arthur Murray instructors truly are the experts in teaching ballroom and social dance.
If you’re nervous, it’s fine. Many dancers come to us with little or no experience. You’ll feel at home in no time. If you’re excited about learning and committed to practice, you will see amazing results. Everyone learns at a different pace and your instructors are here to offer support and guidance along the way. If that next big event is just around the corner and the dance floor is calling your name, let’s get started!

Name: Movem Live!
Description:
We in Movem Live are dedicated to create safe spaces for learning or developing your skills in dancing Urban Kizomba and other Afro Latin dances. We organize workshops, courses, events and other unique dance related experiences. 

Our goal is to be one of the leading actor in the international Kizomba Scene and our vision is to help bringing world where everyone has access to international level Urban Kizomba to the world. You find us all over Sweden and in events and workshops around the world!

Name: InnerAll
Description: De gezelligste dansschool van Twente! Kom langs voor een gratis proefles en join the family!

Name: Magical Tots
Description:
Magical Tots is a unique, creatively-entwined class where children (aged 18 months +) learn through dance. At Magical Tots, children are enlightened into the world of pointy toes and jazz hands, sparking their creativity and imagination, whilst also learning key skills and knowledge from the Early Years Foundation Stage Curriculum. So pick up your magic wand or sword, put on your tutu or cape and get ready to shine.

"Dancing is the closest thing to magic."

Name: Place 4 People
Description:
Place 4 People is a dance and movement studio in Prague in Žižkov. We offer informal regular dance courses and workshops as well as the possibility of individual lessons with leading Czech and international lecturers, champions of the Czech Republic and StarDance finalists.

We also provide facilities for trainings and seminars of sports clubs (Dance 4 People, Taneční klub Vavruška, Tanec Kladno) and couples of dance sports through membership in a dance club that allows its members free access to the Place 4 People dance hall for training, rehearsals, etc. Last but not least, the Place 4 People studio offers rentals of two dance halls near the center of Prague.

Name: UP Streetdance Club
Description: The UP Streetdance Club is the official street dance varsity representative of the University of the Philippines – Diliman,  housed by the College of Human Kinetics. Established in 1997, this group aims to instill values of teamwork, integrity, and excellence while developing talents and skills through dance.

Name: Ruby Josephine Dance Theater
Description: Ruby Josephine Dance Theater, RJDT, creates theatrical contemporary performances and workshops that use movement as a vehicle for deeper connection, resonance and conversation. Through its emotional, fluid and often narrative work, this company brings dance to its organic roots of connecting people through rhythm, flow, and exuberant expression. It digs deep into themes of human emotion, existence, and a connection to the intangible, exploring common threads and resonant stories. While grounded in the movement vocabulary of artistic director Ruby Josephine Smith, it frequently weaves in the perspectives and voices of its dancers and collaborators. RJDT inspires its international audience to ask deeper questions, become more curious, and connect to one's own voice and luminosity.

Name: Sanskruti Dance
Description:
Sanskruti Cambridge CIC is an award-winning dance school and dance company, based in Cambridge. Our professional dance company tours original dance shows and runs community events and dance workshops. 

Our vision is for South Asian dance to thrive at the centre of British cultural life.

We started Sanskruti School of Dance in 2007 to train students from all age groups and with different cultural backgrounds in Cambridge in the South Asian classical dance form called Bharatanatyam as well as the popular dance Bollywood dance style including Indian folk dance forms. Our school’s aim is to build students’ confidence, create, imagine and express their thoughts and feelings. 

Our professional dance company, Sanskruti Dance, began in 2017 following a number of one-off events, including the Cambridge Big Weekend Festivals and a Bharatanatyam Flashmob performance for Mill Road Midsummer Festival. Sanskruti Dance was officially registered as a Community Interest Company in October 2021.

Our work reaches families nationally, but we remain rooted to our local communities by bringing art to local families.

Name: Unlogic Crew
Description:
Unlogic is a dance crew that has been active since 2018. Based in Bali, Indonesia. Unlogic is actively competing, performing on stage, and making collaborative projects. We have upgraded as an event organizer as well, and already have 2 products/services, namely UDDU Movement and UNO.

UDDU is a MOVEMENT. Stands for U D Double U, or Unlogic Dance Workshop, we created a place for dancer and dance enthusiasts to expand their knowledge and share it with the dance community and professionals.

UNO - Unlogic Organizer, is a brand of Unlogic Crew to launch event projects of the community as well as providing service for event organizing and talent booking.

For more info, you guys can check our social media, 
Instagram: unlogic.crew & uddumovement
YouTube: Unlogic Crew

Name: Charliz Balicao Dance Company
Description: An ELITE dance program designed for athletes participating in a variety of sports.

Name: Royal Academy of Irish Dance
Description:
The Queen City's Irish Dance Studio let by founder/owner Alexandra Macchi: TCRG, choreographer, and former professional dancer.
Ages 4+ to adults, from first-time beginners to champions!

Name: Grupo Folclórico Ucraniano Poltava
Description: O Grupo Folclórico Ucraniano Poltava é uma entidade sem fins lucrativos que agrega voluntários para a divulgação e promoção da cultura ucraniana no Brasil e no mundo. Dentre as várias atividades, destaca-se a realização de espetáculos artísticos envolvendo dança, coral e orquestra.

Name: BaM Choreography
Description: BaM Choreography offers inclusive in-person dance classes and online options for children through older adults, with the goal of cultivating community and a love for movement for anybody (and every body). Its studio – the Haus of BaM – is located at 101 Castlebrooke Drive in Venetia, Pa., where it offers classes in hip hop, sassy strut, cardio dance, contemporary, jazz, hula hooping, bellydance, broadway, strength training and more. Learn more at bamchoreography.com.

Name: vit_zephyr
Description: Zephyr at our college is a dynamic dance group known for their unwavering dedication and stellar achievements. Renowned for participating in various competitions, their hardworking spirit and passion for dance make them consistent achievers!

Name: I&E Dance
Description:
I&E Dance Company was started in 2019 by Michelle Malone due to a lack of opportunity for professional level dance training and performing opportunities in the La Crosse, WI area. The company rehearses weekly and performs every 3-4 months!

I&E now has their own studio space in La Crosse, WI which opened in January 2023. The I&E Dance Studio now offers classes for ages 18+ in a variety of levels and styles!

Name: Dance Alive National Ballet
Description: Dance Alive National Ballet features an international roster of award winning dancers. Elegant and exciting, they are at the heart of the company’s undeniable success. The company's repertoire ranges from the quintessential classic Nutcracker to the cutting-edge movement of contemporary ballet. Throughout this choreographic tapestry are woven the ballets of Executive Artistic Director, Kim Tuttle and Choreographer-in-Residence Judy Skinner, whose distinctive artistic styles brand the company. Entertaining and insightful, provocative and joyous, this creative aesthetic is at the heart of the Company.

Name: Dance Nirvana
Description:
Dance Nirvana is a pilot studio for contemporary dance-oriented fitness routines and creative choreographic practice. It also offers several value-added services and facilities in dance. 

It’s a unit of Deepika Sagar Movement Arts, a London-based performing arts company. It is driven by a team of health & tech entrepreneurs under the leadership of its chief choreographer Deepika Sagar.

Name: Dansekapellet
Description:
Dansekapellet er Københavns Kommunes kulturhus, dedikeret til dans, bevægelse og performance. Her samles mennesker i alle aldre og på alle niveauer for at udforske dansens verden. 

Foreninger tilbyder undervisning i en bred vifte af stilarter, og i Teatersalen, Kuppelsalen samt på udendørsscenen Himmelblå afholdes events, forestillinger og festivaler. 

Dansekapellet arbejder aktivt for at bringe dans og koreografi ud til børn og unge, og styrker unge talenter gennem forskellige skole- og fritidsprojekter samt scenearrangementer. 

I Dansekapellet kan man opleve forestillinger af både danske og internationale koreografer og kompagnier, og vi deltager i internationale co-produktioner og samarbejdsprojekter med det formål at udvikle og udbrede dansen. At inspirere og lade os inspirere.

Name: Sangeetha Dance Expressions
Description: The complete and comprehensive freelance dance teacher in Dubai offers training in a wide spectrum of dance styles and forms. Whether you're a beginner or an advanced dancer you will enjoy the diverse range of dances we offer. Connect with us to know more!

Name: Cuban Salsa Leuven
Description:
Cuban Salsa Leuven offers classes of Cuban salsa, lady style and rueda. 
This can be in our regular classes, but also in private classes or as a perfect team building idea!

Name: ODTÜ EŞLİ DANSLAR TOPLULUĞU
Description: Türkiye’nin İlk Eşli Danslar Topluluğu

Name: Momentum Dance, LLC.
Description: Boston based dance studio who offers recreational, developmental, and competitive programs.

Name: RDS Art Group
Description: Dom umenia RDS Art Group je jedinečný koncept s tématicky ladenými tanečnými sálami, nahrávacím štúdiom, eventovým priestorom s krásnym výhľadom na Bratislavu. Každá zo sál má svoje zameranie a je určená na tanec, jogu ako aj silové a kondičné tréningy, kde sú k dispozícii kardio stroje, činky a tiež boxovacie mechy. Jogová sála ponúka priestor na relax a pohodu, kde sa budete vedieť uvoľniť a načerpať sily. Baletná sála je ladená do čistých bielych farieb s krásnym farebným klavírom. K dispozícii je aj nahrávacie štúdio na rôzne diskusie, podcasty ako aj dabingové teambuildingy pre firmy. Galéria s balkónom je krásnym miestom na vernisáž prípadne sledovanie eventov pre divákov a slúži aj ako zázemie. Dom umenia ponúka viac ako 30 tanečných štýlov a cvičení pre verejnosť. Súčasťou je aj Muzikalová akadémia s výučbou spevu a herectva pod vedením kvalitných umelcov z divadla a televízie. Dom umenia tvoria aj tri tanečné skupiny, ktoré zastrešujú vystúpenia na rôzne spoločenské udalosti, firemné akcie ako aj natáčania videoklipov či reklamy. Poslednou zložkou je divadelno-tanečné teleso Slovenské divadlo tanca pod vedením Jána Ďurovčíka. Dom umenia je unikátnym miestom stretnutí deti aj dospelých, kde vznikajú nové projekty, zbierajú cenné skúsenosti z umeleckého sveta ale tiež vytvárajú zážitky na ktoré sa nezabúda.

Name: Penn State Orchesis Dance Company
Description: Orchesis is a performance-based dance company, specializing in jazz, ballet, and contemporary. Established in 1935, Orchesis is Penn State’s oldest dance company. Alumni and current members, please join this private group for active updates: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/13021090/

Name: CS Attitude
Description:
Școală de dans de societate și dans sportiv

Organizăm:
- Cursuri de dans pentru copii, adulți și seniori de la nivel de inițiere la performanță
- Cursuri de dans pentru companii - team building, Flashmob, Showuri
- Cursuri de Dansul Mirilor
- Tabere și cantonamente
- Spectacole
- Concursuri naționale sub egida Federației Române de Dans Sportiv

Name: Dance Services
Description: Business support and development services for dance professionals, from industry experts.

Name: Sutherland Dance Company
Description: Sutherland Dance Company is driven by a passion for inclusivity, representation, and shedding light on human issues through the art of dance. We believe in the transformative power of movement, as it fosters connections among people. Embracing diversity in gender, race, sexuality and ability, we take pride in celebrating individuality. Through our performances, we strive to challenge stereotypes, break norms, and uplift marginalised communities. Our repertoire explores themes such as identity, mental health and social justice. Join us in cultivating a more inclusive and empathetic world through the profound artistry of dance.

Name: Degasó, LLC
Description:
Degasó, LLC is revolutionizing the way dancers prepare their pointe shoes. 

Dancing "en pointe" has been a cornerstone of ballet since 1823. Since that time, dancers have been mac-gyvers of their pointe shoes making customized alterations to create function and form. One alteration all dancers make is attaching ribbons and elastics to the shoes to both secure the shoe to the foot and support the ankle. On average it takes dancers 30 minutes to sew their shoes. With a shoe lifespan of 12 hours, it is not uncommon for dancers to go through several pairs of pointe shoes a week. On average dancers are loosing 50+ hours a year to sewing their pointe shoes.

Through an innovative device, Degasó, LLC is on a mission to help dancers reclaim that time while continuing to honor the tradition and beauty of the sport.

Name: Ελληνικοί Χοροί Κωνσταντινούπολη
Description:
Βραδιές Ελληνικού Χορού στην Κωνσταντινούπολη

Οργανώνουμε μαθήματα ελληνικών χορών και βραδιές χορού στην Κωνσταντινούπολη, συνεχίζοντας μια παράδοση 20 χρόνων..

Η εκπαίδευσή μας βασίζεται σε ελληνικά πρότυπα και διδάσκουμε όλους τους χορούς στην αυθεντική τους μορφή, τηρώντας τις ρίζες τους. Είμαστε λίγο αυστηροί σε αυτό. Σίγουρα δεν είμαστε η σωστή επιλογή για τους λάτρεις των ταβερνιών ή της ομάδας που σπάει πιάτα!

Λάβετε υπόψη ότι δεν έχουμε καμία σχέση με κλισέ όπως το "Sirtaki Night" ή το "Greek Night". Χορεύουμε εκατοντάδες παραδοσιακούς ελληνικούς χορούς από όλες τις περιοχές της Ελλάδας.

Οι βραδιές ελληνικών χορών μας ξεκινούν κάθε Σάββατο στις 8 το βράδυ και συνεχίζονται μέχρι αργά. Συμμετέχουν παλιοί και νέοι μαθητές μας, καθώς και άνθρωποι που αγαπούν τον ελληνικό χορό και τη μουσική.

Ελάτε να χορέψουμε μαζί!

Name: Kindred Culture Inc.
Description:
Kindred Culture is a company that uses dance to give people a positive outlet to express themselves, build a sense of community, and support charitable organizations. 

Based in Mississauga, we offer different dance programs & classes through out the week.

We also run some of the largest dance competitions in the Greater Toronto Area.

Name: Alexander Sway
Description:
Alexander Sway Milano è una scuola di danza elegante e inclusiva. Offriamo un’esperienza di ballo personalizzata, con sale di grande prestigio e percorsi su misura, per chi vuole crescere non solo come artista, ma come persona.

Le nostre lezioni – individuali, in piccoli gruppi o in sessioni speciali – sono pensate per professionisti, manager, medici e amanti del ballo che cercano benessere psicofisico, motivazione e stile di vita sano. Crediamo che danzare significhi migliorare la postura, liberare la mente, costruire energia e relazioni.

Da Alexander Sway promuoviamo un ambiente inclusivo che accoglie persone di tutte le età e abilità (ipovedenti, autistici, etc.), con insegnanti professionisti qualificati, strutture moderne e un’attenzione particolare al comfort e all’eleganza.

Siamo più di una scuola di danza: siamo un punto di riferimento per chi vuole trasformare la sua vita attraverso il movimento, l’arte e la consapevolezza corporea.

Name: Konfidance Ballroom and Latin American Dance Studio
Description: Welcome to Konfidance Studio, where the world of dance comes alive. We specialize in bringing the joy of ballroom and Latin dance to both kids and adults. . Whether you're taking your first steps or looking to refine your skills, join us and let the rhythm move you

Name: House of Wingz
Description: Our name abbreviated to HOW, is influenced by the countercultural phenomenon of Ballroom, rooted in the necessity of community and safety, and in the defiance of oppression. ‘Houses’ are chosen families of artists and performers who ‘walk’ at balls as a form of self-expression and escapism. Walking enables people to be whoever they want to be, to create an alternative reality where they can share the version of themselves that they love, without fear of judgement.  A celebration of personal identity, acceptance, expression, struggle, community, and love.

Name: Stichting Dance4You
Description: Stichting Dance4You heeft als missie om dans toegankelijk te maken voor personen met en zonder een zorg- of hulpvraag ongeacht de leeftijd. Wij streven naar inclusie binnen de podiumkunsten en hebben een fundamenteel sociaal-maatschappelijk doel voor ogen. Bij Dance4You geloven we sterk in de kracht van dans als universele taal die mensen verbindt en in staat stelt om zichzelf uit te drukken. Wij faciliteren een omgeving waarin zelfexpressie, verbinding en levensgeluk centraal staat en waar ieders achtergrond als waardevol wordt beschouwd.
Location: Deventer en omgeving, Overijssel en Gelderland

Name: Dana Tai Soon Burgess Dance Company
Description:
Now in its 32nd season, Dana Tai Soon Burgess Dance Company (DTSBDC) is the preeminent modern dance company of the Washington, DC region.
DTSBDC performs works that illuminate the joy, sorrow, and beauty of the human experience. The Washington Post says of the dance company, “Not just a Washington prize, but a national dance treasure.”

Name: InMotion Dance Company
Description:
"For those to fall in love with dance again"

Hello, we are InMotion Dance Company! Based out of Indiana University, InMotion strives to reconnect dancers to their creative outlet throughout their collegiate journey. With a specialized focus on hip-hop, jazz, contemporary, and other various dance styles, our company fosters an environment of exploration for dancers. 

During the fall semester members are encouraged to collaborate and lead a dance class of their own. This unique opportunity allows members to improve their teaching skills, and share their favorite style with their peers. Additionally, members also offered the opportunity to choreograph a piece for our highly anticipated annual Fusion Showcase held in the Spring. InMotion Dance Company provides dancers a chance to teach, choreograph, and express movement creativity in a welcoming and positive space.

Name: City Ballet San Francisco
Description: For over two decades, City Ballet San Francisco (CBSF) has been a beacon of excellence, propelling our alumni into prestigious professional companies across the globe. With authentic Vaganova training by top industry professionals, extensive performance opportunities, and valuable connections, we nurture talent for a successful ballet career. Our students consistently shine, capturing top accolades in every competition they enter. Beyond our achievements, we have fostered a vibrant community of passionate ballet enthusiasts, united in their dedication to keeping the arts alive.

Name: compagnie yvann alexandre
Description:
Créée en 1993, la compagnie yvann alexandre est une compagnie professionnelle de danse contemporaine de la région des Pays de la Loire.
Attachée depuis ses débuts aux allers-retours entre professionnels, amateurs et les publics, la compagnie développe ses créations sur scène ou in situ, et tisse une politique d’échanges, de rencontres et de formation.
En 2019, la compagnie a pris la direction artistique du Théâtre Francine Vasse à Nantes avec un projet atypique tourné vers les autres équipes artistiques, et qui démarre par la transmission pour arriver à l’oeuvre : Les Laboratoires Vivants. Fidèle aux liens avec le Québec, elle y développe entre autres, Archipel, une plateforme agile de coopération pour les mobilités artistiques.

En 2023, la compagnie signe 30 ANS DE DANSE !

Name: theprofessionals.no
Description: Etter strålende anmeldelser er Dancing Stars by The Professionals endelig klar for å ta hele Norge med storm, live! Publikum får nå oppleve magien i en utvidet versjon av forestillingen, samtidig som resten av landet står for tur.

Name: AnnArt
Description:
AnnArt Pole Dance Studio - mesto gde prkosimo gravitaciji!

Naše radionice su druženje sa prijateljima, treniranje kroz zabavu i smeh, kao i slavljenje naših dostignuća  Svako može da trenira pole dance – ne treba ti nikakvo prethodno sportsko ili plesno iskustvo, ne zavisi od težine niti godina.

Naš studio je opremljen najsavremenijim šipkama visine 4.5m i 4m, proizvedenim po EU standardima, od strane profesionalnog proizvođača Lupit Pole iz Slovenije. 
Sve naše šipke imaju LUPIT POLE QUICK LOCK sistem za brzo i lako prebacivanje šipke iz statike u rotiranje, i izrađene od visoko kvalitetnog materijala koji ne sadrži nikl i ne izaziva nikakve alergijske reakcije.

Kod nas možete da trenirate pole dance ili se pripremate za takmičenja jer naše šipke odgovaraju svim zahtevima svetskih pole dance takmičenja (IPSF, PSO, PoleCon itd.).

Pružamo vam topli kutak gde svi pole ljubitelji mogu da uživaju

Name: ELAMOR
Description: ELAMOR is a dance company and creative producer based in Madrid. Our aim is to expand the fields of action and the potentialities of dance and the living arts. So far, we have created a range of pieces of a varied nature, from stage performances to ephemeral or site specific works. Our pieces have been presented at Teatros del Canal, Museo del Prado, Real Jardín Botánico, Caixaforum, SAT! Barcelona, ARCO, Conde Duque with whom we have established different models of cooperation. Institutions to which we can add Compañía Nacional de Danza, Círculo de Bellas Artes and so in our drive to weave relations that feed back to dance artists and creation. ELAMOR has also opened collaborations, meetings and dialogues with professionals and artists from very different disciplines, and is at the center of the creation and research nodes 112LAB Barcelona and Leopoldo Madrid.

Name: VB Danse
Description: Enseignement des danses de loisirs (Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba, Rock, Swing, Valse). Cours, stages, soirées. Chorégraphies de mariage, séances pour entreprises.

Name: Spartan Showstoppers
Description:
The Spartan Showstoppers are a student-run dance team at Michigan State University. Our team is choreographs our own dances and performs two showcases every year. We consist of 21 dancers who have a passion for dance and wanted to continue in college. 
Instagram: @spartanshowstoppers

Name: Hivewild
Description:
The body is the medium through which we create art. 

Founded in 2016 by Artistic Director Katherine Maxwell, Hivewild is a contemporary movement platform based on the unceded land of the Lenapehoking People (Brooklyn, NY). Hivewild is dedicated to the presentation of formal, site-specific, and public works that ignite conversation and unlock emotion, rooted in the principles of radical inclusion and lifelong curiosity. Endemic to each Hivewild work, and the processes that create them, are strong senses of dignity, interconnectivity, and playfulness. Hivewild is an invitation to experience, feel, and be - embodying a broader bandwidth of what it means to be alive. 

Hivewild exists to present movement as an affirmation of human value and emotion. Through the presentation of formal evening-length works, public works, site specific projects, dance films, and situational encounters, Hivewild aims to act as a catalyst for movement, sensation, and interdisciplinary artistic exchange.

Members of Hivewild seek to invest in their communities by actively engaging in cross-disciplinary collaboration and skill-sharing. Every human has a body, and the artists use this understanding as a starting point to identify connections and celebrate differences between people. Hivewild aims to use accessible performance work to engage a variety of viewers: artists, art enthusiasts, and those who have yet to experience contemporary dance work.

Name: DearK
Description:
Somos una marca que apoya el arte, la danza, el baile, el deporte, la salud, el bienestar, individualismo, trabajo grupal, desarrollo personal, promoción a los artistas (Profesores y alumnos)
Una academia de baile
Un Salón para poder realizar y mejorar actividades desde el Arte, los deportes como Artes Marciales, la enlongación y bienestar como el yoga.

Name: YOUnique Studio - Dance
Description:
Tom Slater has been dancing, coaching, choreographing, and directing for over 35 years. He is an expert at making individuals and couples comfortable in their movement and body.

He is lauded for his ability to work with the talents an individual brings to the Studio and then highlight and elevate those talents to next-level performance.

His current passion is wedding dances. One of his most recent clients brought in his Mom to create a special dance for the special day. His Mom was so impressed she brought in her husband for lessons and the groom ended up bringing in his fiance to create exquisite moments for them to bring extra joy to their unique wedding dance.

Contact Tom directly to book a consultation or take the plunge and purchase a package so you can start right away.

Name: Hijack Dance Company
Description:
Hijack Dance Company is one of the leading dance companies of Pune we have taught over 1000 + students around Pune. Our classes are conducted online as well as offline.
We specialised in wedding and corporate choreography as well as school and college choreography.
We also choreograph music videos and have been featured on multiple TV channels including VH1. 
Our motto is to give good opportunities to our students in order to pursue a career in dance.

Name: Ballet Spartanburg
Description: Ballet Spartanburg's mission is to enrich, engage and educate the Spartanburg community by providing the highest quality dance education, performance and outreach.

Name: Unofficial Project Dance Team - Boston University
Description: Unofficial Project (UPRO) is a hip-hop based competitive dance team that practices and encourages different fusion styles. The team is made up of undergraduate students from Boston University. Unofficial Project is also the host of OVRDRV Showcase and JAM.

Name: Nathan Mark Dance Academy
Description:
Nathan Mark Dance Academy is a performing arts company based out of Nathan Mark Dance Academy, Allendale Rd, Ormesby, Middlesbrough, United Kingdom.

Nathan Mark Dance Academy was founded on 1st September 2012. The mission was to create an affordable and welcoming dance school for children of all ages and abilities giving every star the chance to shine. The school opened in a simple church hall at The Church of Ascension in Middlesbrough.
On 2nd September 2013, just one day after the schools 1st birthday, the now sucessful school moved into its permentant home on the corner of Allendale Road and Daisy Lane.
On 1st November 2017, the studio rebranded to Nathan Mark Dance Academy - a whole new look, feel and a brand new start! Since opening our doors, NMDA has remained a success and continued to give the passion and love of dance to children of all ages. The Academy has achieved many things in its time including a 100% consecutive exam pass rate and our studio Principal and students have been nominated and won national awards!
NMDA remains at the heart of our community and welcomes new students every week of the year. The future is looking very bright indeed.

Name: THE ROOKIES WORLD
Description:
Champions du monde, THE ROOKIES partagent leur passion pour la danse urbaine à l’échelle mondiale, depuis 2013. Basés à Nantes, ils se distinguent par une diversité de styles — Hip Hop, Afro, Waacking, Krump, Experimental — faisant d’eux une référence incontournable et multiculturelle dans l’univers de la Street Dance.
Présents sur des scènes emblématiques (Wembley Stadium, Stade de France, Zénith de Paris...) et dans des émissions prestigieuses (NBC World of Dance, La France a un Incroyable Talent, Disney Channel), ils exportent leur art à travers l’Europe, l’Afrique, le Moyen-Orient et les Amériques.
THE ROOKIES vont encore plus loin que la danse : c’est aussi un collectif de créateurs. De la réalisation de films à la production d’événements, en passant par le DJing et la vidéo, chaque membre apporte son expertise pour développer des projets artistiques et commerciaux. Ils ont déjà collaboré avec plus de 50 marques et créateurs dans l’univers de la mode et de la culture.
Spectacles | Workshops | Création visuelle | Partenariats artistiques & marques

Name: DA F.U.N.K. STUDIOS
Description:
DA F.U.N.K. TANZ STUDIOS 

Die grösste Tanzschule Deutschlands. Über 30X in Deutschland.

Headquarter: 

Oskar-von-Miller-Straße 19, 86199 Augsburg, Germany.

Name: Finleigh Zack Dance Inc.
Description: Finleigh Zack Dance, a 501(c)3 not-for-profit organization believes that through the language of physical movement, artists can find clarity and a new ways to express themselves. Our mission is to bring perspective, awareness, and inspiration to mental health through dance, and give voice to young adults that have been personally affected or know someone affected by mental health.

Name: The Saxonz
Description: 2013 gegründet, heute eine der erfolgreichsten deutschen Breaking-Gruppen weltweit.

Name: Movement on Main Center for Dance
Description: Movement on Main Center for Dance is a company based out of 531 Main St, Zanesville, Ohio, United States.

Name: Instituto Colombiano de Ballet Clásico - INCOLBALLET
Description: INSTITUTO COLOMBIANO DE BALLET CLASICO INCOLBALLET is a company based out of VIA JAMUNDI KILOMETRO 4, CALI, Valle, Colombia.

Name: Cia Thais Akemi
Description: Sou arquiteta e design gráfica de formação, e o mundo artístico sempre fez parte do meu currículo. Como sou professora de dança de salão e coreografa, procuro formas de trazer para a dança todo meu conhecimento de design.

Name: La Sierra Se Mueve
Description:
En el año 2015, un torrente de creatividad tomó forma en la Sierra Noroeste de Madrid. El espectáculo "Acordes de Danza", presentado en la Sala Real de Becerril de la Sierra, marcó el inicio de una aventura artística sin igual. En este mágico escenario, la pintura, la música en directo y la danza se fusionaron en una experiencia sensorial que cautivó al público.

Inspirados por la cálida acogida y la magia de la unión de las artes, nació la Agrupación. Con el objetivo de fomentar, divulgar y promover la danza como pilar fundamental de las Artes Escénicas, la Agrupación se erige como un faro cultural en la región.

Más que un colectivo, la Agrupación es un crisol de ideas, talento y pasión. Su misión principal es ser un impulsor de la cultura artística, organizando eventos de gran calidad en la Sierra Noroeste de Madrid.

La Agrupación no solo pone en escena espectáculos de danza, sino que también organiza talleres, exposiciones, conferencias y encuentros con artistas. Su objetivo es crear un espacio vibrante donde la danza dialogue con otras disciplinas artísticas y con el público, enriqueciendo la vida cultural de la región.

Name: Back to the Flow
Description:
BACK to the FLOW, le Centre Chorégraghique Hip-Hop & Contemporain situé à Valenciennes. Le meilleur endroit où passion et excellence se rencontrent pour offrir une expérience unique à chaque danseur. Spécialisée dans une variété de styles, de la danse hip-hop au contemporain en passant par le Girly et le jazz, Back to The Flow propose des cours adaptés à tous les niveaux, du débutant au professionnel. Nos professeurs expérimentés et passionnés sont dédiés à vous aider à atteindre vos objectifs et à exprimer votre créativité à travers le mouvement.
 
Dirigé par FLOW (Florian Olivier), danseur de niveau international, chorégraphe émérite, BACKtotheFLOW est riche de professeurs reconnus dans leur spécialité.

Name: EA Dance Art
Description:
Opened in 2023, EA Dance Art is a ballroom dance studio in Hilliard, OH owned by professional American Rhythm competitors Enoch Evans and Anastasia Gordeeva. At EA Dance Art, Enoch and Anastasia teach adults and children the art of ballroom dancing through private one-on-one lessons, group classes, social dance parties and dancesport competitions.

Enoch and Anastasia began their journeys separately as young children studying International Latin, only meeting each other in 2018 to dance together professionally. They each have over 11 years of teaching experience and have multiple certifications to teach over 25 different partner dance styles including Salsa, Bachata, Rumba, Swing, Waltz, Tango, and Foxtrot to name a few of the most popular.

Currently, Enoch and Anastasia compete in the American Rhythm division all around the country in hopes of being able to provide the best version of themselves to their beloved community of dancers. They have numerous titles in the Rising Star Rhythm and Open Rhythm divisions. They are always striving to continue their own education to inspire their students and encourage constant growth physically, mentally, and emotionally.

Join Enoch and Anastasia on this journey of dancing, and you too will see how it changes your life! Contact us to schedule a lesson today or book online: https://www.eadanceart.com/book-online

Name: Nrityakosh
Description:
‘Nrityakosh’, a belly dance school & production house based in Bangalore, was founded by the versatile belly dancer Debapriya Das. Nrityakosh has been at the forefront of the new age belly dance movement in Bangalore for the past several years.  Over the past 5 years, Nrityakosh has curated and produced concepts’ with middle eastern folk dances, classical and modern oriental style, Indian and tribal fusion belly dance repertoire. Her concepts or dance themes put a method to the cacophony of emotions and energies, pick and customize elements from storytelling and oriental dance vocabulary to present a captivating show. Artists in Nrityakosh break, rather ‘shake’ the stereotypical notions and beliefs, inferiority complexes with our own body. They strongly preach and practice celebration of the body that we have been gifted with!
 
Some of Nrityakosh’s notable works
 
Safar-E-Raqs is a theatrical belly dance production which travels from the late 1790’s to the present day unravelling how the dance was adapted – to different cultures & different audiences. Safar-e-Raqs was a collaborative effort between Nrityakosh Dance Company and several independent belly dancers and theatre actors in Bangalore. The production opened in Bangalore on 21st January 2018 at the Alliance Francaise Auditorium.
 
Papusza - The Rise And Fall Of Romani Poet is a dance production of the greatest Polish Roma poet of the same name. She was a path-breaking artist and tragic figure - where her own art led to her exile from her people, as literacy was considered unsuitable for women. The story of her life was presented on Nov 9th, 2019 at ADA Rangamandira Auditorium.
 
The RaS Project – A collection of stories from the Ramayana explored the concept of the Bhava-Rasa theory from the Natyashastra through the language of modern-day belly dance. To help in exploring this concept several characters were chosen from the Ramayana and their journeys were narrated by the dancers and students of Nrityakosh.

Name: SOUL DE SOUL Dance Convention
Description:
"A Soul Defining Movement" | NON-COMPETITIVE Dance Convention & Showcase

SDS seeks to disrupt conventional convention training by focusing on diversity, application of intersectionality, and the prioritization of all voices. in its pursuits to create a safe space for all, its fundamental principles and values are deployed in artistry, community, and by an altruistic ethos and creation based culture where the emphasis is on people.

Name: La Danse Art & Cia
Description: Somos uma escola de dança, criada em 1994, localizada na Barra da Tijuca!

Name: Dynamic Dance School
Description: Dansschool in Koksijde // we dance, we create.

Name: Wonder Club Dance Studio Oy
Description: Tanssitunnit, Workshopit, yritysten tanssitunnit, yksityistapahtumat, polttarit, tanssistudion vuokraus, juhlatilan vuokraus, tanssijat, esitykset

Name: UC Berkeley Zahanat
Description:
We are Zahanat, the premier competitive, nationally-ranked all-male fusion dance team out of UC Berkeley. We specialize in bringing together traditional Indian styles of bhangra, bollywood, kuthu, and more, with a western hip-hop influence. Currently performing in our 14th year!

Please reach out here if you are interested in gig bookings:
https://www.gigsalad.com/zahanat_berkeley

Email us:
ucberkeleyzahanat@gmail.com

Name: Zavod Studio Dansa
Description: Plesni center s poudarkom na swing plesih in gibalni kulturi. Center za plesno terapijo in gibalno kulturo.

Name: Forza Dance
Description:
At Forza Dance, we believe in the transformative power of movement to break barriers, build bridges, and cultivate deeper human connection. Guided by Artistic Director Michaella Barron, Forza creates relevant, thought-provoking work that reflects contemporary social themes, honors diverse experiences, and uplifts ancestral stories. Rooted in the Italian concept of "forza," meaning strength and resilience, our mission is to use dance as a catalyst for empathy, dialogue, and change.

Forza Dance is deeply community-focused, offering accessible programming that supports both emerging and established artists. Through workshops, professional development, and our 5 for $5 Class Series, we ensure that movement remains open to all. Signature events like Shindig: A Social Gathering with Dance and the BLOOM: Emerging Artist Festival have become vital platforms, transforming traditional performance into interactive, inclusive experiences.

We strive to help keep the dance industry thriving and evolving to ensure a more robust future of the field that can make deeper positive impacts on our communities. Join us on our journey creating exciting events and opportunities for all and sharing our artistic visions with the world.

Name: OORJA
Description:
OORJA - The Western and Street Dance Society of Hansraj College, University of Delhi, has been a thriving force in the Delhi Dance Circuit for the past 17 years. With a legacy built on passion, perseverance, and pure love for the art, Oorja continues to elevate the standard of collegiate dance year after year.

Our members specialize across a vibrant spectrum of Western styles — from Popping, Hip-Hop, and Waacking to Krump, Locking, Animation and many more — conquering both street battles and stage competitions with unmatched energy and finesse. Each performance is a testament to our versatility, storytelling, and dedication to pushing boundaries.

Every year, fresh talent steps in, keeping the spirit of Oorja alive — a spirit rooted in teamwork, discipline, and creative evolution. What defines us is not just how we move, but what moves us is a collective heartbeat for dance that refuses to settle for mediocrity.

Name: PPARC - Parimal Performing Arts & Research Center
Description: PPARC  specialises in the Bharatanatyam style of classical dance. Our vision of creating performers and choreographers is executed by our talented staff which holds Master’s degree in dance, thereby assuring high quality training and teaching.

Name: UW Dhamaka
Description: Introducing UW Dhamaka: University of Waterloo's first Bollywood dance club open to the KW community. UW Dhamaka is a club to bring together the community of Indian dancers and fuse Bollywood music and dance culture into the UW student body. The club aims to infuse the different cultural dance forms in Bollywood such as bhangra, kathak, bolly-hop and more.

Name: AXIONS CREW
Description:
Hey there! Welcome to Axions, where we're all about dancing, having fun, and connecting through our shared love for movement and expression.

At Axions, we're not just a dance club; we're a tight-knit family of dancers who support and inspire each other every step of the way. Whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting out, there's a place for you here. We believe that everyone has their own unique rhythm to bring to the dance floor.

From late-night practice sessions to adrenaline-pumping performances, we're always pushing boundaries and exploring new styles. But it's not all about the dance moves; it's about the friendships we build, the memories we create, and the passion we share for our craft.

Join us as we groove to the beat, chase our dreams, and spread joy through dance. Connect with us to stay in the loop on auditions, workshops, and all the exciting events we have planned. Let's make some unforgettable memories together!

#AxionsFamily #SRMISTDance #DanceCommunity #FindYourRhythm

Name: Dance.Film.Performance.
Description:
DFP is an award-winning contemporary dance company and production agency, renowned for its groundbreaking approach. Specialising in producing events, original films, performances, and music, it delivers bold creative impact through exclusively produced works.

Working at the intersection of new media arts, visual arts, and fashion, DFP fosters innovative collaborations that redefine contemporary performance. By connecting artists across disciplines, it creates dynamic platforms; including curated events and live productions to showcase visionary work and spark transformative creative dialogues.

Committed to reimagining contemporary art, DFP meets the ambition of today’s most exciting creators. With its focus on immersive experiences, it has established itself as a leading force in the contemporary arts scene, inspiring audiences and artists to engage with dance as a multidimensional, evolving form of expression.

Name: BackBone | Donna Chittick
Description:
BackBone creëert relevant werk met de waarden van hiphop als basis. We brengen maatschappelijke thema's met als doel het publiek te prikkelen en aan het denken te zetten over hun aandeel in de maatschappij. BackBone blijft een organisatie waarin toekomstig hiphoptalent kan groeien – geschoolde dansers én autodidacten. Deze praktijk van ontwikkelen en doorgeven zit namelijk in het hiphop DNA.

De kernwaarden van BackBone zijn saamhorigheid, gelijkwaardigheid en ontwikkeling. BackBone wil hiphopdans verbreden door het vocabulaire te verdiepen, de dansvorm te linken aan andere disciplines en te verbreden naar andere podia, ander publiek en de publieke ruimte; daar waar de hiphop vandaan komt.

Name: Destiny School of Dance Ltd
Description: Growing dance school based in Wolverhampton

Name: ASCENSION DANCE
Description: We are mission driven and dedicated to fostering an uplifting environment ready to showcase, inspire and recognize the aspirations and talents of your dancers. Our team is steadfast in our commitment to offer events which are held to the highest standard of excellence while providing exceptional service through the fruit of the Spirit.

Name: Dancenter Vietnam
Description: Since opening in 2007, our mission is to create a home for dancers of all ages and skill levels and to build a vibrant community that nurtures dance creativity in Saigon. With styles including Ballet, Hip Hop, Contemporary, Lyrical, and Jazz, our international instructors guide students in developing technique and self-expression. Beyond classes, we actively support the growth of the local dance scene through artist residencies, professional dancer training, and show productions. These efforts come together to make Dancenter a unique space—where dancers can grow, and artists can share the power of dance.

Name: Dance Unlimited Miami
Description:
Miami based dance studio 

Our goal is to nurture and encourage our dancers to do their best and build a staff devoted to creating a studio of excellence. We aim to develop the entire child in body and mind while enabling them to succeed in the world of today.

Name: KM Agency
Description: What we strive to bring to your studio really can be life-changing; mentally, physically and monetarily. Our goal is to enhance your brand, your business, and your product. Through a combination of classes, mentoring and heart to heart sessions, we completely transform and rejuvenate not only the dancers and faculty but also the inner workings of the studio. We are CHANGING LIVES… even when the music stops.

Name: compagnie danse louis barreau
Description:
𝗗𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗘 ︎ 𝗠𝗨𝗦𝗜𝗖

✚ 𝟯 𝘾𝙊𝙉𝘾𝙀𝙍𝙏𝙊𝙎 𝙋𝙊𝙐𝙍 𝙋𝙄𝘼𝙉𝙊 𝘿𝙀 𝘽𝘼𝙍𝙏𝙊́𝙆
Premiere 05/11/24  Manège, scène nationale-Reims

✚ 𝘼𝙎𝙎𝙊𝘾𝙄𝘼𝙏𝙀𝘿 𝘼𝙍𝙏𝙄𝙎𝙏 Manège, scène nationale-Reims & Moulin du Roc - Scène nationale Niort

✷ ✷ ✷

Louis Barreau is choreographer, dancer and musician. Trained at the Conservatoire of la Roche-sur-Yon
(music, ballet, release and drama), he pursues studies at Trinity Laban Conservatoire of Music and Dance, in London, where he receives the Simone Michelle Award for Outstanding Choreography Achievement, after being specialized in various contemporary and classical dance techniques.
After graduating from the Laban School in 2014, he creates in France his own dance company: compagnie danse louis barreau. He undertakes at the same time a Master’s degree in dance research at Paris 8 University, arts, philosophy, aesthetics, and graduates with first class honours in 2016. Graduated of a first cycle of Kinetography (Laban notation of movement) at the Paris National Superior Conservatoire of Music and Dance (CNSMDP), he keeps on focusing his work on the dialogue between dance and music, questioning specifically choreographic composition and structure.
He considers that the choreographing act essentially consists in organising movement in space and time. His works associate the formal and mathematical abstraction to the musical, vital and dynamic impetus of movement.

Name: Côté Danse
Description:
Côté Danse’s mission is to create and present original dance works and experiences in collaboration with various and diverse designers, artists, and partners with the goal of providing performance excellence.
We continue to offer accessible and scalable productions for a multitude of audiences and venues within Canada and abroad, fostering a new generation of dance and theatre goers.

Informed by his classical ballet vocabulary, Guillaume Côté’s choreography contours space with resonant geometries and fervent human connections. Contemporary lines and forms with a sleek edge and refined athleticism give his work a profound vitality.

Name: Giant Studio
Description:
Le Giant Studio est une école de danse, d’aérobic et de condition physique qui se veut accessible à tous. Au cœur de la philosophie du Giant Studio se trouve la conviction profonde que la danse est une forme d’expression universelle qui transcende les barrières culturelles et linguistiques.
Le Giant Studio s’engage à cultiver la différence, quelle qu’elle soit et à en faire une force. Accepter la différence amène la tolérance, la considération et le respect. Une vie en harmonie que l’on emmène partout avec soi pour un épanouissement personnel permanent et constant.

Le Giant Studio célèbre l’unicité de chaque individu, encourage son potentiel tout en lui transmettant son énergie et en restant fidèle à sa philosophie.

En s’engageant à offrir une formation de haute qualité dans un environnement positif et respectueux, le Giant Studio inspire les danseurs à repousser leurs limites, à explorer de nouvelles formes d’expression et à découvrir tout le potentiel de la danse en tant qu’art transformateur.

Name: En Corps
Description:
En corps est une association de danse qui initie les étudiants du Celsa 

Notre but est de leur faire découvrir un large panel de danses, de toutes cultures. 

 Nous sommes trois co-fondatrices à l’origine de ce projet.  
Clélia Gheller, Manon Treca et Yousra El Maghnouji. 

 Pour nous suivre sur Instagram: https://lnkd.in/eKPUcEJ2

Name: Blue Moon Dance Co.
Description:
Welcome to Blue Moon Dance Co.!

We believe in the transformative power of dance to inspire personal growth and bring joy to our community. Whether you’re looking to learn the latest moves from our local country dance halls or explore new styles like swing, ballroom and Latin, we’ve got you covered.

Our friendly instructors and state-of-the-art studio are here to support you every step of the way. Our goal is to create a welcoming space where everyone feels valued and empowered. Join us soon and discover the joy of dance with Blue Moon Dance Co. See you on the dance floor!

Name: Norwich Latin Dance
Description:
Learn to dance with us at weekly classes in Norwich city centre.

Wee accommodate for all levels.

Name: PopRox Dance
Description: Since 2018, PopRox has been a welcoming, judgment-free community where adults of all backgrounds, body types, and experience levels can move, connect, and thrive. Dance is a fundamental human need—not just for professionals, but for anyone craving joy, confidence, and community.

Name: Palette Session
Description:
Palette Session Australia is a not-for-profit organising experimental dance sessions for freestyle dancers of all genres to discover the unique colour of their movement and celebrate the unique colour of others. A session is a gathering of dancers who improvise to music with the intent of developing their craft and building tight-knit communities.

Palette Session was created in South Korea by choreographer and freestyle dancer CHAEDO in 2022 with principles he developed while studying at Paekche Institute of the Arts. The group has a membership of 582 dancers, performers and choreographers within Korea's flourishing street dance industry.

In February 2024, Palette Session established its first international chapter - Palette Session Australia. Since launching, we have run 6 sessions for over 96 dancers drawn from street dance, contemporary dance, contact improvisation and Ballroom communities.

Name: Sukanya Burman Dance
Description:
Sukanya Burman Dance is a 501 (c)(3) US based contemporary dance company, located in Jamestown NY, that mobilizes the expressive techniques of Indian diasporic dances and modern dance to explore compelling ideas and create shared visual experiences. 

With deep roots in Bharatanatyam, Kathak and Modern dance vocabularies, the company aims to explore different ways of movement in the human body to tell stories relevant to our world today.

Name: Lordz GmbH
Description: The dance academy with experience and style. We live hip hop. We love movement. LORDZ is the SCHOOL FOR DANCE, but also much more: we are a place for urban culture in a peaceful atmosphere. MOVE WITH US! Come and join us, get to know the TEAM and be a part of LORDZ.

Name: The Ballroom Club
Description: At The Ballroom Club, we aim to stimulate the mind, to challenge the body and to ensure that you have fun on the dance floor. Our lessons are engaging, effective and delivered at your pace. Each class is designed to achieve your personal goals whether they are simply to keep active or to perfect your technique. Come dance with us to explore a new world of motion and emotion and get to know yourself in a whole new way.

Name: Ritmo y Sabor - Georgetown University
Description: We are Georgetown University's premier Latin dance group! We specialize in all types of Latin dance including, but not limited to: bachata, salsa, reggaeton, merengue, etc!

Name: Dance Casa Festival
Description:
Dance Casa Company is a dynamic event production company dedicated to creating immersive and inspiring dance festivals that celebrate global culture and community. Since our founding, we have brought together thousands of dancers, artists, and enthusiasts from around the world to share in the joy of movement and connection.

We specialize in organizing large-scale international festivals, workshops, and social dance events that highlight a diverse range of dance styles, including bachata, salsa, kizomba, and more. Our mission is to foster creativity, cultural exchange, and unforgettable experiences through the power of dance.

As we continue to grow, we welcome partnerships with brands and sponsors who value authentic community engagement and want to support vibrant cultural events.

Name: Portland Dance eXchange
Description: A safe, uplifting environment to learn, grow, & celebrate yourself through dance.

Name: La Fondation de danse Margie Gillis Dance Foundation
Description:
La Fondation de danse Margie Gillis (FDMG) a pour mission la mise en œuvre de la vision artistique de la chorégraphe et danseuse Margie Gillis, en plus du déploiement de son engagement envers la communauté des arts. La FDMG accompagne la création, la production et la diffusion des œuvres chorégraphiques de sa fondatrice. 

The Margie Gillis Dance Foundation (MGDF) has the mission of implementing the artistic vision of choreographer and dancer Margie Gillis, in addition to actively engaging with the arts community. MGDF supports the creation, production, and dissemination of choreographic works of its founder.

Name: UMass Stage Crew Dance Team
Description: We incorporate styles of Lyrical, Jazz, Modern, Musical Theater, Contemporary, and Hip Hop into our team practices along with dance conditioning and technique. We are a dedicated group who loves to perform!

Name: Kalanjali Club NMAMIT
Description: The Kalanjali Club at NMAMIT college is a dynamic and passionate community for dance enthusiasts of all styles and backgrounds.
