It offers a creative platform for students to express themselves through the art of dance, while also fostering growth and skill development. Through regular workshops led by experienced choreographers, performances at cultural events, and intercollegiate competitions, members have the opportunity to explore a wide variety of dance forms, from classical to contemporary to hiphop. The club also organizes fun events like dance battles and showcases, promoting teamwork, confidence, and a deep appreciation for dance culture.

Name: DNC Dance & Yoga Studio
Description: Purpose built dance studio, with two floors available to hire for fitness and wellness classes/treatments.

Name: MStepDanceStudio
Description:
M-Step the Dance Studio was founded in 2006 by Manvendra Singh with a vision of providing the best quality dance education with high-class professional infrastructure at an affordable price in Delhi NCR.
M-Step the Dance Studio offers many dance classes such as Kathak, Bollywood, Hip-Hop, Contemporary, Jazz, Waacking, and many more classes. We have special batches for kids with a team of experienced trainers who are passionate about dance. We all are happy to help students to understand & equip their styles.

Name: North Georgia Clogging and Dance Co., LLC
Description: On behalf of North Georgia Clogging and Dance Co., we are thrilled to bring our enthusiasm to the dance community of the growing and vibrant community of Cherokee County, GA and beyond. We are committed to providing top-tier dance education, fostering creativity, and nurturing a love for movement in students of all ages and skill levels. We aim to inspire individuals to explore the joy of dance while embracing the rich cultural heritage of clogging and traditional dance forms.  It is with great anticipation that we embark on this journey, and we are eager to connect with the community, cultivate a supportive and inclusive environment, and hone in on leadership and development skills for our youth.

Name: Mayura Natyalayam
Description: Mayura Natyalayam is a Kitchener-based Indian classical dance studio that specializes in Bharatanatyam and fusion. We provide online & in-person classes with flexible schedules. Please visit our website to know more about our exclusive workshops, tutorials & events.

Name: Hamilton School of Dance {Canada}
Description:
Our dance program offers an opportunity to explore a variety of dance forms such as ballet, contemporary, jazz, lyrical, and more. Our high-caliber faculty is committed to nurturing a passion for dance while providing the highest quality of training.

*Classes for all ages and levels
*Progressive dance curriculum
*Highly qualified dance instructors
*Founded by a former professional dancer

Name: Gema Nusantara Sekolah Vokasi IPB University
Aoife Ryan Academy Irish Dance
Description:
Irish Dancing classes Aoife Ryan TCRG registered with CLRG. 
Tiny Tots 3+
Little Jiggers 5+
Adult Céilí Fitness Classes
Performance Group

Name: Soul Entertainment Art
Description: We are a school focused on developing dancers with strong foundations and with a very defined technique. Besides the dance, we want to teach our students about the art of Latin dance and some of its history to also generate understanding and hopefully place the seed for them to grow in love with the dance and the culture. We teach Salsa and Bachata be ready to learn, have fun and bring your water to stay hydrated!

Name: KHÉO
Description:
Compagnie de danse contemporaine et collectif d’artistes hybrides.
Philosophie d’une libération.

Name: UBC Dance Team
Description: Established in 2009, the UBC Dance Team is a dance company composed of UBC students with several years of competitive experience. The company's members come from a variety of dance backgrounds, and our choreography incorporates many varying genres including contemporary, jazz, lyrical, and tap. Although we are mostly self-choreographed, we are fortunate to be able to work alongside guest choreographers every year.

Name: Lovely Leaps
Description: Lovely Leaps is a company based out of 457 E Grand Ave Suite 2, Escondido, California, United States.

Name: Hope 4 Hip Hop LLC
Description: Hope 4 Hip Hop aims to uphold the integrity of authentic Hip Hop and Break culture in Austin, Texas while educating the next generation of youth and young adults. By creating platforms for creators and giving them the opportunity to express themselves. Our mission is to utilize Hip Hop as a tool through competitive Breaking events, performances, artistic development, coaching, and dance classes.

Name: Generation Kiz
Description:
We are a Kizomba related dance school with a team of passionate teachers in both The Netherlands and Germany. Everything we do is supporting our values authenticity, equality and respect. 

We focus specifically on Urban Kiz and Tarraxo, these dances involve understanding body language and building trust. We integrate diverse worldwide styles, preparing our students for social dancing. Our goal is to develop a new generation of adaptable dancers and teams navigating our ever-changing environment.

The term ‘Generation’ reflects our mission to positively influence those around us and to radiate respect and authenticity. Join Generation Kiz for a transformative dance journey, expressing yourself through the language of movement.

Name: PRO DANCE STUDIOS
Description: PRO DANCE STUDIOS

Name: Mayura Natyalayam Bharatanatyam Academy
Description:
Mayura Natyalayam Bharatanatyam Academy, founded by Prithika Kamalesan, follows a structured grade-level system, and students receive individualized mentorship to build confidence and performance excellence.
 
In addition to regular classes, the academy offers official high-school dance credits and opportunities to participate in various performances, cultural events, and stage productions to enhance their stage experience and artistic growth.

Name: Black Arts Company
Description: The Black Arts Company (BAC) is Princeton’s premier hip-hop dance company. Founded in 1990 with the mission of celebrating the black arts and bringing diversity to Princeton's campus, BAC Dance has since grown to embody much more. We aim to explore a variety of hip-hop styles from high energy hip-hop, to technical styles such as popping and house, to cultural styles of the African Diaspora such as dancehall and modern African. Our student-run biannual shows, workshops, guest performances, and choreography videos showcase the best that BAC has to offer while embodying the never-ending energy and spirit that is at the heart of this dance company. BAC continues to push its dancers, in hip-hop and beyond, without ever sacrificing the tight-knit bond of our purple family!

Name: Uptown Entertainment Sahne ve Gösteri Sanatları - Uptown Funk Dance Company
Description:
Uptown Entertainment, yeni ve yaratıcı dans gösterileri sunmayı amaçlayan bir dans organizasyon şirketidir. Dansa aşık olan üç ortak tarafından, dansın gücünü kullanarak insanları eğlendirmek, ilham vermek ve birleştirmek için bir araya gelinerek oluşturulmuş bir oluşumdur.

Her gösterimizi izleyicilerimize unutulmaz bir deneyim sunmak için özenle planlıyoruz. Farklı dans türlerini ve stilleri bir araya getirerek, her yaştan ve ilgi alanından izleyiciye hitap eden gösteriler yaratıyoruz.

Deneyimli ve yetenekli bir ekip tarafından yönetilen Uptown Funk, dansın sanatsal ve teknik yönlerini birleştirerek, her gösteriyi benzersiz ve özel kılan bir çalışma ortaya koyuyor.

Name: Covent Garden Dance Company
Description:
Founded in 2006 by the company director Matt Brady,  The Covent Garden Dance Company represents a fresh approach to creating and producing dance theatre and events in the UK and abroad. The company combines new and established talents in the fields of production, choreography, musical composition and design to create original, engaging and entertaining work.

The Covent Garden Dance Company is renowned for taking beautiful and unique locations around the world and creating stunning 400+ seat dinner theatres.  

We pride ourselves on our reputation for creating programmes that are beautiful and inspiring for all tastes; whether a season ticket holder at The Royal Ballet or a first time visitor at Hatch House, we promise performances that will stay with you long after you leave.

As a company we are dedicated to producing new and original work to the highest degree of excellence for young and emerging creatives.  A large part of our performance programmes are based on original works created by the company from its endeavours and the profits generated from them.  We are strongly committed to building and educating new audiences, young and old, which includes delivering not only educational workshops in conjunction with all performances whenever possible but to strive to find inspiring locations to present the art at its best. 

The original ‘Bijou Ballet’ event concept was created with the hope that we might encourage and instil the same passion and love of dance that this company was founded upon.

Name: Ambo Dance Theatre
Description:
Ambo Dance Theatre (Louisville, KY) is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization dedicated to furthering the artistry, accessibility, and professional opportunities within modern and contemporary dance. Their work is often interdisciplinary in nature, combining elements from theatre, film, photography, and visual arts to create works that touch on social issues and the human condition. 

 

Using a collaborative model for creation, Ambo Dance Theatre not only presents the unique voice of the choreographer, but also the direct input and movement vocabulary of the dancers themselves to create innovative, integrative, and original modern dance works that unify a variety of perspectives on complex topics.

Name: Dance Unlimited
Description:
Dance Unlimited is one of Sheffield’s leading dance studios, inspiring dancers of all ages through high-quality training, positive experiences, and a community built on confidence, creativity, and joy.

We offer a wide range of dance programmes for children, young people, and adults, with clear progression pathways across styles including ballet, tap, jazz, contemporary, street, acro, musical theatre, and more.

At DU, we believe dance is about so much more than steps. Our classes are designed to develop skill, resilience, friendship, and self-belief, helping every dancer grow both inside and outside the studio.

Everything we do is rooted in our core values, SPLIT:

 Service & Smiles
 Passion & Positivity
 Loving & Limitless
 Innovation & Imagination
 Teamwork & Transparency

Alongside our signature teaching standard SHINE, these values shape the supportive, uplifting environment that makes Dance Unlimited truly unique.

 Transforming lives through the joy of dance, and Doing Dance Differently, every step of the way.

Name: Salsa Pa'lante
Description: Salsa Pa'lante, established in 2004, is dedicated to enhancing the Latin arts community at Cornell University and Ithaca through workshops, weekly instruction, cultural education, and performance of salsa choreography and improvised Rueda de Casino demonstrations.

Name: Spoilers Danza y Producción
Description:
Spoilers es un centro de Danza y Producción Audiovisual que se distingue por ser un espacio polivalente, diseñado para llevar a cabo cualquier tipo de producción artística sin límites. El centro cuenta con unas instalaciones completamente equipadas en sonido e iluminación, lo que permite desarrollar cualquier tipo de producción audiovisual, musical o teatral.

Además, Spoilers se caracteriza por ser una escuela de formación en danza, ofreciendo clases de diversas disciplinas, como hip hop, heels, bachata, reggaetón, entre muchas otras, adaptadas para todas las edades y niveles. 

Spoilers persigue la creación de todo tipo de artes escénicas. Su compromiso es impulsar la creatividad y la expresión a través de la danza y la producción audiovisual, proporcionando una plataforma única en Málaga.

Siente la Inspiración.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios-Michigan Region
Description:
Co-founded by the legendary Fred Astaire, our studios set the standard of excellence in dance instruction. From Ballroom to Latin, from Swing to Salsa - we offer all styles of dance lessons for all ages and abilities in a friendly atmosphere.

Our Michigan region is expanding and we have many opportunities for those looking to open their own studio or to become a dance instructor at an existing studio. Contact us today!

Name: Evolve Dance
Description:
A fun, elevated dance studio that helps people find joyful expression
& community, in addition to strong technical skills.

Find us on instagram @evolvedancephilly

Name: Academia de baile ARIA
Description:
Somos una academia de baile donde nuestro principal objetivo es acercar el baile a muchas más personas. Ofrecemos una amplia variedad de estilos de ritmos latinos tales como cumbia y salsa para fiestas, salsa en línea, bachata, salsa cubana, entre otros.

Nuestras clases están diseñadas para que las personas puedan aprender a bailar en poco tiempo y a su propio ritmo, no importa si nunca han bailado o si ya saben bailar.

Además, ofrecemos servicios de clases de baile para empresas, para que puedas brindar este beneficio a los miembros de tu equipo de trabajo.

No lo dudes más, ven y disfruta la magia del baile.

Name: West Coast Ballet School
Description: West Coast Ballet School is a new dance school located in Hermosa Beach, CA. WCBS offers classical ballet training for ages 4 and up. Classes include Creative Movement, Ballet Levels 1-3 and Adult/Open Ballet Class.

Name: Temper Tantrum Dance Company
Description: We create an engaging, entertaining, and unique dance experience while providing a platform for dancers to freely create and be fairly paid for their artistry.

Name: UW Dance Company
Description: UW Dance Company is the University of Waterloo's only competitive dance team. As a club we compete in 3 varsity competitions each year against University and College teams from across Canada. We choreograph, train, and perform in a variety of styles including tap, jazz, ballet, pointe, acro, hip-hop, lyrical, contemporary, and open. All of our routines are choreographed by current students on the team and we take pride in the amazing talent of our dancers. Each member of our team is hardworking, dedicated, and passionate about dance.

Name: New Vision Dance Center
Description: Located in Hillsboro, OR, our dance center helps students cultivate their creativity and have a blast! Visit New Vision Dance Center today to become a student!

Name: Dance latin Boston
Description: Dance with passion, live with joy. Latin Dance Boston, where every rhythm matters. We offer services for hotels, residences, companies, and personalized lessons. Inquire about your package today.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - San Mateo
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - San Mateo is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Northern California. From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance. We teach waltz, tango, foxtrot, Viennese waltz, quickstep, cha-cha, rumba, swing, bolero, mambo, salsa, bachata, hustle, merengue, country western dances, also we provide wedding-first dance, father-daughter dance, mother-son dance, wedding party choreography. Check out our dance studio today and ask about our introductory offer!

Name: dansmetlaura
Description:
Dansmetlaura, is jouw bestemming voor wekelijkse danslessen én een go-to hulplijn voor je huwelijksdans. Wij bieden een veilige en inclusieve omgeving voor dansers van alle achtergronden en leeftijden.

Maar dat is niet alles - we schitteren ook in de evenementen wereld. Zo organiseren we energizers voor bedrijven om de vermoeidheid tegen te gaan tijdens het langdurig neerzitten tijdens congressen. Maar ook ons showteam staat klaar om jouw evenement te verlevendigen, of het nu is als dansact of als freestyler.

Wil je meer informatie? Neem contact met ons op via het onderstaande formulier. We kijken ernaar uit om samen iets moois te creëren.

Op maandag in Gent.
Op weekavonden in Deinze.
Op zondag in Nevele.

Name: Shimmy Shimmy Ya
Description:
SHIMMY YOUR TEAM TO SUCCESS
 
Our highly experienced instructors at Shimmy Shimmy Ya have been empowering people through dance for decades, and now we want to bring our expertise to your office and encourage your team to step away from their desks.
We understand the impact corporate stress can have on employees’ wellbeing, so we designed dance classes specifically for the workplace and the disability sector.
 
Dancing is more than just physical exercise. It has the potential to increase self-esteem, relieve stress, trigger creativity and create bonds. But most importantly: it’s fun. This is why we have not only created classes to combat burnout in today’s corporate culture, but specifically to empower people living with disability too.
 
Whether you have a particular dance style in mind, or there’s a specific need in your company that you’d like us to help you address – Shimmy Shimmy Ya can create a bespoke dance class package for your team to enjoy. Our instructors specialise in choreography that caters to all abilities and in creating an atmosphere that’s fun and relaxed. We’d love to come and dance with your team.

Name: Latina Tribe
Description: Empoderamos mujeres a través del baile. Proporcionamos un espacio seguro de liberación emocional y conexión física y mental al ritmo de la música. #LatinaTribe

Name: Afro-Hoos Dance Team at UVA
Description: Afro-Hoos is an afro-fusion dance team that strives to demonstrate and celebrate the complexity of cultural dance throughout the African diaspora at the University of Virginia and in the Charlottesville Community. They represent traditional and modern dance styles from all over the continent of Africa by learning about the different dance styles of African nations and implementing their knowledge of these styles to construct dynamic dance performances that work to include and unite the community.

Name: Rejoice! Diaspora Dance Theater
Description: Rejoice! Diaspora Dance Theater seeks to diversify the contemporary dance landscape with untold stories and under-told perspectives from communities of color. Grounded in values from the African Diaspora and using our art as activism. Rejoice! celebrates and cultivates community through artistic engagement, performances, and dialogue, weaving our stories of hardship and triumph.

Name: Dance Yard Studio
Description: Dance Yard Studio is een warme thuis voor iedereen die de liefde voor creativiteit deelt en zichzelf wil ontplooien. Dus, of je nu je eerste pas zet of al jaren danst, of je een concept tot leven wil brengen of simpelweg een inspirerende ruimte zoekt: bij Dance Yard Studio ben je welkom. Let’s create. Let’s connect. Let’s dance. LET'S GROW!

Name: Society Hill Dance Academy
Description: At Society Hill Dance Academy, established in 2002, we help our students achieve their goals at their own pace and teach all of our dance classes in a style that is clear, supportive and fun. Our beautiful 2 story studio also boasts nearly 10,000 sf of stunning event space including beautiful hardwood floors and large floor to ceiling windows overlooking the trendy East Passyunk Avenue.

Name: OTROLADO DANCE COMPANY
Description: Cuban contemporary dance company founded and directed by Norge Cedeño and Thais Suárez. A unique artistic experience motivated to challenge the limits of the body and mind, to create works of art as wonderful and unpredictable as life itself with total artistic integrity.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Clearwater
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Clearwater is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Florida! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: Prelude Dance Competition
Description:
Prelude's goal is to support the Dance Community with a competition focusing and showcasing local & regional hip-hop dance groups, dance companies, and the overall dance community. By training and preparing for this event, we hope to enrich, strengthen and improve an indivIdual dance and/or dance group.

Prelude Dance Competition is committed and accountable in including and accepting dancers of all backgrounds—there will be no discrimination of race, ethnicity, sex, gender, age, religion, disability, socioeconomic status, and political beliefs. We will emphasize and encourage the education of dance history and culture, including but not limited to Hip-hop culture and other movements of the African diaspora. We aim to establish a safe environment through anti-racism, anti-othering and anti-abuse to protect the physical, mental, and emotional safety and health of competition participants. As an organization, there will be a long lasting commitment to evolve and adapt with the current social and political climate.

Name: FoxCarpentry and General Contractors
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Portland is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Maine! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: Salsa With Juan
Description:
Salsa With Juan is a dance company in Oakland California. We teach salsa, bachata, cha-cha, merengue, 2 step, and many other partner dances.

We offer group lessons, private lessons and can even teach private and corporate events. NEW... we also offer ZOOM classes!

Services Available
-Online Dance Lessons
- Salsa Dance Classes In Oakland 
-Corporate Salsa Dance Classes (Group building dance!)
- Wedding Choreography 
- Performance Choreography
- Performance Team Training
- Corporate Team Building Salsa Lessons
- DJ Services
- MC 
- Event Management
- Private Lessons
- Corporate Events and Entertainment
- Coaching - Dance Coaching

Name: Las Damas - Muñoz Salas Choreography
Description: We are a dynamic Latina, first-generation duo who first met through cheerleading back in 2006. That shared experience sparked our passion for performance, eventually leading us to pursue dance and, later, the confidence to step into choreography. Together, we bring over 13 years of experience to our craft, and we’re thrilled to share this creative journey with all of you.

Name: Natyalaya School of Arts
Description:
Natyalaya School of Arts is an Indian Classical Dance school based out of 9401 N Meridian St, Indianapolis, Indiana, United States.
The mission of Natyalaya School of Arts is to instill a sound understanding and enjoyment for rich and eloquent art of  Bharatanatyam and Mohiniyattam in our students while maintaining its purity, elegance, and traditional roots.

Name: Footsteps Dance School
Description: Footsteps is a dance school founded in 1995, specialising in Ballroom, Latin, Rock 'n' Roll, and Freestyle dance. We also offer classes in Musical Theatre, Street, and Contemporary dance, along with private tuition and exercise sessions. Our bi-annual shows at the Haymarket Theatre give pupils the opportunity to reach their full potential as stage performers. All our instructors are fully qualified with the International Dance Teachers' Association.

Name: Dance 10 Project
Description: Project based dance collective | stages dance & physical-theater

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Hoboken
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Hoboken is the premiere ballroom dance studio in New Jersey! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: Dance Studio One
Description: Test

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Summit
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Summit is the premiere ballroom dance studio in  New Jersey! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: FLEX Dansskola
Description:
FLEX Dansskola erbjuder ett brett utbud i barndans, showjazz, disco, street, modern, jazzdans och akrobatik. Oberoende om du är ung eller gammal, aldrig dansat tidigare eller dansar på elitnivå. Du är välkommen vare sig du vill dansa för nöjes skull, för motionen eller om du vill bli tävlingsdansare och siktar mot toppen. Vi håller till vid Fågelsången i Bällstaberg, Vallentuna, och har även danskurser i kommunens gymnastiksalar.

På FLEX dansskola strävar vi efter att erbjuda dansundervisning av högsta kvalitet, där varje elev står i fokus. Vi värdesätter starkt en känsla av gemenskap och tillhörighet bland våra dansare

Skolans lärare erbjuder även privat dansträning (PDT). På en PDT får eleven möjlighet att arbeta på det som eleven önskar, vilket exempelvis kan vara bra inför tävling. Det går också bra att boka PDT för att jobba på en ny koreografi. 

Kom och bli en del av FLEX dansskola!

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Northern California
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Northern California Regional Office is the headquarters for all studios located in the Northern region of California including the San Mateo & Sant Clara counties! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: Umakoko
Description:
UMAKOKO is a creative company that delivers dance-oriented services, such as performances, creative directing, content creation, and artist performance management services to clients. 

With dance as our main tool, our mission is to create a unique vision through high-quality and innovative performances that captivate and engage audiences.

UMAKOKO aims to leave a mark, a legacy through a disruptive and unique vision of dance and performance.

Name: Michigan Mayuri
Description: Michigan Mayuri, previously known as Michigan Mastani, is the first co-ed Indian classical competitive dance team at the University of Michigan. We value growth as people, dancers, and creatives by constantly exploring different styles of Indian classical dance.

Name: hART Dance
Description:
Founded by Martha Hart, hART Dance is a dynamic company dedicated to inspiring and empowering through the art of dance. We offer professional performances, educational programs, and community engagement initiatives that blend contemporary and classical styles. Our expert instructors and innovative choreography foster a supportive environment for dancers of all ages and backgrounds. We are committed to making dance accessible and enriching our community. 

Join us and experience the transformative power of dance at hART!

Name: Dostana Dance Team at UF
Description: Dostana is the University of Florida’s co-ed Bollywood fusion dance team, blending traditional and modern South Asian choreography to create electrifying performances. Known for their high-energy routines and captivating storytelling, the team incorporates elements of Bollywood, hip-hop, contemporary dance, and South Asian styles like Bharatanatyam, Bhangra, and Kathak. Open to everyone, including those without prior dance experience, Dostana welcomes passionate individuals to join their vibrant community. Fueled by creativity and cultural expression, the team shines on stage through showcases, events, and a dynamic social media presence. More than a dance team, Dostana is a family committed to representing Bollywood culture with artistry and innovation.

Name: IMAGINE DANCE ACADEMY LLC
Description: At Imagine Dance Academy, we aim to stimulate the mind, challenge the body and help you to discover your inner dancer. Our classes are engaging, effective, and designed for both those who seek a career in dance or are looking for the perfect form of exercise. Come dance with us to explore a new world of motion and emotion and get to know yourself in a whole new way.

Name: Maytelier Studio de Dança
Description: Professora de Dança com experiência no ensino para crianças, jovens e adultos com enfase em Dança de salão e cultura popular.Desenvolvendo atividades integradoras, práticas de saúde e bem estar, promovendo inclusão e divulgação da arte brasileira.

Name: Stardom Dance Academy
Description: Award-winning Dance studio for both Recreational and Competitive child and adults alike.

Name: The First Dance
Description:
The First Dance is Canada’s go-to wedding dance company, helping couples across Toronto, Montreal, Ottawa, Calgary, Windsor, and online. We make learning to dance for your big day fun, easy, and totally stress free.

Whether you're feeling nervous, excited, or have never danced before, our award-winning instructors are here to guide you every step of the way. We create custom choreography that fits your style, your song, and your schedule. No pressure, just progress.

From romantic First Dances to fun parent dances and full bridal party routines, we’re here to make sure your moment on the dance floor feels just right and truly one of a kind.

Name: ViBe Dance
Description: ViBe Dance offersdance classes for children age 4yrs+ from our very own purpose-built studio in the heart of Warrington.

Name: Association dansehabile
Description:
Créée en 2001, dansehabile est une association de danse inclusive ouverte à toutes et tous. Elle a pour mission de développer des projets culturels et sociaux favorisant la rencontre entre danseurs avec ou sans handicap.
Structure artistique et pédagogique unique en Suisse romande, dansehabile propose une forme innovante d’intégration par le mouvement et la création. Elle invite danseurs et spectateurs à une approche sensible et inédite du corps, des perceptions, et de la différence.
Depuis 24 ans, l’association concrétise un rêve : rendre la danse accessible et porteuse de sens, en dépassant les barrières du handicap. Elle offre au public un regard nouveau sur la diversité des corps à travers des créations artistiques, des performances et des ateliers.
Pour qui ?
Toute personne aimant la danse, quels que soient ses capacités ou son parcours.
Avec qui ?
Des artistes professionnels de divers horizons, unis par une vision partagée de l’inclusion artistique.
Comment ?
Par le biais d'une compagnie, d’ateliers réguliers, de spectacles et d’événements culturels.
Pourquoi la danse ?
Parce qu’elle unit le commun et les singularités. Elle valorise les différences en les mettant en mouvement, et rappelle qu’un handicap n’est jamais une identité, mais une manière parmi d'autres d'habiter le monde.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Chesapeake East
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Chesapeake East is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Virginia! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: Stijldanssportstichting floorcraft
Description:
Wij zijn floorcraft!

Een Amsterdamse stijldanssportstichting in oprichting. Wij verzorgen wedstrijdtraining voor alle leeftijdsgroepen en danslessen voor stijldansenthousiasten van rond de 25-40 jaar.

Name: Kingdom Dancers
Description: Nous aidons les gens qui aime la danse à sortir de leurs zone de confort pour ensuite mettre leur talent pour l'œuvre de Dieu. Et le but principale est de répandre la parole de Dieu à travers le monde

Name: Danza Academy
Description:
Since 1976, Danza Academy of Social Dance has been making dance fun & easy for everyone. Danza Academy of Social Dance is the premier studio in Pennsylvania, with convenient locations in Philadelphia and Exton. With over 40 years experience in dance instruction, the best staff around, and our deeply rooted connections in the dance industry.
Danza Academy of Social Dance offers many benefits for anyone interested in learning to dance.

Name: TWISTERS CREW
Description: Twisters is the official dance crew of Anna University . It was found in the year 1995 by Mr. Solomon Karmegam . Since then, with persistent hard work and spirit it has made many achievements . It has been a motivational factor for many young talented students. With Efficient training of professionals and excellent training by the seniors , the team has proved to be one among the best crews in south India . And above all we are one BIG family of brothers and sisters . We practice everyday for the betterment of our team . We strictly practice only western style dances. We always enroll ourselves in every inter- college cultural festival . We have won many intercollege competitions like Choreonite - IITM saarang , The Hindu Nxg - Campus Jive etc., and also TV shows like thillana thillana , EQ etc., We also travel to other state colleges to compete in their culturals . We always have a thirst for competition . And lastly we always live upto to the saying " DANCERS ARE GOD'S ATHLETES"

Name: Avahita at UCI
Description: UCI’s Premier Competitive Indian Classical Dance Team

Name: Florida Dance Workshop
Description:
Florida Dance Workshop was founded in 1991 by mother/daughter duo Susan (Labousier) Kickbush & Michelle (Labousier) Mandile. Now, FDW is proudly owned and operated by alumna Holly Legare, who shares the love of dance Susan and Michelle passed down. Every new student is welcome, and encouraged to come for a free trial class!

Our internationally board-certified staff takes pride in helping each individual dancer achieve their personal goals. We are proud to offer training in all styles of dance, to those who wish to pursue a professional career, compete in national dance competitions, or enjoy dance as a recreational activity!

FDW staff teaches that hard work produces results for dancers, building the genuine self-esteem that comes with achieving goals, mastering technique, overcoming obstacles, performing in front of audiences, and working as a team with their fellow dancers! We encourage our students to strive to be their own personal best!

Name: ADV - Associação de Dança de Vizela
Description:
Ballet, Contemporâneo, Comercial, Danças Urbanas, Dance Kids, Zumba
 geral@adancavizela.pt

Name: CEYDA TANC DANCE
Description:
Ceyda Tanc Dance is a contemporary dance company led by British-Turkish Choreographer, Ceyda Tanc. 

The company produces aesthetically driven contemporary dance works with influence of traditional Turkish folk dance, the dance style of Ceyda’s heritage. Ceyda’s work seeks to challenge traditional gender representation in dance and promote the intersection of cultures as a medium for social change. She draws on themes of ritual, ceremony and community to create work that is unapologetically feminist. 

The company’s distinctive style references the virtuoso movements of male Turkish folk dancers with an all-female company. Combining athletic contemporary dance with folk and global styles, they express captivating forms, unified strength and a strong yet sensual energy.

Ceyda Tanc Dance seeks to create work that is accessible, enjoyable and empowering for audiences spanning ages, cultures and backgrounds. 

Community and participation are at the core of our practice, encompassing a strong community of collaborators and participants. We are passionate about empowering women and girls, and reaching refugee and migrant communities in the UK through dance. We provide high-quality, artist-led dance activities for people of all ages and abilities, including bespoke commissions and intergenerational community workshops.

Name: ASI Dance Elite
Description:
At ASI Dance Elite, we strive to instill in our students three guiding principles which we believe will guide them in every aspect of their life: To Aspire. To Strive. To Inspire. We believe that all dancers have the capacity to achieve any goal they set their hearts and minds to; it is our privilege to have the ability and opportunity to provide them with the education, tools, and space necessary to help them achieve their greatest aspirations and inspire those around them.


Whether your student chooses to dance in order to gain self-confidence, to make long-lasting friendships, or to take steps towards one day becoming a professional dancer, we make it a priority to help them achieve their goals. We value creating a fun, welcoming environment for all dancers to be able to cultivate their love for dance.


At ASI, we strive to be more than a dance studio; we aim to create a dance family. We believe that anyone can dance, and we work diligently to ensure that dancers of all age, levels, and abilities have a place in our family.

Name: TRIBE Dance Mission - Dance School
Description:
TRIBE Dance Mission – Dance School is home to 300+ students, offering anything from an introductory class for your three-year-old to an extensive training program for higher levels.

Our first-rate services include private dance lessons, group dance classes and memorable events guaranteed to intrigue beginners and inspire over-achievers.

Type of dances we have at Tribe: Contemporary, Jazz, Latin, Street Jazz, Classical Ballet, Pre-Ballet, Pointe, Oriental, Hip hop, gymnastics, yoga and Aerial dance. Whether you are looking for a new hobby or want to take your skills to the next level, TRIBE Dance Mission – Dance School ensures that your needs and desires are met every step of the way by always making it a priority to have fun!

Name: Tango Pasional
Description:
Out of great love and passion for tango, in 2010, Lucija and Luka started a school under the name Tangoneo with the aim of promoting Argentine tango, music and culture. In 2023, Tangoneo got a new image under the name - Tango Pasional.
In the past time, the school has become a real place of inspiration, learning and community, and we are proud of each of the hundreds of dancers who took their first dance steps with us.
Thanks to the wonderful tangueros who are part of this community, Tango Pasional has become more than just a dance school - it's a place where passion and love for tango connect hearts and create incredible human stories.

Both in Zagreb and in Rijeka, in addition to regular classes and workshops, we organize dance evenings (milongas and practicas), Zagreb Tango Festival and Zagreb Embrace, and cooperate with other Argentine tango dance schools and teachers inside and outside Croatia.

Join us, immerse yourself in the essence of tango, and become part of our passionate dance story. 
Welcome to Tango Pasional!

Name: Studio Dhoom
Description:
At Studio Dhoom, we are committed to connecting individuals of all ages with their cultural roots through the art of dance. As the largest Indian dance studio in the DMV area, we offer a diverse range of styles, including Bollywood, folk, semiclassical, and fusion, across our seven locations in Virginia and Maryland. 

Our journey began with a simple motto: "Culture is sacred. Preserving it should be fun!" This philosophy has guided us in creating an inclusive and dynamic environment where over 400 active dancers thrive. 

Our dancers have had the privilege of performing at prestigious events, such as private ceremonies at the White House to welcome global leaders, multiple NBA Washington Wizards halftime shows, and renowned festivals like the National Cherry Blossom Festival. 

At Studio Dhoom, we believe in preserving the rich heritage of Indian dance while embracing contemporary expressions. Our dedicated team of instructors ensures that each student experiences the joy, confidence, and cultural connection that dance brings.

Join us at Studio Dhoom, where tradition meets innovation, and every step tells a story.

Name: Brevard Ballet Academy
Description: Brevard Ballet Academy is a fine art company based out of 1399 Highland Ave Eau Gallie Art District, Melbourne, Florida, United States.

Name: THE NEWMAN Dance Center
Description: Offering recreational and competitive classes in dance, acro & aerial in Annapolis, MD to students ages 18 mos to adult.

Name: Rancho Folclórico São Pedro da Raimonda
Description:
O Rancho Folclórico de São Pedro da Raimonda foi criado no inicio da década de 80 do século passado na sequência da realização dos tradicionais “Leilões do Senhor”, levados a cabo pelas pessoas da freguesia em que se apresentavam algumas marchas e danças para animar a venda das oferendas do povo para que a receita daí resultante servisse para ajudar a pagar as “despesas do culto” ou outras necessidades da paróquia, e também do empenho de algumas personalidades activas da nossa freguesia.
Desde o início do nosso Rancho o objectivo sempre foi o de pesquisar, preservar e divulgar os usos e costumes dos nossos antepassados, em concreto, representar a faixa temporal entre 1880 e 1910, quer através da música, como também da Dança e dos Cantares do povo dessa época.

Name: Ada ArtEina
Description:
"Ada ArtEina" fa referència a Ada Lovelace i a l'art com a eina per al canvi social.
Ada va ser la creadora del primer algorisme per ser processat per una màquina i és considerada la primera persona a programar un ordinador. La
seva mare va ser activista social.
"Ada ArtEina" es construeix sobre el projecte anterior "D(is)T-D(ance)" https://www.dist-dance.eu/, que ja va gaudir del suport de l'Euroregió, i
sobre la llarga experiència dels socis en els àmbits del moviment, la tecnologia i l'activisme feminista, dins la pràctica artística, i vol portar-ho molt
més enllà.

La pràctica artística és una de les eines més potents per promoure un canvi social intencionat.
Amb "Ada ArtEina" volem compartir i aprofundir en les competències que els socis han anat
desenvolupant i utilitzant durant la seva trajectòria professional, tant en la vessant més escènica
com en l'aplicada a tallers per i amb diversos col·lectius. La tecnologia juga un paper important en
el treball dels socis d’aquest projecte, amb tot el treball fonamentat en el cos i el moviment; la
dansa. Aquests són els elements per construir el projecte:
• Cos
• Dansa i Moviment
• Tecnologia

Tots els socis tenen una sòlida experiència integrant aquests elements i són capaços de fer-ho de
manera creativa, amb objectius artístics i pedagògics dispars que inclouen tant l'acte escènic en si,
com accions de mediació (tallers, etc.) amb diferents col·lectius.

Name: Inspiration Dance Academy
Description: Inspiration Dance Academy is located in Fayetteville, NC. We offer instruction to students ages 3 & up. We have classes in Ballet, Tap, Jazz, Hip Hop, Lyrical, and Contemporary. We have a recreational and competitive program.

Name: Georgia Club Dance Team
Description:
The Georgia Club Dance Team is one of the University of Georgia's student-run dance groups! The team seeks passionate dancers looking for a creative performance and choreography outlet. Our routines are choreographed by team members or members of the UGA and Athens community. We aim to provide a safe and fun environment where students can continue their performance training at UGA. The Georgia Dance Team hosts auditions at the beginning of every Fall semester. For questions regarding auditions, please email us at gadanceteam@gmail.com or DM our Instagram @gaclubdanceteam.

Each spring, the Georgia Dance Team hosts an exhibition featuring dancers performing three group pieces, which include lyrical, jazz, and hip-hop styles, along with small group pieces choreographed by team members. In the past, small groups have explored various styles such as musical theater, heels, ballet, contemporary, and more!

Name: Dazzle Dance Experience
Description:
Dazzle Dance Experience is all about bringing energy, fun, and unforgettable moments to every occasion! With over 25 years of dance expertise, I create dynamic and engaging dance sessions for all ages—whether it’s a hen party, birthday, corporate event, or just a chance to let loose and have fun.

My goal is to inspire confidence, joy, and connection through movement, ensuring every participant leaves feeling uplifted and empowered. No dance experience? No problem! Dazzle Dance Experience is all about inclusivity, laughter, and making memories that last a lifetime.

Let’s get moving and make your event truly dazzling!

Name: StardanceStudio
Description:
Danseskole med bredde- og elite afdeling.
Fokus på udvikling og trivsel.

Name: Do Things Different Dance Collective
Description:
Do Things Different Dance Collective is a London based dance training company providing professional dance training for the youth and young adults.

Do Things Different strives themselves on embracing students individuality and being different from one another. That's why we provide professional dance training in various different styles in order to promote and expand students creativity. The company is open for the youth and young adults no matter what background they come from.

Name: African Club Dances
Description:
Twanga Pepeta (African Club Dances) is poised to become the premier African urban dance classes provider. Our primary focus is pioneering new, distinct, innovative African urban dance styles. In high demand, we introduce dance forms, collaborating with exceptional dance instructors skilled in these genres—styles that often elude conventional dance studios.

Unlike traditional dance forms, confined primarily to classroom settings or formal stage performances, our dance styles are designed for real-world application. They can be seamlessly integrated into club scenes, parties, and social gatherings, rendering the learning process highly practical and timely. Our dance styles offer an authentic connection to the African continent and its diaspora, enabling participants to feel in sync with global cultural trends. We foster an interactive "dialogue" where individuals engage actively with dance expressions rather than remaining passive observers, appreciating the art from afar.

Name: Salsa Tours PR
Description:
Salsa Tours PR, founded in 2019 by a passionate dancer and traveler, is dedicated to showcasing the beauty, culture, and vibrant spirit of Puerto Rico through unforgettable experiences. Our mission is to create a unique blend of outdoor adventures, cultural immersion, local cuisine, music, and dance that captivates and inspires travelers from around the world.

Over the past four years, we have proudly established ourselves as a trusted name in the tourism industry. With more than 2,000 reviews and an impressive 4.95 rating across platforms like Airbnb, Viator, TripAdvisor, Expedia, and Google Business, Salsa Tours PR is recognized for its commitment to quality, authenticity, and personalized service. Our guests rave about our tours, which transform Puerto Rico’s stunning beaches, scenic rivers, and lush countryside into unforgettable memories.

Whether you’re an explorer, a food enthusiast, or someone who wants to dive deep into Puerto Rican culture, Salsa Tours PR has something special for you. Led by founder Charlotte Serrano Pagán, we offer curated tours that highlight the island's charm, delivering authentic experiences that are both thrilling and enriching.

Name: Carleton DanceLab
Description:
Carleton DanceLab is a student-run dance club through the Carleton University Student Association that creates a welcoming, inclusive space for dancers of all backgrounds and skill levels. Whether you’re a beginner or have danced your entire life, DanceLab offers a supportive environment to explore movement, build confidence, and connect with a community that shares a passion for dance.

The club hosts 2–4 weekly classes, including drop-ins and member-exclusive sessions, many of which work toward performances in our year-end showcase. Our mission is to celebrate individuality, encourage creative expression, and make dance accessible and enjoyable for everyone.

Name: Setadanza Milano
Description: Scuola di danza, ballo e pilates per bambini, ragazzi e adulti a Milano

Name: ASLC Danse
Description: L'ASLC Danse est une association de danse modern jazz et de remise en forme. Avant tout, créée en 1989 à Flins-sur-Seine dans les Yvelines.

Name: Zohar Dance Company
Description: A world-renowned non-profit offering dance training and performance space to artists, and acting as a pillar in the dance community (Est. 1979).

Name: L. E. A. P.
Description:
L.E.A.P.—Live, Express, And Persevere!

At L.E.A.P., we provide faith-based, high-quality dance instruction that fosters self-expression, healing, and confidence for both kids and adults.

Our dance classes create a space where everyone can celebrate life, express themselves through movement, and find the strength to persevere through their journey.

L.E.A.P. was founded to uplift mental, emotional, physical, and spiritual well-being—one step at a time!

Name: Dev Asha Dance Academy
Description: We are more than just a dance school – we are dedicated to mastering the art of dance, pushing boundaries, and celebrating the beauty of movement. Whether you're a beginner or an advanced dancer, our expert instructors offer personalised guidance to help you achieve your full potential.

Name: Maaza - Bollywood Fusion Dance Team
Description: Maaza is California State University, Fullerton’s dynamic Bollywood fusion dance team, bringing together students with a passion for dance, culture, and creative expression. Founded with the goal of blending traditional Bollywood with modern dance forms, Maaza showcases a unique fusion style that represents both the rich heritage of South Asia and the vibrant diversity of contemporary dance. Our team is open to all students, welcoming dancers from various backgrounds and levels of experience. We perform at cultural showcases, competitions, and campus events, using dance to foster a sense of community, celebrate cultural roots, and connect with broader audiences. Through our performances, we aim to inspire pride, unity, and appreciation for South Asian and global dance influences. Whether you're an experienced dancer or someone looking to explore the art of Bollywood fusion, Maaza is a place to learn, grow, and celebrate the beauty of dance in a fun, supportive environment. Join us as we blend rhythm, passion, and tradition into every step!

Name: Tiffany's School of Dance & Performing Arts Center
Imperial Fernando Ballet Company
Description: At Imperial Fernando Ballet Company, we are dedicated to providing our students with the highest quality ballet training & Ballet Classes

Name: Novel Dance Company
Description: Novel Dance Company is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization with a mission to enhance the education, recreation, and professional development of dance. We do this through providing free adult community dance classes, working with school programming, and presenting original professional dance works. When hiring dancers it is our central focus to be incorporating dance styles and humans of all backgrounds. We believe there is no hierarchy in movement and no age, shape, size, color, or socio-economic background that should inhibit the right to dance.

Name: Caderas Dance Studio
Description: Teaching Bachata Dominican classes and organizing Bachata events and workshops

Name: The Pointe Jewish Dance Academy
Description:
The Pointe Jewish Dance Academy is a small but growing dance studio located near Bathurst and Lawrence. 

We offer tap, ballet, jazz, and acro classes for girls age 3-15, as well as ballet, tap, hip hop, and contemporary dance classes for women. We pride ourselves on offering quality dance education with a focus on building confidence and creativity through movement and dance. 

Part of our organizational mission is to teach dance in a positive and nurturing environment where every student can thrive. In addition to fostering prowess in dance, we strive to make each and every student feel special and empowered.

Name: AU.CH
Description: Dance studio

Name: CADA Dance Studio- Collaborative Artists for Dance Advancement
Description:
Collaborative Artists for Dance Advancement was created for the Treasure Valley to house a dance education that provides the highest return on investment in dance training and character building: Advancing the Art and the Artist.

A roof under which the pursuit of personal excellence, the highest standard in technical training, collaborative relationships, and a positive environment meet.

Where professional instructors, mindful administrators, and passionate learners come together to grow in character and care for the whole self, mental development, self-confidence, and belonging. 

We hope your time within our studio walls will inspire your mind, clear your head, ground your soul, and open your heart. 

Our prayer is that the CADA home will nurture a collaborative spirit, growth in artistry, a desire to contribute to the whole over self, a commitment to chasing our passions, and a heightened appreciation for the privilege of studying the art of dance.

We are #thedanceadvance.

Name: Dancing People
Description: Dancing People is on a mission to bring joy, excitement and connection into the lives of parents, grandparents and all caregivers and their children, one boogie at a time. We throw a dance party for all the family. Our vibrant atmosphere is designed to spark joy in all. Kids will light up with excitement as they vibe with new friends, and adults will have an opportunity to let loose and connect with those who share the same love for a good dance party.

Name: xCel Performance Company
Description: xCel HipHop Performance Company is a prodigious dance institution with a distinct history. Established in 2016, xCel's mission is to bestow a platform for women and young girls to express themselves through dance. As a performance company that provides the highest quality of discipline and ingenious choreography, xCel has cultivated an exclusive and unique footprint while congruently bridging the gap between communal programming and performing arts.

Name: The Dance Dots
Description: The Dance Dots is a classroom management system designed for dance teachers, music teachers, and all instructors who work with children in a movement capacity.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studio - Hilton Head
Description: Originally inspired by Fred Astaire’s superb style of dancing, Fred Astaire Dance Studios’ ballroom dance curriculum covers the full range of American, Latin-American, International Style, Exhibition/Theater Arts dances, Wedding First Dances and more. World famous dance champions and registered members of the Fred Astaire International Dance Council continually study and review our curriculum, to ensure that only the finest, most up-to-date programs are offered to our students. Our unique teaching method includes a three-tiered system of regularly scheduled private lessons, group classes and practice parties.

Name: ATOM THEATRE
Description:
ATOM Theatre is a dynamic Bulgarian contemporary dance company focused on creation and education. Stefaniya Georgieva, founder and Artistic Director of ATOM, has over 12 years of experience in choreography. Her artworks are presented domestically and abroad, including in Europe and South Korea. The company also has a record of site-specific projects, miniatures and films in addition to full-length dance pieces. 

At the core of ATOM are dancer and choreographer Kalina Georgieva, a ballet dancer and graduate of the National School of Dance Art in Sofia, and dancer and choreographer Dorina Puncheva, who studied Dance Theatre at the National Academy of Theatre and Film Arts. The trio actively teaches emerging dance artists. True to their devotion to fostering talents, they founded ATOM Choreographic Series, an international platform, in 2017.  


VISION

Our vision is to place Bulgaria on the world map of contemporary dance.

MISSION

Our mission is to deliberately create favourable conditions for young contemporary dancers to grow, develop professionally, and discover their creative identity. Our aspirations are to broaden contemporary dance art in Bulgaria, create an inclusive environment, and introduce more dance artists to contemporary dance as a means of expression.

Name: Yellow Rose Dance Company
Description: A small dance school based in Kent teaching school aged children Ballet, Tap and Acro

Name: RnD Dance
Description:
Founded by passionate Pepperdine students, RnD Dance (Rise and Dance) brings the joy of dance to the Pepperdine community. “Rise” symbolizes both the act of dancing and personal growth through movement.

Our mission is to create an inclusive, vibrant space where students of all backgrounds can explore, develop, and share their love for dance. Through regular workshops in styles like Hip-hop, Jazz, and K-pop, we foster creativity, community, and confidence—no prior experience required.

For those seeking a deeper commitment, auditions are held each semester for our performance crew and instructors. Crew members focus on performances and dance cover videos that represent RnD at campus events.

At RnD, dance is more than movement—it’s leadership, growth, and connection. All Pepperdine students are welcome to rise and dance with us.

Name: G.Souls | Compañía de Danzas
Description: Somos una compañía de jóvenes artistas con conocimientos en diversas disciplinas de danza, artes audiovisuales, producción de espectáculos y pasión por los ritmos y la cultura moderna asiática.

Name: Preschool Ballerinas
Description: At Preschool Ballerinas, we are dedicated to fostering a love for ballet in every student. Our mission is to provide high-quality training in a supportive environment that nurtures creativity and discipline.

Name: Nishana
Description: Nishana is the official co-ed Bollywood fusion dance team of Oxford College of Emory University. We incorporate a wide range of styles into our routine, including hip-hop, classical, and Bhangra and perform at a variety of venues both on the Atlanta campus and on the Oxford College campus.

Name: 5th Avenue Dance
Description:
5th Avenue Dance Gold Coast we teach you to Learn to dance to any music, with any partner, on any size dance floor.

Always wanted to learn to dance but don’t think you’re cut out for it?
At 5th Avenue Dance Studio we believe that everyone has the natural ability to dance, you just need the right instruction. 

We teach traditional, modern and contemporary Ballroom and Latin dances, from the elegance of Waltz, through to the Romance of Rumba, to the cheeky and high energy Salsa and Cha Cha. 

We are a Social Studio, so it is all about having fun! And if you want to be able to dance to any music, with any partner, on any size dance floor, we are the only dance studios on the Gold Coast who can help. 

We don’t teach timed choreography, routines or combinations, so you can take your dance moves anywhere. 

Find out more, and try us out, with a Free Private Lesson that can be taken any time Sunday to Thursday – 8am to 8pm.

Name: Tanssikoulu TR Studio Oy
Description: Tanssikoulu Tr Studio Oy is a company based out of Pietiläntie 6,13130 Hämeenlinna, Tavastia Proper, Finland.

Name: AfroKids86
Description: Valoriser les jeunes à travers les danses Afro-urbaines

Name: Tippi Toes Rockwall Wylie
Description:
Tippi Toes Rockwall Wylie brings the joy of dance to children in the Rockwall, Wylie, Rowlett, Sachse and neighboring areas! We offer fun, energetic dance classes for kids between the ages of 18 months - 12 years, including ballet, tap, jazz, and hip hop. Our classes focus on building confidence, creativity, and coordination in a positive, non-competitive environment.

Bring the joy of dance to you!

Name: Star City School of Ballet
Description: Situated in an up and coming art centric industrial area, Star City offers Ballet and so much more.

Name: Jayna Dance Academy
Description:
Jayna Dance Academy runs a range of regular classes, alongside pop-up workshops, giving dancers the opportunity to experience Hip-Hop, Contemporary, Afro, Bollywood, Bellydance and Dancehall amongst many more styles.

JDA aims to positively impact the dance journeys of as many people as possible, whether it be to boost confidence, improve mental health or simply get fit, and will continue to work closely with local communities to make a powerful difference.

Name: Nordic Dance Academy ApS
Description:
Velkommen til Nordic Dance Academy – hvor passion og bevægelse møder fællesskab og glæde!
Uanset om du er nybegynder eller erfaren danser, har vi et hold, der passer til dig. Kom og oplev energien, glæden og magien ved dans!

Name: Amsterdam House Dance Community
Description: We focus on creating safe space for the house (dance) community in Amsterdam area.

Name: The Twerk Sorority Bordeaux
Description:
Bienvenue dans la 1ère école de Twerk de Bordeaux !
Ici on démocratise l'Art & Culture du Twerk.
Qu'est ce que la Sororité  ?? Une Espace Safe pour devenir la meilleure version de toi-même dans une ambiance 100% Bienveillante ! 
The Twerk Sorority en 3 mots =  Féminité - Confiance en soi & Partage Viens découvrir nos cours, stages & évènements !
Peu importe ton age, ton genre, ta morphologie, ta forme physique, tu peux apprendre à danser. 
Nous proposons des cours collectifs, des cours particuliers, du coaching, des stages, des animations spéciales EVJF/EVJF, l'animation de soirées avec des shows  thématiques et personnalisés, l'organisations d'évènements.

Name: Ellensburg Dance Ensemble
Description:
Discover the Heart of Dance and Community at Ellensburg Dance Ensemble

Ellensburg Dance Ensemble (EDE) is the only nonprofit dance studio in the region, passionately dedicated to enriching the lives of children and adults through dance, community arts, and unique performance experiences. EDE fosters an inclusive and dynamic atmosphere where dancers of all ages can express themselves, learn, and grow in the art of dance.



Classes for All Ages
At EDE, we offer classes for ages 3 through adult, spanning a variety of styles. Whether you're a beginner exploring movement for the first time, an advanced dancer seeking new challenges, or simply looking for a fun way to stay active, EDE has something for everyone. Our class lineup includes ballet, jazz, hip-hop, musical theater, belly dance, Zumba, and even a roller skating dance troupe. For adults, we offer drop-in options as well as an 8-class pass, making it easy to join in at your convenience.



Iconic Productions and Community Performances
EDE is known for its annual productions, bringing beloved classics and innovative new performances to life on the big stage. This season, we're thrilled to present The Nutcracker & The Battle for the Key—a fresh reimagining of the holiday classic that combines magical storytelling, stunning choreography, and live orchestration. Our shows provide a unique platform for local talent and create cherished memories for audiences of all ages.



Event Rentals at Our Studio
Our beautiful studio spaces are available to rent for private events, meetings, and parties. With spacious rooms, ample natural light, and all the amenities you need, our studios are perfect for hosting events with a creative flair. We offer flexible rental packages and are excited to help you customize your event to make it unforgettable.

Name: SHUFFLE DANCE SHOW
Description:
when I turned 13 years old I went into the teenagers shuffle dance I'm still in the teenagers shuffle dance group but now its call Shuffle Dance Cadets I own the company the shuffle dance staff members are called AAC staff at the Australian Shuffle Dance Cadets and we call our Shuffle Dance Cadets NCO'S some of the teenagers are NCO'S there about 30 teenagers who are NCO'S at the shuffle dance cadets and there are 170 shuffle dance cadets at the shuffle dance cadet unit theres only one shuffle dance cadet unit in Australia at the moment there will be more shuffle dance cadets units in Australia I hopefully there will be more shuffle dance cadet units next year.
We are a Australian Shuffle Dance Cadets we are not linked with the Australian defence ir ADF we have our own company foe the Australian Shuffle Dance I own the shuffle dance company I just opened it this month I had to wait for 6 months from the governments to open a shuffle dance cadet unit.
My Shuffle Dance Cadet Unit is 400ACU Australian Shuffle Dance Cadet Unit - Browns Plains.
Theys are our AAC staff rankings:
Second Lieutenant (2LT(AAC)
Lieutenant (LT(AAC)
Captain (CAPT(AAC)
Major (MAJ(AAC)

And theys are the shuffle dance cadet ranks:

Cadet Lance Corporal (CDTCPL)

You got ti be 13 years old to join the shuffle dance cadets and once you hit 18 years old you can't be a teenager in the shuffle dance cadets you can be a AAC staff.

Name: Step By Step Dance Club
Description:
At Step By Step, we believe that dance is not just a form of artistic expression but a way of life. As a premier dance academy, we offer a wide range of dance styles and disciplines that cater to individuals of all ages and skill levels.
With a team of highly trained and passionate instructors, we are committed to providing quality dance education in a supportive and inspiring environment. Our goal is to empower our students with the knowledge, technique, and confidence they need to excel in their chosen dance form. 
Whether you are a beginner seeking to explore the world of dance or an experienced dancer looking to refine your skills, our diverse and comprehensive curriculum has something for everyone. 
Through our classes, performances, and events, we aim to contribute to the cultural enrichment of our society.

Join us at Step By Step and embark on an incredible journey of movement, self-discovery, and personal growth. Let us guide you as you unlock your full potential and unleash your passion for dance. Get ready to step into the rhythm, express your individuality, and become the dancer you have always envisioned.
Connect with us today and discover the world of dance at Step By Step together, let's dance to the rhythm of life!

Name: VIA DANCE
Description:
2015 yılında üniversiteye yeni başlamış iki gencin sokakta kendi kendine dans etmeye çalışmasıyla başladı her şey…
Çok kısa bir süre içinde dans hayatlarının merkezi haline gelmişti.
Akıllarına koymuşlardı; Bursa’yı dans konusunda yenilikler yaparak ileriye taşımak istiyorlardı.

3 yıl boyunca tam da üniversite çağında durmadan çalıştılar. Tüm vakit ve nakitlerini dansa yatırdılar ve Temmuz 2018’de bir anlık cesaretle tüm riskleri göze alarak 26 Eylül 2018’de tek stüdyolu küçük bir dans okulunu tüm Bursa’ya açtılar.

Bursa’da hiç bilinmeyen dans türlerinin eğitimlerini vermelerine rağmen sabır ve istikrarları sayesinde kısa sürede neredeyse tüm Bursa’ya isimlerini duyurmaya başladılar. Gelen yoğun talep doğrultusunda şubat 2021 yılında dans okulunu büyüterek 4 stüdyolu yeni evlerine taşındılar.

İlk günden beri aile anlayışını bozmadan evlerine her gelen kişiyi ailenin bir üyesi olarak benimseyip beraber gelişmeyi ve büyütmeyi amaçladılar.
Çok şanslı olan bu ikili kısa bir süre içinde sayılarını katladılar.
Tek kökten gelip farklı dala yerleşen tüm eğitmenleri sayesinde Via günden güne kendini daha çok geliştirip, Bursa’da dansı ileriye taşımaktadır.

Peki Via isminin nereden geldiğini hiç merak ettin mi?

Bu yola dansla başladık, hayatımızı dansla şekillendirdik.
Dans; sevginin, dostluğun, birliğin, başarının, kendini ifade etmenin, hırsın, dayanışmanın ve bir çok şeyin en güzel anahtarı.
Biz de güzel olan tüm eylemi, düşünceyi, ifadeyi “dans yoluyla” yapmayı seçtik.

O yüzden Via Dance;
Dans Yoluyla beraber büyüyoruz, öğreniyoruz ve gelişiyoruz.
Bu yazıyı okuyan kişi iyiki varsın, iyiki geldin evimize, ailemize…

Diğer Sosyal Medya Hesaplarımız:

Instagram:   https://www.instagram.com/viadancee/
Youtube:      https://www.youtube.com/@viadancee
Facebook:    https://www.facebook.com/viadancee/?locale=tr_TR
Tiktok:         https://www.tiktok.com/discover/via-dance

Name: Elizabeth Parsons School of Dance (EPSOD)
Description:
Elizabeth Parsons School of Dance - former dance studio in Windermere, Florida
(1981-2020)

Name: Vive y Goza
Description:
Baila salsa, bachata, jazz dance, afrofusión, reggaetón, champeta, danza comercial y muchos más estilos urbanos. 

Mejorar tu condición física y resistencia con nuestra clase de rumba cardio. 

También tenemos clases para niños: ballet, latino kids y rumba kids. 

Realizamos montajes coreográficos para tu quinceaños, bodas y eventos. 

Tenemos clases presenciales de domingo a domingo y también  contamos con clases personalizadas de Iniciación musical y técnica vocal para todas las edades. 

Anímate y aprende a bailar con nosotros! Academia de baile ubicada al norte de Bogotá, en Colina Campestre. Ofrecemos clases para todas las edades. Inscripciones permanentes. 

También nos puedes ver a través de Instagram @vive_goza"

Name: Molly Shanahan  Mad Shak
Description:
Molly Shanahan/Mad Shak (MS/MS) is an award-winning, Chicago-based contemporary dance company led by choreographer, performer, and educator Molly Shanahan, PhD. Since its founding in 1994, the company has created original dance works known for their emotional intelligence, physical virtuosity, and commitment to movement as inquiry — a space where truth can unfold in real time.

For more than three decades, MS/MS has cultivated an artistic practice rooted in what Shanahan calls the virtuosity of compassion — a rigorous discipline of seeing and being seen, of allowing movement to reveal rather than conceal. This philosophy animates every aspect of the company’s work, from the creation of its evening-length performance projects to its community-based teaching and research through Spiral Body Techniques, Shanahan’s original approach to movement education and somatic inquiry.

MS/MS’s projects — including the multi-year Ex/Body series — center the body as a site of knowing, transformation, and interconnection. Each work grows from deep collaboration among a core ensemble of long-term artists whose sustained relationships allow for radical trust, creative risk, and integrity in process.

Through performances, classes, and workshops, the company invites audiences and participants to engage in embodied reflection: what does it mean to be human, to connect, to stay present in the unknown?

Presented by venues including the Dance Center of Columbia College Chicago, Links Hall, and international festivals, Molly Shanahan/Mad Shak has been supported by the Gaylord and Dorothy Donnelley Foundation, the Illinois Arts Council, DCASE, and others.

At its heart, MS/MS continues to ask how movement can help us reimagine excellence, equity, and the lived experience of being alive together.

Name: Evolve Dance: Dance Kinetics
Description:
At Evolve, we help you go from doing moves, to feeling where in your body the energy for those movements should come from. Dance kinetics is the study of how the energy propels a dancer through space. We're in the business of energy and body movement here, friends. Fixing your energy means fixing your quality of movement.

All of us have been in a class where we watch an amazingly talented teacher do something with their feet or body, but when we try to copy it, we just...can't. At Evolve, we'll help you understand why that happens.

Name: Majestic Strength LLC
Description: Majestic Strength LLC is a business dedicated to providing support, treatment, and resources to dancers with mental illnesses. We offer a comprehensive approach that includes dance classes and therapy, allowing dancers to improve their mental well-being while pursuing their passion for dance. Our goal is to create a supportive and inclusive environment that addresses the unique challenges faced by dancers, promoting both physical and mental health. Our services are available to all, and we provide opportunities for dancers with mental illnesses to express themselves through movement. Visit our website at majesticstrengthllc.com to learn more.

Name: Ghorbet Lagee Organization
Description:
"IF A NATION'S CULTURE SURVIVES, THEN SO TOO DOES THE NATION." ~ Jan Mládek

Through dabke dance and choreography, a vivid form of artistic expression and crucial symbol of Palestinian culture, we aspire to provide intriguing education and development opportunities for the youth, raise international awareness to the Palestinian cause and contribute to the preservation of our cultural heritage and national identity.

Name: Ikin Dance
Description:
We get it, dance studios can be intimidating. That’s why we created Ikin Dance. We embrace you just the way you are. Whether you’re an absolute beginner or a seasoned professional, you’ll feel right at home. 

We’re not about entering every single comp. We don’t do favourites. Instead, our mission is to transform you into the best version of yourself. A performing warrior who owns the spotlight.

Name: NI Dancesport
Description:
NI Dancesport is a membership organisation for dancers in Northern Ireland.

Our mission is to promote and develop the world of Dancesport in the region, and to provide a supportive community for dancers of all levels.

We aim to support dancers worthy of progressing to represent Northern Ireland on an International level.

We offer a range of services including dance classes, workshops, social events, competitions and a growing membership base.

Our team is passionate about sharing the joy of dance and helping our members achieve their goals.

Join us today and become part of the NI Dancesport family!

Name: ELENCO DE DANZAS CON DOCENTES DE CHOSICA - PERÚ.
Lindy Jazz
Description:
Want to learn to swing dances such as the Lindy Hop & Charleston? You’ve come to the right place! 

Find out more about Weekly Lindy Hop Classes in Durham

We offer courses for beginners as well as experienced dancers.
Lindy Jazz courses are designed to cover all the foundation skills and moves you need to fully enjoy swing dancing.

We offer 6-week courses in Durham that are perfect for you! 

You will improve quickly because you'll be learning from the same teaching couple every week. We use a proven and successful system, which means you'll have consistency in your learning.

When you join our courses, you'll receive simple, non-jargon instructions as well as step by step explanations of a few fun moves. In between lessons you will have access to online videos to help you to recap the moves you learnt in class. These videos will walk you through each technique in a clear and informative manner. You'll have all the support you need to improve your skills so that by the end of 6 weeks, you will be able to put together a dance to dance all the way through a song!

Even if you don't have immediate plans to dance at a social event, these foundation skills are essential for any swing dancer. They form the building blocks of your dance journey. So, why not take this opportunity to acquire those skills in a progressive and structured way?

Email us today (info@lindy-jazz.co.uk) and let us guide you on your swing dance journey. You'll soon feel really confident and ready to dance with your partner and the wonderful wider swing dance community. We can't wait to see you shine on the dance floor!
https://www.lindy-jazz.co.uk/weekly-classes

Name: NTA Dance School
Description: NTA DANCE SCHOOL è un’associazione sportiva dilettantistica iscritta a CSEN Trentino. Nata a Trento nel 2022, ha come scopo la valorizzazione e promozione della danza e del benessere a 360 gradi.

Name: Shall We Dance — Premium Latin Dance Experience for Corporate Teams in Amsterdam
Description:
At Shall We Dance, we offer a luxury-level Latin dance experience designed specifically for corporate teams in Amsterdam.

This is not just a dance class. It’s a curated journey of transformation — from uncertainty to elegance, from stress to joy, from “I can’t dance” to “I just performed!”

Led by Mascha Liachina, a professional Latin dancer and coach with 25+ years of experience, our programs help teams build:

 Physical & emotional confidence
 Charisma and stage presence
 Unity, empowerment & personal growth

Participants train and perform like real dancers — solo, strong, and expressive. We offer a rare opportunity to make dreams come true, even for those who’ve never danced before.

Custom programs include:
 Premium weekly dance sessions
 Private coaching & styling
 Performance preparation
 Team events, showcases, competitions
 Professional video & photography

This is for companies that want more than fun.
This is for those who want to inspire.

Name: Rhythmic Union Dance Studios
Description: We create the perfect wedding dance suited to any style - from a simple and elegant sway, to a fully choreographed flash-mob for your whole bridal party.

Name: Studio de dança Mariana Bittencourt
Description:
O Studio de Dança Mariana Bittencourt nasceu de um sonho, um conjunto de sócios apaixonados por arte e educação que desde muito cedo sempre foram envolvidos com ensino.
Inaugurado em 2022 na cidade de Praia Grande, São Paulo. Com o objetivo de promover aulas de dança com uma metodologia focada no desenvolvimento dos alunos, utilizamos a dança como forma de expressão e desenvolvimento pessoal de forma humanizada.

Name: Palmetto Ballet Theatre
Description: Palmetto Ballet Theatre will cultivate a deep and enduring passion for dance by showcasing exceptional artistry, thrilling performances innovative choreography, and extensive educational initiatives. Emphasizing the beauty and creativity in dance, Palmetto Ballet Theatre will promote an appreciation with audiences and participants alike. Our commitment to excellence will not only entertain but educate. We will foster the celebration of movement and expression in our community by ensuring that the transformative power of dance is accessible to all.

Name: Espaço Jessyca Rominna
Description:
O Espaço da Jessyca Rominna é um refúgio onde a dança ganha vida e os sonhos se tornam realidade. 

Localizado em Goiânia-GO, este estúdio de dança é fruto da paixão e dedicação de Jéssyca Rominna, uma talentosa bailarina e educadora física. Com um objetivo nobre de levar a dança até as pessoas de forma afetuosa, sensível e lúdica, o Espaço da Jéssyca Rominna se destaca por sua abordagem única e cativante.

O Espaço da Jéssyca Rominna oferece uma variedade de serviços para atender a todas as idades e níveis de habilidade.

Para os pequenos bailarinos, o Ballet Infantil é uma jornada mágica de descoberta e expressão. As aulas são conduzidas com carinho e paciência, estimulando a criatividade e a confiança das crianças. 

Já o Ballet Adulto é um convite para aqueles que desejam se reconectar com seu corpo e explorar a graça e a elegância da dança clássica.

Um destaque especial para a Dança do Ventre para gestantes e mamães com seus bebês. Jéssyca Rominna, com sua credencial da BellyMamãe, oferece um ambiente seguro e acolhedor para as futuras e recentes mamães. Através dos movimentos suaves e fluidos da dança do ventre, as mulheres podem fortalecer seus corpos, encontrar equilíbrio emocional e criar laços afetivos com seus bebês.

Para aqueles que buscam um estilo mais enérgico e contemporâneo, as aulas de Jazz são uma opção perfeita. Com coreografias dinâmicas e músicas cativantes, os alunos podem liberar sua expressividade e se desafiar a cada passo. 

Além disso, o Espaço da Jéssyca Rominna também oferece serviços de coreografia para eventos, tornando cada celebração única e memorável.

No Espaço da Jéssyca Rominna, a dança transcende a técnica e se torna uma forma de expressão da alma. Jéssyca e sua equipe de bailarinas altamente capacitados estão comprometidos em criar um ambiente onde cada indivíduo possa se conectar consigo mesmo e com os outros através da dança. Aqui, a afetividade encontra seu lugar no movimento, e cada passo é dado com o coração.

Name: The Kiz Lab
Description:
