The Kiz Lab is the number one Urban Kiz dance school in the Bay Area, founded by Jessica Marie, Ph.D., a passionate advocate for dance and psychology. Our mission is to offer an inclusive, safe space where individuals of all backgrounds can explore the art of Urban Kiz. With a focus on detailed instruction, personal growth, and community building, we strive to empower our students through dance while fostering deep, meaningful connections.

As a Black Veteran-owned and minority-led entity based in the Bay Area, CA, we pride ourselves on our commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion. Our offerings include weekly classes, workshops, private lessons, and social dance events designed to cater to both beginners and advanced dancers. Our innovative approach to dance education emphasizes the importance of consent, mutual respect, and the joy of learning in a supportive environment.

Our team, led by Dr. Jessica Marie, comprises dedicated instructors and organizers who bring a wealth of knowledge and experience to our community. Each member is committed to creating a welcoming atmosphere where students can thrive, learn, and connect with others who share a passion for dance.

At The Kiz Lab, we believe that dance is more than just movement, it's a way to connect with others, express oneself, and foster mental and physical well-being. Our goal is to make Urban Kiz accessible to everyone, regardless of their dance background, and to contribute to the global dance community by sharing our love for Urban Kiz.

Join us on this exciting journey to explore the world of Urban Kiz, where good dancers become great dancers, and where every step on the dance floor brings us closer together. Let's dance, learn, and grow together at The Kiz Lab.

Name: Cie Dynamo
Description:
Les chorégraphies de la Cie Dynamo revisitent et questionnent notre époque et nos pratiques, par le prisme d'une danse énergique, aérienne et poétique.

La Cie Dynamo a été créée à l'initiative de Virginie BARJONET, danseuse, voltigeuse et chorégraphe.


Le mouvement génère de l'énergie !
Nourrie de ces élans, l’équipe de Dynamo élabore des œuvres polymorphes au sein desquelles une danse poétique, aérienne, teintée de jeu théâtral dialogue avec notre temps. Les chorégraphies naturellement empreintes de la personnalité des danseurs qui les interprètent, revisitent et questionnent notre époque et ses pratiques : la surconsommation, l’hyperconnectivité, le diktat de l’image, l’invasion du plastique sur Terre.

Name: UCD Raasleela
Description: Founded in 2014, Raasleela is UC Davis's official premier competitive Raas-Garba dance team. Through our passion for dance, we hope to cultivate an on-campus family, showcase our high energy and uniqueness, as well as entertain and inform the public about this beautiful tradition. Raas-Garba is a style of dance originating in Gujarat, India. We compete against collegiate teams across the country.

Name: Ballet de la diaspora Camerounaise
Description:
Après avoir longtemps brillé au sein de diverses structures artistiques camerounaises telles que la Fokamaise, le Ballet National Camerounais et les ballets universitaires, bon nombre de danseurs ont dû par la force des choses se disperser aux quatre coins du monde. Sous l’impulsion du président du BDC, Mr. Gabin TCHOUPO, ces danseurs émérites décidèrent de se retrouver dans la capitale française, afin de renouer avec leur passion et de continuer à exprimer leur talent au sein d’un groupe de danse: le Ballet de la diaspora camerounaise - BDC. 

Créé le 06 octobre 2018, Le Ballet de la Diaspora Camerounaise (BDC) est une association reconnue d’utilité publique qui compte 30 membres et a pour vocation de promouvoir la culture camerounaise et africaine en matière de danse, à travers la présentation des spectacles de danses traditionnelles dans le monde entier. Le but est de favoriser l’intégration et le brassage culturel, de partager ses connaissances en matière de danse par le biais des masters class, d’apporter du sourire autour d’elle grâces aux actions caritatives que nous organiserons en Afrique, de participer à tous les évènements culturels organisés dans notre ville et dans la France entière (foire festival gala culturel soirées…).

Name: Muse Enterpise
Description:
Muse Enterprise, formerly C.E.D Studios - is an East Sussex dance establishment built on innovation, community and growth.

Founded in 2017 by professional dancer Oliver Large, we have grown from a single commercial class into a studio that now spans commercial, contemporary, hip-hop and jazz. The rebrand marks not just our evolution, but our vision: to place dance at the heart of wellbeing, creativity and culture.

At Muse Enterprise, dance is more than movement. It builds confidence, strengthens fitness and shapes a sense of belonging that extends far beyond the studio.

Name: Platinum Cuts
Description: Music services by professional audio engineers and producers to take your dance or cheer studio to the next level.

Name: Social Street
Description:
Social Street es una empresa social que surgió durante la pandemia con el propósito de generar bienestar en las personas, creando un espacio seguro para darle frente a los síntomas de depresión y ansiedad a través del baile.

En Social Street, nuestro objetivo es promover el bienestar físico, fortalecer la conexión entre las personas y mejorar la salud mental a través de terapia de baile. Nos enfocamos en llegar a un público diverso, fomentando la inclusión y el bienestar integral.

Liderazgo femenino: Nuestro equipo directivo está compuesto mayoritariamente por mujeres, lo que asegura una diversidad de perspectivas en cada decisión.

Accesibilidad: Nuestros programas están diseñados para ser inclusivos y accesibles para todos, con especial enfoque en promover la participación de poblaciones con menor acceso o recursos.

Compromiso con la comunidad: Nacimos con el objetivo de apoyar a personas en zonas vulnerables, y nuestro equipo incluye miembros que pertenecen y han vivido la realidad de estas comunidades.

Actividades del programa:
-Bailes latinos: Salsa y Bachata
-Prácticas sociales y eventos de baile con la comunidad

Los servicios y actividades pueden personalizarse para responder a las necesidades específicas de cada organización o comunidad.

Name: KRUW at UW Bothell
Description: K-pop dance club at University of Washington Bothell

Name: CONFIDANCE BY SOFIA MEYER
Description: DANCE CLASSES | PARTIES | WORKSHOPS

Name: Breath Dance Lab
Description: Qui si respira danza.

Name: Shivaatmika
Description:
Shivaatmika Dance School is a premier institute dedicated to nurturing the art of dance through tradition, discipline, and creativity. We offer comprehensive training in various dance forms, including classical, contemporary, and fusion styles, empowering students to master technique, expression, and stage presence.

Our experienced instructors provide personalized guidance, ensuring that each dancer hones their skills while embracing the joy of movement. Through structured classes, workshops, and performances, we cultivate confidence, artistry, and cultural appreciation.

At Shivaatmika, dance is more than just movement—it’s a journey of self-expression, passion, and excellence. Join us and let your rhythm tell a story!

Name: Paracosm Dance
Description:
Paracosm Dance is dedicated to a deep exploration of movement development, expression, and performance. 

We push choreographic and performative boundaries within our evolving multimedia field, celebrating the continuous conversation between classical forms and contemporary vocabularies.

Working to create conscientious and captivating works for unconventional stages, Paracosm Dance prioritizes art accessibility. Actively engaging audiences in revolutionary spaces and exploring new ways to bring dance education and experiences to our community, we provide financially and physically accessible performances around our city. 

We strive to hold space for outside artists, allowing those in our community to bring their work to wider audiences.

Name: Koinonia Arts, Inc.
Description: Providing youth and families opportunities to grow personally, spiritually, and academically through educational arts.

Name: UIUC Dheem
Description: UIUC Dheem is the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign’s first competitive Indian classical dance team. In the past 4 years, UIUC Dheem has been growing as a Bharatanatyam and Kuchipudi dance team that strives to continue our traditional heritage of Indian classical dance forms. We hope to continue to grow as a team and to use the beauty of Indian classical dance to express our own contemporary lives and culture.

Name: Dansschool Wesseling Den Haag
Description: De enige echte dansschool van Den Haag. In onze prachtige danszaal(en) kunt u heerlijk dansen. Voor volwasssen bieden wij voornamelijk stijldansen, maar ook Zumba en Modern Ballet en voor de jeugd bieden wij: Peuterdans, Kleuterdans, Jazz/Streetdance, Modern, Urban, Show/Musical, Hip Hop en Breakdance.

Name: Contemporary Dance Ensemble at Virginia Tech
Description: A student-run dance organization at Virginia Tech that provides a place for dancers to continue to grow in their passion for dance and share their talents with the community. But most importantly, CDE provides dancers with a place to call home on campus. CDE offers two performances a year and weekly technique classes so we can continue to improve. Our performances are choreographed and performed by members of CDE so we can share not only our talents, but our artistic visions as well. In addition, we offer leadership opportunities within our organization since we are student-run, so we can continue our love for an art form while getting experience on how to effectively and successfully run an organization.

Name: Lisa's Dance Connection
Description: Lisa's Dance Connection has provided top-notch professional dance education to the Central Texas area since 1992. We offer training in all styles of dance for all levels and ages of dancers. We have a recreational dance program, LDC Company Stars program for competitive dancers, and Classical Ballet Conservatory.

Name: Dance Station
Description: Dance Station is a place where you can express your talents and learn how to dance based on structured syllabus with nationally and internationally qualified professional trainers. We offer both Academy Dance and Dance for Fitness / Lifestyle.

Name: GRIP
Description:
GRIP was founded in 2014 by choreographer and dancer Jan Martens and manager Klaartje Oerlemans.

From 2023 on, GRIP choreographers Femke Gyselinck, Jan Martens, Cherish Menzo, and Steven Michel act together as artistic directors. They do so in close dialogue with Klaartje Oerlemans and Rudi Meulemans, who coordinates and facilitates the dialogue between the four makers in his role of artistic coordinator.

GRIP is a nomadic structure. GRIP does not have a studio of its own, but makes use of the existing infrastructure in the performing arts landscape by forging alliances with theatres, co-producers, production companies and residency venues. The creations always emerge in different spaces and in interaction with the different professional contexts.

GRIP is a non-profit organisation active in several countries. The ‘vereniging zonder winstoogmerk’ is based in Antwerp, the ‘stichting’ in Rotterdam. GRIP receives structural subsidies from the Government of Flanders and has several international co-producers as well as many partners in Europe and North America.

Name: Bethesda Conservatory of Dance
Description: Award winning dance studio in the heart of Woodmont Triangle in Downtown Bethedsa!

Name: Ballettschule VOGES
Description: Our state-approved ballet school for ballet, jazz and tap teaches over 400 children, young people and adults at two locations - Bückeburg (Lower Saxony) and Minden (North Rhine-Westphalia).

Name: Stepit
Description: Whether you’re a teacher, performer, or dance enthusiast, StepIt is your go-to platform for connecting with the dance community, sharing your passion, and finding events that match your style.

Name: howone
Description: howone (pronounced “how one”) is derived from the Chinese characters 好玩, meaning ‘good fun’. howone is a Creative Health social enterprise with science at play.

Name: Dants Pance LLC
Description:
Dants Pance LLC creates custom dance events for any industry, community, or organization. Corporate Retreat? Bachelorette Party? Kid's Birthday? Youth Group? Everyone can dance, we just help you ‘Find your Rhythm.’

AKA Shake Yo' Groove Thang, Drop It Like It's Hot, Werk Yo Twerk, Bust Out An Old Tap Solo, Dance Off The Day, Connect To Your Roots, Express Yourself, Move To Music, Release and Let Go, Movement Therapy, Pajama Jams, Dance Like No One Is Watching, Dance Without Being Hit On, Dance Like You Do In Your Kitchen In Your Socks, Connect To Music And Your Community.

Name: AJ Dance Education
Description:
An integral part of Hyndburn’s creative arts curriculum developing curriculum-based dance delivery plans for Primary and High Schools. 

Contributing to the physical, emotional and social well-being of children in the borough by offering an outlet for creativity and personal expression. Developing, body awareness, technical and expressive skills, confidence, creativity, choreographic and performance skills.

Name: South Shore Dance Ensemble
Description:
South Shore Dance Ensemble offers classes in a variety of genres for all ages and levels.
Acro Arts & PBT certified
RAD trained instructors
Recreational & Competitive programs

Name: Ekta Creative Dance Studio
Description: Ekta Creative Dance Studio in Sydney, Australia, offers a wide range of services for all ages and events. From group classes to workshops, wedding choreography, and costume rentals, we provide comprehensive dance solutions. Our unique teaching approach blends various dance forms, ensuring a holistic experience in Bengali, Semi-Classical, Bollywood, Folk, and Modern Contemporary styles.

Name: Natyam4Health
Description:
Not for Profit Organization Run by High & Middle School Students promoting mental well-being for all age groups by connecting them with Indian Classical Dance. Provides a platform for Indian Classical Dancers to create 30 second dance video reels that has potential to be a stress buster and improve overall well-being both mentally and physically if practiced at their convenience.

Insta: @natyam4health
Yt: Natyam4health

#DanceMovementTherapy

Disclaimer: Consult Certified Professionals before trying these routines

Name: Novaera Productions
Description: Novaera fosters a welcoming and supportive community for dancers of all levels to discover and deepen their passion for Latin dance and culture.

Name: Arthur Murray Arnold
Description: Our mission is to provide the community with a high quality dance experience, in a nurturing environment. We believe that learning to dance opens doors to improved health, closer relationships with loved ones and produces a greater passion and joy for life!

Name: UoB SalsaSoc (Salsa Society)
Description:
Hola bailarin@s!

Welcome to the University of Bristol Salsa Society! We are a GOLD Balloon Accredited Society and we are super excited to share Latin American dance with you! Along with our passionate teachers, we teach regular Salsa and Bachata classes and have weekend socials twice a month so you can explore other Latin American dance styles and practice your social dancing skills.

>Membership options :
 FULL YEAR MEMBERSHIP NOW AVAILABLE - £20 
--> What does membership include?
- Discounted in-person dance classes: £3 per class instead of £4.50
- Discounted Saturday Special classes and socials
- Discounted Salsa Ball tickets
- Being part of the Salsa Family scheme
- Discounted Shoes and Dancewear 
- Discounted entry to Latin American, Reggaeton, Afro Caribbean and International club nights
- Discounted tickets to Dance Festivals in the UK

>Classes :
--> Salsa on Wednesdays:
- Beginners level: 7-8pm.
- Intermediate level: 8-9pm.
Salsa classes are held in the Carpenter Room of the Student's Union building.
--> Bachata on Thursdays:
- Beginners level: 7-8pm.
- Intermediate level: 8-9pm.
Bachata classes are held in Studio 3 of the Indoor Sports Centre.
--Please note, you still need a ticket for class even if you are a member!!--

>Socials:
Every fortnight we invite a guest professional teacher to show us a new style of dancing and we put to practice all of the fancy moves we’ve learned in our regular weekly classes. In the past our guests have taught us Kizomba, Merengue, Flamenco, Reggaeton, Samba and the Cha Cha!

>Performance Teams:
Auditions for our Salsa and Bachata performance teams take place in November 2023, with training sessions at the weekend. Our performance teams are a fun opportunity to take your dancing to the next level and learn a choreography to perform at the Salsa Ball and at other awesome events!

>Events:
The Bristol Salsa Ball is the event of the year and is not to be missed! The Salsa Ball 2024 dates are TBD, so keep an eye out for this

Name: TRIBE 99
Description:
TRIBE 99 is a dance company that exists to inspire and build authentic relationships with dancers and coaches across the globe. We passionately believe in having the most professional and knowledgeable staff when delivering industry leading choreography services to our clients. We help define the future of the dance team industry by providing uncharted opportunities including national recruiting events. 

TRIBE 99 stands for creativity, innovation, and leadership.

Name: Danceiros
Description: The Danceiros are Anubhav and Kathi, two internationally trained and passionate dance instructors. A dream-team since 2021, Anubhav's musicality, beautiful energy, and business expertise and Kathi's technical training and passion for teaching complement each other to form a highly sought-after dance experience. Formerly exclusively on Airbnb Experiences, the 2 are now on a mission to spread the love for dancing and to connect people again after a few dreadful years of way too little human interaction and fun!

Name: Australian Teachers of Dancing
Description: Australian Teachers of Dancing (ATOD) is Australia’s largest not-for- profit membership-based dance organisation. ATOD offers excellence in dance education across several platforms including systems of training, syllabus and Nationally Recognised Training (RTO 31624). ATOD has a highly regarded national and international presence in Dance Education, supporting dancers, Dance Teachers and performers to fulfil their dreams.

Name: Savvy Studios Limited
Description: Savvy Studios is a premier centre of excellence dedicated to delivering top-tier Dance and Pilates education in a friendly, inclusive and secure environment. Designed to support both children (from aged 2) and adults, our professional teaching teams are passionate about guiding each individual toward confidence, wellness, and lifelong creative discovery.

Name: Shuffles NYC
Description: Shuffles NYC is a Broadway tap and musical theater school for kids and teens. Director, Gail Pennington Crutchfield, started the school in the fall of 1992. After closing her sixth Broadway show, Gail decided to open the school as a way to give her own young children the best possible musical theater performing experience. Thirty years later, SHUFFLES has grown into a thriving training program that offers students a unique combination of the highest level tap, singing, and acting technique along with a love of performing. Live music in every class creates a professional Broadway atmosphere for students every day! Each year of classes and technique culminates in an original full-scale production for all SHUFFLES students. SHUFFLES students work on Broadway, and in high school and college musical theater programs across the country.

Name: ARDS India
Description:
ARDS India provides the best dance classes and education through intricately designed & formally planned curriculum with a team of industry leading professionals in Bangalore. Offering street styles and club styles, we care about providing the right and well-informed training to our students.

As a dance company, we believe in creating a safe space for all individuals (all age groups, beginners and amateurs alike) to express themselves freely as artists and propel their artistic and holistic growth.

Our students have access to dance battles, style-specific dance parties, workshops and various community events organized by us and our fellow-peers.

Name: Dansesolution
Description: Chez DANSESOLUTION, je mets ma passion et mon expertise au service de votre danse. Professeur et chorégraphe expérimenté, je vous accompagne à chaque étape avec bienveillance, créativité et professionnalisme. Que vous soyez débutant ou danseur confirmé, j’adapte mes méthodes pour révéler votre plein potentiel et faire de chaque cours un moment unique et mémorable.

Name: ArtlabJ
Description: Dedicated to the art of dance in the city of Detroit, Artlab J strives to create spaces where people of all ages and abilities can learn and grow and connect through dance and culture. We believe that dance is for everyone!

Name: DaFlow Community
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ?
Daflow Community est une association de danse urbaine située à Malakoff. Nous proposons des cours réguliers d'Afro, de Hip-hop, de Dancehall et de Dancehall Gyal. Nos cours sont accessibles à TOUS, des plus petits aux plus grands, de tous les niveaux, que vous ayez 2 pieds gauches ou que vous ayez déjà remporté "Danse avec les stars."

 Notre Mission :
Nous nous réunissons pour partager et faire découvrir la danse urbaine et sa culture avec des danseurs professionnels passionnés par leur métier.

 Rejoignez-nous !
Nos portes sont grandes ouvertes tous les mercredis à partir de 18h.

 Connectons-nous !
Suivez-nous sur Instagram : @daflowcommunity

Name: Dansayiti
Description:
Dansayiti is now offering a Haitian fusion dance classes in Ottawa.
Haiti fusion is a mix of many dance styles with a heavy dose of Haitian traditional dance (folklore rhythms/moves). We are taking an international music plate and adding Haitian spices to it. You will get a good base training in various folklore rhythms (ibo, nago, yanvalou...), which will be blended into modern choreographies.

Name: Star Heels Dance Team
Description: Star Heels Dance Team is a student run dance team at UNC consisting of Jazz, Modern, Ballet, and Tap companies. Fully organized AND choreographed by students. Perfect place to dance, choreograph,and meet great new friends!

Name: Centro de Danças Mavi Chiachietto • Ballet CDMC
Description:
The Ballet CDMC is a traditional and renowned School of Dance, officially affiliated to the Royal Academy Of Dance (RAD) in London. We use the RAD methodology and our students are internationally certified at the end of the course.

We have 28 years of history and baggage, with many national and international shows, festivals and awards. Our happiness and mission is to transform lives through dance!

Our forte is Classical Ballet, but we also have classes in Lyrical Jazz, Jazz Dance, American Tap, Ballroom Dancing, Contemporary, Physical Efficiency and the newest modality 2022: Video dance TikTok!

Our classes start from the age of 03 and there is no limit, everyone can dance and it's never too late to start!

If you want to know more, follow our social media, get in touch and come visit us in person.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Old Saybrook
Description:
Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Old Saybrook, was established in October of 2011. In 2020 under new proprietors, they’ve created an elegant, friendly, no pressure environment in which our students can learn great dance from world class instructors. The new studio completely remodeled with a total new look, with new dance classes and a whole new team of certified dance instructors.
Our most important priorities are that our students have fun while they improve their dance skills. Fred Astaire took great pride in a standard of excellence which is still alive and well in our studio. Our instructors have completed a rigorous training program and are Certified teachers. We train and promote our students through the trophy system and have beginners, social dancers, competitors, and advance level dancers. Our unique qualifications both in American and International Styles allow any student to progress from a beginner to any goal they set for themselves in a very short time frame.
We serve the following communities in Connecticut: Old Saybrook, East Lyme, Old Lyme, Westbrook, Clinton, Niantic, Deep River, Madison, Lyme, Essex.

Name: Nova Forma Academia de Dança
Description: A Nova Forma Academia de Dança atua no ensino da dança há 40 anos na cidade de Arujá, fornecendo formação técnica e artística de qualidade aos artistas da região; além de receber premiações importantes e concursos e festivais dentro e fora do estado de São Paulo.

Name: Choreo Hacks
Description: Choreo Hacks is an Open Style Dance Community that aims to promote fitness, creativity, and overall self through movement in Kenya.

Name: YinYang Kiz
Description: YinYang Kiz's mission is to uplift the world through dance, cultural education, and community building.

Name: The Salsa with Silvia Dance Studio
Description: Salsa with Silvia offers salsa and bachata lessons, salsa social parties, venue rentals, corporate salsa lessons, kids' programs, salsa performances, and more. We are located in Washington DC and Bethesda.

Name: GOOD Dance Co
Description: Founded by Julian Talens and Robin Ching in 2013, The G.O.O.D. Project, which stands for Growth Out of Dance is a group of individuals whose mission is to grow, inspire, and innovate dance in the form of happiness, humility, and hard work to impact those around us in the most positive way possible.

Name: Studio E
Description:
Schedule your next team outing with Studio E and solidify a company culture unlike any other. If you run offsites, ERGs, or people programs in Chicago and want something your team will remember, DM me ‘TEAM’ and we will get you set up.

About the Founder
Austin Moulder is an ex-BCG management consultant and ex-Operations Director for a $200M/yr technology marketplace platform. He understands the important of meaningful in-person team building. Whether he was working in a scrappy consulting team of 5, or leading a 50-person team, he makes sure individuals feel like their contributing to something larger than themselves. He has led dozens of sessions on team building, executive communication, and values-driven work, all of which are integrated into Studio E's corproate Latin dance experiences.

About the experience
Studio E is your home for top quality large group and private dance instruction. Based in Chicago, but serving students worldwide, we host electrifying salsa and bachata happy hours, offer high-quality dance classes for all levels, and help empower teams through effective communication and problem solving. We are rooted in Latino culture, and invite all backgrounds to experience this culturally enriching art form.

Name: BalletRox, Inc.
Description:
Empowering Boston youth through the transformative power of dance.

BalletRox is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to creating opportunity and fostering resilience through dance. We provide in-school and after-school programs that promote physical, emotional, and social growth—offering a supportive community where young people thrive.

Rooted in the Boston community, BalletRox partners closely with Boston Public Schools and local organizations to ensure equitable access to arts education. Our mission is simple: to give more kids a chance to dance—and, through that, a path to lifelong success.

Name: AnD Choreography
Description:
At AnD Choreography, dance is how we help people connect - with themselves, with each other, and with the moment they’re in. What began as a shared passion has grown into a practice rooted in storytelling, detail, and an instinct for making every performance feel personal.

We work closely with families, couples, brands, and teams - curating wedding choreography, corporate sessions, award shows, commercials, and music videos. From large-scale productions to intimate gatherings, our approach remains the same: thoughtful, collaborative, and tailored to the people in the room.

Based in Mumbai, working everywhere - we’d love to be part of what you’re creating!

– Akshay & Dionne

Name: Learn 2 Bhangra
Description: Our bhangra dance studio, established in 2023, is dedicated to inspiring and empowering individuals of all ages and backgrounds to discover the joy and passion of Bhangra. We offer a variety of classes taught by experienced instructors, catering to beginners and advanced dancers. Join us in celebrating the vibrant culture of Bhangra and unleash your inner dancer!

Name: Charlotte Dance Alliance
Description: A place where families come together to cultivate a shared passion for movement and expression. We foster a nurturing environment where learning flourishes, and every step is a celebration of dance.

Name: Las Juanas artes escénicas
Description:
La escuela cuenta con 13 años de trayectoria en el aprendizaje de la danza para niños y jóvenes. 

Recibimos a  niños y niñas a partir de los 3 años, segmentados en 6 niveles de aprendizaje que abordan diferentes estadios formativos.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Monserrat

Name: Junior Ballet Project
Description:
JUNIOR BALLET PROJECT BY OPINION PUBLIC
The contemporary dance company Opinion Public, anchored in the Belgian artistic landscape for over 13 years, is fully committed to its mission of transmission by launching its youth ballet, the “Junior Ballet Project” (JBP), dedicated to dancers aged 18 to 23. This initiative demonstrates a significant commitment to the training of a new generation of dancers, sharing the exploration of distinctive style it has developed since its creation in 2010.

PRESENTATION
The JBP, established in Brussels, is a two-year program offering a variety of classes from Monday to Friday. It is designed to develop the versatility and unique artistic identity of dancers, thus preparing them optimally for the professional demands of dance. Inspired by the hybrid style of the Opinion Public company, the JBP offers an exploration of classical and contemporary dance techniques, including in-depth analysis of partnering, floorwork, acrobatics, and improvisation. These various disciplines will be put into practice through experiences in creation and on stage, with at least one piece created each year for the JBP, followed by a series of performances.

Furthermore, additional artistic and technical horizons will be explored, with the participation of renowned professionals throughout the season, thus allowing this new generation of dancers to enrich their experience.

TRAINING CONTENT
Classical dance classes
Contemporary dance classes 
Chorographical workshops
Improvisation
Partnering techniques
Acrobatic classes
Breaking techniques
Theatrical expressions classes 
Learning of the Opinion Public company’s repertoire
Creation season 2024/2025 (with Sidonie Fossé, co-founder and artistic director of the professional dance company Opinion Public)
Series of shows and performances

Name: Kauno šokio teatras Aura | Aura dance theatre
Description:
Aura Dance Theatre is the first contemporary dance theatre in Lithuania, dating back to the modern dance studio founded by Birutė Letukaitė in 1980, which grew into the Kaunas Dance Theatre in 1995. In 2011, it became an international dance company, presenting performances on every continent and winning numerous awards.

In 1989, the theatre welcomed the first international modern dance festival in Lithuania held in Kaunas.

Name: Muvva - Nritya Raaga Nigamam
Description:
Muvva-Nritya Raaga Nigamam is an association established for the promotion of Indian Classical Dance since 2003. Started by Dr. Hima Bindu Kanoj, the institute’s objective is to train students in the art of Kuchipudi dance. The students undergo training in Kuchipudi dance, ranging from beginners to advanced learners. 

The members of Muvva are actively working for the promotion of Kuchipudi dance. The association aims at inducing dynamism in the younger generation and improves their creative abilities by conducting workshops, interaction session with prominent artists in the field of dance, motivating the students to wholeheartedly pursue the dance form, which requires dedication and hard work. It conducts online classes to students too.

Name: Tutu.Com
Description: At Tutu.Com we specialize in custom made as well as rental tutus for dance companies internationally. Check out our website for information about ready made rental tutus, Tutu School (seminars), patterns, books and more.

Name: Emerald Ball Dancesport Championships
Description:
Located in the heart of Los Angeles, California, USA, the Emerald Ball Dancesport Championships has made a reputation among ballroom competitors as being, like nothing else, both on and off the dance floor.

With origins dating back 57 years, the Emerald Ball is a cornerstone of American dancesport, for all dancers—including those new to the competitive scene, and those hoping to capture a ranking on the national scene. As one of the top three competitions in the United States in terms of both size and prestige, the Emerald Ball is an enjoyable and awe-inspiring event for anyone who loves ballroom. 

While numbers are impressive, the Emerald Ball is equally proud of its accomplishments off of the dance floor. Known for its creation of a warm and welcoming atmosphere, the Emerald Ball prides itself on excellence in customer service and hospitality.

Name: Salsa at Cal
Description:
Salsa at Cal is a group of university students who would like to spread their appreciation and knowledge of salsa and other Latin dances to UC Berkeley and the surrounding community. We primarily function as a Registered Student Organization, DeCal; and dance/cultural community. 


We teach a weekly series of beginner and intermediate classes in Hearst Gym as part of our for-credit DeCal course for students only. As an RSO, we host dance events, trips to local clubs, and FREE classes in Salsa and other styles. We are also open to performance bookings and host private classes upon request. We've taught everything from Rueda Cubana to Bachata, but our main focus is on Salsa. Dancers of all levels--from complete beginners looking to learn for the first time, to seasoned Salseres just looking for a fun crowd to dance with--are welcome in our classes and events, and no partner is required. 


As a club, Salsa at Cal strives to create spaces where Latine students can learn, grow, and celebrate their experiences through social dancing while also providing all students of different backgrounds the opportunity to respect, experience, and learn about Latin music, culture, and dance.

Name: Dance Culture
Description: Dance Culture is Brisbane's favourite dance school for those who want to give Latin dancing a try. We specialise in teaching Salsa and Bachata, the two most popular street Latin dance styles worldwide. Our classes and events are held in our beautiful, air-conditioned dance studio located in Annerley, Brisbane.

Name: Ballet Ashani
Description: Iyun Ashani Harrison (artistic director & choreographer) is a dance maker, educator, and executive director of Ballet Ashani. Born in Saint Andrew, Jamaica, Iyun first trained in acting, classical ballet, modern technique, and Jamaican folk dance. He graduated from the Juilliard School (BFA) and Hollins University (MFA). Harrison danced with the Dance Theatre of Harlem under the artistic direction of Arthur Mitchell. At the Dance Theatre of Harlem, he developed a love for neo-classical ballet and dancing choreography by George Balanchine, Glen Tetley, Michael Smuin, and Billy Wilson. This experience profoundly influenced Iyun's movement aesthetic and laid Ballet Ashani's foundation. Iyun's professional credits also include Ballet Hispanico, Buglisi Dance Theatre, Ailey II, National Dance Theatre Company of Jamaica, and guest appearances with Connecticut Ballet, Flint Institute of Music, Collage Dance Collective, Seattle Dance Project, and St. Louis Black Repertory Theater. With these companies, he danced choreography by Jirí Kylián, José Limón, Paul Taylor, Alvin Ailey, Lar Lubovitch, Donald Byrd, Edwaard Liang, Talley Beatty, and George Faison. A precursor to Ballet Ashani, Iyun founded and served as the executive director and resident choreographer for Ashani Dances (2011 – 2018). The Seattle Times wrote of Harrison, "Ashani Dances showcases an artist of diverse talents with sophisticated musical tastes and an understanding of how to use a bare stage to full effect." Most recently (2019), Iyun moved his company to Durham, NC rebranding it Ballet Ashani – A Contemporary Ballet. Iyun's choreography has been commissioned by the Juilliard Dance Ensemble, Ailey School, Boston Conservatory at Berklee, Collage Dance Collective, Men in Dance, American Dance Festival, Boost Dance Festival, University of Florida, Henderson State University, Pomona College, Goucher College, Webster University, Cornish College of the Arts, Jamaica School of Dance.

Name: Le Cercle Hip Hop
Description:
Le Cercle Hip Hop est une compagnie de danse basée à Chambéry, dédiée à la célébration et à la transmission des valeurs et des énergies du hip-hop. 

À travers ses créations, elle explore les multiples facettes de cette culture urbaine, tout en rassemblant des publics variés et en offrant un espace d’expression et de partage.

Portée par une vision artistique engagée, la compagnie met l’accent sur la transmission, le dépassement de soi et la créativité. Chaque projet est une invitation à découvrir la richesse et l’impact du hip hop, dans une démarche inclusive et ouverte sur le monde.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Oro Valley
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Oro Valley is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Arizona! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: Stygian Dance
Description:
Dark Fusion Dance Performance, Instruction, & Community
Our Mission: To foster growth and weave connections between non-traditional dancers by creating a supportive, tight-knit, and structured platform for dancers to express themselves, collaborate, and find inspiration and innovation through an open community. 

What We're All About
*Connecting: Our unique membership program connects you to other dark-dabbling fusion dancers around the world, opening opportunities to work together and grow together!
*Learning: We offer a wealth of online content from beginner to advanced levels, from technique to lectures--taught by our director Daewen and dozens of guest instructors from around the globe!
*Performing: We're always performing, whether it's in online shows with impressive videos, or in live venues as our Local Chapters! Watch us and find our next show!
*Producing: Don't miss our full virtual festivals and events! Spend a whole weekend with your peers in shows & classes!
*Coaching: Daewen offers several services one-on-one for both dance coaching and lifestyle coaching. Got a goal in dance or life you need accountability and guidance to achieve? Reach out!
*Certification: Looking to dance or teach professionally? We have Certification Programs to guide you to be who you want to be!

Name: Florida State Dancesport Championships
Description: August 1-6, 2023 at the Ritz- Carlton Sarasota Hotel

Name: SOUL Ballroom
Description: SOUL Ballroom specializes in ballroom and Latin private and group dance lessons, social dances, wedding dance lessons. SOUL Ballroom's mission is to awaken the SOUL of every individual through dance, movement, music & community.

Name: H&T Creative
Description: Igniting curiosity through enriching dance and arts experiences. Founded in 2020 by co-directors Hannah Woodliffe and Tilly Maginnis, H&T Creative is an emerging dance company committed to lay bare contemporary social themes through dance, H&T Creative deliver physically powerful performances that provoke a visceral response from audiences. Characterised by collaborations with artists from multiple disciplines and innovative staging.

Name: Vermillion Area Dance Organization
Description: ...committed to promoting expression and creativity through dance and making dance accessible to all.

Name: Step in2 Salsa
Description: Welcome to Step in2 Salsa, Brașov, where passion meets precision on the dance floor! Nestled in the heart of România, Braşov, our vibrant dance school is dedicated to the art of salsa, bachata, and kizomba. With classes tailored for beginners through to advanced dancers, we invite you to embark on a rhythmic journey like no other.

Name: The Movement Haus
Description:
The Movement Haus is a dance education & movement coaching company rooted in the dances of the African diaspora. We create spaces where movement is more than exercise — it’s medicine, culture, and connection.

Through virtual classes, corporate wellness programs, and community-based workshops, we empower every body to relax, relate, release, and return to joy. Our work blends artistry with healing, honoring tradition while shaping a future built on freedom, resilience, and belonging.

 Every body belongs here.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Chester
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Chester is the premiere ballroom dance studio in New Jersey! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: YJ Dance School
Description:
Welcome to YJ Dance School – Your Gateway to K-Pop and Dance in Queensland! With schools on the Gold Coast and in Brisbane, we strive to provide our students with the opportunity to not only explore their passions, but to also live out their dreams. 

 Our Dance Universe:  Dive into the dynamic and energetic realms of K-POP and Hip-Hop dance styles, taught by our talented instructors. Whether you're a seasoned dancer or taking your first steps, our goal is to create a welcoming environment where everyone can learn, improve, make friends and enjoy themselves.  Join Our YJ Family:  Join our community of passionate dancers who share your love for K-POP and Hip-Hop. Connect, collaborate, and share your progress with fellow dance enthusiasts who are just as excited to express themselves through movement.

Name: dNaga Dance Company
Description:
Our mission is to offer art programming that cultivates creativity and builds connection. By cultivating creative thinking, we are directly affecting our ability to build new pathways to problem-solving. By thinking creatively, we can help to heal trauma, interrupt systemic oppression, and serve as a tool to liberate ourselves and our communities.

 dNaga is in residence at Danspace, where we have been offering a Dance for Parkinson’s program since 2007 have trained and rehearsed. dNaga’s six company members live in Oakland and Brooklyn, and are currently rehearsing virtually. Intergenerational community members are always included in our performances. dNaga’s GIRL Project is in residence at EastSide Cultural Center, where we have been offering a multi-disciplinary art and empowerment program for POC girls 11 and up since 2014.

Name: Move It Studios
Description:
Move It Studios is located in the heart of Douglas Isle of Man. Our studio is a vibrant hub for dance enthusiasts of all ages and skill levels. We believe that dance is an expression of joy, a celebration of culture. Whether you're a beginner taking your first steps or an experienced dancer looking to refine your skills, our passionate and experienced instructors are here to guide you on your dance journey.

Our state-of-the-art facilities provide the perfect backdrop for you to learn various dance styles inc but not limited to, Ballet and Tap to Hip-Hop, contemporary, cheerleading, theatre and acrobatics. We offer a wide range of classes tailored to your interests and goals. And for those aspiring to take their dance to the next level, we have performance and competition opportunities to showcase your talent.

Join our dance family and discover the magic of movement. Experience the joy of dance, build confidence, and forge lasting friendships along the way.

Name: GW Raas
Description: The George Washington University's Premiere Competitive Garba Raas Team!

Name: Pianos, Pies & Pirouettes
Description:
Pianos, Pies and Pirouettes…

Our work includes working with disabilities and the Wigan Warrior Rugby project. Donna designed a program specifically for Wigan Warriors Rugby, working to strengthen any weak, injured area. Also building strength and flexibility into muscles and tendons they don’t necessarily use in their usual rugby training. This worked alongside a project that PPP ran with Wigan Council, concentrating on getting working-class boys into dance. As a result, we know what it takes to become a professional.

In addition to the lessons offered by Donna and Alan, we also work with several associates, such as Professional Actors, Playwrights and Singer-songwriters too. Including burgeoning talent from Wigan & Leigh College to ensure you get every opportunity to develop your full potential.

Name: TAAL Community
Description: Taal Dance Club at MITID isn’t just a club—it’s a whole vibe! We’re a crew of passionate movers, shaking off stress and bringing the heat with every beat. Through community dance sessions, we give students a chance to break free, let loose, and showcase their creativity while escaping the academic grind. From epic stage performances to crazy jam sessions, we turn every step into a story. Catch us grooving, vibing, and owning the stage on @taal.mitid—Taal se Taal Mila!

Name: Coastal Dance Company
Description: At Coastal Dance Company, we offer dance programs at various recreation centers and schools throughout Southwest Florida. Our mission is to provide a supportive and inclusive environment where dancers of all levels can explore their passion for dance, develop their skills, and unleash their creativity. Through our experienced and dedicated faculty, we strive to instill confidence, discipline, and a lifelong appreciation for the art of dance in our students. We are committed to fostering a love of dance and a sense of community that will last a lifetime!

Name: D-ZIRE
Description: Official page of D-ZIRE || The Dance Club of National Institute of Technology, Agartala (NITA)

Name: MDF- The label
Description: MDF-The label is the first bridge between Europe, Africa and the Caribbean regarding Afro-Caribbean dances and cultures. The objective is to be able to exchange, to have easier access to the source and to improve our cultural and technical knowledge in order to better promote these dances and cultures in Europe, to give more visibility to the BIPOC actors and creators of these cultures. We want to avoid the appropriation of these dances and the impoverishment of cultures. Therefore, we promote culture with an intersectional and decolonial perspective. More specifically, the association aims to promote access to dance knowledge and techniques, while raising awareness among the public and artists of the historical and social issues underlying artistic creation. Our activities : dance therapy ( reflective & movement/dance workshops, healing-empowerment & deconstruction trainings, reflective events, dance & cultural trips, merch line , workshops, festival, conferences & more

Name: Meg Stuart / Damaged Goods
Description: Meg Stuart, born in New Orleans, is a choreographer, director and dancer who lives and works in Berlin and Brussels. With her company Damaged Goods, founded in 1994, she has created over thirty productions, moving freely between the genres of dance, theater and visual arts. Her work is driven by a sense for experiment and artistic cross-pollination, challenging the limits of the body and expanding our perception of reality. She uses fictions and shifting narrative layers to expose the scripts that are written not only on our bodies, but also on the spaces and landscapes that we move in. Stuart’s work questions how we can rewrite these histories of ourselves and others not by looking back, but by harnessing the potential of the moment. Through her practice she explores dance as a way to transform the social fabric and gather communities.

Name: Alberta Dance Theatre
Description:
Alberta Dance Theatre is a supportive, non-competive, inclusive environment for Youth Artists to make life long friends while creating high quality performance art that is exceptionally theirs.

Unique to ADT, Youth Artists in grades 1-12 engage in a creative process alongside professional performance artists during an intense 11 week process to create a full length production. It is through this mentorship experience that dancers not only learn to create choreography, but also develop skills such as creative problem solving, healthy risk taking, collaboration, and leadership.

Every fall we use a piece of children's literature as inspiration for the production. We seek rights from the author and often get to speak with them as part of the creation process. The company presents the production every November with original music specifically composed for ADT. In addition to public performances and school matinees at professional performance venues the cast performs at seniors homes and pop up venues to engage over 600 Calgarians with imaginative and affordable family entertainment every year.

Formerly known as Children in Dance, Alberta Dance Theatre has been a part of the Calgary dance community since 1979!

Name: The Space Dance Co
Description: The Space Dance Co., the ultimate destination for dancers of all levels and styles. We are a premier dance studio dedicated to providing a supportive and challenging environment for dancers to grow and excel. Our mission is to help you achieve your dance goals and reach new heights in your dance journey.

Name: Toronto Zouk
Description: Toronto Zouk is a company which represents an artistic and cultural community around Toronto, which is interested in growing and performing the new forms of dance and music known as Zouk, in particular the ones that originate from Brazil in the various forms of Zouk-Lambada. We aim to promote the authenticity of these new forms of dance and music, while connecting them to the very diverse forms of social-artistic expression already existing in Canada.

Name: Ballet Folklórico de Antioquia
Description: Más de 30 años de trayectoria, más de 13 espectáculos de danza en gran formato llevados a escena y más de 60 giras internacionales, ratifican su misión cultural. China, Japón, Finlandia, Polonia, Francia, Bélgica, Holanda, Italia, Alemania, Rusia, Emirátos Árabes, Estados Unidos, Canadá, México, Chile y República Dominicana, son algunos países que han disfrutado de una Colombia alegre, mágica y diversa.

Name: Bhangra in the Burgh
Description: Bhangra in the Burgh (BIB) is Pittsburgh's premier Bhangra competition run entirely by students from Carnegie Mellon University and the University of Pittsburgh. All proceeds go to a charity of our choice. Last year we donated to The Period Project!

Name: LundDance
Description: Liikunta- ja tanssivalmennus. Ryhmäliikunta ja yksilöohjaus. Group, couple and solo dance. Latin, show and ballroom.

Name: OFFprojects
Description: OFFprojects is a collective that creates interdisciplinary performances and events using dance, music, image and words. The group consists of former dancers of Nederlands Dans Theater and Batsheva Ensemble, gathered around the work of choreographer and musician Amos Ben-Tal

Name: Tanssitarvikeliike Footlight
Description: Tanssitarvikeliike Footlight is a family owned business located in Finland with the purpose of helping dancers everywhere find the best products and equipment for themself. We are experts when it comes to dancewear and we our product lines are carefully selected with our dancers best in mind.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - High Point
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - High Point is the premiere ballroom dance studio in West North Carolina! From ballroom & Latin to private, group or couple style dance lessons, we enrich lives socially, physically, mentally & emotionally through dance.

Name: MB Desenvolvimento Humano
Description:
A MB Desenvolvimento Humano é o resultado das experiências profissionais de quase duas décadas de dois educadores nas áreas da dança e da educação pelo esporte, para a criação de algo único: uma metodologia robusta para o desenvolvimento humano de crianças e adolescentes através da dança. A MB acredita fielmente que transforma a vida das crianças com a prática de competências socioemocionais utilizando a dança como ferramenta educacional.

Atualmente, estamos presentes com atividades de dança para crianças e adolescentes em 9 (nove) escolas da Grande Florianópolis. Entre em contato conosco caso tenha interesse em implantar a dança na sua escola como uma ferramenta educacional!

Name: Alamal Dance School & Organization
Description:
Al-Amal Dance School & Company , is a non-profit organization for contemporary dance that was established in 2007 .
The school offers dance education consisting of major dance styles such as classical ballet, contemporary, jazz and hiphop. By doing so we expose both the students and the arab community in Israel to this kind of art and culture that is rarely known in our region. 
Several talented student of our school continue a professional education in dance, and join the school's professional dance troupe.
Our future vision is to establish the first ballet academy in the Arab community in the city of Israel.

Name: Limonada Enrique Gasa Valga Dance Company
Description:
2023 hat Enrique Gasa Valga dank dem Support vieler Unterstützer seine eigene Tanzkompanie, die Gasa Valga Dance Company gegründet.

Unsere erste Saison war außerordentlich erfolgreich:

Über 40 Shows auf 3 verschiedenen Bühnen in Europa, eine Weltpremiere, immer von einer Live Band begleitet. 

Die Begeisterung und Vorfreude auf die nächste Spielzeit ist bereits vorprogrammiert. Hier möchten wir euch über unseren nächsten Projekte am Laufenden halten.

Name: Time to Swing - SciencesPo
Description: Time to Swing is the dance association of SciencesPo Paris - Reims campus!

Name: Joann's School of Dance
Description: Sharing the love of dance since 1985.

Name: Higher Ground Dance Company
Description: HGDC is a student-run, student-choreographed dance company at Purdue University. We are a philanthropic organization that supports the Andrea Rizzo Foundation. Founded in 2002, we have reached over 200 members. We produce two shows a year with styles including lyrical, jazz, contemporary, ballet, hip hop, tap, pom, etc.

Name: babyballet New Zealand
Description:
Our classes provide the opportunity for babies and young children from 6 months to 6 years to learn to dance and develop key life skills in a healthy, sociable, caring and safe environment. babyballet is so much more than just a dance class and we can't wait to welcome you to our magical world. Our programme and syllabus has been carefully designed by leading preschool dance and ballet experts.

babyballet dance classes are bringing joy to thousands as we make learning to dance an unforgettable and magical experience – for you and your little star. The successful babyballet programme, founded 15 years ago in the UK, is now also available in New Zealand. From six months to six years, our babyballet classes will give your child the chance to dance, gain confidence and shine, in a fun, caring and supportive environment.

By learning through play, our qualified and welcoming teachers give babies, tots, toddlers, preschoolers and young children the chance to dance in their own unique way, having fun and making friends along the way, making this the perfect activity choice for you and your child.

If you’ve ever dreamed of running your own dance business or expanding your dance school, then a babyballet license could be just the opportunity you’ve been waiting for. Setting up and running your own babyballet licensed dance studio could be nearer than you imagine! Once becoming a babyballet New Zealand licensee you’ll be given all the tools and advice you need to set up and bring babyballet to children from 6 months to 6 years old! Our award winning preschool dance syllabus offers four stages of ballet dance classes for young children, plus a tap-dancing syllabus for children over 3 years. In addition, you can also increase your income by offering babyballet parties and through selling the adorable range of uniforms and merchandise.

Name: Somos Romero Paiva
Description: Escuela de marinera y danzas folclóricas, dirigida a niños, jóvenes, adultos y adultos mayores.

Name: København Danser Studios
Description:
Dance Maze – Your Dance Studio in Copenhagen!

Discover the excitement of drop-in open classes at Dance Maze, brought to you by København Dansers. Our state-of-the-art studio invites you to immerse yourself in a diverse range of dance genres, including ballet, gaga, contemporary, yoga, jazz, and flamenco.

At Dance Maze, we cater to all skill levels, providing a welcoming environment for both beginners and experienced dancers. Our classes are designed to accommodate your schedule, offering flexibility without any long-term commitments. Feel free to drop in whenever it suits you, and there's no obligation to return the following week – though you're always welcome to do so.

Need a spacious and well-equipped venue for your dance endeavors? Consider renting the ERIK ASCHENGREEN STUDIO at Dance Maze.

Name: Compagnie Ego
Description:
Fondée en 2003 par le chorégraphe Éric Mezino, la Compagnie Ego initie et mène des projets culturels,
des créations chorégraphiques et d’expressions artistiques en danse Hip-Hop en France et à l’étranger, tout en gardant une attache forte au territoire niortais.
La Compagnie Ego promeut une vision artistique basée sur l’échange, le métissage et sur la rencontre interculturelle.

Son activité évolue autour de trois grands axes de travail :

- L’action artistique (créations et diffusions de spectacles)
- L’action pédagogique (stages, formations européennes, projets de territoire)
- L’organisation d’événements (galas, festivals Milk Hip-Hop, Battle Niort Event)

La Compagnie s’efforce de toucher un large public d’initiés et de néophytes, issus de différents univers,
afin de faire partager et de faire connaître la culture Hip-Hop et ses valeurs.
Elle est devenue un acteur reconnu sur son territoire, mais aussi à l’échelle nationale et internationale, pour son expertise dans le domaine de la danse Hip-Hop et pour ses compétences en matière de développement culturel local.

Name: UK China Performing Arts
Description:
We was founded in London, England in 2017, is a dance academy which specialises in Chinese classical and folk-dance but also provides education for ISTD Ballet, Jazz, Hip-hop, K-pop and Ballroom dance both online and in the studio.

As an international artistic exchange platform and performing arts company, we have strong relationships with artists and companies from different countries around the world. We have provided professional performance services and collaborations with theatres, media partners and event organisers such as Lebanon Caracalla Dance Theatre with the Abu Dhabi Cultural Foundation, Netflix on the high-profile production of The Crown.

We have also successfully hosted events, such as exchanges to the Edinburgh Fringe Festival and the Chinese Culture and Arts Festival, Silk road dance festival, masterclasses such as the Chinese Family Day, the Children’s Creative Dance Masterclass, and the Drama Workshop.

We are an official UK subsidiary of CFA (Chinese Folk Dance Association), providing teacher and student training using the Chinese Folk Dance syllabus recognised by the Ministry of Culture and Tourism of the People’s Republic of China.

We believe in giving opportunities to everyone who loves dance, with our professional training method that caters to all levels from absolute beginner to professional and also for all ages from 3 years old.

Name: Hollywood Ballet
Description:
A new ballet company that combines the powerful elegance of ballet with the dazzling allure of Hollywood. Our mission is to deliver compelling storytelling, empower the community and nurture the next generation of artists.

Founded by Petra Conti and Eris Nezha. 

"They’re ready to revamp L.A.’s ballet scene" 
- LA Times 2023

Name: Tifenn Morin
Description:
𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐬 | 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬 | 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐯𝐚𝐢𝐥 𝐬𝐜𝐞́𝐧𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞 

𝑪𝒂𝒃𝒂𝒓𝒆𝒕 | 𝑺𝒂𝒍𝒔𝒂 | 𝑳𝒚𝒓𝒊𝒄𝒂𝒍 | 𝑱𝒂𝒛𝒛 𝑩𝒓𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒘𝒂𝒚 

Evènements professionnels et privés :
Mariages 
Entreprises dans le cadre de la QVT ou de la communication 

Organismes :
Cabarets
Structures de santé
Ecoles primaires, collèges, lycées, universités

Name: Five-0-Five | House of Dance
Description: We enable people to have a healthier relationship with movement and dance through our extensive range of dance education and choreography services - including events and corporate wellness programs. We also collaborate with condominiums and host multi-genre dance and creative movement classes for kids and adults classes within the complexes.

Name: Lula Washington Dance Theatre
Description:
Lula Washington Dance Theatre (LWDT) is a contemporary modern dance company founded in 1980 by Lula and Erwin Washington. Since its beginnings in South Los Angeles, California, LWDT has risen to become one of the most admired African-American contemporary dance companies in the West – known for powerful and high-energy dancing, unique choreography, and exceptional educational residencies.

LWDT’s mission is to build a world-class, professional, contemporary modern dance company that reflects the many aspects of African-American culture and history, and that celebrates and uplifts the human spirit through innovative, evocative, exciting, educational, and accessible dance. 

LWDT's education mission is to create a school in the inner city where young people can learn the art of dance, launch careers in dance, and where dance is used to motivate, educate, inspire, challenge and enrich the lives of young people so they can become successful, productive and competitive citizens.

Name: FUNDACIÓN MARÍA PAGÉS
Description:
La FMP centra su objeto de investigación y sus referencias en María Pagés, bailaora, coreógrafa, directora de escena y humanista de la danza. En su labor parte sitúa a la creadora, catalana de origen, madrileña por adopción, sevillana de nacimiento y universal por vocación, como un patrimonio vivo de la cultura española y universal.
María Pagés se ha implicado en la promoción de esta institución partiendo de la toma conciencia de la necesidad moral de devolverle a la sociedad lo que ésta le ha aportado a lo largo de su ya dilatada vida profesional. Por consiguiente, se activa como un patrimonio vivo y comprometido con su entorno inmediato y global.
La labor creativa y social que María Pagés ha desarrollado a lo largo de estos últimos cuarenta años legitima su nueva andadura humana, orgánica y comprometida con la danza y su capacidad transformadora.
La FMP transforma la experiencia humana, el conocimiento y los valores de María Pagés en paradigmas de acción creativa y sociocultural. Desarrolla sus territorios físicos y simbólicos en una identidad material e inmaterial, arraigada en una memoria colectiva e innovadora, convergente y cohesionadora, que está al servicio de los profesionales de la danza y de la gente, en general, independientemente de su edad, su clase social, origen, género y capacidades físicas.
Este esfuerzo transversal despliega una atención especial hacia los colectivos e individuos que más lo necesitan. Aporta apoyo a los artistas emergentes, estudiantes y alumnos de danza, incluidos todos sus lenguajes y abre la puerta de la danza, en general, y la danza flamenca, en especial, a los niños, adolescentes, personas con otras capacidades, mujeres y personas mayores que sufren una soledad no deseada.

Name: NCK'Zouk
Description:
Notre objectif : faire vivre le zouk autrement.

Notre association a pour mission de révéler le zouk et les musiques caribéennes sous un nouvel angle : en les dansant en solo, avec liberté, sensibilité et émotion.
Nous créons un espace où chacun peut se reconnecter à son énergie intérieure, renforcer son affirmation de soi, et s’épanouir dans une ambiance familiale, chaleureuse et dépaysante.

Name: Optima Dance
Description: Optima Dance is a student organization that was created to give dancers at UW-Madison the opportunity to showcase their own choreography and perform in student choreographed works. Optima gives students of all dance backgrounds and all fields of study the opportunity to experiment with and express their talents in ALL genres of dance. We welcome all forms of dance and all levels of dancers. Optima offers many opportunities for its members, including performances across campus as well as yoga, technique, and dance classes and monthly master classes in various styles of dance.  Most importantly, Optima spends each semester preparing for the fall and spring showcases. This includes weekly rehearsals, a feedback showing, dress rehearsal, and the showcase. Each year, the shows draw hundreds of audience members, creating memories for the dancers, choreographers, and the audience alike.

Name: Ildance
Description: Ildance is a company based out of Topeliusgatan 4, Göteborg, Västra Götalands Län, Sweden.

Name: Aglow Studio Singapore
Description:
We are a dance and yoga studio located in Singapore. 

Aglow Studio aims to cultivate a community that is supportive without judgment and share tools with you to become healthier, happier, and live a full-potential life. Our classes are suitable for all levels of experience! 

Totally new to yoga or dance are welcome to learn basics and with proper guidance for better understanding and foundation!

Name: EHL Dance Committee
Description: As passionate dancers and active members of the EHL Dance Committee, we're committed to infusing life at our prestigious institution with movements, creativity, and boundless energy. As ambassadors of the art of dance, our mission is to curate unforgettable events, workshops, and performances for the EHL community. Join us in celebrating the harmonious fusion of the dance world with hospitality excellence!  #EHLDance #DancePassion #EHLCommunity

Name: Montréal Shuffle
Description: Montréal Shuffle est un organisme à but non-lucratif, la seule communauté dédiée à la promotion et à la croissance de la danse shuffle à Montréal. Meetups, cours, ateliers et autres activités pour tous les styles. et niveaux.

Name: Karakashyan & Artists
Description:
Karakashyan and Artists is a multidisciplinary company of dance artists from Bulgaria, boldly moving through disciplines and brought together by director and choreographer Kosta Karakashyan. 


In a world where people often feel like spectators of their own lives we create unique large-scale immersive productions which resonate viscerally with audience members close enough to join the action. Our work aims to empower the audience through the synergy of movement and storytelling. We aim to cultivate empathy and tenderness in society and to advocate for social change through our art. 


Our process explores a movement language that subverts traditional dance vocabulary in favor of authentic emotional expression, inviting our collaborators to follow their own impulses, creativity, and agency.	


Informed by a desire to explore the boundaries of emotion and society, Karakashyan and Artists embraces the beauty of the intimate, the visceral, and the subversive. Our work is set in kitchens, landfills, public spaces, warehouses, beaches, toilets, caves, runways, and film sets, incorporating dance, theatre, film, design, and literature. We strongly rebel against any boundaries in our creative approach thus finding new exciting opportunities to incorporate our love for dance, society, and culture. 


Founder Kosta Karakashyan's work across dance, film, and education has been described as "an important voice for LGBTQ+ struggles in Chechnya and elsewhere". A two-time Bulgarian National Ballroom Champion, Karakashyan has performed and choreographed on Dancing with the Stars Vietnam and across Bulgaria, New York, Canada, Germany, Norway, Egypt, Vietnam, and Japan. His work has been featured by The Guardian, Elle Magazine, them, GLAAD, and Radio Free Europe. The Guardian writes: "Karakashyan moves with hard jolts and swift stealth, a body of expression, skill, and power; a body standing its ground and not about to give up."

Name: Usina das Artes Ciranda
Description:
Escola de Dança

Ballet Clássico de formação, Ballet Adulto, Baby-class, Jazz, Jazz Lyrical, Jazz Musical, Sapateado Americano, Contemporâneo, Danças Urbanas, Flexibilidade, Condicionamento Físico para bailarinos, Pas de deux, Heels/Stiletto, Dança de Salão, Teatro, Coreografias para 15 anos e Casamentos, Coach de Variação de repertório

Name: Dance with Gabby
Description:
Founded by Gabrielle Mabilia, a dancer with over 26 years of experience, Dance with Gabby was born during the height of Australia’s COVID-19 lockdowns in 2020.

With the closure of dance studios and the forced shutdown of performing arts, Gabby’s network were searching for ways to connect with dance during this time, and inject a bit of fun into their new lives at home.

What started as a project quickly became an online movement, recruiting dancers all across Australia who were selling out Gabby’s 60 minute classes. 

After 18 months of only existing virtually, when the world reopened DWG moved into a studio in Hawthorn, a suburb in Melbourne’s East. DWG now offers a variety of casual classes, designed for all skill levels, with a modern approach of a new routine in each class so you can simply book and attend when suits you - just like exercise classes.

Name: Lions Of Africa
Description: Unlock the rhythm of West Africa with Lions of Africa on LinkedIn.  Dive into our world of vibrant performances, cultural exchange, and community empowerment. Join us as we share the heartbeat of Africa's dynamic arts scene. Connect with us now for a journey of inspiration and collaboration. #LionsofAfrica #AfricanArts #CulturalExchange

Name: Zentrum für Ausdruckstanz und Tanztherapie
Description: Das Zentrum für Ausdruckstanz und Tanztherapie ist ein Ort, an dem Menschen die Möglichkeit haben, sich frei von tanztechnischen Vorschriften mit den vielfältigen und kreativen Ausdrucksformen von Tanz und Bewegung zu beschäftigen.

Name: Pointeworks
Description:
Passion, creativity, and dedication to the art are the driving forces of Pointeworks, a company committed to inspiring communities by celebrating the voices of dance, with a special emphasis on female choreographers. 

We strive to nurture and connect artists of all background, and to bring a balance to the kinds of voices that are represented on stage through classical and contemporary works

Name: Kalashree
Description:
Kalashree; The Indian Dance Society of ARSD College, University of Delhi. 
We specialize in showcasing the rich tapestry of Indian dance forms, encompassing folk, classical, and more. Committed to excellence, we actively participate in competitions and curate dynamic events throughout the academic year. Our ethos revolves around teamwork, emphasizing collaboration and dedication to achieving collective success. Join us in exploring the intersection of tradition and innovation, where every performance resonates with cultural vibrancy and artistic finesse.

Name: KolKo KollektiviKompaniet
Description:
KolKo KollektivKompaniet är en dansorganisation som producerar dansföreställningar och driver dansfrämjande projekt för framförallt barn och unga.
Verksamheten drivs sedan 2009 av danspedagogerna och producenterna Sara Nilsson, Sara Johansson och Sandra Fredriksson och genomförs ofta i nära samverkan med med kommuner och regioner, lärare och förskolepedagoger, kultursamordnare och arrangörer runt om i Sverige. 

2024-2025 utvecklar de dansfortbildningen DansaKänsla för förskolans verksamhet tillsammans med psykoterapeut Susanna Lundström.
KolKo KollektivKompaniet har sin bas i Stockholm och genomförs med stöd av Statens Kulturråd och Kulturförvaltningen Region Stockholm.

Name: Nőkre hangolva - Tematikus táncélmények Nőknek
Description: A Nőkre hangolva tematikus táncélmények kifejezetten a Nők számára teszik lehetővé, hogy fejlesszék testi és lelki egészségüket koreográfiák által, amik a 7 fő érzelem mentén érzelemkifejezés fókusszal készülnek. A cél egy olyan támogató és inspiráló női közösség, ahol minden résztvevő megtalálja önmagát.

Name: Clearwater Dance Depot
Description: Clearwater Dance Depot, formally know as Rungo Dance, is a total dance and movement training system for all ages and all levels promoting mind-body integration.

Name: Cie 1 des Si - Etienne Rochefort
Description: Compagnie de danse

Name: Duck-Billed Company
Description:
Created in 2020, Duck-Billed is a contemporary dance company from Lyon, mainly presenting the work of Grégoire Manhes. 
The company present works with multiples influences, an atypical gesture and a meticulous music/dance relationship. Duck-Billed's universe is set to become as eclectic as possible. Whether it's a simple taste for research or with the aim of reaching a wide audience, the company is constantly seeking to renew itself and find new way of creating.

Humor, disarticulated gestures and strong musicality are part of the
company's DNA. Whatever the work you will see, you will recognize easily a Duck-Billed's piece. Passionate about the collection, Grégoire Manhes wants to build the repertoire of his company as a catalog of musical genres, artistic trends or the socials phenomena, drawing his inspiration from the "culture" in the broadest sense of the term.

You can already see in the repertoire of the company two choreographic pieces, a medium-length movie, a documentary all accompanied by original music creations.

Name: Nela Dance
Description:
Transform Your Workplace with Movement & Connection – In Person or Online!

Looking for a unique way to boost employee morale, foster collaboration, and reduce stress? Bring your team together through dance—wherever they are!

At Nela Dance Academy, we offer customized corporate dance programs designed to enhance teamwork, creativity, and employee well-being—all while having fun! Our interactive workshops create a positive, energized work environment, whether in person or via Zoom, so teams from anywhere can stay connected, inspired, and motivated.

Why Choose Dance for Your Team?
 Strengthens collaboration and communication
 Boosts creativity and problem-solving
 Enhances physical and mental well-being
 Creates a vibrant, engaged workplace culture

 Available In-Person & Online – Bring the Benefits of Dance to Your Team, No Matter Where They Are!

Let’s create an experience your team will never forget! 
Learn more by filling out the form on this page or by contacting us directly: 
 neladancellc@gmail.com
 neladance.com
 612-213-8126

Dance For Business | Corporate programs | Team-building activities | Corporate Wellness | Dance lessons | Employee Engagement | Workplace Wellness

Name: Vision Dance
Description: VISION DANCE CONVENTION was created to bring dancers of all ages together with the purpose of developing a positive mindset when it comes to their craft in order to bring their goals to reality. This convention focuses on connecting students with teachers who are dedicated in bringing a light of inspiration to those that they teach. We create a learning space where there is no room for judgement, a space for each dancer to discover and feel liberated enough to exceed their own limitations.

Name: USA Dance Breaking For Gold USA
Description: The DanceSport Breaking Division is the organized branch of USA Breakers within USA Dance, Inc — the National Member Body of WDSF (World DanceSport Federation) and Recognized Sports Organization by the USOPC (United States Olympic and Paralympic Committee).

Name: THE SHOWSTOPPERS CREW
Description:
The ShowStoppers is a dance crew here at MIT manipal, known for its ORIGINALITY, CREATIVITY and AUTHENTICITY.
College is all about exploration and they provide a platform that allows all their members to dance without restricting them to one dance style, which includes Eastern, Western, Classical, Bhangra and more.

Name: Project Female CIO
Description:
Founded in 2018, Project Female is a Brighton based dance organisation. Our mission is to create an inclusive space for young dancers who identify as female or non-binary to express themselves free from judgement. 

We aim to redefine the preconceptions of youth dance. We teach a unique fusion of contemporary, commercial and hip-hop/street dance and we empower dancers to express themselves unapologetically and grow in confidence. We support dancers to take risks and challenge the boundaries set by society.

Project Female applies a youth work approach to our dance setting with integrated pastoral care to prioritise the mental and physical wellbeing of our young people.

Name: Passerelle Dansée
Description: Compagnie de danse inclusive qui vise à favoriser le lien, les générations et les cultures par le biais du mouvement, l'expression corporelle, de la création collective à la transmission.

Name: X-POLE Australia
Description:
Supplying polers with high-quality safe equipment that can be used to "pole anywhere, anytime." 
The world's number one portable, professional grade pole. Height adjustable, no permanent fixings, sold globally since 2004. High-quality engineering, safe to use for your entire pole journey. In a width, finish & model to suit your individual pole style.

Name: HQ Dallas Dance Studio
Description:
HQDallas | Elevating Dance, Building Community

Welcome to HQDallas, where passion meets precision in the art of dance. Located in the heart of Dallas, we are more than a studio—we're a movement dedicated to inspiring dancers of all levels. Whether you're a beginner exploring the fundamentals, an intermediate dancer mastering choreography, or an advanced performer refining your style, HQDallas offers programs that cater to every journey.  

Our classes focus on:  
 Choreography: Sharpen your skills with dynamic routines.  
 Street Styles: Build a strong foundation in street dance techniques.  
 Beginner Programs: Start your dance journey with confidence.  

We also host pop-up classes, performance opportunities, and are thrilled to launch a competitive dance team in 2025.  

At HQDallas, we believe in fostering creativity, connection, and growth. Join us to move, learn, and thrive with a community that shares your passion for dance.  

 Explore our class calendar at [hq.sites.zenplanner.com](https://hq.sites.zenplanner.com) and become part of the HQDallas family today!  

#DanceCommunity #HQDallas #DanceClasses #Choreography #StreetStyles #BeginnerFriendly

Name: Qualia Dance Collective
Description:
Qualia Dance Collective seeks to explore the qualities of space, time, and energy as catalysts for movement and art and performs the choreography of Fiona Scruggs.
