Fiona’s background is in ballet, so her movement is grounded in principles of line and technical precision. The work she creates explores creative narratives of visual art and often possesses a surrealist quality, inviting her audience to envision new worlds. 

We perform in local venues and festivals to stay connected to our Berkshire neighbors and form stronger bonds with our nearby communities. Dialogues with the audience following performances are integral to engaging with our community and bridging access into the artistic process. 

Our work is poetic and classical, smart and inventive. We aim to awaken the imaginations of everyone we meet.

Recent performances include:

Jacob's Pillow Dance Festival (Becket, MA)
Edith Wharton's The Mount (Lenox, MA)
Wandering Dance Festival (Pittsfield, MA)
5x5 Dance Festival (West Hartford, CT)
The Foundry (West Stockbridge, MA)
Choreography on the Edge (Ancram, NY, & Kingston, NY)
Chesterwood (Stockbridge, MA)
Berkshire Busk (Great Barrington, MA)
Dance on North (Pittsfield, MA)

Name: Emerson Urban Dance Theatre
Description:
Emerson Urban Dance Theatre (EUDT) is a student-run dance troupe at Emerson College. Founded in 2006 by Michael Love (2010), EUDT uses hip-hop, tap, and contemporary dance as tools to tell dynamic narratives.

The company produces a new original dance production each semester, featuring new pieces of choreography. EUDT strives to advance the dance presence on Emerson's campus, and in the Boston college dance/performing arts community at large. EUDT is dedicated to furthering its dancers both creatively and physically as dancers and as choreographers.

Name: Dance To EvOLvE
Description:
Dance To EvOLvE is located in San Diego, Chicago and Cleveland and is unique as a mobile dance company as we don’t have ‘one’ studio. We hold all of our classes in third party venues around each of those cities.  Through our great teachers, we offer great classes in recreation centers, schools and other venues, specializing in ages 2-12 years.  We are a team who loves what we do!  Our mission is to evolve our students through dance while creating heart-warming smiles! 

Your Choices: Multiple Classes Near You! Specializing In Children’s Classes. Multiple Class Styles, Birthday Parties, Camps & School Programs. Affordable pricing options. Affordable & optional annual recital. No registration fee.  No dance competitions or the fees that come with them. Flexible dress code. Easy class make-up policy.

Our Knowledge:  EvOLvE believes it’s the teacher that makes the difference. Each one is carefully chosen by their experience, passion, professionalism, and bubbliness! Small student ratios, curriculum goals, and ongoing teacher trainings create our progressive and age appropriate classes. All this ensures that your dancer is in the best learning environment possible. 

Their Fun!: Our talented teachers create welcoming classes that balance learning with fun so that our dancers are always improving with a smile and a giggle! Fun props and creative imagery add to the nonstop class energy that is not to be missed!

Name: The Dancers Club
Description:
The Dancers Club (TDC) , the official choreographers of the globally renowned "Enjoy Enjaami," is a leading educational institution, providing comprehensive dance education and career opportunities for artists. 

Founded by Arnold Charles and Suren Rajendran, seasoned veterans with 10+ years of experience in the entertainment industry, TDC has had the privilege of choreographing for esteemed personalities such as Badshah, MS Dhoni, Virat Kohli, AR Rahman, Yuvan Shankar Raja, and many more.

Our vision is to create an ecosystem where artistic talents and education intersect, fostering a platform for profound societal impact. Dance, as a transformative lifestyle, inspires, educates, and empowers individuals from diverse backgrounds.

We take pride in our partnerships with Foundation of Goodness and MOCA Studios, organisations committed to social impact and artistic excellence.

With dedicated instructors, industry professionals, and a nurturing community, TDC offers programs, workshops, and performances empowering individuals to express themselves authentically, discover their unique voices, and effect positive change. 

Join us at TDC and embark on a transformative journey of artistic growth and societal influence.

Name: DSDA Dynamic
Description: D.S.D.A. Dynamic’s mission is to provide a platform for students (also non-students) in Delft to enjoy everything related to dance. We think that dance is a great way to connect all kinds of people.

Name: InterArt Cultural Center
Description: Evolving the contemporary dance culture in Macedonia since 1996

Name: Kalas Dance Academy
Description: Kala’s is the ultimate reality for all the dancers who have the potential and capability in them to beat their own limit and set a new benchmark. It is through Kala’s, named after Mrs Kalavati- Guru of Ms. Ssonia Deshmukh, many people are successful in turning their dreams into reality. Kala’s is not only a dance institute but it is also a way of life for the students performing and learning at the academy. Through Kala’s, students have earned their respect in life and have gained the confidence to reach their goals and inspire others to do so.

Name: Rince na Gréine Irish Dance
Description: At Rince na Gréine we share the joy of Irish Dance by offering traditional Irish Dance lessons for ages 2 through adult.  Dance Director Lauren Adams-Plehal, ODCRN.  Assistant Dance Director, Margaret Schmitz, ODCRN.

Name: BOOT Dance Project
Description: BOOT Dance Project (Building Opportunities for Outstanding Texas Dancers) provides Texas-based dance artists and audiences with enriching opportunities that foster community and artistic development. We aim to support and uplift the Texas dance community through performances, audience engagement, and collaborative projects. Our work centers on creating spaces where Texas dance artists can thrive and Texas audiences can engage with innovative and meaningful dance.

Name: Yaya Dance Academy
Description: Open ideals and high quality art education is Yaya Dance Academy’s continuous mission. The academy works with dancers of all ages, mainly individuals who are remarkably passionate in dance. Through professional training the academy provides reputable competition and performance opportunities to broaden the members’ vision and capabilities. For more inquiries, visit us at www.yayadanceonline.com or on Instagram at @yayadanceacademy. We currently have 3 locations in City of Industry, Irvine, and Torrance.

Name: Breaking Walls Festival
Description: Breaking Walls is a festival of innovative Site-Specific performances, Dance and theater workshops and Dance Films developed in collaborations between international and Egyptian artists in Cairo.

Name: Press Play Dance Convention
Description: A NEW ERA OF DANCE EVENTS.

Name: Groupe et Compagnie Grenade - Josette Baïz
Ballet Ana Araújo
Description:
A PROPOSTA da academia é ensinar, educar e desenvolver os alunos procurando despertar a sensibilidade artística de cada um.
O OBJETIVO é dar um ensino de alto nível técnico e artístico proporcionando um amplo aprendizado dos cursos ministrados na academia.
A PAIXÃO PELA DANÇA é o nosso combustível, assim o Ballet Ana Araújo conquistou e consolidou um nome de respeito e prestígio no cenário da dança nacional.

As METODOLOGIAS de ensino dos cursos: 
No Ballet Clássico a linha adotada é da Escola Russa com ensinamentos da Escola Francesa, Cubana e Inglesa. 
Nos cursos de Jazz e de Sapateado são adotados fundamentados das técnicas americanas.

Saiba mais no Instagram: @balletanaaraujo
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: Paradigm Dance Workshop
Description: Furthering dance education through diverse technique-focused and performance driven master classes.

Name: We Are Surprise Effect
Description:
Nous sommes un collectif de performers spécialisés dans l’entertainment,  originaires de Toulouse et de Paris.

Nous mettons tout en oeuvre pour vous faire vivre une expérience exceptionnelle. Nous apportons une attention toute particulière à vos attentes et vos envies pour vous offrir un spectacle riche en émotions et qui vous ressemble.

Nous défendons l’idée d’un spectacle, où tout le monde partage un moment riche en émotions au travers d’un show rythmé, énergique et drôle. Un spectacle participatif qui délivre un message positif sur les valeurs humaines.

RÉCOMPENSES : 
Première place - Compétition de Street Show à Surfer Paradise, Australie - 2017
Prix du Public - Festival Bastid'Art 23e Edition - 2017
Pavé d'or - Festival international de Vevey, Suisse - 2018
Première place - Prix du jeune public - Festival international de Usedom - 2022

Name: Compagnie MI'VYBZ
Description:
Compagnie de danse professionnelle
Danse Hip Hop et Langues étrangères

Fondatrice / Chorégraphe / Artiste Interprète : Michaela Piklova

Name: Bachata Inspire
Description:
Plesna škola u Zagrebu posvećena osobama koje nikad prije nisu plesali a žele naučiti ples u paru, upoznati nove ljude i zabaviti se. 
 Pridruži se najstrastvenijem plesu u Hrvatskoj i postani dio Bachate Inspire!
 Ne treba ti plesno iskustvo niti partner, samo želja za plesom.

 Bachata ples je jako lako za naučiti te vam je 3 mjeseca dovoljno da plešete sa samopouzdanjem, uživate u trenutku i zaboravite sve brige svijeta. 

 Provjerite naš online projekt www.plesonline.com gdje možete naći besplatni online tečaj bachate.

 Upiši tečaj bachate u plesnoj školi Bachata Inspire i uči plesati po strukturiranom tečaju koji te vodi od osnova do naprednog tečaja
 Provjerite našu web stranicu www.bachatainspire.com za više informacija. 

3 RAZLOGA ZAŠTO BAŠ BACHATA INSPIRE! 
 Bachata Inspire je najveća i najpopularnija plesna škola bachate u Hrvatskoj i jedina certificirana plesna škola za sensual bachatu u Hrvatskoj. U zadnjih 6 godina educirali smo generacije izvrsnih plesača koji dan danas rasturaju na plesnom podiju.
 Brinemo se za tebe i dajemo 100% od sebe da se osjećaš ugodno na tečaju i da se uklopiš u ekipu. Pazimo da bude isti omjer dečki i cura. Garantiramo veselu i prijateljsku atmosferu.
* Članovima dajemo puno više od plesnog tečaja! Organiziramo redovite partije, posebna druženja za članove, besplatne radionice, odlaske na plesne festivale te svašta nešto. Provjeri naše foto albume https://bit.ly/2YkmyCC / https://bit.ly/2ZwM1Fl / https://bit.ly/2YnwB9W
 Pratimo najnovije trendove iz svijeta bachate i upravo vas to učimo. Tečaju i vašem plesnom napretku pristupamo profesionalno, odgovorno te sa velikim strpljenjem za svaku razinu plesa od potpunih amatera do naprednih plesača. Ako mislite da imate “dvije lijeve noge” dođite kod nas i mi ćemo ih pretvoriti u plesne korake . Naša glavna prednost je da smo odlični instruktori koji jasno i jednostavno prenose plesno znanje i brinu za svoje članove.

Live, Dance, Inspire!

Name: Les Mutins de Longueuil
Description: Depuis 1960, les Mutins de Longueuil initient les jeunes à la danse traditionnelle. À la fois ludique et physiquement stimulante, cette forme d’expression privilégie les interactions sociales et mène à la découverte des cultures d’ici et d’ailleurs.

Name: Danfit International (Dance, Fitness and Events)
Description:
DanFit International, established in 2016 by the visionary founder Kalyan Bhowmick and co-founder Mistu Mukherjee, is a premier dance and fitness studio dedicated to fostering a holistic approach to wellness through the art of dance. Located in the heart of the city, DanFit International has quickly become a beacon for dance enthusiasts and fitness aficionados alike.

Our studio is a vibrant and inclusive community where individuals of all ages and skill levels come together to explore the transformative power of dance. At DanFit International, we believe that dance is more than just movement; it is a journey of self-discovery, expression, and physical well-being. Our mission is to inspire and empower our students to reach their fullest potential by providing a supportive and dynamic environment for learning and growth.

We offer a diverse range of classes that cater to a wide array of interests and preferences. Our dance fitness classes are designed to combine high-energy dance routines with effective fitness techniques, ensuring a fun and engaging workout that burns calories, tones muscles, and boosts cardiovascular health. For those who are passionate about street dance, our expert instructors teach the latest moves and techniques in hip-hop, breakdancing, and other urban dance styles, allowing students to express their individuality and creativity.

DanFit International is also proud to offer traditional and classical dance forms. Our Kathak classes delve into the rich cultural heritage of this classical Indian dance, emphasizing intricate footwork, expressive gestures, and rhythmic storytelling. For those drawn to contemporary dance, our curriculum blends modern techniques with fluid movements, encouraging artistic innovation and emotional expression. Additionally, our semi-classical dance classes offer a unique fusion of classical and contemporary styles, providing a versatile platform for students to explore and hone their skills.

Name: La Casa del Son Barcelona
Description:
We work every day to make La Casa del Son Barcelona the place where you can feel like at home, learning your first steps of Cuban Salsa, Son & Bachata, or improving your dance skills in order to feel better and to get more confidence in dancing the latin styles at the best salsa & bachata clubs of the city or at the uncountable free dancing events in the open air.

We give private classes, group courses to private people and group courses to companies who organize team building activities for their employees.

Some more courses available: yoga, stretching, cardio dance.

Name: Maryland Dance Project
Description:
Maryland Dance Project is expanding! Former NFL dancers Jess and Emily are proud to announce Columbia’s newest youth dance program. We are a local, women-owned small business with highly attended classes for ages 15+, who have served over 400 dancers and created a transformational and inclusive community. We have a proven track record of training dancers to become professionals with programs like our popular Stadium Series. Starting fall 2024, we will be offering a comprehensive youth program for dancers starting at 2 years old, where every dancer receives the care and education they need to have fun and grow. 

The future of MDDP is bright, with programs for competitive and pre-professional dancers on the horizon.

Name: River Oaks Dance
Description: River Oaks Dance is a dance studio with two locations in Houston, Texas serving children ages 3 months and older with classes in ballet, tap, jazz, hip-hop, mommy & me and more!

Name: UNIΦ -Dance Club, BITS Goa
Description: The Dance Club BITS Goa is a community of passionate dancers who come together to train and perform across a wide range of dance styles. More than just a club, we are a family that believes in collaboration, growth, and the joy of dance.

Name: The Artist Inside You Store
Description:
The Artist Inside You Store is one-stop destination for everything that an artist needs!
Starting with dancers we have launched some limited collection of products and services creating a unique store only for artists. Dance shoes and Dance wear available for the very first time in India from brands like Bloch, Capezio, Tendu, Freed London, Merlet, Ballet Rosa and many more.
The idea is to provide access to all the dancers with all the necessary tools required to carve their path towards discovering the Artist Inside each one of them. 
It was started on 10th November 2010 when we completed our first order of 8 shoes which was delivered to dancers after 8 months! But was so worth as it helped those dancers finally dance their favourite dance styles like ballet & Jazz.Today we are deliverin 8-10 orders per day to all over India and have more than 6 physical outlets in different cities like 
1.  Nritya Shakti, Bombay
2. IFBC, Saket Delhi
3. Noida, Uttar Pradesh
4. Dhurri, Bangalore
5. Les And Danseus academy, Pune
6. Assam

We have our mission as a store is to make available all the products that are needed by dancers and other artists to build their art with the perfection they want.

Name: Natya Dance Theatre
Description: Natya Dance Theatre honors the rich heritage of Bharatanatyam, reimagining this classical Indian dance for modern audiences through innovative choreography. Under the direction of Hema Rajagopalan, Natya merges rhythmic footwork, intricate gestures, and expressive storytelling with contemporary vision. As a touring company and academy, it fosters cultural dialogue, spiritual connection, and emotional transformation, ensuring the vibrancy of this ancient art form. Natya’s work is a dynamic conversation between tradition and innovation, preserving a timeless legacy.

Name: Industrial Dance Complex Ltd
Description:
The Industrial Dance Complex Ltd is Ireland’s newest destination for dance, performance, and creativity. Founded with a passion for movement and a commitment to artistic excellence, we strive to inspire dancers of all ages and abilities to reach their full potential.

Our state-of-the-art facilities and dedicated team of experienced instructors create an environment where aspiring dancers and professionals alike can thrive. Not only can you utilise our studios for any creative project, we proudly host classes, workshops, and events, including professional performances, seasonal camps, and bespoke choreography for special occasions.

The Industrial Dance Complex Ltd is where passion and artistry come alive.
Let’s move together, grow together, and make magic happen!

Name: Royal Vulcan Cheer and Dance
Description: Welcome to Royal Vulcans Cheer and Dance, Lincoln's premier cheer and dance program dedicated to fostering excellence, teamwork, and athleticism in our members. With a commitment to nurturing both physical skills and personal growth, we provide comprehensive training in cheerleading and dance techniques while instilling values of discipline, dedication, and sportsmanship. Our experienced coaches prioritize individualized attention, ensuring each participant reaches their full potential in a supportive and inclusive environment. Join us in celebrating the spirit of cheer and dance, where every member is valued, empowered, and inspired to shine. Connect with us to explore opportunities for collaboration, partnership, and community engagement. Let's elevate together! #RoyalVulcans #LincolnCheerDance #PremierProgram

Name: Tartan Salsa Latin Dance Club
Description:
Tartan Salsa was established for the purpose of creating an environment where the CMU and Pittsburgh community can explore, express, and learn different social dance styles with Latin and Afro-descendant beats. Through dance, it is possible to gain a better understanding of other people's cultures. We teach social salsa and bachata dance styles, aiming to give our members the tools to feel comfortable dancing Latin music in a social scene in Pittsburgh and beyond.

We aim to develop and improve individual skills in the various forms of Latin dance, including but not limited to salsa, bachata, merengue, and bolero, and the different styles within each. The organization is also committed to providing an open and enjoyable venue for students, faculty, staff, and other members of the Pittsburgh community to learn and dance socially. Furthermore, Tartan Salsa is committed to teaching proper technique in these forms of dance through the help of amateur and professional dance instructors. The organization is also dedicated to educating the members on various aspects of the history of Latin music and its development across time. Latin dances are a common social medium in countless cities around the world. Our hope is that Tartan Salsa will help prepare its members for future encounters with these styles of music and social atmosphere, wherever they may travel.

Name: Fit Kids/Fit Teens (FKFT)
Description: We are a collective of creative, innovative performers, choreographers and coaches working within communities across Ireland.

Name: Queerchata
Description:
Queerchata was founded in Los Angeles in 2021 and is now the fastest-growing queer dance movement in North America with classes in five cities and more coming soon.

Our classes are designed with queer people, respect, consent, and inclusivity at the heart of everything we do. It’s how we create a safe environment full of wholesome people, who are here to dance, have fun, and build community.

Queerchata classes accommodate all levels of experience, and first-timers are welcomed by dance buddies who introduce you to our community and the new way of dancing.

Name: Bollywood Signature
Description: Our vision is to provide exclusive Bollywood entertainment through personalized high quality performances delivered by professional and pre-professional dancers. Our mission is to create an exceptional dance team by providing year-round Bollywood dance training with elements of technique, conditioning, and intricate choreography.

Name: Proud association
Description: Vibes Up Dancing est une école de danse pour tous à Antananarivo, où chaque enfant et adolescent trouve sa place. Nous créons une communauté accueillante où chacun peut apprendre, s'exprimer, se connecter, et surtout, apprendre à danser dans un environnement chaleureux et inclusif. Nos cours, ouverts à tous les niveaux, offrent un équilibre entre plaisir et apprentissage, favorisant la croissance personnelle et des amitiés durables. Rejoignez-nous et découvrez un espace où tout le monde est le bienvenu, et où chaque pas compte.

Name: R&M Latin Dance
Description:
A YOUNG AND FRESH DANCE COMMUNITY!

WE ARE R&M LATIN DANCE!
R&M Latin Dance - Rhi and Mario are extremely proud of their unique and fun teaching methods, and their structured courses are easy and logic for any complete beginners. We believe in creating a safe and supportive place for all backgrounds to connect and join our R&M Latin Dance family. 

R&M is comprised of just two Salsa and Bachata dance Teachers, Mariano De Simone (Italian) who moved to Cardiff to start his dance company dream in 2015, and later joined his dance partner Rhian Saunders (Australian/Welsh) in 2018. Together they own and run the dance school, including all media marketing, as well as teach all their group and private Salsa and Bachata dance classes, dance performance, present student showcases, and continue to spread the joy of dance now even in Sydney, Australia.

Name: Vrienden van het Rijswijks Jeugdtheater
Description: Dit jaar, 2024, bestaat het Rijswijks Jeugdtheater 50 ! jaar en is het mogelijk Vriend van het RJT te worden.  Het doel is spelers, oud-spelers, ouders, grootouders aan haar te binden die mee willen denken/beslissen over het Rijswijks Jeugdtheater.

Name: Baha Ballerina Hybrid Dance Studio
Description:
Baha Ballerina is a Hybrid Dance venture that encompasses all the creative energy of Rozanna Symonette - a Bahamian, freelance ballet instructor. 
Miss Rosie has been dancing for 20+ years and received her VCC Teacher's certification, a product of VIRTUE Dance Academy, in June 2016. She has studied both VCC and AAB, along with RAD workshops. She has also engaged with several individuals and organizations during her journey, both at home and abroad.

Baha Ballerina looks forward to sharing Rozanna's passion with you by offering services in 1-on-1 Classical Ballet Instruction, Stretch + Split Conditioning, Choreography, and other Corporate + Private event opportunities. 

Be sure to follow Miss Rosie on social media (@BahaBallerina) for updates and other information!

Name: Fattoria Vittadini
Description:
Fattoria Vittadini è una compagnia di danza nata a Milano nel 2009. Lo studio insieme in accademia P. Grassi, guidati da Luciana Melis e Maria Consagra, ha definito sempre più un approccio teatrale alla danza, enfatizzando la sua capacità di raccontare storie e di comunicare emozioni e concetti complessi. Gruppo numeroso ed eterogeneo, Fattoria Vittadini è un collettivo in continua evoluzione artistica, che valorizza sia il lavoro di gruppo che la crescita dei singoli, attraverso la formazione continua, la ricerca, il perfezionamento professionale e la contaminazione con altri artisti. Dalla famiglia alla community contemporanea, Fattoria Vittadini lascia che la sua esperienza di collettivo possa aprire a nuove domande e una nuova consapevolezza dello stare insieme. Fattoria Vittadini è tutt’oggi un collettivo orizzontale, dove il gruppo di danzatori e la direzione artistica coincidono, creando una particolarità nel panorama della danza contemporanea italiana.

Dal 2018 Fattoria Vittadini gestisce Spazio Fattoria, situato all’interno di Fabbrica del Vapore di Milano, il quartier generale della compagnia. 
Le vocazioni dello spazio si ramificano tra la produzione di spettacoli, la formazione, l’organizzazione di progetti nazionali e internazionali orientati all’inclusione, la promozione della ricerca nel campo delle arti sceniche e performative.
Con passione, apertura, sensibilità per le diversità sociali, rispetto e cura, Spazio Fattoria vuole essere un luogo fatto di persone, ospite e custode di cultura e idee.

Name: iDANZ
Description:
iDANZ Performing Arts Studio welcomes dancers of all ages and skill levels to join us on the quest to CONFIDENCE! We offer a wide range of dance styles and encourage our students to strive for greatness! Dancers age 2 to adult. 

HOME OF:

VIZUAL CONTENT PERFORMING COMPANY
MOM CREW
MOMS WITH MOVES 

AND MORE!

Name: GrooveXperience Dance
Description: Dance Classes in Miami, FL for adults. Salsa, Zumba, Hip Hop, Heels, and more! Take a break from your busy work day for a fun fitness break. Whether it's your first time dancing, or you have experienced, our classes are tailored to different levels and styles so everyone feels comfortable dancing

Name: Nova Dance
Description:
We make dance.

We bring new ideas to dance, transforming respected traditions with individual expression, taking our audiences on a shared journey of the imagination.

We are passionate about diversity. Diversity of dance forms, disciplines, individuals, generations, opinions and cultures.

We celebrate the act of gathering, creating a community that embraces the essential life-force of art in our lives.

We make dance. Dance that holds our histories, dance that is connected to the here and now and dance that dreams the future.

Name: Dakodas - Dance Academy
Description: Our Academy offers the highest standard in children’s Dance & Performing Arts education with limited class sizes and individual attention given to every child. We offer a wide range of dance styles including–RAD Ballet, Street Dance / Hip Hop, Musical Theatre, Contemporary, Jazz, Tap, Acro/Gymnastics as well as singing and drama for children from the age of 2 – 17.  Students taking Ballet classes are given the opportunity to participate in Royal Academy of Dance examinations and West End Theatre performances are offered to all from the age of 5.

Name: Latin Rhythms Denmark
Description:
We promote a healthy balance between performance wellbeing, by dancing together basic Latin moves, across ages and dance levels. Enjoy Andean, Cumbia, Merengue, Reggaeton, and Salsa, with a Dance Instructor from Galapagos and Andes Ecuador.

While dancing, we sell Latin American meaningful artisanal products, elaborated by indigenous women in the Amazon of Ecuador and La Guajira of Colombia, promoting a Just Green Transition in their communities, honoring their knowledge and work by sharing their stories.

Name: Cairde
Description:
Cairde means ‘friends’, and we are a group of six friends from Ireland: Brian, Dara, Francis, Ronan, Seamus and Stephen. We used to compete against each other in Irish Dance competitions around the world and during lockdown we decided to come together to start making dancing videos. 

We replace traditional Irish music with mainstream hits and put our own twist on our routines. We love making videos for our followers on all platforms including TikTok, Instagram and YouTube, where we have gained over 3 million followers.

We've had some incredible experiences from performing in the White House in Washington DC to dancing in a stadium in front of 80,000 people in Paris. 

We have collaborated with some of the biggest brands in the world through our channels and wish to continue making connections. Our goal is to travel the world as a stage production.

We can't wait to continue this journey and bring you all along.

ᚉᚐᚔᚏᚇᚓ

Name: All That Dance
Description: Sharing the art of movement and inspiring kids, teens & adults for more than 25 years.

Name: USC Chaotic 3
Description: Chaotic 3 is the premier and oldest competitive collegiate hip-hop dance team based at the University of Southern California, with 20+ years of history. Originally founded as an artistic outlet for members of the Chinese American Student Association, Chaotic 3 has evolved into a well-known team that strives to foster the passion for dance from new and veteran dancers alike. Through exhibition and competition performances on USC’s campus and around Southern California, they hope to continue to be influenced by the best while maintaining the spirit that is Chaotic 3.

Name: Concordia, dance space
Description:
Somos una agrupación estudiantil PUCP que, trabajando en equipo, comparte y promueve la danza como herramienta de transformación individual y social. 
Creamos un espacio de danza libre que permite a las personas mejorar su bienestar físico y mental.

Name: Kids For Fun
Description:
Hej och hjärtligt välkomna till Kids For Fun dans och gymnastik för barn!

Grundare är Tilda Almén och hon skapade Kids For Fun i Mariefred 2021 för att skapa mer aktivitet för barnen. Sedan dess har företaget expanderat.

Dansen har varit en trygghet och en källa till glädje för Tilda Almén under sin uppväxt. Att få vara aktiv och inte behöva tänka så mycket utan bara få lära känna hur sin kropp fungerar och få uttrycka sig i känslor genom musiken! 

Gemenskapen är också en viktig del i livet som man får av dansen/gymnastiken, man lär sig att samarbeta med andra och visa hänsyn.

Det Tilda Almén har fått från sin barndom vill hon ge andra barn möjlighet att få uppleva. En trygg plats av glädje och gemenskap genom dansens och gymnastikens rörelse! Att få ha roligt.

Ni kan även boka oss för events för barn.

Ni är varmt välkomna att höra av er. 
Kids For Fun 
dans.mariefred@outlook.com
Tilda Almén 0725000133
www.kidsforfun.se

Name: Taneční Petrů
Description:
From group dance courses and private lessons to wedding dances and stage performances.
I’m redefining the traditional atmosphere of dance classes by creating a modern and fresh environment — with timeless music, a touch of humor, and a rich accompanying program.
As an active dancer, judge, and coach with the Czech Dance Sport Federation, I offer standard and Latin dance performances at balls, social events, or anywhere else dance belongs.

Name: Compagnie IN
Description:
Chorégraphe de la compagnie IN, Ingrid Estarque se distingue par sa capacité à créer des espaces poétiques et transformateurs, où l’art devient un moyen d’éveil intérieur, de connexion aux sens et de métamorphose du regard.

Entre mouvement et image, elle est guidée par une recherche sensible de mise en valeur du corps, à travers les multiples textures de la danse et l’exploration de supports visuels et sensoriels variés. Elle fusionne danse, projections visuelles, hypnose et expériences immersives pour interroger la frontière entre le visible et l’invisible, le réel et l’imaginaire.

De la création chorégraphique immersive à l’usage de l’hypnose comme outil d’exploration sensorielle, Ingrid navigue avec fluidité entre réalité et imaginaire, repoussant sans cesse les limites de la perception.

Son univers se réinvente au fil des projets, porté par une devise profonde :
« Le corps pour créer, le corps pour soigner. »

Name: Currents Dance Theatre
Description: Providing the Grand Rapids community and beyond with opportunities to engage with contemporary dance through performance, education, and collaborative experiences.

Name: Corpuscule Danse
Description: Corpuscule Danse se consacre au développement d’une danse inclusive fondée sur la rencontre d’artistes, étant ou non en situation de handicap, perceptible ou imperceptible. À travers la création et la diffusion d’œuvres, la recherche, la formation, l’enseignement et la médiation culturelle, la compagnie contribue à l’inclusion, à la valorisation et à la professionnalisation des artistes de la diversité fonctionnelle et corporelle.

Name: LaFabriquedesArtsetduCorps
Description: Cours de danse tous publics et pour tous les âges : Jazz, contemporain, hip-hop, street-jazz, méditation dansée, gym posturale – stretching. Situé au 146 bvd Jean Royer à Tours, le projet de La Fabrique des Arts et du Corps s’articule autour de la danse dans sa diversité. Tous les ateliers sont portés par un collectif de professionnels souhaitant partager leurs passions en permettant à chacun d’évoluer en fonction de sa sensibilité, de son expérience, de ses capacités.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Huntington Beach
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Huntington Beach is the premiere ballroom dance studio in the LA Metro, California area!

Name: Toca Danse

Depuis sa fondation en 2009, notre mission est de favoriser l'accès à la danse peu importe l'âge et le statut social, de faciliter la création de nouveaux réseaux sociaux pour nos élèves et d'aider tous et chacun à développer sa personnalité et son estime de soi. Bien que notre école s'engage fermement envers l'excellence artistique et est dévouée à promouvoir les danses latines, elle désire avant tout propager le plaisir de la danse.

Name: Donna Sternberg & Dancers
Description: Donna Sternberg & Dancers is a company based out of 911 9th St, Santa Monica, California, United States.

Name: IngenuityDance
Description:
Inspiration. Values. Dedication. Spirit. Authenticity

We dance to tell a story. Education through dance with nurturing and inspiring love of life. 

Our Philosophy 

Ingenuity means quality of originality or creativity. 

Ingenuity Dance was founded in 2018. It provides high quality artistic dance education for students aged 2.5 and above with international standards instead of quantity. 

Classes are created with a sense of  love, passion, healthy progress and caring environment, family oriented atmosphere.  Dance educators use positive language, scientific and psychology teaching methods  for strongly protecting physical and mentally health for dancers. The opportunity here is to give children to build their social etiquette,  confidence, brain and creative development through sensory and imaginative movements. Moreover, we give students invaluable dance performance and life experience through arts and love of dance. We want to offer a meaningful and wonderful opportunity  to broaden their knowledge from inside and outside of school and enhance their strong creativity skills through dance education. 

Our Philosophy is not just focusing on techniques. We also want to create a lot of beautiful memories and friendships with multinational cultural backgrounds in our dance classes and performances. Other than discipline, students also develop social skills and mannerism from dance. We also open dance opportunities for special condition students like autism, down syndrome, visual processing delay etc to improve brain development and body coordination through dance. 

Our mission is to see our students able to instill their self-independence and self whole-person development and learn eventually to enjoy and have fun from dancing. 
We hope all students have a great experience with Ingenuity Dance.

Name: TANEC PRAHA
Description:
Tanec Praha z.ú. je součástí české národní kultury. Rozvíjí současnou taneční a pohybovou tvorbu v České republice a projekty mezinárodní spolupráce. Veřejnosti přináší výjimečné umělecké zážitky díky organizaci a rozvoji festivalů TANEC PRAHA, Česká taneční platforma a celoroční činnosti divadla PONEC. 

Zajišťuje komunitní práci umělců i jejich mezinárodní spolupráci.  Svými aktivitami se podílí na kreativním a estetickém rozvoji společnosti, podporuje kulturní rozmanitost, otevřenost, diverzitu a toleranci. Svou činností přispívá ke kreativnímu a hodnotovému rozvoji společnosti.

Name: Confidanceltd
Description:
Confidance deliver high quality dance work with integrity, creativity and integration at its heart.

Based in East Kent, we work across schools. community settings and arts venues. We make dance and performance with dancers with learning disabilities, including, creating dance works with our ConfiCo artists through regular training on our proffesional pathway. We are resident at The Wyvern School (Ashford), Whitfield Aspen School (Dover) and Quaterhouse (Folkestone).

Driven by curiosity, we continue to deepen our approach, exploring ways to redefine dance and make sure that the powerful, creative voices of our artists are heard in all areas of our practice. As we pursue the certainty that we are all artists, we push the boundaries of what we consider dance to be and who it is for. We create, educate, and perform.

Name: Watertown Studio of Movement
Description:
Watertown Studio of Movement is a small, non-competitive boutique dance studio for young kids focusing on character first, and dance skills second.  We believe all are created equally and will choose to love first, speak kindly of others, and service our community. 

We offer multiple dance styles such as tap, jazz, ballet, lyrical, and hip hop. We also offer worship classes open to all ages. Boys and girls are equally welcome in every single class, and parents are welcome to stay and enjoy this time with their kids. 

Check out our website for more details and registration information. We can't wait to dance with you!

Name: Pulp danse
Description:
Pulp Danse est une école de danse urbaine et inclusive qui a ouvert ses portes fin 2023. Ce projet a à cœur de décloisonner les différentes pratiques et veut permettre la rencontre de différents publics dans un lieu unique où tout le monde a sa place et où chacun peut partager sa propre expérience de vie. 

On y enseigne des cours de danse urbaine à La Rochelle, Saintes, Clavette et Villedoux. Les cours sont accessibles et adaptés aux personnes en situation de handicap (handicap moteur, maladies chroniques, troubles dys). Les cours sont ouverts aux enfants, ados et adultes.

L’école joue également un rôle de sensibilisation à la santé par le biais des activités physiques en menant des actions ciblées tout au long de l’année. Nous intervenons également auprès des centres de formations pour former aux activités physiques adaptées.

Notre méthodologie est simple, ludique, collective et fondée sur la découverte de soi, des autres, de l’espace, du temps, de la musicalité, de la créativité et du partage. Les cours sont remplis de fantaisies et d’inventivité. 

L’une de nos particularités réside dans le fait que nous emmenons danser toutes les disciplines de l’Académie le plus souvent possible sur scène, lors de plusieurs rendez-vous durant la saison.

Name: Клуб по спортни танци Инфинити Тийм
Description:
Инфинити тийм е клуб по спортни танци, създаден с мисията да развива физическата активност, социализацията и емоционалното благосъстояние на деца, тийнейджъри и възрастни. Нашата философия е да предлагаме качествени танцови тренировки, които не само развиват техническите умения на участниците, но и формират положителни нагласи към живота и спорта.

През първата си година клубът постигна значителни успехи, включително участия на световни състезания, където нашите състезатели достигнаха до полуфинали и влязоха в топ 10 в света. В допълнение, имахме честта да бъдем част от престижни събития като София Фешън Уик и финала на Денсинг старс България. Подкрепата на известни личности като Мария Илиева, трио Тринити, Атанас Месечков и актьора Антон Порязов също е важен елемент от нашето вдъхновение и растеж.

Нашите тренировки обхващат различни танцови стилове, включително бални и латино танци, и са подходящи за всички възрасти. В клуба царува атмосфера на подкрепа, екипна работа и сплотеност, което прави Инфинити тийм не само място за спорт, а и за личностно израстване и споделени успехи.

Присъединете се към нас и открийте как танците могат да бъдат път към здраве, радост и постижения!

Name: RANI Dance Collective
Description:
RANI Dance Collective is a comprehensive dance studio and school that offers inclusive dance lessons for children and adult learners. It aspires to reach artistic excellence in the performing arts while embracing the imperfections and normalcy of life. It is currently offering Kathak dance classes for adult beginners. The current student base consists of professionals from diverse industries, such as healthcare, technology, education, freelance, finance, marketing, content creation, etc. They are setting an exemplary model of self-care and personal growth through art, despite their intense work schedules and commitments.

RANI Dance Collective is open to collaboration and contribution that can accommodate our passion that is not limited to one class per week. We welcome opportunities that help spread the classical and experimental performing art practices and research across borders both on and off-stage.

 welcome everyone to my dance studio to not only witness this magic but also join us. As working professionals, it is important to find a balance between work and personal lives. Come and take a deep dive into something meaningful to exercise your creativity, nurture your passion, and give yourself a productive break that helps you get in touch with your inner child. Whether you're reconnecting with an old passion or exploring something new- RANI Dance Collective is a safe space for you.

Name: Primavera Tango
Description:
Primavera Tango is the home of Argentine tango in Sydney, led by internationally acclaimed dancers Dean James Beattie & Genevieve (Gigi) Silva. With over a decade of experience, countless awards, including Sub-Champion at the 2024 World Tango Championships Preliminaries & a bronze medal at the 2023 Campeonato Tango Envenado in Buenos Aires, Dean & Gigi bring a wealth of passion, artistry & professionalism to every class & performance.

Their tango made it to the screen! The phenomenal success of ‘The Heiress Blacklisted Her Husband’ continues to soar, now surpassing 80 million views in just a few months & still climbing. They had the honour of choreographing & performing the dramatic tango scene alongside the lead actress, contributing to one of the show’s most intense & emotionally charged moments. This gripping drama of love, betrayal & redemption has captivated audiences worldwide & we’re proud to have brought authentic Argentine tango to its global stage.

Based in Macquarie Park, a well-connected Sydney suburb with great public transport & major highway access, Primavera Tango offers weekly group classes for all levels plus a vibrant Thursday night practica, a social space to refine your skills & connect with the tango community.

They also offer exclusive lesson packages for new & returning students, crafted to support your tango journey with value & flexibility.

Name: The Natashas Project
Description:
It is estimated that 50 million people are living in modern slavery today, with experts estimating there are over 130,000 in the UK alone. It is not a thing of the past, and modern slavery is happening right now, in cities, towns, and villages- in every corner of the UK and the world. 

At The Natashas Project, we raise awareness of modern slavery and exploitation, inspire young people and communities to drive positive action, and support survivors- all through dance. 

We achieve this through 4 key initiatives:

-Anti-Slavery Dance Productions 
-Creative Educational Workshops
-Trauma- Informed Restorative Dance Workshops with Survivors 
-Co-Created Survivors Performance Projects 

We connect hearts to these issues, inspire action, and restore joy to survivors. We empower people to tackle these issues, keep themselves and others safe, and help survivors to relax, connect, and heal.

The Natashas Project is a professional dance company and charity founded in 2013.

Name: Stompin
Description: Stompin is a vital force in Australian youth dance, leading the sector with its ambitious site-specific practice, innovative programs and empowering approach to the engagement and development of young dance artists. Stompin began in 1992 with the idea that when young people collaborate with professional artists they can create inspiring, bold and relevant new dance works and through that process, experience transformative personal and creative growth.

Name: New Chamber Ballet
Description: Praised by the New York Times as “one of the small-scale delights of the New York dance scene,” New Chamber Ballet is dedicated to the creation of new ballets performed to live chamber music. Since its inception in 2004, the company has premiered over one hundred ballets by founder Miro Magloire and selected guest choreographers, set to classical and contemporary chamber music and performed by its acclaimed all-female company. The company has been praised in the national and international press for its classic-modern aesthetic as well as for the top-notch musical artists who accompany all performances. In addition to national and international touring, New Chamber Ballet presents ground-breaking work in the round in a chamber setting during its year-round performances in New York City.

Name: Zagreb Dance Company
Description: Zagreb Dance Company was founded in 1970 by the dance artist Lela Gluhak Buneta, and since 2014 it has been run by the producer Petra Glad Mažar with Petra Valentić joining her in the artistic directors role in 2022.. Throughout many years of its existence and under the leadership of various artistic directors, Zagreb Dance Company (ZPA) has always insisted on original works and high artistic and technical level of its productions. Regular collaborations with foreign choreographers and various artists from the fields of theatre, visual arts and music, have contributed to the Company’s readiness to face the challenges of different artistic approaches and poetics. As such, ZPA has marked the careers of many dancers and dance experts who are working in Croatia and abroad. For its contribution to the development of Croatian theatre, ZPA has received the Croatian Association of Dramatic Artists’ awards for best choreography (2004, 2012, 2018), best female dancer (2004, 2016), best male dancer (2004, 2006, 2012), best set design (2006), and best dance production (2008, 2012). Zagreb Dance Company continually presents its productions at theatres and festivals in Croatia and abroad, with performances in almost all European countries, Russia, South Korea, Israel, Egypt, the Dominican Republic and Mexico.

Name: Cie Sans Ceinture Ni Bretelles
Description:
La compagnie Sans Ceinture Ni Bretelles développe une danse contemporaine incorporant la dimension sociale et « sacrée » de la danse.

Exécuter un mouvement « Sans Ceinture Ni Bretelles » c’est se dévoiler, se mettre à nu, oser, révéler l’envers du décor.

Notre intention se place là où se tisse un lien subtil entre « Danser » et « Faire Danser », dans l’interstice entre les codes de la représentation de la danse et les codes d’une danse récréative et populaire. Le mouvement créé des espaces de transformations, ouvre des trajectoires, rompt avec la sédentarité. La nécessité d’agir avec le mouvement plonge les recherches chorégraphiques de la compagnie dans une écriture singulière et engagée.

La démarche de la compagnie consiste à créer des rassemblements, des espace-temps de convergences dans lesquels la danse peut déployer sa puissance magnétique, contagieuse et laisser la place à l’improvisation brute, à l’extase et au groupe. Danser avec l’invisible, flirter avec l’infini entre imaginaire et réalité quotidienne: une danse qui joue, explosive et sensible. Notre écriture chorégraphique se compose en permanence en lien avec les différentes sphères artistiques et en confrontation avec le public.

Blanche Bonnaud, danseuse et chorégraphe est à l’initiative de la compagnie depuis 2018. Elle collabore avec différents artistes dont notamment Céline Doubrovik et Stella Gaton dans une direction artistique partagée au sein du projet Jour de Bal depuis 2020. L’objectif de la compagnie est la création d’œuvre chorégraphique contemporaine originale et l’organisation d’événement chorégraphique dans l’espace public, les lieux dédiés et les lieux non dédiés. La compagnie produit aussi d’autres projets valorisant l’art vivant et l’art chorégraphique tel que La tournée à vélo du CLAC depuis 2020. La compagnie agit localement et plus largement dans plusieurs directions artistiques avec des créations chorégraphiques, des performances in-situ, des actions culturelles et de médiation.

Name: Stars Studio
Description: Stars Studio is a dance studio based in Savage, MD! We specialize in (and currently offer) tap, jazz, pointe, and ballet classes to both recreational and pre-professional dancers. We have also added hip-hop, poms, lyrical, contemporary, ballet technique, leaps and turns, toning and stretch classes to our list of courses. Whether the goal is to dance recreationally and perform in our annual recital, or to dance pre-professional/competitively, we are honored to help your dancer's reach their potential!

Name: Main Stacks Dance Team
Description: Competitive dance team based out of UC Berkeley. Founded in 2007 by Vivian Peng and May Matsuo.

Name: Jazz Dance, Ballet, Modern Dance, and Fitness Instructor
Eclectus Dance Academy
Description:
Eclectus is born with a mission to empower choreographers and dance enthusiasts across India and beyond. With our two innovative products, 'Choreo Crunch' and 'WeddChoreo Trends', we're reshaping the dance industry and providing valuable resources for both aspiring and established choreographers.

Our vision is clear: to be the go-to destination for choreographers and dance enthusiasts seeking growth, recognition, and success in the dynamic world of dance. We're not just a brand; we're a community that fosters creativity, collaboration, and professional excellence.

Name: La Phoenix School
Description:
Le mot d’ordre de la Phoenix School : « Pratiquer, c’est faire ensemble ». Nous mettons tout en œuvre pour créer un environnement chaleureux et stimulant, où chacun peut exprimer sa créativité et repousser ses limites. Nos professeurs passionnés et expérimentés sont là pour vous guider tout au long de votre parcours, que vous soyez un novice ou un danseur aguerri.
Plongez dans notre univers artistique, laissez-vous guider par nos talents et ressentez la magie qui opère lorsque le corps s'exprime avec grâce et détermination. La Phoenix School vous attend pour faire naître le danseur ou le sportif qui sommeille en vous !

Name: 555 TANGER
Description: Le 555 famous club discothèque vous souhaite la bienvenue!

Name: Portland Dance Film Fest
Description: Portland Dance Film Fest (PDFF) invites dance filmmakers to submit their minis, shorts, long, & mini-documentary dance films for PDFF’s annual dance film festival. PDFF is a multi-day festival showcasing curated dance film submissions from around the world. We are looking for originality, innovative cinematography, unique choreography, and a demonstration of dance and film in a synergistic relationship.

Name: Con el Corazón Co.
Description: A professional dance company made up of fourteen Mexican artists with disabilities as an initiative to create a space for expression and realization through dance with the aim to inspire other vulnerable communities to approach the arts.

Name: Marc Vlemmix Dance
Description:
Wij zijn Marc Vlemmix Dance. Een gezelschap van mensen die elkaar hebben gevonden in het dansen. Wij dansen om lijf en geest in beweging te houden en zo onze kwaliteit van leven positief te beïnvloeden. 

Dans stelt ons in staat om onze emoties uit te drukken in een unieke danservaring.  We stellen ons open en delen onze ervaring graag met een publiek dat zelf opzoek is naar contact en nieuwsgierig is naar het ontdekken van de eigen kracht. Met onze persoonlijke verhalen hopen we anderen te inspireren en uit te dagen zelf op zoek te gaan.

Name: Dancer's Dreamhouse
Description: Dancer’s Dreamhouse provides dance education for ages 3 and up. Classes include, ballet, jazz, hip-hop, tap, and more.

Name: Allure Dance Collective
Description: Not just a dance collective but a community. A safe space for young women to be themselves. Open dance classes every week in Manchester.

Name: Elevate Dance Company, LLC
Description:
Elevate Dance Company, LLC is a dance organization that focuses on empowering dancers with skills and experiences to take the next step in evolving the dance industry. Our focus is on childhood dance training to professional mentorship. 
We believe that each stage in a dancer's life will need encouragement, inspiration and valuable training on and off the stage. Our Dance Company is divided into 3 divisions to help best support our community: Elevate Dance Company (Studio Training - ages 3 and up), Elevate Dance Conservatory (Mentorships, Apprenticeships & Career placement on/off stage - ages 16 +) and our Elevate Dance Apparel (Apparel shop focused on evolving atheisure and dance wear - body positive centric).

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - New Berlin
Description:
A ballroom dance studio providing private lessons, group classes, children' classes, performance opportunities, competitions, etc. to provide physical, emotional, mental, and social benefits to all!

We offer adult and youth lessons, competitive dancing, group classes, hip hop, ballet, jazz, social dancing, beginner classes, intermediate classes, advanced classes, choreography, wedding dances, wedding choreography, first dance, wedding party dances, mother-son dances, father-daughter dances, cruise preparation lessons, and more!

Name: Flor da Pele
Description:
O Flor da Pele é um coletivo cultural que atua na região do Grajau - Extremo Sul da cidade de São Paulo - Ensinado dança de salão para os moradores das proximidades. As aulas acontecem todos os sábados das 9hs às 15hs no CEU Navegantes (Bairro Cantinho do CEU), com aulas de: Hip Hop, Sertanejo, Zouk, Samba de Gafieira e Forró. As aulas são ministradas por professores voluntários com amplo conhecimento técnico e de vivencias em suas modalidades. 

Como produto final, todo ano o coletivo Flor da Pele produz um espetáculo de dança agregando todos os estilos das aulas e convida outros grupos da região promovendo a integração entre coletivos que atuam na mesma região ou em outras periferias. 

Ao todo foram oito espetáculos de dança: 

1. Falando de amor
2. Se eu pudesse
3. Tempo
4. Sonho
5. Recomeço
6. Gratidão
7. Memórias
8. Coragem 

Todos os temas são escolhidos pelos os seus significados para os participantes.

Name: Curtsy Ballroom
Description:
At Curtsy Ballroom, we are more than just a dance studio. We are a haven for dance enthusiasts, a place where rhythm, elegance, and connection come to life.

 Who We Are: We are Nashville's premier dance studio, dedicated to nurturing the love of dance in our community. Our world-class instructors bring passion, expertise, and a touch of magic to every step you take.

 What We Offer: We specialize in Ballroom and Wedding Dance, providing a personalized and elegant approach to dancing. From first-timers to seasoned dancers, we cater to all levels and aspirations.

 Why Choose Curtsy Ballroom:

Tailored Learning: Our instruction is personalized, ensuring every individual reaches their dance goals.
Elegance Meets Fun: Experience the beauty of dance without sacrificing the joy of learning and connecting.
Creating Memories: We craft unforgettable wedding dances that capture the essence of your love story.
 Our Mission: We are here to inspire, to transform, and to make every dance a memory to cherish. We believe in the power of dance to enrich lives, and we're here to share that joy with you.

Join us at Curtsy Ballroom, and let's dance our way to new heights together. 

Connect with us on LinkedIn for updates, dance tips, and a closer look into the world of dance at Curtsy Ballroom.

Name: Company 8e1
Description: The music bar that ends with 8 and begins with 1 is where our name comes from. Our team of highly skilled professionals are dedicated to ensuring that each client experiences a personalized and luxurious treatment tailored to their unique needs. Join us at Studio 8e1, where exceptional service meets unparalleled learning experience.

Name: COMPAGNIE I WANNA BE
Description: La compagnie I Wanna Be, dirigée par la danseuse et chorégraphe Lyli Gauthier, développe des créations chorégraphiques singulières à la croisée de diverses esthétiques, danse contemporaine, hip hop, cirque, arts visuels et audiovisuels, où le rapport au corps et à son image est en perpétuel questionnement. Par le mouvement, Lyli Gauthier s’interroge sur nos corps, notre relation à l’autre, nos postures façonnées par nos sociétés contemporaines.

Name: TOES FOR DANCE
Description: TOES FOR DANCE (TFD) is an artist-run non-profit organization based in Toronto. We value curiosity, creativity, community, and collaboration.

Name: Peridance Contemporary Dance Company
Description: Peridance Contemporary Dance Company (PCDC), founded by renowned choreographer, Igal Perry, is a repertory company with unwavering commitment to creative collaboration and sustainable social engagement. PCDC works nationally and internationally to amplify both emerging and established artistic voices and to create visionary performance based in care, vigor, and innovation. Guided by core values of Support for Artists,  Access to Dance for All, and Community Engagement, PCDC is dedicated to expansive public programming, educational partnerships, and inclusive and equitable processes for all collaborating dancers, choreographers, composers, musicians, and designers.

Name: Ultimate Bhangra
Description: Ultimate Bhangra are renowned for our exceptional dancing energy, leaving an indelible mark on prestigious stages worldwide. Our vibrant presence have illuminated TV screens on esteemed channels such as the BBC. Our goal is to bring the energy of Bhangra to everyone, through our dance classes held in the West Midlands. We use Bhangra as a vessel to help us stay connected to our culture. We are here to give you the ULTIMATE BHANGRA EXPERIENCE!

Name: ESSCREW
Description: ESSCREW est l'association de danse du campus de l'ESSCA Angers. Avec plusieurs évènements de danse à la clé depuis 2011, ESSCREW fait bouger la vie associative de l'ESSCA Angers !

Name: Little Leaps Dance
Description: Little Leaps offers child-and-caregiver programs as well as independent child dance programs with a focus on self-discovery, mindfulness, & joy!

Description:
Nieuwe dance studio te Veurne, sinds januari 2021. Volg ons op social media en check de website!
Dans voor jong en minder jong, voor ervaren en minder ervaren dansers.

Name: Jas Aulakh Bhangra
Description:
Jas Aulakh Bhangra is a London Based Bhangra dance company; founded by Jas Aulakh - a globally recognised and multi-award winning Bhangra Instructor, Choreographer and Dancer with over 15 years of industry experience.
Jas' life-long passion for Bhangra music & dance led to the formation of Jas Aulakh Bhangra; determined to share her wealth of knowledge & spread the joy of Bhangra to as many people as possible around the world!
 
Services include weekly Bhangra Classes in Hounslow, Harrow & Mayfair (Central London), Wedding Choreography for wedding first dances, groups and bride/grooms, Corporate packages which include Bhangra Workshops, Live entertainment & Fitness classes, Private lessons (online classes available too), Hen/Sangeet Party packages and a world-class Professional Live entertainment Bhangra troupe.

Jas Aulakh, Founder, is one of the UK's leading female Bhangra instructors, bringing women to the forefront of UK Bhangra throughout her career. 

Jas started her career in Bhangra as a competitive Bhangra dancer, training at the highest level possible in the UK and winning both National (UK) and International (USA) competitions.

Her portfolio of work ranges from working with theatre companies, football stadiums, featuring on National Television on CBeebies in an episode of "What's in your Bag?", choreographing and featuring in music videos for world-famous singers, including Jazzy B for his hit single "Guddi Charhi Hoyi A", hosting Corporate Bhangra Workshops & performances for companies including Meta, Accenture, Crowe LLP & Big 4 Accountancy firms. She also performed and choreographed for the Queens Official Platinum Jubilee Celebrations in 2022!

Jas' wealth of Bhangra knowledge and bubbly personality truly are what make Jas Aulakh Bhangra a world-class Bhangra company!

For all enquiries please contact jasaulakhbhangra@gmail.com

Name: What a Jazz dance studio
Description:
What a Jazz is a swing dance studio in Vilnius founded in 2017 (former hoppers' dance studio).
We specialise in teaching such dances as Lindy Hop, Charleston, Balboa and Collegiate Shag.
These vernacular Jazz dances are African American art forms associated with the cultural values and aesthetics of Black American culture.
It is our purpose to honour the lineage by creating a respectful and appreciative environment for everyone to enjoy during our classes and events.

Name: Reprezentacyjny Dolnośląski Zespół Pieśni i Tańca "Wrocław"
Description: Reprezentacyjny Dolnośląski Zespół Pieśni i Tańca "Wrocław" od 70 lat jest folklorystyczną wizytówką Wrocławia i Dolnego Śląska. Zespół tworzą dorośli, seniorzy, dzieci oraz młodzież dolnośląskich szkół i uczelni. Naszą misją jest pielęgnowanie dziedzictwa kulturowego, dlatego niezwykle ważnym elementem naszej działalności są publiczne koncerty, gdzie szerokiej publiczności możemy pokazać jakie są korzenie naszego polskiego społeczeństwa. Nasz program budowany jest w oparciu o bogactwo narodowych i regionalnych tańców, pieśni, przyśpiewek i obyczajów wykonywanych w oryginalnych strojach ludowych, z towarzyszeniem kapeli złożonej z zawodowych muzyków.

Name: Wild West Girls e.V. and Boys
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen bei der Cancan und Westernshow-Tanzgruppe.

Seit mehreren Jahren begeistern wir das Publikum mit unseren Shows und sind damit in ganz Süddeutschland und darüber hinaus unterwegs. Von Stuttgart bis Salzburg/A und Berlin bis Interlaken/CH treten wir bei kleinen Privatfeiern bis zu großen Festivals auf.

Zusammengefunden haben wir uns mit 10 ehemaligen Gardemädels, die das Tanzen nicht lassen konnten. So wurden wir in 2007 als Sommergruppe eines Faschingsvereins gegründet.
2013 wagten wir den großen Schritt und gründeten mit bereits 29 Mitgliedern unseren eigenen Verein. 

Unsere Mitgliederzahl wächst seitdem stätig und zu den Tänzerinnen sind auch Tänzer dazu gekommen. 
Ab einem Alter von 16 Jahren kann bei uns mitgetanzt werden. Wir freuen uns immer über neue Gesichter im Verein.

Name: Arkansas Atrangi
Description: Arkansas Atrangi is the first-ever premier Competitive Bollywood Fusion Dance Team in the entirety of Arkansas. We are affiliated with the University of Arkansas and are students of all years and backgrounds who come together for the love of dancing. We are a part of the Desi Dance Network national circuit which consists of 125 collegiate teams across the nation.  Our team showcases a variety of dance styles. We perform dance styles from India such as Bhangra, Kuthu/South, and Indian Classical. We also perform Western dance styles such as Hip-Hop and Contemporary. Arkansas Atrangi is dedicated to cultivating a vibrant Indian cultural presence on the University Campus while championing the rich tapestry of Arkansas's heritage on a national stage. Our mission is to foster inclusivity, celebrate diversity, and nurture a strong sense of community. Through engaging artistic representations and meaningful cultural initiatives, we aim to bridge cultures, promote understanding, and inspire unity.

Name: Columbia Repertory Ballet
Description: Founded in 2018 by a group of former professional ballet dancers turned Columbia University students, Columbia Repertory Ballet exists to give dancers at Columbia opportunities to learn, rehearse, and perform established repertoire from the classical ballet canon as well as contemporary repertory work.

Name: That! Dance
Description:
That! Dance run fun and friendly inclusive weekly classes in Lichfield and Burton which focus on developing dance technique, creativity and confidence for young people with learning disabilities aged 16-30. That! Dance was formed following the Birmingham Commonwealth Games 2022 and the mass inclusive movement project, 'Critical Mass' run by FABRIC, which saw dancers perform in the Opening Ceremony for the games, as well as at multiple festivals across Birmingham.

That! Dance takes part in, and delivers, dance projects and performance opportunities, including creating films, performing at local events and festivals and undertaking skills development such as Arts Award. FOREST, a film supported by The National Forest, has been selected for 3 national film festivals and has been seen by over 2k people.

That! Dance is part of FABRIC's 'Keep Moving' project and is supported by Liberty Jamboree, The Brewhouse, The National Forest, The Sebbie Hall Kindness Foundation and The Hub.

Name: Nachdi Jawani Toronto
Description:
At Nachdi Jawani Toronto, we are dedicated to keeping Punjabi culture alive through the art of Bhangra, Giddha, and Dhol. We train dancers of all levels and bring people together through performances, competitions, and community events.
As the team behind Groundshaker, one of Canada’s biggest Bhangra competitions, we create opportunities for dancers to showcase their talent and connect with others who share their passion.

Name: Movers and Shakers Salsa and Bachata Dance Academy
Description: Learn to dance at Los Angeles' largest salsa & bachata dance academy!

Name: Gator Salsa Club
Description: Every semester the Gator Salsa Club offers FREE salsa classes on Tuesdays and Thursdays every week at Ben Hill Griffin Stadium on the University of Florida campus and The Bull in downtown Gainesville. We specialize in teaching LA and Casino style salsa, as well as Bachata! We also offer a variety class every Thursday to highlight other dance styles and aspects of dance. ALL levels of dancers are welcome, even if you've never set foot on the dance floor. You do not need a partner to join us and no prior registration needed!

Name: Sequana Academy of Irish Dance
Description:
Anciennement connue comme la “Sarah Clark Academy”, créée à Paris en septembre 2004 par Sarah Clark, ex-danseuse principale des spectacles Lord of the Dance et Feet of Flames, et rebaptisée Sequana Academy en janvier 2024, notre école forme des danseurs qui participent aux compétitions internationales et animent vos événements.

Pourquoi « Sequana » ? 
En référence à la déesse de la Seine dans la mythologie gauloise. Ce nom reflète notre attachement à la culture celtique et à Paris.

Name: Bravo Dance Center
Description:
Bravo Dance Center is incredibly proud to be entering our 23rd year in business! 

We are committed to providing a well-rounded, fun, family oriented and high quality dance program for our students.  Whether your student wants to dance simply for recreation and fitness or is a student who is serious about performing and competing on a professional level, Bravo has plenty to offer you! Choose from one or more of our many styles of dance classes including Jazz, Tap, Ballet, Lyrical/Contemporary, Pointe, Acro/Tumbling/Gymnastics, Hip Hop,  Pom Dance as well as Combo Classes for ages 2 and up!  
Our students will be individually nurtured to achieve their own personal goals and dreams. Bravo's Director and our Staff continue to train, perform and participate in professional development activities both locally and nationally. We are confident in the quality, appropriateness, safety and correctness of our instruction and operation policies here at BDC. We will not compromise quality dance technique or safety for points. Ever!

Our goal is to ensure that every student and parent has a satisfying and rewarding dance experience. We embrace and welcome ALL new and returning students!

Name: Flair Dance Company
Description: Flair Dance, led by Christina Dunnington, was created as an opportunity to bring together dance artists and celebrate our passion for dance through our unique artistic voices.

Name: Emmanuel Pierre-Antoine Dance Studio NYC
Description: The largest Ballroom and Latin dance studio in Manhattan offering a wide variety of dance classes, live performance dance shows and events.  With 10,000 square feet of space, which can be divided into five separate rooms, it is the perfect place for any event – from dance events and special occasions to team building with a dance pro!

Name: DANCECIRCUS
Description:
DanceCircus is a pioneering dance-theatre company based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, creating bold, interdisciplinary performances that blend movement, visual art, music, poetry, and storytelling. Since 1976, we’ve brought thought-provoking, emotionally resonant work to theaters, schools, community centers, and public spaces across the Midwest and beyond.

With a name rooted in the Latin word circus, meaning “circle,” our work invites people into a shared space of movement, transformation, and connection. Each performance becomes a circle of influence uniting artists, audiences, and communities around stories that inspire, inform and entertain.

At the heart of DanceCircus is a deep commitment to the environment and to uplifting local voices. Our original works explore environmental concerns, social issues, and the beauty of everyday life. Often site-specific and always collaborative, our performances feature musicians, poets, visual artists, youth, and community members making art that is grounded, inclusive, and alive.

From Milwaukee to Martha’s Vineyard, our impact is felt in motion. We invite you to join the circle whether as a dancer, partner, supporter, or audience member and be part of the circus of motion and emotion.

Name: DANCE LEVELS
Description:
Dance Levels is a 501c3 non-profit organization, governed by a Board of Directors. Our passion is to give everyone the chance to dance or the chance to experience dance on an empowering, inspiring and nourishing level

We strive to Encourage, Stimulate, Influence, Achieve, Nurture, Enrich and Strengthen all whom we reach!

Name: The Dance Company of Ocala, LLC
Description: This site is dedicated to The Dance Company located in Ocala, FL. We are a Dance Studio and provide exceptional dance instruction in ballet, pointe, jazz, tap, ballet, hip hop and acrobatics to children-adulthood.

Name: babyballet Harrogate, Knaresborough and Ripon
Description:
Our preschool dance and ballet syllabus offers four stages of ballet dance classes, for young children aged 6 months to 6 years, plus a tap dancing class for children over 3 years.

GET IN TOUCH!!
Phone/Text/WhatsApp: 07779 221087
Email: harrogateknaresboroughripon@babyballet.com

babyballet teachers all undergo babyballet training, and with professional dance and teaching experience, they strive to create a fun, friendly and inclusive experience for everyone – no matter what your child’s age or ability.

Our classes are a great way for parents, carers and guardians to meet up and make new friends too!

Our programme fits well within the UK Government’s Early Years Foundation Stage (EYFS) framework, with our classes providing the opportunity for babies and young children to learn and develop key life skills in a healthy and safe environment.

We look forward to welcoming you and your little ones to the magical world of babyballet very soon!

Name: Dance Inspiration
Description:
Dance Inspiration is committed to offering students top quality dance instruction in a positive, structured, and inspiring environment. Our students not only receive a strong technical foundation, but more importantly develop self-confidence, discipline, and learn the importance of teamwork and setting goals.

Dance Inspiration is a place where students of all ages and abilities are treated as equals, and everyone is allowed to shine.

We strongly believe in the power of dance to educate, enrich, and inspire, and know that the skills we teach will serve our students far beyond the dance classroom.

We offer classes in Jazz, Tap, Ballet, Pointe, Lyrical, Hip Hop, Clogging, and Pre-school classes.

Name: Penn Ballet
Description: Penn Ballet is the University of Pennsylvania's premier ballet company. We are a student run organization dedicated to helping dancers at Penn continue to do what they love despite the stress and time constraints of a rigorous academic environment. Classes are free and open to all students looking to maintain or improve their skills, try their hand at choreography, or simply get some exercise!

Name: Ignition Dance Academy
Description:
Ignition Dance Academy (IDA) is a premier dance studio in Lawrence, Kansas, dedicated to igniting passion, confidence, and excellence in dancers of all ages. Under new ownership and direction, IDA blends high-quality technical training with a supportive, family-oriented environment where every dancer can thrive.

We offer both recreational classes for students exploring the joy of movement and a nationally recognized competitive Company program that builds artistry, discipline, and leadership. Our talented faculty is committed to helping each dancer grow not only as performers, but also as individuals—instilling values of perseverance, teamwork, and self-expression.

At IDA, our motto is “All Heat. No Hype.” We move differently, combining professional instruction, innovative choreography, and a welcoming community to shape dancers who shine on stage and beyond.

 Classes for ages 2+
 Recreational & competitive pathways
 Experienced faculty & guest choreographers
 Community-focused, family-driven culture

Ignition Dance Academy is where passion meets purpose—and where dancers are inspired to reach their fullest potential.es.

Name: Illini N Motion
Description: INM is a Registered Student Organization at the University of Illinois. We are self choreographed dance team that performs at various BIG10 sporting events, charities, and Showcases throughout the year.

Name: Houston Bhangra Academy
Description:
Houston Bhangra Academy is where tradition meets rhythm and passion! 
We believe in fostering a love for dance while building a strong community of enthusiasts of all ages and skill levels.

Name: Wisconsin RangDe
Description: We are Wisconsin RangDe! Wisconsin RangDe is UW-Madison’s all-girls recreational South Asian fusion dance team. We bring together talented women of all skill levels to perform a variety of styles such Bhangra, Bollywood, Hip-Hop, Contemporary, Semi-Classical, and more.

Name: Likha Dance Crew
Description: La compagnie a pour objectif de rassembler les étudiants danseurs du campus de Kedge Paris pour créer des chorégraphies et vidéos ensemble. Passion, diversité (des styles et des genres) et créativité sont les mots d’ordre.

Name: THE COMPANY by Jouana Samia
Description:
THECOMPANY - The first international, pop-cultural dance company from Germany.  An institution for dance and choreography with a focus on individuality.

EDUCATION: We support dancers through various workshops with national and international instructors.

Taneční škola TangoLab Štěky: Snažíme se tvořit místo, kde ožívá argentinské tango a vytvářet rodinné zázemí.

V naší škole se argentinské tango stává víc než jen tancem. Tango má dlouhou více než 120 let dlouhou historii. Z kolébky Buenos Aires a Montevidea se tango rozšířilo, tango festivaly, maratony a tančírny najdete nyní v každém větším městě na celém světě a tančit tak můžete praktický celý rok.

Tango byl vždy tanec, za kterým toho bylo mnohem víc. Pro nás je to nyní cesta k sebevyjádření, porozumění v páru, radosti z pohybu, vytváření komunity a setkávání s lidmi z celého světa bez ohledu na jazykové bariéry. 


Naše škola v srdci Brna je pro každého – ať už jste začátečník, který neumí vůbec nic a chce se naučit základy tanga, nebo zkušenější tanečník toužící po prohloubení svých dovedností, posuneme vás. Pod vedením profesionálních lektorů se nejen zdokonalíte v technice, ale zároveň objevíte, jak tango přináší do života harmonii a radost, odpočnout si od dennodenních starostí.

Přijďte k nám do Tangolab Steky – místa, kde se propojují tanec, vášeň a inspirace.

Name: Fitos Dezső Társulat - Fitos Dezső Hungarian Professional Dance Ensemble
Description:
Ars poeticánk a hitelességre törekvés.Hűek vagyunk hagyományainkhoz, táncainkhoz,amelyek elsajátítása és bemutatása nem csupán magas szintű technikai tudást,de különleges kifejező erőt is igényel.A mozdulatnak ugyanis láttatnia kell azt a régről jövő erőt,amely minden táncművészeti ág alapja.Hiszünk a néptánc kortárs művészeti megmutatkozásában.Hisszük,hogy erejével, természetességével megszólítjuk a ma emberét.
The work of the creative couple Dezső Fitos and Kocsis Enikő is of decisive importance and provides a model and a guide in the dance life in the Carpathian Basin.They are not only the permanent creators and dance masters of Hungarian amateur and professional ensembles,but with their camps and courses they have also played a significant rolein the life of Hungarian amateur groups and professional troupes across the border of decades.They are inspired by the cultural diversity of Carpathian Basin and its inexhaustible folklore treasure. Their performances are always based on authentic collections, dance and music material, but at the same time,addition to respecting tradition,they boldly experiment by expanding the boundaries by involving other performing arts genres.Puppet theatre,theatre and circus art, as well as other branches of dance are integrated into Hungarian folklore and thus fusions are created in wich other components based on folk dance reinforce each other to create original works. With these special creations that preserve the authenticity of the consistuent element and are ultimately unique,they also reach an audience for whom Hungarian folklore was perviously unknown.
