Name: Mind in Motion
Description:
Mind in Motion is a project that raises mental health awareness in Kenya. Currently, Kenya is suffering from a ‘mental health crisis’ (Mental Health Task Force – Ministry of Health, Kenya) and victims often self-isolate due to stigma, traditional misconceptions and shame. 
We are a team of choreographers and therapists and use the power of DANCE to bring change. We train and support local dancers to express their personal experiences and struggles in their own dance-choreography that is then performed for their communities of origin. With every performance, we show that expression is possible, it is healing and it is strong. We break the ice and start the conversation with our visitors. We fight the stigma that prevents people from reaching out for support. 

After a very succesful pilot, we are proud to announce local county governments, hospital groups and therapists have joined forces with us to create a movement that is here to bring permanent change to how Kenya views mental health.

Are you ready to contribute? Spread our message or reach with a personal message to see how you can aid our cause.

Name: Ronald K. Brown/EVIDENCE, A Dance Company
Description:
Ronald K. Brown/EVIDENCE, A Dance Company seeks to  promote understanding of the human condition through the dances and storytelling of the African Diaspora, and to provide sensory connections to history and tradition through music, movement and spoken word.

Founded by Ronald K. Brown, EVIDENCE, a Dance Company is dedicated to connecting audiences to the rich history, traditions, and complex stories of African Americans and the African Diaspora.

Brown gave his newly-formed company the name EVIDENCE because he wanted people—especially young people and people of color—to see a reflection, or evidence, of their families, their neighbors, their stories, and their circumstances, on stage.

In the four decades since the company’s founding, Brown has created a rich and diverse body of work that is significant in its pioneering blend of classic and traditional forms grounded by compelling ancestral narratives. Additionally, Brown is one of the nation’s most celebrated choreographers.

He has created over 30 works for EVIDENCE, and has garnered commissions from Alvin Ailey American Dance Theater, Jacob’s Pillow, The Kennedy Center, The Joyce Theater, Ballet Hispanico, Malpaso Dance Company, Cleo Parker Robinson Dance Ensemble, Dayton Contemporary Dance Company, Jennifer Muller/The Works, Jeune Ballet d’Afrique Noire, and Harlem Stage, to name a few.

Description: Founded on 2015 by a group of enthusiast K-pop cover dancers based in Batam, Indonesia.

Name: Pastry Dance
Description:
A brand born into hip hop royalty, Pastry was founded by celebrity fashionistas Vanessa and Angela Simmons, the daughters of Joseph "Rev. Run" Simmons, in 2007. Their bold colors and unique patterns instantly captured the hearts and minds of costume designers and Hollywood wardrobe stylists, making Pastry a household name.

Following international success, Pastry identified a need for fashionable sneakers in the dance market. Pastry's distinct features, quality, and passion for innovation has established the brand as America's #1 Dance Sneaker for professional and university dance teams.

Pastry is focused on movement, activity and style; creating comfortable footwear that fits every need. An effortless fusion of high fashion and streetwear, Pastry delivers style that doesn’t sacrifice performance and comfort – a perfect recipe for dancers and shoe-lovers alike.

Name: Dans Hotspot
Description:
De Dans Hotspot is een danssportcentrum aan de Westzijde 71 in Zaandam. Er worden lessen en workshops gegeven in verschillende dansstijlen, o.a. Stijldansen, Raynetics, La Blast en Rock & Roll. Onze lessen zijn open voor echt iedereen, wij zijn een inclusieve, regenboogvriendelijke dansschool.

Kijk voor het actuele programma op: https://www.danshotspot.com/boeken

Zin in een dansfeest? Elk weekend kun je bij ons in de balzaal een avondje uit, gezellige mensen, uitnodigende sfeer, royale wedstrijddansvloer (18 x 22 m), goede dj’s. We organiseren themafeesten, vrijdansavonden met een docent om vragen te beantwoorden, danscafé middagen en nog veel meer.

Check onze uitgaanskalender op: https://www.danshotspot.com/events

Dans Hotspot, dé danszaal van de Zaanstreek
Westzijde 71 Zaandam
 info@danshotspot.com
 06 55 79 13 05
 www.danshotspot.com

Name: Arts House Dance Company
Description: Arts House Dance Company (AHDC), founded in 1985, is celebrated for its strong technique, original student choreography, dynamic stage presence, and close-knit community. The company showcases styles including contemporary, jazz, ballet, hip-hop, and more through two annual performances, guest shows, campus events, and student-led workshops open to the public. Committed to excellence, AHDC presents high-quality performances at Penn with choreography, content planning, and production entirely student-driven.

Name: Sutradhar Institute of Dance & Related Arts
Description: Sutradhar Institute of Dance & Related Arts is a women-led, non-profit, Kuchipudi dance company based in Silver Spring, Maryland. Since its creation by Nilimma Devi in 1989, Sutradhar has been holistically nurturing empowered dancers and artists of all ages and backgrounds. Our projects transcend ethnic, religious, and gender barriers with reimagined, innovative choreography.

Name: RHUL Dance Society
Description: Royal Holloway Dance Society.

Name: Groove Academy Jo
Description:
Groove Academy | West Amman, Jordan 
Where tradition meets innovation through Dabkeh, Ballet, and Hip Hop. Empowering ages 8–45 to dance, connect, and grow. 

Why Us?
 Cultural Legacy: Preserve Jordanian heritage with authentic Dabkeh while mastering global styles like Ballet & Hip Hop.
 Structured Learning: From beginner workshops to professional certifications—your journey, your pace.
Community Impact: Build confidence, forge friendships, and perform at local & international events.
 Mentorship: Learn from Mr. Samer Ayyad, our visionary leader shaping Jordan’s dance future.

For Everyone:
Families •  Aspiring Artists •  Professionals •  Expats/Tourists

Join us to celebrate dance as life in motion. Partner, learn, or simply groove with us!

Name: Inspired Aerial Arts
Description: Offering instruction in aerial silks, lyra, and more in Lawrence, KS!

Name: Jstreets crew, St Joseph's University
Description: The official western dance association of St Joseph's University

Name: Chowk Production
Description:
Chowk Productions is a home for Singapore-made dance-theatre that delves deep into the heart of Asian movement and theatre traditions to develop a contemporary performance vocabulary for actors and dancers.

Through training rooted in classical Odissi and artistic productions with a process-oriented, research-based approach, Chowk’s mission is to develop an Asian contemporary movement expression that dissolves the dichotomy between tradition and modernity.

Chowk has a centre that offers dance classes and a dance company that creates artistic productions and engages in research. The dance classes include regular lessons in Odissi dance for a range of ages, from children to adults, as well as periodic workshops in other traditional Asian somatic practices.

List of works:
- The Hungry Stones (2011)
- The Blind Age (2014)
- You Cannot Look Away (2014)
- From Another Land (2015)
- Pallavi and Space (2016)
- The Second Sunrise (2016)
- Pallavi in Time (2017)
- from: The Platform (2017)
- Pallavi with Stillness (2018)
- The Experimental Man (2019)
- Pallavi through Abstractions (2020)
- Pallavi through Abstraction (2021)
- These Brief Encounters (2021)
- Yāhi (2022)

Chowk’s productions have been commissioned by festivals in Singapore such as Kalaa Utsavam and da:ns festival. Chowk has also toured internationally at venues and festivals including the Kennedy Center (Washington DC), Les Hivernales festival (Avignon), the Melkweg (Amsterdam) and Ten Days on the Island festival (Tasmania).

Chowk Productions Ltd is supported by the National Arts Council under the Major Company Scheme for the period from 1 April 2022 to 31 March 2025. Chowk Productions is also a registered charity and Institute of Public Character (IPC) in Singapore.

Name: MIS Dance Co.
Description: Storytelling and passion powered by dance, MIS Dance Co. brings the beauty of ballroom to life through learning to dance, performance, choreography, and unforgettable shows!

Name: Association Hip-Hop GROOVE NATION
Description: Shows, Prestations et Cours de Danse

Name: Community Dance Project
Description: Community Dance Project is committed to generating accessibility for movement artists to experience the process of art development with focus on growth and innovation in a nurturing community-based environment. Community Dance Project and its partners span across the Mid-Michigan Region.

Name: STARZ BALLET BABES LLP
Description: STARZ BALLET BABES LLP is a company based in Hampshire, United Kingdom.

Name: Dance 10 Performing Arts Center
Description:
Dance/10 Performing Arts Center, located in Alameda, California, is a vibrant and inclusive performing arts studio dedicated to inspiring dancers of all ages and abilities. For over four decades, Dance/10 has been a cornerstone of Bay Area arts education by offering exceptional training in ballet, tap, jazz, hip hop, lyrical, contemporary, musical theatre, and more.

Our mission is to create a joyful, professional, and supportive environment where students can grow as artists and individuals. Whether pursuing dance recreationally or competitively, every student is guided with care, encouragement, and respect.

At Dance/10, we believe that artistry and professionalism go hand in hand. Our faculty of experienced educators and working professionals foster confidence, discipline, and creativity in every class. Beyond the studio, our community comes together through performances, competitions, and special events that celebrate teamwork, expression, and the shared love of dance.

We are proud to be home to a thriving competition team of both youth and adults, the Tap Dancing Christmas Trees, and a full spectrum of programs for our youngest beginners in our Academy of Little Stars to advanced pre-professional dancers and all levels in between.

Programs and Highlights:

Children’s and youth dance classes (ages 3+)

Competitive and pre-professional training programs

Adult dance classes

Seasonal performances and community events

Summer camps and workshops

Name: The Concept Chile
Description:
Somos una organización que une danza, psicología y bellas artes para transformar la expresión artística en una experiencia de autodescubrimiento, identidad y bienestar.

Más que una academia, ofrecemos un espacio seguro donde la prioridad es la salud mental. 

No se trata de competir ni de encajar en una coreografía perfecta, sino de conectar con las emociones, explorar la corporalidad y descubrir un lenguaje propio a través del movimiento y el arte.

 Nuestra propuesta se centra en psico-educar, generar conciencia y entregar herramientas que acompañen a cada persona dentro y fuera de la sala.
 Creemos que las artes son un motor de cambio, y cada sesión busca inspirar respeto, autenticidad y aprendizaje colaborativo.
 Nuestra visión es que la danza y las bellas artes sean reconocidas como prácticas que promueven la salud mental, la empatía y la conexión genuina con los demás.

No enseñamos coreografías, creamos procesos de transformación personal a través del arte y el movimiento.

Name: Baylor Dance Company
Description: Baylor Dance Company provides a unique university experience for students who have a background in dance and want to further their training in college. While the organization is student led by a leadership team of elected officers, the affiliation with the dance minor provides the company with a director, enforcing a professional environment. The company primarily trains in Contemporary, Jazz, and Hip-Hop as well as fundamental Ballet and Jazz technique. Rehearsals occur from 6:15-8:15 p.m. on Tuesdays and Thursdays, with additional weekend or outside rehearsals around performances. Performance opportunities include events in the Waco Community, Baylor sponsored events such as After Dark, Homecoming, and Stompfest, a competition or convention, and our annual Spring Showcase featuring company member choreography. Baylor Dance Company not only gives trained dancers an advanced environment to grow both technically and artistically, but also provides a community of kindness and support with a shared passion for the art of dance.

Name: NA Dance Company
Description: Upper Blue Mountains dance school located in Wentworth Falls; providing Ballet, Jazz, Lyrical, Tap, Acro Dance & Cheer Pom classes.

Name: TEAM PH8NTOM
Description:
Ph8ntom was founded in 2019, with a purpose to promote cultural understanding, inclusion, and awareness. 
As Ph8ntom evolves, our impact has also grown exponentially. We introduce world's diverse culture to our community, and advocate for the causes of local charity. With the help of talented choreographers and notable local organizations, we have launched creative contents and dance covers reaching over 170,000 audiences. 
For three years, we have created a safe space for our now 600 and growing participants to embrace, share, and showcase their unique stories both within our group and with the broader community.

Name: Clian Studio
Description:
We are a dance studio, located in Monterrey Mexico which is focused on: K-pop, Commercial Dance and Fitness.
We have high-performance dancers who participate in competitions, K-pop events and also make dance cover recordings. We aim to be the first K-pop focused dance studio in Mexico that develops talent at a high level to be observed internationally.

Some of our achievements since our opening in october 2022, are:
- KPOP COVER DANCE FESTIVAL 2023: 2nd Place 'Blue Flame'
-KDC COMPETITION: 
Highest Score Overall 'Air Unit - More & More' 
1st, 2nd, 3rd Place [Female Compact] 
1st [Female Open]
1st [Mixed Open]
1st, 2nd [Kids]
3rd [Male Open]
- HALLYU EXPO: 1st [April 2023, Blue Flame], 1st [August 2023, Run BTS]

Name: Free Bird Cabaret Burlesque
Description:
Free Bird Cabaret Burlesque est une association fondée en 2021 afin de promouvoir l’art de l’Effeuillage Burlesque à travers des spectacles & des événements.

Nos performances mêlent différentes disciplines, de l'effeuillage burlesque au cerceau aérien, en passant par la magie du Drag-Queen et du Drag-King !

Le tout dans des spectacles uniques, décalés et riches en émotions !

Name: CIE MORPHOSE
Description: Compagnie chorégraphique transdisciplinaire basée sur l'île de La Réunion et dirigée par Soraya Thomas

Name: Everyone Deserves the Chance to Dance Limited
Description:
Each EDC Dance session is filled with fun, learning and exercise. The sole purpose of the classes is to engage all within the art form of dance. This is achieved through learning taught dance material, creating own movement sequences and working as a group to build and create routines. 

Each session is tailored to the individual participants and abilities within the group. No two EDC Dance sessions are the same! 

We offer sessions within Primary School settings, community centres and local churches. If you want the chance to dance, then join us today!

Name: Abhinayaa Institute of Research and Fine Arts
Description:
Abhinayaa Institute of Research and Fine Arts, founded in 2002, is a prominent institution based in Vasai-Virar, Maharashtra. The institute specializes in classical dance forms such as Bharatanatyam, Kuchipudi, and Mohiniyattam, and is led by Guru Dr. Chitra Vishwanathan. It offers certified courses for students of all levels, from beginners to advanced dancers, and follows a traditional approach to teaching with personalized attention.

Abhinayaa is known for successfully training over 500 students for Arangetram, the formal debut performance in Bharatanatyam. The institute also organizes various cultural events and festivals, showcasing dance performances and fostering a vibrant cultural community. Additionally, the institute offers online courses, making its programs accessible to students both nationally and internationally.

Name: Martin Schlichting - Dance Teacher & Trainer
Description:
I could tell now what I have done in my more than 25 years of dancing experience, but more interesting for you is actually, what I can offer you with ballroom. So, what's in for you?

SOCIAL ACTIVITY - meet new people, make friends, share something with your partner

HEALTH - reduces the risk of cardiovascular diseases and benefits your stamina even at lower intensities, building up new nerval networks, prevents dementia

CHALLENGE - strong coordinative development, train skills like balancing, rhythmization, orientation, anticipation, agility, combination ability, adaptability, control and more in an interaction with your partner

BONDING - ballroom dancing means synchronizing both movements and minds resulting in similar thoughts, better understanding of each other and closer bonding

ATTRACTION - attractiveness throughout fitness and agility, better posture, improved self awareness and confidence

And yet, my history in a short summery:

• registered at the chamber of commerce
• More than 25 years of experience in social dancing
• 23 years as active athlete
• (private) lessons and workshops from world and national champions
• first doing 10-dance (ballroom & latin), specialized in ballroom dancing in 2006
• several times regional champion ballroom & latin
• semi-finalist German Championships
• finalist Dutch Championships (2nd place NDO)
• Licence: Dance Sport Trainer C Standard (DTV e.V. / DOSB)
• giving regular lessons/classes (both as main teacher and fill in) & workshops at e.g.
  o Studentendansvereniging AmsterDance (Amsterdam)
  o CREA Amsterdam (cultural student centre of the UvA and HvA)
  o Utrechtse Studentendansvereniging U Dance
  o Student Dance Association Leidance (Leiden)
  o Wageningen University Ballroom Dance Association WUBDA
  o Ballettcentrum Berlin
  o Tanzschule Steirl Berlin-Brandenburg
• Giving private lessons to dance sport couples (up to B/A class ballroom)

Name: Barrington Dance Ensemble
Description: Barrington Dance Ensemble is a company based out of 758 W Northwest Hwy, Barrington, Illinois, United States.

Name: 2Dance Danseklubb
Description:
Danseklubben 2Dance ble stiftet i 2009.

Vi er en frittstående fleridrettslag som er eid og drevet av medlemmene. Vi er tilsluttet Norges Idrettsforbund og Norges Danseforbund. 

Vi har et bredt kurs- og treningstilbud innen både dans og turn til barn og ungdom i alle aldre.

Klubben tar særskilt ansvar i forhold til barneidrett. For barn vil fokuset i større grad ligge på mestring ut fra egne forutsetninger og i mindre grad resultatene i konkurranser. Sunn utvikling er et krav. Det betyr at barn vil lære riktig teknikk og utvikle koreografi i takt med egen fysisk utvikling.

Treningsplanen skal gi mulighet for å satse så mye man vil på de forskjellige dansestilene og utvikle seg i den retningen som passer danseren best.

Vår klubb, som alle andre klubber, er helt avhengig av frivillighet for å få til en forsvarlig drift, både økonomisk og organisatorisk. Minimumsgraden av frivillighet i 2Dance er knyttet til organisert dugnad fordelt likeverdig på alle medlemmene. Men dette er ikke tilstrekkelig. Vi har behov for ildsjeler som er villige til å ta på seg mer.

Vi håper at det blir flere som velger å involvere seg. Døra er åpen for alle :-)

Send en melding til kontakt@2dance.no. Vi tar deg gjerne imot!

  

2Dance skal kjennetegnes av følgende verdier:

Glede
Sunnhet
Likeverd
Samhold
"Gjennom sunn danseveiledning i et sunt miljø skal vi skape likeverdig mulighet for alle våre dansere slik at de finner sin EGEN danseglede uansett evne og ambisjon."

- Dette er vårt ledetråd; grunnpillaren i alt vi gjør!

Sunnhet handler både om det mentale og det fysiske. Det gjelder individuelt, gruppe og klubben som helhet.

Med forskjellige ambisjoner og evner mener vi:

Dansere som ønsker og har potensiale til å bli en danser i verdenstoppen
Dansere som ønsker å danse kun for å ha det gøy
Dansere som har fysiske eller psykiske begrensninger

Name: Step By Step Dance
Description: Step By Step Dance (SBSD) is a organization that offers free dance classes for children and adults with special needs. In these classes, we practice stretching and light calisthenics, learn beginning dance combinations, and freestyle to student-chosen songs. Currently, SBSD teaches in-person classes throughout the Bay Area, but offers virtual classes that have reached international communities. Our mission is to uplift the special needs community through the transformative power of dance.

Name: Wholesome Dance
Description: Wholesome Dance is a Dance School with a Difference. Closely connected to Northside Christian College’s Dance and Performing Arts program, Wholesome Dance will provide extra-curricular dance classes for the community, reaching beyond NCC families.

Name: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Westborough
Description: Fred Astaire Dance Studios - Westborough is the premiere ballroom dance studio in Massachusetts.

Name: Reflections Repertory Company
Description: Reflections offers NU students the opportunity to choreograph new works of dance and create a community for those who want to train, rehearse, and perform classical and contemporary ballet together. We aim to provide a space for all levels of dancers to grow and continue their training with regular open classes. Our performance division is an audition-based group of dancers that perform regularly on-campus and in the Evanston community. This group creates and learns repertoire through weekly rehearsals, providing a space for dancers to showcase their artistry to a wider audience.

Name: Chicago Thriller
Description: Ready to rise from the grave and dance? We’re the Chicago Thriller Flash Mob — a horde of undead volunteers performing the full, original “Thriller” choreography every Halloween in Chicago. Since 2012, we’ve welcomed zombies ages 18+ (no experience needed!) for weekend dance classes, zombie movement training, and public performances across the city. Join us Sept–Oct for frightfully fun rehearsals and help us bring the undead to life!

Name: Lobo Loco Tango School
Description:
Individuele Initiatiecursus Argentijnse Tango & Bachatango

"When you Master Tango, you Master Life." (A.J. Garces)
"You don't choose Tango. Tango chooses you." (Pablo Veron)

Individuele Beginnerscursus Argentijnse Tango: 12 privélessen op 2 maanden.
Starten kan iedere week, volgens je eigen agenda, 3 lessen per 2 weken.
Na iedere les ontvang je via Whatsapp aangepast materiaal om thuis te oefenen.

Na de eerste cyclus van 12 lessen beheers je alle figuren en technieken om een volledig tango-lied supersensueel uit te dansen en zelfzeker en zelfstandig naar Milonga's en Tangosalons te gaan.

De tweede cyclus is voor Intermediates of Halfgevorderden met voor de dames de nadruk op Benentechniek en Voetvloerversieringen (Adornos) en voor de heren: Eenduidig en Anticipatief Leiden. Mocht je er niettemin voor opteren om het bij de eerste cyclus te houden, dan ben je perfect op niveau om te starten in een regulier derde jaar van eender welke dansschool.

De derde cyclus is voor Gevorderden; daar verhogen we het tempo van de muziek en het aantal figuren en leren we de snelle Milonga en trage Tangowals.

Voor beide vervolgcycli gelden dezelfde handige afspraken en tarieven.

Individuele lessen met Patrick van Steenis als danspartner en leider: € 75,- voor 75 minuten.
Als je per 2 of 3 dames komt, dans je afwisselend met Patrick van Steenis als leider: € 150,- voor 75 minuten, dus € 50,- pp

Dit kan ook voor koppels; dezelfde handige afspraken en tarieven gelden per koppel (privéles) of per twee of drie koppels (afwisselend).

Locatie: Syntex Sound Studio - Begijnendijk halverwege Leuven en Lier - Veldstraat 46H, 3130 Begijnendijk - www.singandswing.be

info@singandswing.be
0498 666603

rek: BE82 9794 2414 8568
tav: SingandSwing vzw
ovv: Reeks van 12 Individuele Lessen Argentijnse Tango

De eerste les leren we: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=brR5JOcGZZg&t=28s

Zorg voor aangepast schoeisel: Dansschoenen met lederen zool. Hoe hoger je hakken, hoe mooier je naar voren leunt.

Name: MAITE MARCOS MUÑOZ
Description:
Soy coreógrafa, y pedagoga de danza, con más de 20 años de experiencia, en el montaje de espectáculos y la enseñanza de danza. Desde pequeña sentí pasión por la danza; mi formación se fundamenta en el ballet clásico, el teatro musical y la danza contemporánea.

Desde hace 15 años, trabajo en el equipo de Shakira como coreógrafa.  La inclinación que siento hacia los niños me ha llevado a diseñar el programa “Impronta” de enseñanza artística y expresión corporal para el ciclo de primaria.

Name: West Coast Pole & Dance Studio AB
Description:
Västra Sveriges största Poledance studio beläget mitt i hjärtat av Göteborg.

Vi erbjuder kurser för alla nivåer inom Polesport, luftakrobatik, styrka- och flexibilitet samt olika former av dans.

Alla som är träningssugna är välkomna till oss, du sätter din egna gräns!
Det ska vara roligt att träna!

Name: Cordova Escuela de Danza
Description: Damos clases de Ballet, Flamenco, Urbano y Karate

Name: Ariel Dance Studios
Description: We provide a positive, dynamic, family-oriented environment. We offer a wide range of classes and performance opportunities for kids, teens, and adults, all of which are led by our supportive and professionally trained staff. We provide a creative and fun-filled environment for dancers as we prepare for many formal and informal performance opportunities throughout the year.

Name: Piah Dance Company
Description:
Where tradition meets modernity.
Founded in 2011 in Bangalore, India, Piah Dance Company creates high quality choreographies and performances through our process of incorporating a ‘Traditional India with a Modern Twist’ philosophy.
 
Our vision at Piah Dance Company has always been to make human connections. We believe in building a strong dance community within our city, country and the globe and a strong community is built by its people.
 
This community forms an important part of the vision of this dance collective. Apart from a strong offline community, we have created an online community with the aim of sharing our choreography, creating a platform for people to learn Indian dances across the world, develop an emotional well being through dance and cultivate a repository of dance videos that encompasses all aspects of the culture of the Indian subcontinent.
 
This online community is created primarily through Piah’s Youtube channel that has reached over 62,000+ subscribers and over 21 million views and counting till date.
 
Our work at Piah Dance Company showcases the beauty of India and takes inspiration from all aspects of Indian culture including dance, music, fabric and handicrafts.
 
Piah Dance Company conducts performances and choreographies and stage shows, folk and technique inspired workshops for kids and adults and online dance consultation for choreographies.

To share the beauty of Indian dances and choreographies across the world, and make Indian folk dances a worldwide phenomenon. 

"Dance is a very integral form of human expression. I believe we all are dancers. We just need the right mentorship to experience the joy of dance. My passion is to share my love and knowledge of Indian dances with the entire world, and my purpose in life is to spread joy and grace through dancing." - Priya

Name: DancingInXs
Description: At DANCING INXS we work hard to provide students strong technical foundation in a supportive and professional atmosphere. We provide beginner, intermediate and advanced classes for ages 3 and up, in a variety of programs, conducted in a positive environment, with a professional, passionate, and caring staff, committed to each student’s strengths and weaknesses.

Name: Dinastía
Description:
Dinastía es un proyecto artístico integral con base en Montevideo, Uruguay, que fusiona academia de danza, tienda especializada y espacio multifuncional.

Ofrecemos un entorno moderno, versátil y accesible donde podés entrenar con técnica y pasión, acceder a una selección cuidada de indumentaria diseñada para acompañar tu estilo, y contar con un espacio profesional para clases, ensayos y colaboraciones creativas.

En Dinastía acercamos el mundo de la danza y el arte a más personas sin resignar calidad, diseño ni elegancia. Nuestro compromiso es construir comunidad, crear oportunidades y hacerlo con estilo, creando una experiencia completa que potencia tu talento desde todos los ángulos, inspirando crecimiento, expresión y sentido de pertenencia.

Name: Noretta Dunworth School of Dance
Description: Welcome to Noretta Dunworth School of Dance, where excellence meets artistry. Our nationally acclaimed institution proudly presents a diverse range of classes, including Ballet (encompassing Cecchetti, Vaganova, and non-syllabus approaches), Pointe for our advanced students, Tap, Jazz, Contemporary, Lyrical, Hip-Hop, as well as Acrobatics and Gymnastics. We offer classes ranging from recreational level to our annual auditions to join our elite competitive team.

Name: Dance Concepts
Description: Dance classes for kids ages 2-18.

Name: Grand Prix Dance Shop
Description:
Grand Prix is a brand of dancewear, shoes, and accessories based in Kyiv, Ukraine. We have a history of 25 years of creating dance products for ballet, rhythmic gymnastics, Ballroom and Latin, and other dance styles. 

We value quality most of all. Having our own production here in Kyiv, which produces 10,000 items per month, enables us to control the process thoroughly and be flexible for our customers. We develop models ourselves, considering dancers' and gymnasts' needs; we select high-quality materials and keep up with new technologies to create so that you can dance.

Our flagship store is in Kyiv, Ukraine. We also have an online shop for Ukraine and one for the World. Our large wholesale department works with shops and stores in over 35 countries.

Name: Dança Grupo Plus
Description:
People moved by their passion for dance, with the purpose of celebrating it, without generational boundaries and inspiring others with their constant curiosity, creativity and confidence.
They live life to its fullness and are active and focused on overcoming their limits.  With an inclusive and strongly collaborative mindset, they aim at inspiring the audiences that want to join them.

Name: Studio 95 Dance Complex
Description: Studio 95 is a vibrant and inclusive dance complex located in the heart of the West Island, Montreal. We are dedicated to nurturing young dancers and promoting a sense of community through the art of dance. With small, family-oriented classes and passionate instructors, we create an environment where dancers can grow, express themselves, and form lasting connections.

Name: Empowered Movement Dance
Description:
Empowered Movement Dance Company is dedicated to building dancers from intro-level to professional. We believe in empowering dancers through dance by creating a space to train, learn and become confident in the dancer YOU are!
EMDC provides training in different dance styles such as Bachata, Salsa, Salsa Calena, Jazz, Hip Hop, Contemporary, Reggaeton, Ballet and much more! It is our mission to continue to provide dance outlets for all.

Name: Novum Dance Collective
Description: Founded in 2013, Novum Dance Collective (formerly Nozama) is a contemporary dance company dedicated to exploring and celebrating human identity through movement. Led by Artistic Director Dana Alsamsam, Novum’s work engages with themes of identity, gender, and power, particularly focusing on the women’s and queer experiences. Our performances, known for their raw emotional intensity and technical innovation, aim to resonate, challenge perceptions, and inspire social change. With over a decade of creative collaboration, Novum produces two major concerts each year, alongside participation in local festivals like NACHMO, Boston WiP, and the Dance for World Community Festival. Our dancers are given opportunities to grow as choreographers, teachers, and arts leaders, contributing to a vibrant and supportive artistic community. At the heart of Novum is a commitment to creating impactful work that is more than just movement—it’s about the stories we tell, the conversations we start, and the communities we build.

Name: Bella Danze Artz
Description: Bella Danze Artz is a highly respected educational dance studio. We have trained thousands of dancers in the Denver North Metro area that have gone off to do amazing things in and out of show business. For us it is more than a business, it's teaching a love of dance and making lifelong friendships!

Name: Serenity Dance Studio
Description: At Serenity Dance Studio, we provide a safe and welcoming environment in which to learn and practice IDTA syllabus dance grades. We offer lessons to a variety of ages, teaching ballet, tap, and jazz. We welcome everyone from complete beginners to advance level students.

Name: Aisling Mor Academy of Irish Dance
Description: The Aisling Mor Academy was established in 2018 under the direction of Teresa Hesener, TCRG. 'Aisling Mor' means big dream in Gaelic, and we believe in helping our dancers achieve every dream they have, big or small. Join us, and be a part of our BIG DREAM!

Name: Texas Latin Dance
Description: Texas Latin Dance is a student organization at The University of Texas at Austin. We promote the art of Latin Dance to the UT and Austin communities through weekly dance classes, social events, dance outings, workshops with professionals, and individual practices. We seek to manifest an awareness of the importance of dance in Latin America historically, culturally, and socially, as well as the global impact of Latin dance.

Name: Aakaar Dance Company
Description:
Dance is about creating shapes and telling a story!
We are focused on bringing the non dancing community closer to the Indian Classical Dances as an audience. The company is designed to provide long term training in Kathak, workshops and many different shows.

Name: Kimm Dance Center
Description: Dansschool in Geertruidenberg. Kimm Dance Center verhuurt ook een green screen studio, geeft kinderfeestjes en geeft halfjaarlijkse dans shows in het theater.

Name: Salsa Torino ASD Estilo y Pasion
Description: Grazie all'esperienza pluriannuale sviluppata nei balli caraibici, siamo fieri di presentare SalsaTorino una scuola di ballo, dedicata all'insegnamento della Salsa, Bachata, Cha-cha e Latin Hustle. SalsaTorino fa parte dell'associazione sportiva dilettantistica Estilo Y Pasion di Collegno. I corsi si tengono presso la Lavanderia a Vapore, insegniamo Salsa, Bachata, Cha-cha e Latin-Hustle per permettere a tutti di ballare “in pista“ fin da subito divertendosi.

Name: Anjali Danzas de India
Description: La Compañía de Danzas de India Anjali destaca por sus fusiones entre la alegría del folclor y la elegante danza clásica. Su lema, "sintiendo India en cada paso", resuena en cada uno de sus movimientos y coreografías.

Name: Gator Udaya
Description:
Gator Udaya combines various styles of dance such as Bollywood, hip hop, and bhangra to create powerful yet graceful performance art.

https://www.instagram.com/gatorudaya/?hl=en

Name: Dance Express Easton
Description: Dance Express is a dance studio located in Easton, Massachusetts. We offer classes for ages 2-18 ranging in various styles and levels. We pride ourselves in being a family oriented business. Instilling confidence and friendships in our dancers. We are celebrating our 35th Anniversary this year!

Name: Lady Red Charm
Description: Lady Red Charm est effeuilleuse burlesque et danseuse de cabaret… Elle est, plus globalement, votre Showgirl from Charlouz. Passionnée et passionnante, tantôt ingénue, sulfureuse ou flamboyante, elle se dévoile comme les nombreux pétales de la pivoine dont elle tire son nom. Sa sensualité est exacerbée… Tout comme son cambré que vous ne risquez pas de manquer.

Name: International KPOP Dance Association
Description:
Started from Los Angeles, IKDA is a global organization that is dedicated to promoting and advancing the art of KPOP dance around the world. Our mission is to connect local KPOP dance groups and provide a platform for KPOP lovers to showcase their skills, create dance videos, and support the wider KPOP community.

At IKDA, we believe in celebrating diversity and creating opportunities for KPOP dancers of all backgrounds to come together and share their passion for dance. 

In addition to training, IKDA provides opportunities for dancers to showcase their talents and connect with the wider KPOP dance community. We organize events, competitions, and performances where dancers can perform, learn from other dancers, and network with industry professionals.

Join our international KPOP dance network today and become part of a vibrant and supportive community that celebrates diversity and the power of KPOP dance. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced dancer, IKDA is here to help you connect, learn, and grow in your passion for KPOP dance.

Name: Denver School of Social Dance
Description:
Our mission is to create a safe space where people can come together, form meaningful friendships, and learn healthy ways of connecting through the transformative power of social dance.

**Our Offerings:**

* **Nightly Classes:** Immerse yourself in the world of dance with our nightly classes in various genres, including brazilian zouk, kizomba, salsa, and more.
* **Private Lessons:** Receive personalized instruction tailored to your specific goals and learning style.
* **Wedding Dance Choreography:** Create unforgettable memories with custom-designed wedding dance choreography.
* **Corporate Wellness:** Enhance employee well-being and team building through fun and engaging dance workshops.

Whether you're a seasoned dancer or a complete beginner, we have something for everyone. Join us and discover the joy of dance!

Name: PharmaDance
Description:
Association artistique spécialisée dans la danse de la Faculté de Pharmacie de Paris de l’Université Paris Cité. Elle regroupe des passionnés de danse, mais également les curieux, désireux d’en apprendre plus, qu’ils soient étudiants en Pharmacie, ou inscrit à l’Université Paris Cité. 
Cette association a pour but de promouvoir la danse auprès des étudiants. L’association organise des entraînements et cours de danse, réalise des représentations avec la coordination d’autres associations, participe à des rencontres inter-asso ainsi que des compétitions de danse en dehors de l’Université Paris Cité. 
Par ailleurs, l’association compte une équipe de montage vidéo et alimente la chaîne YouTube avec les vidéos de représentations.

Name: Dans Kolektif
Description: At Eylül Ercan Dance, I create projects focused on body awareness and the voice of the body. My work explores the connection between movement and expression, using dance as a powerful tool to enhance self-awareness and communication. Through my projects, I aim to bring attention to the body’s narrative, allowing it to speak and express through movement.

Name: House of Chow
Description: Founded by Artistic Director Yvonne Huatin Chow | 周化炜  in 2015, House of Chow {HoC} is where the wisdom of Asian lineage and a deep respect for Hip-Hop Dance meet. House of Chow’s mission is to educate, empower, and unify Asians in the US through Hip-Hop Dance. With Yvonne’s extensive education and experience in the culture and art form, she guides fellow Asians to understand their role and define their contribution as a guest in the culture of Hip-Hop Dance, an art form created by Black and Latino Americans in the US. House of Chow became a 501c3 non-profit organization in 2024 to continue accomplishing its mission through performances, education, and community building.

Name: Exis Inclusive Dance Company
Description:
EXIS is a professional inclusive dance company of disabled and non-disabled dancers based in Athens, Greece. It was founded in 2015 with the aim to include disabled dancers into the dance world. 
EXIS Dance Company aims 
- to promote inclusive dance through professional dance projects and performances,
-  to create a site for inclusive dance education and training, 
- to provide access to creativity and artistic expression to disabled people. 
With the operation of Ison - Dance Theater from 2019, it ensures systematic inclusive education for every disabled artists in Athens.

Name: Dance Crew Devotion
Description:
Wij zijn een enthousiaste groep dansers in de leeftijd van 5 jaar en ouder met als doel om op een leuke en gezellige manier een mooie dans neer te zetten voor ons publiek.
We trainen iedere woensdagavond van 18.00-21.00 uur en iedere eerste zondag van de maand van 14.00-16.00 uur in het Volkshoes te Geleen.

Name: Adaa: USC’s Premier Indian Classical Dance Team
Da Real Punjabiz
Description:
Da Real Punjabiz - San Diego's Premier Bhangra Team

 Established in 1999 |  Based in San Diego, CA |  Elevate Your Event with Energetic Bhangra Performances

 Contact us at: darealpunjabiz@gmail.com

 Da Real Punjabiz is San Diego's leading Bhangra Team. We are dedicated to infusing your events with vibrant energy and the rich cultural heritage of Punjab. For over two decades, we've been setting dance floors on fire, making weddings, corporate events, and cultural celebrations unforgettable. Our talented and passionate team of dancers brings the heart-pounding rhythms and electrifying moves of Bhangra to life.

 Looking to add an unforgettable cultural touch to your event? Whether it's a wedding, corporate gathering, or any special occasion, we've got you covered. 

 Reach out to us at darealpunjabiz@gmail.com for bookings, inquiries, and availability. Let us help you create a truly memorable and dynamic experience that your guests will talk about for years to come.

Name: Nikul
Description:
This is NIKUl DANCE in Dubai,UAE

We Are Freelancer Dance group, in DUBAI, UAE
We Would Like to provide  our Artist for your events & entertainment.
 Our Artist has made a significant impact in the dance industry, gaining recognition for our exceptional performances at prestigious events and venues. Some of our previous performance highlights include mesmerizing audiences at the FIFA World Cup 2023, gracing the stage at the IIFA Awards, captivating audiences at corporate events, adding flair to product launching functions, and bringing the spirit of dance to T10 UAE tournaments

Name: Jungle City projects
Description:
Jungle City’s mission is to makes space for Every Body Every Day to participate in our innate human need to Move, Create and Connect with people and place through the power of dance as a cultural, educational, celebratory and personal development practice.

Through both our in house curated programs and external collaborative projects we endeavor to create positive and meaningful connections between diverse communities, promoting the importance of historical and cultural knowledge and respect.

We represent a team of highly skilled, culturally diverse dancers and arts practitioners who perform and teach with knowledge and respect for the roots and culture of the dance we practice, and with a purpose to uplift communities through the power of dance. Our team have years of experience in their respective dance forms, with some members originating from the places where the dance comes from, as well as those who are not genetically linked, but have trained over many years with the dance creators in the communities of origin.

We deliver a weekly program of online and face to face dance classes in and around Melbourne, dance foundation courses, private lessons, workshops, performances, mentoring, and community outreach programs for people of all ages, and backgrounds. Our dancers are available individually or as a group for performances, education and entertainment bookings for private functions, school incursions and more.

Name: Infinity Dance Collective
Description: The Infinity Dance Collective specializes in adapting dance curriculum to accommodate and celebrate different learning styles and physical strengths. We use a person-centered approach to prioritize building confidence and self-expression.

Name: Unapologetic Dance Company
Description:
Unapologetic Dance Collective is a Toronto based dance company composed of dance artists who explore their truths and vulnerabilities through movement. 

Our company has become a safe haven for artists both professional and pre-professional, allowing them to grow, excel, and illustrate who they are unapologetically.

Name: DANSANI Dance Company
Description: DANSANI provides lessons in various Ballroom and Latin dance styles in group or private dance formats. We also provide highly individualized wedding dance choreography/lessons. Our high-energy weekly Zumba fitness classes are great way to start your weekend.

Name: LAGO VISTA DANCE Studio
Description:
We are not a competitive dance studio.
We believe in the innate potential that exists in every student. We are passionate about helping students find and strengthen the best in them. 
We aim to offer quality dance training in a safe, nurturing, and supportive environment. We offer classes for all ages as small children and mature adults.

Name: Level up Dance Academy Cyprus
Description: Level Up Dance Academy specialises in dance forms such as acrobatic, jazz, show, gymnastic, and contemporary dance. Our vision at Level Up is to improve the skills of each and every dancer. i.e. Level Up

Name: Latin Fusion Dance Company
Description:
At Latin Fusion, we do dance differently.
We blend the vibrant rhythms of Latin culture with creativity and connection. From engaging dance classes to professional photography and videography, we provide a full-spectrum experience for dancers and creators of all levels. Latin Fusion is more than dance—it’s a movement, a community, and a celebration of passion and expression. It’s a lifestyle. Live the Rhythm.

Name: Electric Youth Extreme Dance Co.
Description: At Electric Youth Extreme Dance, we're not just about teaching dance steps – we're about igniting a lifelong passion for movement, expression, and self-confidence. From jazz to lyrical, tap to tumbling, our range of classes ensures your child finds their perfect rhythm. Our experienced instructors are committed to helping students have fun and reach their goals. Beyond dance skills, we instill discipline, teamwork, and creativity, empowering students for life's challenges.

Name: LGTBAILAMOS
Description: Somos una escuela de baile sin roles de género, segura e inclusiva con todes, donde enseñamos salsa, bachata y más. Ven a nuestras clases, aprende a bailar y conoce a la PIÑA, nuestra comunidad de personitas increíbles. Nos encontramos en Madrid Centro. Te esperamos!

Name: Art In Motion Dance Performing Company
École de danse Port-O-Swing
Description:
L’École de danse Port-O-Swing se spécialise dans l’enseignement des danses Swing depuis maintenant 20 ans.  On y retrouve des professeurs spécialisés, entre autres, en Lindy Hop, Rockabilly Jive, West Coast Swing, Blues, Solo Jazz Step et Boogie Woogie.
Ayant pour mission de transmettre la passion du Swing dans une atmosphère joyeuse et conviviale, l’école offre des cours, troupes et ateliers mais aussi des soirées de danse sociale ouvertes à toute la communauté Swing.

Name: PERLË
Description:
Perlë  | Ideas In Motion 

Perlë stands at the intersection of dance, movement, and ideas. 
We are a forward-thinking agency that believes in the power of embodied storytelling - shaping culture through choreography, casting and movement direction.

From commercial campaigns to artistic collaborations, we bring ideas into motion and concepts into form. 

We offer:
☆ Choreography 
☆ Movement direction 
☆ Casting
☆ Artistic consultancy

Name: Officina Danza Studio
Description:
OFFICINA DANZA STUDIO nasce nel 2001 ed oggi è riconosciuta fra le più prestigiose scuole di danza di Modena.

Chi siamo? Officina Danza Studio costituisce un laboratorio di studio e sperimentazione in cui anima, corpo ed emozioni sono coinvolti all’unisono. Officina nasce dall’idea di creare un ambiente familiare nel quale il corpo insegnanti è motivato e dedito al proprio lavoro e accompagna passo dopo passo gli allievi non solo verso la crescita tecnica ma anche e soprattutto personale.

Name: Flow And FLex Studio
Description:
Flow and Flex Studio is a unique cultural and creative hub located in a 300-year-old palace in Saraikela, Jharkhand. Founded by Shiva Kar, our studio offers a diverse range of programs, including dance, art, music, and fitness classes, all designed to inspire and nurture creativity. At Flow and Flex, we believe in the power of movement and artistic expression to transform lives, combining traditional heritage with modern practices. Whether you're looking to learn, teach, or host an event, our historic space provides an inspiring environment where tradition and innovation come together in perfect harmony."

Key Specialties:

Dance Classes
Art Classes
Music Education
Fitness Training
Studio Rental for Events
Location:
Saraikela, Jharkhand

Mission:
To foster creativity and well-being through the integration of cultural heritage and modern artistic practices, creating a community where everyone can flow, flex, and thrive.

Vision:
To be a leading centre for artistic and personal development, bridging the past and present in a space that celebrates diversity, inclusivity, and the power of creativity.

Name: Queen of Scots Dance Academy
Description: The Queen of Scots Dance Academy, founded in 1998, provides Scottish Highland Dance lessons for students of all ages and abilities. Established as a competitive dance studio, founder and dance instructor Bree Erin Brownlee works with her dancers to compete at local, regional and national competitions. The QSDA focuses on having a nurturing, family environment for dancer, parent and teacher. We pride ourselves on not only providing world-class dance instruction, but also a fun atmosphere where dancers can find life-long friends, learn life lessons and values and make wonderful memories.

Name: EM STUDIOS, LLC
Description: An adult-based, drop-in style dance studio and the first of its kind for Central PA. This studio offers choreography classes of all styles and levels, as well as dance fitness classes for anybody!

Name: Inspire Dance Academy TN
Description: Inspire Dance Academy is a premier dance studio located in Shelbyville, TN offering a variety of dance classes in a new state-of-the-art dance studio. Inspire Dance Academy (IDA) features some of the best dance instructors experienced in all dance genres such as tap, ballet, hip hop, tumbling, lyrical dance, contemporary dance, jazz funk, acro and musical theater.

Name: Let's Dance Academy
Description: We opened our doors in 2014. Active in Alanya. We aimed for a fun and permanent social environment. We wanted everyone to be able to dance and everyone to look at life from this window. Our steps grew day by day. The rhythm of the music combined with the magic of dance. For nine years, we have reached and continue to reach young people with young hearts. Our school is located in the center of Alanya.

Name: Hindustan Arts Academy
Description:
We get so many questions about how we teach dance! Well, dance, Bollywood, classical and India, are our pillars of passion in life 

With life getting busy we felt as if we were losing touch 

Hence, using our passion and turning that into joining with and building our community of desi dancers who love to swing, jump, swoosh and sing around!

Name: Noraik Armenian Dance Ensemble
Description: The first and only Armenian folk dance studio in Ottawa, Canada. Founded 2019

Name: LoveDance
Description:
Looking for a fun and welcoming space to dance, meet new people, and enjoy great music? Welcome to LoveDance! 

Hi! we're Han, Kim & Caitlin - the owners & instructors, and LoveDance is a community we are so proud of <3 We've designed the class to be inclusive so it truly is a class for all levels, whether you’re an experienced dancer, returning after some time off, or brand new to the dance floor. The session includes a cardio warm-up, stretching for flexibility, and strengthening for that all important core! The majority of the class is then spent learning choreography to a mix of current hits and classic tracks.

With variations for every ability, you can choose the level that works best for you. Come as you are, bring your energy, and enjoy an evening of movement and connection with a friendly group.

Name: Salsa Nepal
Description:
Salsa Dance Academy is THE pioneer institution in NEPAL for SALSA & Latin DANCE under Head-Instructor Binayek Das Shrestha. With 25 years of dance experience and 20 years of teaching experience domestic & international. We are making an effort to offer you various classes in different dance forms and a spectrum of activities related to dance.  You will find all the information regarding: new classes for Beginners, on going classes and events that we organize. The emphasis of our site is on providing all the  information  regSalsa Dance Academyarding our Academy’s various activities. In the meantime you can reach us at +977-9841277893 or +977-9803962935. We are looking forward to hearing from you. You can also contact us at our e-mail address: info@salsanepal.com If you are not familiar with SALSA DANCE ACADEMY and this is your first contact with us online, we would be pleased to hear from you! Please let us know what your needs and questions are and we will be more than happy to help. In brief, you should know the following about us: Salsa Dance Academy was established in 2004 (Baber Mahal Revisited) & from 2007 in Bhatbhateni  and now at Baluwatar has been conducting SALSA, Kizomba, Bachata, Merengue. Our specialty is in SALSA & Latin Dances. We are located at Baluwatar, near Russian Embassy & Lakuri Cafe.

Our dance school’s activities and events have proven to draw significant numbers of participants and contributed to the quality of dance as a hobby and profession in the country. Salsa Dance Academy has performed in different parts of the country and internationally on various occasions and has earned endless glory and pride and has been highly acclaimed and appreciated by audience and the organizers.

Name: Asociatia Tango Malena
Description: Tango Malena este o școală de tango argentinian condusă de creativitate și spontaneitate, ceea ce înseamnă că odată ce te-ai alăturat cursurilor noastre, vei avea parte de o varietate de experiențe.

Name: Double Impro
Description: Dance Company based in Belgium

Name: Mersy G. Dance Company
Description: Mersy G. Dance Company was founded by Mersally Avendano in 2019. The company is committed to providing high-quality dance education and making the art of dance accessible to schools and communities. Mersy G. Dance Company is a reflection of Mersally’s mission to enhance  lives, celebrate diverse cultures, and create community engagement through dance.

Name: Eulogia's Studio
Description: Eulogia's Studio is an upcoming Music Entertainment Academy providing concentrated training in the various styles of dance and other performance skills. We strive to support talented individuals, launching their careers within the Music Industry.

Name: High Voltage Dance Company
Description: Offering recreational and competitive dance instruction for all ages!

Name: SM Dance Company
Description: We organize dance festivals and operate a Latin dance school.

Name: LLMoves
Description: LLMoves creates dance experiences for stage, film, events, and fashion/art installations

Name: Compagnie Anita Reix / iNNER PROJECT
Description: Prochaine résidence et première création prévues pour Juillet 2025.

Name: cobeat
Description:
cobeat is based in London and is home to a variety of Bollywood dance classes for adults. We believe in the transformative power of dance and through our dynamic Bollywood dance classes we hope to show you just how much dance can do for your body and mind. 

We're not just about moves – we're a community in London, a place where the magic of dance and movement brings us all together. Come and join us!

Name: Elevate Dance Studio
Description: At Elevate Dance Studio, our dedicated team ensures your child receives the attention needed to succeed in the art of dance. Our mission is to encourage and promote children's development through the joy of dancing. Join us for classes in ballet, creative dance, and family/mommy and me, where children grow in confidence, self-discipline, and respect while cultivating a passion for dance. We also offer adult workout classes (PiYo, TONE, Pound, ReFit) and studio rentals for parties, private lessons, and events. Join us today at Elevate Dance Studio!

Name: Natya Nithi
Description: I teach Bharatanatyam to students of all ages in Saginaw Michigan. Student perform self-choreographed songs in prestigious festivals, competitions, and cultural programs, showcasing traditional Bharatanatyam with creativity and discipline

Name: kuhl x scharf
Description: kuhl x scharf creates opportunities for artists from the European continent through an inventive approach to funding, commissioning, collaborating, and gathering. Our common values are deeply grounded upon respect, a sense of sharing and connecting, listening to others and yourself, while enjoying freedom and passion. We believe in human relationships and collaborations. Our main goal is to promote and share creative projects for dancers and performers in Europe, as a catalyst for social and progressive ideas. We aim to create a bridge between European and Mediterranean cultures, East and West, South and North. Extending and enlarging our perceptions beyond the sole Western European mindset. Dance and performative arts are anchored in our cultural environment, as a way of being, creating a safe space for self-expression, togetherness and trust.

Name: Pattis Akademi AB
Description:
Pattis Akademi AB är en etablerad dansskola som erbjuder strukturerade och åldersanpassade dansklasser för barn och unga, med fokus på teknik, dansglädje och personlig utveckling. Med engagerade lärare och fulla grupper varje termin skapar vi trygga miljöer där elever växer både artistiskt och socialt.
Utöver vår ordinarie verksamhet erbjuder vi även dans för företagsevent, födelsedagar, bröllop, möhippor/svensexor samt privata lektioner. Kontakta oss gärna så hjälper vi dig att hitta ett upplägg som passar.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pattisakademi?igsh=aDd1MTNqcG4wZndt

Tik Tok: https://www.tiktok.com/@pattisakademisweden?_r=1&_t=ZN-92GdXIimRza

Name: Dance Domain
Description:
Whether you’re 6, 16 or 86, we offer inspiring and uplifting classes that boost confidence, promote diversity, and instill a lifelong love of learning. 

If you’re looking for Inner West dance classes that will inspire and encourage, then look no further. Situated in an uber-cool semi-industrial estate in St Peters, we have a strong sense of community and know what our students love – freedom to move, a space to create, and connection with a group of like-minded individuals.

Come and join the DD community! With dance classes for babies, toddlers, primary school kids, highschoolers, and adults, there’s something for everyone.

Name: Thriver Company
Description:
Thriver Company, a dance studio in Tillsonburg, Ontario, was founded first in 1996 by its then studio director, Angela Farkas, under the name "Danscene."  
 
In 2022, long-time students of Miss Angie, Renée Pelland and Élyse Pelland acquired Danscene, inspired to carry on the legacy of a dance studio that has shaped well-rounded dancers and people for 25 years and counting.

Under a new brand and new ownership, Thriver Co. now offers a variety of dance, fitness and wellness programs designed for all skill-levels and age groups. Whether our students arrive with years of experience, or they’re simply looking to try something new, our spaces are places for all to discover the joys of movement and to thrive to their fullest.

Visit our website to learn more: thriverco.ca

Name: F2 Dance Company
Description:
F2 Dance Company is al ZEVEN jaar een begrip in regio Oldambt. F2 staat voor Frank Ferdinand, de eigenaar en oprichter van F2DC. Na een aantal jaren werken als dans docent op verschillende dansscholen heeft Frank F2DC opgestart met als doel, het creëren van een thuis voor iedereen met een passie voor dans en waar iedereen zichzelf kan en mag zijn. F2DC is nu inmiddels 8 jaar een veilige thuishaven voor iedereen met een passie voor dans, een ware F2DC Family!

 

F2 Dance Company profileert zich als DE SHOWdansschool van het Noorden, dit bewerkstelligen zij door de vele succesvolle shows en optredens die zij jaarlijks geven. Daarnaast werken ze hard aan kunst en cultuur educatie op basisscholen, hierin werken zij samen met het project Tijd voor Toekomst. 



F2DC streeft ernaar om het talent uit iedere leerling naar boven te halen, te ontwikkelen en hiermee onze leerlingen plezier te laten beleven in het beoefenen van uitvoerende kunsten als ballet, dans, theater en musical. Maar naast het plezier en talent richt F2DC zich ook op het individu en besteedt  tijdens de lessen aandacht aan het ontwikkelen van de leerlingen op motorisch, sociaal, lichamelijk, muzikaal en persoonlijk vlak. We willen de kinderen, jeugd en de volwassenen inspireren, motiveren, leren en laten groeien. Vind je eigen identiteit door middel van uitvoerende kunsten. Elk dansseizoen is gevuld met optredens, een grote show, leuke activiteiten, onze jaarlijkse danskamp "F2DC Weekentrip" en dat allemaal voor zowel recreatieve als selectie dansers.

Bij F2DC is er volle aandacht voor alle dansers!



F2DC kiest voor kwaliteit, passie en plezier en werkt daarom enkel met HBO & MBO opgeleide dansdocenten, die als dansspecialist zijn afgestudeerd. Hiermee onderscheidt F2DC zich van andere dansscholen uit de regio, een docententeam met ervaring, kennis, passie en kwaliteit. Daarnaast zijn wij van plan om intern dansdocenten te gaan opleiden naar het F2DC standaard.

Name: KOU Dans Kulübü
Description: Kocaeli Üniversitesi Dans Kulübü

Name: Pura Salsa Pty Ltd
Description: Sydney's First Salsa Calena Studio

Name: Syren Studios
Description:
At Syren Studios, Jennifer and her team are dedicated to fostering a vibrant and supportive community where dancers can explore their full potential and build confidence.

Our diverse class offerings—Heels Beginner, Heels Intermediate, Heels Tease/Seduction, and Bare/Sneakers—are designed to enhance your technique, expressive movement, and self-assurance.

We’re committed to creating a safe, welcoming space where you can connect with others, discover your alter ego, and awaken your inner strength and sensuality through transformative dance experiences.

Join us at Syren Studios to be part of a supportive community that empowers you to shine both in and out of the studio.

Name: SS Education & Entertainment
Description: Certified and Insured dance, music, art, fitness, and sport education for all ages, abilities, and skill levels in the form of workshops, programs, and entertainment bookings. We provide professional educational and entertainment services to daycares, schools, fitness centres, and community centres across Manitoba. Formerly known as Difinity Dance Studio & Productions, we held a 5 star BBB rating, and a 4.8 Facebook and Google rating.

Name: TREASURE BOX STUDIOS
Description: TREASURE BOX STUDIOS is a non profit dance organization based out of Waipahu, HI.

Name: Baila tu Boda
Description:
Somos un equipo donde asesoramos,diseñamos, creamos y soñamos con los novios para hacer el baile de sus sueños. 

Lo más importante para nosotros, que se sientan cómodos y disfruten del momento.

Name: Crimson Yeoja
Description: We are Crimson Yeoja Official. An award-winning Kpop dance cover group established in 2016. Celebrating the vibrant culture of Kpop, we are proud winners of the Kpop World Festival 2022 and Kpop Cover Dance Contest 2018. Follow us for exhilarating performances and exclusive behind-the-scenes content!

Name: Band Baaja Dance
Description:
BBD is a Delhi-based Wedding Choreography company that specialises in Sangeet and Wedding Choreography, Virtual Classes, Workshops, Corporate and School Events and Personal Training.
The founders of BBD, Sidharth Banswal and Manka Rangar have been in the industry for 10 years and are well-known for their splendid moves. After conducting various events, workshops and training sessions in both UK and India, they decided to put their heart and effort into curating creative and unique dance moves loved by all.
Their hard work and dedication leaves clients with smiles, satisfaction and the joy of celebration.

Name: Dance Bollywood Toronto
Description:
At Dance Bollywood, it's not just about dance steps.
It’s about personal growth, self-expression, and discovering what you’re truly capable of.

Dance has always been more than movement for our founder, Reenee Khanna. It’s been a way to celebrate, to grieve, to reflect, and to reconnect. It’s how she’s processed emotions, stayed grounded, and sparked joy through every chapter of life. That deep, personal connection to dance is the heart behind this school.

We created Dance Bollywood to be more than just a studio. It’s a space for transformation.

Every class is designed to help you grow—not just as a dancer, but as a person.
We train hard and honor the rich tradition of Indian dance, blending technique and discipline with play, passion, and purpose.

Whether you're stepping into the studio for the first time or returning to a lifelong passion, this is a place where you can be fully yourself.
A place where you can show up as you are, move your body freely, and meet your own potential.

We offer a supportive, judgment-free space rooted in culture and community. Here, it’s safe to be seen, to make mistakes, to shine. Our classes are grounded in classical and folk Indian styles—drawing on years of professional experience and training under legends like Madhumati and Saroj Khan in Mumbai.

But what makes us different is what happens beyond the choreography.

Dance Bollywood is where confidence is built, creativity is unlocked, friendships are formed, and joy is shared.

This is more than a dance school.
It’s a movement—for self-discovery, for expression, for growth.

Move your body. Meet your potential.
Join us.

Julia's Dance Academy
