Name: COOL STEPS DANCE STUDIO
Description: Welcome to COOL STEPS DANCE STUDIO! Where passion meets precision, and every step is a leap towards excellence. Join us to groove, learn, and shine!

Name: Fun 4 Over 50's UK
Description:
Fun 4 Over 50’s was created to reach a wider audience of individuals over 50 years of age. Our aim is to expand our activities across London and UK to increase the number of individuals experiencing the numerous benefits provided by these sessions.

We work closely with local authorities to provide subsidised or cost-free activities for communities; improving their sense of belonging, building bridges and relationships and change the lives of those experiencing loneliness and social isolation.

We also offer a range of services for private clients, organisations and corporation. 

We are passionate about what we do. We are proud of our services. We care about our people and do what we do from the heart.

Name: Primal Prancing
Description:
Dance fitness with simple choreography & playful prompts
 Attend classes & DIY
 CO & online

Name: South Bay Fusion
Description:
South Bay Fusion is the SF Bay Area's original weekly Blues/Fusion dance.

We strive to nurture a safe and welcoming consent-based dance community.

Name: Allegiant Dance Crew
Description: Based out of Utah, our mission is to empower and bring dance to new and current underrepresented dance students (especially those in low income communities) through unity, culture, family, inclusion, growth mindset, and an enjoyable experience. We provide a safe space for training, practice, exploration, self-expression, and growth to dancers who were turned away from collegiate and/or professional dance teams, and for dancers to feel comfortable and confident in their own bodies.

Name: The Collective TN
Description:
The Dance Collective is a family-owned dance studio in Franklin, TN, offering high-quality instruction in a welcoming, community-focused environment.
We provide dance education that helps students grow in confidence, skill, and character — all within a well-run business built on strong financials, clear communication, and care for every family.

Name: Create Movement Collective LLC
Description: We offer a safe place for students of all ages to explore and express themselves while learning classical dance technique and exercise.

Name: Vault Dance Studio
Description: Vault Dance Studio is a ballroom dance studio located in Eugene, Oregon, committed to helping people of all ages discover the joy of dance and unlock their inner confidence. At Vault, we believe dance is more than steps: it's a mindset.

Name: Bangalore Tango Academy
Description: At Bangalore Tango Academy we offer offline n online Tango dance classes, private lessons, corporate classes and choreography. Our focus is great technique while having fun.

Name: Moving Arts
Description:
Moving Arts originated in Kansas City, under the name of the Kansas City Dance Festival in 2013. It was founded by Anthony Krutzkamp, Logan Pachciarz, and Jill Marlow Krutzkamp. This powerhouse of a team felt the need to employ performing artists in the summer months, a time during the year when dance performance is typically null. Anthony and Logan worked tirelessly to hire innovative choreographers, challenging the minds and souls of both the artists and the community. In turn, KCDF expanded the dance culture and scene in Kansas City, forming a reputation as an event not to miss. It did not take long for Kansas City Dance Festival to get on the national and international map for great dance.  Pointe Magazine featured Kansas City Dance Festival not once but twice in their summer issues. Dancers and choreographers from around the world sought employment opportunities with our summer dance residency.

KCDF continued to grow each year by offering educational resources such as master classes, dance forums/open rehearsals, and intimate black box performances leading up to the main event. This allowed the opportunity to dive in and become more involved in the dance community. In 2015, The  Kansas City Star wrote:

 

“The festival, now in its third year, is more of an artist residency than a full-blown festival, but quality over quantity is appreciated. The enthusiastic audience was certainly engaged.”

-The Kansas City Star

 

KCDF is excited to continue their expansion by bringing the cutting edge performance created in Kansas City to different residencies.  In 2017, KCDF expanded their co-artistic team. Cervilio Amador, Ballet Master and past Principal Dancer with Cincinnati Ballet, joined forces with Anthony and Logan. With the main goal to build Cincinnati’s trust, commitment, and donor support at the forefront, it enabled KCDF to tour the performance to Cincinnati under the name of Moving Arts Cincinnati. This idea worked and it came to full fruition when we knock

Name: Mabuhay Performing Arts Group of Alabama, LLC
Description:
The Mabuhay Performing Arts Group of Alabama LLC, based in Huntsville, Alabama, is a nonprofit organization dedicated to showcasing the rich cultural heritage of the Philippines through dance, music, food, and fashion. We are deeply honored to share the beauty, grace, and vibrant spirit of the Philippines with communities across the United States. We aim to create a bridge between cultures and keep the Philippine cultural heritage alive through the cultivation of the future generation of dancers. With dancers of all ages, we strive to foster a climate conducive to a long-lasting and supportive community. 

Please Connect with Us via:
Email: MPAGAconnect@gmail.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/mabuhayperformingartsofalabama

Name: YesPower Dance
Description:
YesPower Dance 
Empowerment dancing - Powerdancegroups - men groups - women groups - mixed groups -dance holidays - retreats - dance days, dance weekends, danceweeks.

In the YesPowerDancegroups, you will rediscover yourself through music, tune-in, movement, contact, experience, surrender, gratitude, and saying yes to what there is. Everybody goes through processes. We will follow what there is for that moment.

Name: Kuttamath Dance
Description:
Kuttamath Dance is a Hyderabad based dance company founded in 2020, by Anjana Kuttamath, with a vision to connect people and spread the love for dance across borders.She have inspired millions of Dancers as well as non dancers  worldwide to dance her diverse choreographs on Indian traditional dance.

We teach traditional dance as well as different forms ranging from Tollywood and Semiclassical to mass, folk. To Keep up with the distance, the mode of teaching switched from on-ground workshops to online ones.

We are Beginners but Made a great impact on the south of India with different dance styles and putting a brand mark on semiclassical as well as lyrical choreographies.

Name: NAIAS COMPAÑÍA
Description: Compañía dedicada a la creación e interpretación de obras dancísticas desde una perspectiva muy femenina tomando como principal inspiración vivencias propias y emociones cotidianas; explorando las técnicas de la danza tribal, el ballet y la danza contemporánea. Un espacio para el desarrollo libre y artístico de mujeres artistas.

Name: S&M Dance
Description: Social, competitive, group and private ballroom dance classes in Temecula and Oceanside, for all ages

Name: Bachata Studio Tallinn
Description:
Bachata Studio Tallinn is Tallinn's premier destination for authentic Latin dance training and vibrant social connection. Our mission is to share the joy, rhythm, and rich culture of partner dancing, transforming absolute beginners into confident, skilled social dancers. We believe dance is for everyone and are dedicated to building a welcoming, inclusive community right here in Estonia's capital.

We offer a comprehensive curriculum designed for dancers of all levels—from those taking their very first steps to intermediate and advanced dancers looking to refine their technique. While we specialize in Bachata, our offerings also include structured lessons and workshops in popular styles like Salsa, Kizomba, and Zouk. Our classes cover fundamentals, partner work, styling, and body movement, ensuring you gain a well-rounded skill set. Beyond structured lessons, we host regular social parties where you can practice your moves, connect with the local dance scene, and enjoy the true spirit of the dance.

Learning with us is more than just memorizing steps; it's about building confidence, connection, and rhythm. Our experienced instructors focus on clear technique, effective lead/follow skills, and musicality, helping you become comfortable and expressive on any global dance floor. If you're looking for a fun new hobby, a way to expand your social circle, or a serious path to dance mastery, Bachata Studio Tallinn is where your journey begins.

Name: Quick Step Dance Studio
Description:
Located in the heart of Bucharest, our dance school brings passion, elegance, and rhythm to every step. We specialize in personalized private classes for both couples and singles, while also offering engaging group sessions for those who love to learn in a vibrant, social atmosphere.

Our dedicated instructors guide students through a wide variety of styles, including Latin, Ballroom, Latin Caribbean, and Wedding dances, helping each dancer discover confidence, joy, and connection on the dance floor.

Whether you are preparing for a special occasion, looking to share a unique hobby with your partner, or simply want to move, express, and have fun, our school is here to create unforgettable experiences through dance.

 Step into the rhythm. Dance from the heart.

Name: Avalon Dance Productions
Description: Avalon Dance Productions is a Ballroom Dance studio that is based out of 173 Belmont St, Belmont, Massachusetts, United States.

Name: Crystal River Ballet
Description:
The mission of CRBS is to educate students of all ages in the art of dance and nurture and grow the dancer in mind, body and spirit by deepening the connection to ourselves, to each other, and to the world around us through dance.
We foster a sense of accomplishment through steady, continuous training and performance by providing proven, safe, age-appropriate curriculums. 
We aim to communicate clearly with parents and students. We are a community-based, educational organization dedicated to fostering creativity, self-expression and personal growth to students of all ages.

Name: MKH Dabke & Middle Eastern Dance Entertainment
Description:
We bring the beauty & power of Middle Eastern dance and music to stages, festivals, universities, and cultural events across the U.S. 

Led by Michael “Misho” Kahwajy-Hyland — elite dancer, choreographer, producer, and cultural ambassador — our performances blend tradition with energy and top talent, creating unforgettable experiences that celebrate, uplift, and connect audiences of all backgrounds.

From high-impact Dabke/dance shows to immersive workshops and keynote-style experiences, MKH Dabke Entertainment is on a mission to uplift culture, inspire communities, and reawaken the human spirit in all of us through rhythm and movement.

Book us for performances, workshops, or speaking engagements, and let’s create something extraordinary together.

Name: The Triplestep
Description: Hosts of workshops, social dances, and learning experiences focused on dancing to the Blues in Northern CO

Name: Matt Hernandez Dance Co.
Description: I started Matt Hernandez Dance Co. with one central concept in mind - SOCIAL DANCING. I want to build & empower students to take their first steps into learning such an elegant & structured dance. Social dancing is being more concerned with ‘participation’ rather than ‘performance’ and ultimately boils down to that connection between leader and follower.

Name: Slow pace Dance Academy
Description: Slow Pace is a fusion dance academy organization that aims to provide training to the students based on their skills and learn various new techniques of dance forms.

Name: TRACESIGHT : Traditional Dance of Sixty Eight
Step In2 Afro LTD
Description:
Step In2 Afro makes Afro Dance accessible to everyone – whether you’re taking your very first step or refining your skills as a pro.

We offer high-energy Afro Dance classes and training rooted in authentic African movement, powered by the Afrobeats and other African music genres. Our sessions are designed to be fun, fitness-focused, and culturally enriching, helping you sweat, smile, and grow in a supportive community.

From pop-up classes to structured training programs, Step In2 Afro is the space where you can:

- Learn authentic Afro Dance techniques
- Build fitness and confidence
- Connect with dancers from all walks of life
- Celebrate African culture through music and movement

 Based in East London, connecting dancers worldwide
 Join the journey – Your Afro Dance journey starts (and grows) here.

Name: Dance With Sarah Powell (DWSP)
Description:
Dance With Sarah Powell (DWSP) is a creative platform dedicated to advancing Afro dance as a global art form for education, empowerment, and cultural representation.

Founded by professional Afro Dance artist Sarah Powell, DWSP offers workshops, performances, and motivational experiences that use Afro dance as a tool for confidence, purpose, and personal transformation.

Through live and digital experiences, DWSP connects dancers and audiences worldwide to the power of Afro dance — not only as movement, but as a pathway to fulfillment, identity, and joy.

What We Do: Afro Dance Instruction | Digital Product Development | Personal Development Through Movement | Events & Workshops

Name: SD DANCE AND FITNESS HUB
Description:
Welcome to SD Dance and Fitness Hub, Pune's premier destination for dance enthusiasts of all levels! At SD Dance and Fitness Hub, we pride ourselves on delivering top-notch dance education and experiences in a vibrant and supportive environment.

Our dynamic offerings include expert-led classes in Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba, Zumba, Bollywood, and Hip Hop. Whether you're a beginner eager to discover your rhythm or an experienced dancer looking to refine your skills, our diverse range of classes ensures there’s something for everyone. Our passionate instructors are committed to providing personalized attention and fostering a love for dance in every student.

In addition to our exceptional dance classes, we offer a comprehensive suite of services including professional dance trainers, talented choreographers, and skilled dancers. Our team is dedicated to creating memorable experiences, from private lessons and group workshops to bespoke choreography for events.

At SD Dance and Fitness Hub, we believe in the power of dance to inspire, connect, and transform. Join us today and be part of a community where creativity and passion flourish. Whether you're here to dance, learn, or perform, we're here to make every step of your journey exciting and rewarding. Let’s move, groove, and shine together!

Name: Cadillac Rockers
Description: Cadillac Rockers is a performing arts company based out of CBD, Murwillumbah, Australia.

Name: Balettskolan Vackra Rosen
Description: Balettskolan Vackra Rosen undervisar i redskapsbalett – en unik dansform som kombinerar klassisk balett med rytmisk gymnastik och redskap som band, bollar och rockringar. Vi är ensamma i världen om att erbjuda denna inriktning. Vår verksamhet riktar sig till barn och unga mellan 3–25 år och fokuserar på rörelseglädje, rytmkänsla och personlig uttrycksförmåga – oavsett förutsättningar.

Name: Chella Natyalaya
Description:
Chella Natyalaya | Nurturing devotion, discipline & confidence through Bharatanatyam in Sweden & worldwide 

Chella Natyalaya is a registered Bharatanatyam dance school in Gothenburg, Sweden – the first of its kind to bring the timeless beauty of this classical Indian art form into the heart of Scandinavia.

At Chella Natyalaya, we believe dance is more than movement. It is devotion, discipline, expression, and confidence. Through structured courses — from Foundation to Advanced levels — children are guided step by step in their artistic journey.

 What we offer:

Structured Learning Path: Foundation → Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced → Arangetram

Cultural Milestones: Salangai Pooja, thematic productions, open-house showcases

Holistic Approach: Focus on rhythm, slokas, stories, and the deeper philosophy of Bharatanatyam

Community & Global Reach: Classes in Sweden and worldwide through digital platforms

 Our mission is to make Bharatanatyam accessible to every child who wishes to connect with tradition while gaining confidence, discipline, and joy in the process.

 Little Feet, Big Dreams – shaping the next generation of dancers with grace, culture, and purpose.

Name: Dance-topia
Description:
Welcome to Dancetopia, your ultimate sanctuary for dance and mental well-being in Portsmouth, UK. At Dancetopia, we believe that dance goes beyond just steps and routines—it's a journey towards self-discovery and inner harmony.

Our dance classes are designed not only to teach you the art of dance but also to promote mental wellness and personal growth. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced dancer, our passionate and skilled instructors will guide you on this enchanting dance adventure.

Join us at Dancetopia and experience the uplifting power of dance, as it nurtures your body, mind, and soul. Embrace the rhythm, embrace the joy, and embrace a better you. Let's dance our way to a happier, healthier life together.

Name: Apurva Ragas
Description: Our classes focus on building confidence, technique, and creativity...

Name: Kinergie Studio
Description:
Kinergie Studio là một studio múa được đồng sáng lập bởi Nghệ Sỹ Múa Đỗ Hoàng Thi Ngọc và Long Sleepy. Kinergie Studio được thành lập với mong muốn đưa nghệ thuật Múa Đương Đại và Ballet đến gần hơn với cộng đồng thông qua việc giảng dạy và các dự án biểu diễn nghệ thuật. Tại Kinergie Studio, mọi người được trải nghiệm một không gian nghệ thuật thực sự, được giao lưu, học hỏi và chia sẻ niềm đam mê. Bên cạnh việc tạo ra một sân chơi nghệ thuật, Kinergie Studio còn là một không gian nuôi dưỡng tài năng cho các nghệ sỹ trẻ với những dự án, hướng đi nghệ thuật mới mẻ và táo bạo.

Kinergie Studio is a dance studio co-founded by Dancer/Choreographer Do Hoang Thi Ngoc and Long Sleepy. Kinergie Studio was established in hope of bringing Performing Arts, especially Contemporary Dance and Ballet, closer to the community via Dance Education and Productions. At Kinergie Studio, you can experience a true artistic space, exchange dancing experiences, learn new things and share your passion. Beside creating a play-field for the Arts, Kinergie Studio is also a nurturing space for young artists with creative and daring projects and an artistic vision.

Name: DANCE SAVES LIVES
Description: Bone crunching moves, artistic flavour and a real sense of dancing sums up Ricardo Koopman. Many years ago, Ricardo danced his way into the world in the heart of a fishing village called Hout Bay. From the age of four, Koopman has been practicing classical ballet, but who knew he would go on to be the country’s knight in shining armour of the dancing world.“My passion is to dance, but I realised that it was not enough to just dance, but to share this God given gift with all children,” says Koopman.

Description: CO:LAB CREW is a project open style choreography dance team at U-M, established Fall 2025. Follow us on Instagram (@co.labcrew) for content and updates!

Name: Zespół Pieśni i Tańca Lublin im. Wandy Kaniorowej
LatinXcitement
Description:
Ik geloof dat dansen niet alleen gaat om passen en draaien—het gaat om plezier, zelfvertrouwen en verbinding. Of je nu nog nooit een stap hebt gezet of al wat ervaring hebt: ik help je om de magie van dans zelf te ervaren.

Workshops: Energieke groepssessies (salsa, kizomba, bachata) die iedereen kan volgen, ongeacht je achtergrond.

Danslessen: Mix van structuur, techniek en persoonlijke begeleiding in wekelijkse lessen of privétraining.

Bruiloftchoreografie: Een onvergetelijke openingsdans op jullie speciale dag, van idee tot uitvoering.

Privélessen: Op maat gemaakte begeleiding om snel vooruitgang te boeken, zelfs als je weinig tijd hebt.

Door persoonlijke aandacht en een heldere aanpak zorg ik ervoor dat je met vertrouwen op de dansvloer staat—en vooral met een grote glimlach. Ik laat je graag ervaren hoe leuk en laagdrempelig dansen kan zijn!

Name: Street Kings Studio
Description:
Street Kings is Canada’s original hip hop dance studio for kids who want to learn the art of freestyle and battle. Founded in 2013, we believe in celebrating individuality—turning what makes you different into your superpower!

Our studio specializes in high level street dance techniques, focusing on freestyle and improv to build confidence, creativity, and self-expression. Dancers of all ages and skill levels, from beginners to advanced, are welcome to develop their technique, explore their creativity, and perform at a high level.

We have a location in North Burnaby and Langley! 

Message us to schedule a free trial.

Les Belles Danseuses
Description: The perfect performance for your cabaret tents at festivals and any other smaller gigs/parties! We're based around the Norfolk/Norwich area but are willing to travel if possible, feel free to contact us by email for more information: lesbellesdanseuses@gmail.com

Description: Het doel van Stichting "Drenthe Danst", is om het dansen voor jong en oud te promoten in noordoost Nederland met een maatschappelijk en sociaal karakter. Dit doen wij door het organiseren van workshops, danslessen en dansavonden in de omgeving van Drenthe. Via diverse gemeenten in Drenthe is het mogelijk een vergoeding krijgen voor het volgen van een dansprogramma voor Drenten met een kleine beurs. Daarnaast bieden wij een platform aan dansliefhebbers en dansdocenten.

Name: Energise Dance
Description: Energise Dance is an online dance club that offers dance tuition, community and more.  Our members have varying levels of dance skill and experience.

1st Dance Chicago
Description: With over 25 years of ballroom dance experience, and exceptional customized services to assist you in learning most efficiently, there is no other school in Chicago that can help you to achieve your goal more quickly than 1st Dance Chicago

Name: Ensemble Vocal les Airs sacrés
Description:
EVAS-BENIN, c’est comme une grande famille, qui partage des moments musicaux, de sport, de danse et des valeurs comme la rigueur, la complicité, l’amour, la fraternité et le partage.
Lors de la création du projet en 2016, l’objectif était de remédier aux problèmes de techniques vocales observés chez les choristes. Le but est d’offrir la possibilité aux personnes passionnées de chant d’entrer dans un ensemble professionnel. Cet ensemble aborde un vaste répertoire allant de la musique sacrée à l’interprétation de morceaux classiques et folkloriques béninois et africains.
Aujourd’hui c’est un ensemble de plus d’une vingtaine de personnes qui contribuent à l’émergence d’une nouvelle génération de musiciens capables de lire, écrire et enseigner la musique et de s’approprier des danses de nos différentes régions pour enrichir le patrimoine culturel béninois.
EVAS c’est l’adaptation des musiques sacrées et traditionnelles du Bénin dans une mise en scène moderne complète : chantée, exécutée et dansée.

Name: Dance LAB Creative
Description: Dance LAB is an artistic collective that aims to produce dance projects based on creative collaboration, vulnerable exploration, and the generation of innovative art. Libby Anne Bullinger is the collective's independent choreographer.

Name: My Dance Destiny
Description: Welcome to MDD: My Dance Destiny, where your passion for dance meets expert guidance! Led by industry veterans Mithun Madhu, who has trained dancers for the Dance World Cup, and Sujana K V, with over 200 reality TV show performances and collaborations with stars like Prabhu Deva and Sudeep. Our studio is a safe, fun space for all dancers—beginners to pros. Your Journey Starts here!

Name: Vision Dance Company
Description:
We are Miami University's most versatile dance company, offering a range of styles including ballet, jazz, lyrical, contemporary, hip-hop, tap, and musical theater. Our company comprises 24 dancers, each with a passion for building a community around dance.

Vision Dance Company was established in 2001, and this upcoming year marks our 25th Anniversary. We host one annual recital during the spring semester, where friends and families attend to watch the student-choreographed performances. Our 2026 show theme and dates will be released shortly.

We recently concluded auditions for the 2025-2026 Vision Dance Company. If you would like to learn more about our company, please follow our Instagram @vdcmiamioh or open the FAQ Sheet in our Linktree.

To keep up with us on our social media platforms:
Instagram: @vdcmiamioh
TikTok: @vdc_miamioh
YouTube: @visiondancecompany.miamioh

Name: J.S.R Dance Classes
Description: A dance is a series of movements — sometimes choreographed, but sometimes not — where the person moves in time to music. Rumba, tango, disco, swing, and ballet are all examples of types of dances. If you move in a rhythmic manner — especially to music — you can use the verb dance to explain your actions.

Name: King Dancing Inc.
Description:
Learn dance from teachers who dance themselves!

King Dancing Inc. aims to inspire and nurture you along your journey to dance excellence. Through creative movement and a welcoming space for exploration and growth, we know you will discover a world of fun, energy, and inspiration in dance. We believe in the transformative power of dance as a joyful experience and a wonderful art form.

By fostering creative movement, we help dancers explore their unique style and artistic voice, allowing them to express themselves fully. This approach nurtures their creativity, ensuring they grow not just in technique but also in personal expression.

We prioritize FUN as a core value because we believe dance should be a joyful, energizing experience. By focusing on fun in every class, we create a space where dancers feel free to enjoy the moment, making their learning journey more engaging and rewarding.

We prioritize creating a safe and inclusive space where dancers of all levels feel valued and supported. By providing a supportive space, we encourage exploration and personal growth, allowing each dancer to feel confident and comfortable in their own abilities.

Name: Elemental Dance Company
Description: A professional contemporary dance company in Las Vegas, Nevada. At Elemental Dance Company, our mission is to create a supportive environment for dancers to express themselves while giving back to the community through performances and charity shows that raise awareness of societal issues, such as mental health. Our goal is to promote the well-being of dancers by nurturing mind, body, and artistry, ensuring they achieve balance in all three areas.

Name: Podium voor dans
Description: Dansexpressie, jazzdans, body&jazz, aerobics. Demogroepen.

Name: Illest Illusionz
Description:
Illest Illusionz is a dynamic street dance crew based in Surrey, British Columbia, Canada, established in 2017. They are recognized for their high-energy performances and a distinctive blend of styles, including hip-hop, krump, waacking, and experimental street dance. The crew has made significant contributions to the West Coast dance scene and has connections extending to Japan.

Founded in Surrey, BC, Illest Illusionz has become a prominent force in the Canadian street dance community. Their performances are characterized by a fusion of storytelling, emotional expression, and technical prowess, often drawing inspiration from diverse sources such as anime and movie characters. This unique approach has allowed them to stand out in various competitions and showcases across North America.

Name: The SomaEssence Method
Description:
The SomaEssence Method is a dancer-centered training philosophy that blends somatic awareness, technical refinement, injury prevention, and wellness education to foster sustainable and empowered movement practices. Designed to support the longevity of a dancer’s career, this method encourages artists to train with intention, connect deeply to their bodies, and cultivate both strength and sensitivity.

Founded by Stephanie Rivera, M.S.Ed., M.A., The SomaEssence Method is the result of years of dance education, research, and lived experience. Whether in the studio, on stage, or in recovery, this method supports dancers at every phase of their journey—honoring the body as both instrument and storyteller.

Name: Baila Dance
Description:
Baila Dance è una scuola di danza che offre un'ampia varietà di corsi per tutte le età e livelli. Con anni di esperienza nell'insegnamento della danza, Baila Dance è diventato un punto di riferimento per coloro che desiderano migliorare le loro abilità di danza o semplicemente divertirsi.

I corsi offerti includono Danza Classica, Danza Moderna, Ginnastica Ritmica, Gioco Danza, Urban Dance, Hip Hop, Zumba e Pilates. Ciascuno di questi corsi è stato progettato per soddisfare le esigenze e gli obiettivi dei nostri studenti, che vanno dai principianti alle persone avanzate.

La Danza Classica è una forma di danza tradizionale che si concentra su tecnica, postura e eleganza. La Danza Moderna, d'altra parte, è una forma di danza contemporanea che combina elementi di danza classica e contemporanea per creare uno stile unico. La Ginnastica Ritmica è una combinazione di danza, ginnastica e acrobazie, mentre il Gioco Danza è un corso divertente e interattivo progettato per i più piccoli.

Per coloro che amano il ritmo e la musica, offriamo anche corsi di Urban Dance, Hip Hop e Zumba. Questi corsi sono perfetti per coloro che vogliono migliorare la loro capacità di movimento e di ritmo, o semplicemente divertirsi ballando. Inoltre, offriamo anche corsi di Pilates per migliorare la flessibilità, la forza e la postura.

Infine, per coloro che vogliono scoprire le danze caraibiche, offriamo corsi di Danze Caraibiche come Salsa, Bachata, Merengue e Reggaeton. questi corsi sono divertenti, interattivi e ti aiuteranno a migliorare la tua capacità di movimento e di ritmo.

In Baila Dance, il nostro obiettivo è quello di fornire un ambiente divertente e stimolante per imparare e migliorare la danza. Siamo orgogliosi di avere un team di insegnanti altamente qualificati e dedicati che lavorano con ogni studente per aiutarli a raggiungere i loro obiettivi. Se sei interessato a imparare a ballare o migliorare le tue abilità, non esitare a contattarci per iscriverti ai nostri corsi oggi!

L'évènement phare de Salsamas est "Les Pyramides" . Ayant lieu l’été, il s’agit du plus grand open-air Salsa gratuit de Suisse, d’Europe .. et du monde !

Salsamas c’est avant tout et pour tout une communauté de danseuses et danseurs. Une grande communauté avec en 2024 plus de 330 000 participants, tous animés par l’euphorie de la fougue cubaine. Alors vous aussi, rejoignez-nous !

Name: OnOne Salsa
Description:
Salsa OnOne was founded in January 2023 by Sara and Curro, two passionate dancers who wanted to share their love of salsa with others. 

We teach salsa in the Crossbody On1 style, with a focus on technique, body movement, musicality and confidence. But for us, it’s not just about steps or routines. It’s about the people in the room, the energy we create together, and the joy of dancing with others.

What We Offer:
We host regular Salsa classes for all levels every Monday and Tuesday in Edinburgh.

Our classes are small and personal, with around 25 students per class. This allows us to give individual attention, correct technique, and even dance with you during the session.

Mondays - Our more experimented dancers groups:
 18:00-19:00: Salsa Improvers (Stage 3)
 19:00-20:00: Salsa Advanced (Stage 5) - Invitation by instructor only.
 20:00-21:00: Salsa Intermediate (Stage 4)
 21:00-23:20: Social Dance - Practice the moves you’ve learned in class!
 Location: The Mash House, 37 Guthrie St, Edinburgh EH1 1JQ

Tuesdays - Our beginners groups: Good to start Dancing!
 18:15-19:15: Salsa Crossbody Foundations (Stage 1)- First Steps
 19:30-20:30: Salsa Cuban Rueda Casino (Stage 1 & 2) - First Steps
 20:45-21:45: Salsa Crossbody Beginners (Stage 2) - Next Steps
 Location: Assembly Checkpoint, 3 Bristo Pl, Edinburgh EH1 1EY

What you need to know:
No prior experience required: Perfect for Salsa Foundations (Stage 1).
No partner needed: Come alone or bring a friend, either way, you’ll have a great time!
Suitable for all genders and +18: Everyone is welcome!
Progressive structure: Each class builds on the previous one to help you improve steadily.

Give us a shout if you want more information:
Website: www.ononesalsa.com 
 Email: hello@ononesalsa.com
 Instagram: www.instagram.com/saraycurro.salseros
 Facebook: www.facebook.com/onone.saraycurro

Name: #instaballet
Description:
What happens when you combine professional dancers and a community audience? #instaballet. 

Formed by Eugene, Oregon based ballet dancers, Suzanne Haag and Antonio Anacan, #instaballet is a unique, interactive, fun way to experience ballet and other forms of dance. Since 2013, #instaballet has connected audiences with artists, creating pathways to access dance by bringing ballet out of the theatre and into the community. 

Our mission? We teach the use of creativity to empower the self and build community through the art of dance.

How do we do it? We include the audience in the creation of a dance by translating audience ideas into movement that is learned and performed by professional dancers. Zero pressure, 100% fun. Come create with us, it's your turn to make a move!

Name: ELEV8 Dance Company
Description: ELEV8 Dance Company is an audition-based hip-hop dance company founded in 2020 by Ariel Overton, Sussie Amponsah, and Alyssa Santiago in Richmond, Virginia. We provide training to our members while also offering open workshops and intensives for anyone of all dance skill levels. Our team actively performs at showcases, engages in community events, and competes. We are committed to fostering a vibrant and inclusive dance community, helping dancers develop their artistry, technique, performance skills, and individuality.

Name: Fit By Dancing
Description: Fit By Dancing é uma escola de danças de salão

Name: The Taylor School
Description: As the educational wing of the Paul Taylor Dance Foundation, the Taylor School is committed to providing high-quality dance education to students of all ages, from introductory classes to rigorous professional classes, from tiny tots to elders. Through a wide range of classes, formats, and activities, the school seeks to nurture, sustain, and advance the field of dance by sharing Paul Taylor’s rich repertory, fostering the talents of budding choreographers, and exposing students to a wide range of dance styles and techniques. As an American art form, modern dance has emerged from its inherent multiculturalism. The Taylor School embraces the rich history of the field while providing innovative dance education initiatives and seeks to produce the next generation of dancers, dance makers, dance audiences, and dance advocates.

Name: Komuna - קומונע
Description: Komuna is a social-cultural venture aimed to encourage young people to join Israeli folk dance and create a lively community through it. It is based in Jerusalem and Tel Aviv. There is a dance class every Sunday in Jerusalem and a dance class every Wednesday in Tel Aviv. We are teaching in Israel and abroad and we are having special events and social gatherings for the community members. The people who are part of the community are religious Jewish and secular Jewish, from age 18 till 40, new immigrants from all around the world, students and professionals.

Name: Dance Elements

"Dance training is life training." - Joe Tremaine

Name: Miniya's Dance Academy
Description:
Welcome to Miniya's Dance Academy, where we provide top-quality dance instruction for all ages and skill levels.
Our experienced instructors are passionate about helping you achieve your dance goals and have fun while doing it.
Located in the vibrant neighborhood of Malad East, we offer a variety of classes including ballet, jazz, hip hop, and more.
Our academy is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and our team is dedicated to creating a positive and inclusive learning environment.
Whether you're a beginner or an advanced dancer, we have something for everyone. Stop by and join our dance community today!

Name: DesiHop
Description:
DesiHop in Frankfurt was founded with the hope of building a safe platform for desi dancers to explore different dance styles in Europe. We focus on dancing to desi mixes and fuse it with international dance styles mainly Hiphop and Afro to gain international audience. 
So far, we have done 15+ workshops in different cities in Germany and 5+ events in two different cities. We are planning to host lots of events this year to promote the culture and integrate with the community here in Europe.

Description: Britt Olsen-Årnes

Name: All Dance RJ
Description:
Somos uma companhia de dança que nasceu oficialmente em janeiro de 2021. Agatha, Luísa e Lucas (ALL) são os sócios-fundadores da All Dance RJ, se conhecem desde pequenos e sempre dançaram juntos na escola onde estudaram.

“Criamos a All Dance com o propósito de levar a dança para todas as idades, corpos, tamanhos, gostos... nosso lema é Todo Mundo Dança!”, dizem Agatha, Luísa e Lucas.

Atualmente estamos com nossa sede no Clube Vila da Feira e atuamos no Instituto Braga Carneiro, ambos na Tijuca. Visamos nos expandir na Tijuca e futuramente atuar em mais bairros do RJ.

Name: babyballet Norfolk Central
Description:
Our babyballet preschool dance programme offers four stages of ballet classes, for young children aged 6 months to 6 years, plus a tap dancing class for children over 3 years. Taught by thousands of dance teachers across the world, the babyballet syllabus has been carefully developed by dance professionals to introduce your child to the magic of dance, whilst creating precious moments between you and your little star.

At babyballet Norfolk Central, we strive to create a fun, friendly and inclusive experience for everyone – no matter what your child’s age or ability. Not to mention, our classes are a great way for parents, carers and guardians to meet up and make new friends too!

For toddlers, pre-schoolers and school starters alike, babyballet classes at our venues in Hethersett, Cringleford, Barford and Mulbarton run Monday to Saturday. So if you live in the Norwich area, please take a look at our timetable – which is quick and easy to use when booking your three-week trial at babyballet.

Name: 4YOU STUDIO GmbH
Description: Dance school

Name: Viladanse
Description: Chez Viladanse, nous partageons notre passion pour la danse à travers des cours adaptés à tous. Basés à Bordeaux, nous offrons des services variés : cours à domicile, chorégraphies sur-mesure pour les ouvertures de bal, sessions spéciales pour les seniors, ou encore des moments uniques pour des EVJF. Notre objectif ? Rendre la danse accessible, enrichissante et joyeuse, tout en répondant aux besoins spécifiques de chacun.

Name: Cultivate Dance Project
Description:
We’re here to ignite the spark waiting inside every young dancer, blending high-energy fun, deep support, and a dedication to excellence. Our studio is a lively community buzzing with hip-hop beats, the grace of ballet, and the undulating groove of contemporary movement. We celebrate each child’s individuality, taking time to deeply know every dancer who walks through our doors, and encouraging them to work hard and bring their own style to the floor. 

Our dancers learn to navigate challenges with grace in a supportive, caring environment. We teach them to strive for excellence in everything they do. Our passionate teachers are more than just exceptional choreographers -- we are mentors, cheerleaders, and guides providing a safe and encouraging environment for kids to move, groove, and grow together. 

At Cultivate Dance Project, dance is about more than just steps and leaps—it’s a joyful discipline that influences every aspect of life. We don’t just teach dance; we build confidence, community, and courage. From our littlest twirlers to our top-tier competitive performers, every dancer finds their place in our vibrant family.

We’re a team of highly engaged and passionate instructors, choreographers, and mentors who believe every student who walks through the door comes with their own creative gifts. It’s our job to help our dancers explore what they have to offer. 

We’re here to unleash the power of dance to to help every dancer tap into their potential and shine, both on the dance floor and off. Offering classes in all genres, for all age and experience levels, we truly believe that dance is for everyone!

Name: SalsaDeRue
Description:
SalsaDeRue est une association dynamique dédiée à la promotion de la salsa et des danses latines, rassemblant une communauté passionnée autour de valeurs de partage, d’inclusion et de convivialité. Notre mission est de rendre la danse accessible à tous, qu’il s’agisse de débutants souhaitant découvrir cet art ou de danseurs confirmés cherchant à approfondir leur pratique.

À travers des cours réguliers, des ateliers spécifiques et des événements festifs comme des soirées, stages et festivals, nous offrons une expérience complète pour célébrer la richesse culturelle des danses latines. SalsaDeRue se distingue par son ambiance chaleureuse, une pédagogie de qualité et une organisation professionnelle, créant un espace où chacun peut évoluer, s’exprimer et tisser des liens. Nous sommes fiers de contribuer au rayonnement de la salsa en tant qu’art, passion et mode de vie.

OBJETIVOS ESPECÍFICOS

Name: Rise City Dance
Description:
Rise City Dance is a youth, pre-professional dance company in the heart of Atlanta. We exist to cultivate the innate artistry and passion that exists within every one of our dancers. We believe in the limitless potential that a quality dance education can provide, as it applies far beyond the studio and the stage. RCD imagines becoming a fixture in the Atlanta dance community, leading the next generation of artists, visionaries, and leaders.

Rise City Dance (RCD) is composed of various instruction levels starting at our Apprentice level, and going from Company levels 1 through 5, and a contemporary dance track called Unbound. RCD is made up of four key components: quality dance education, professional-level productions, and performance opportunities, community outreach programs, and summer intensive training to further technical development and provide experience choreographing. 

RCD’s dance education primarily focuses on a concert-dance track and within RCD we offer students the opportunity to study multiple disciplines of dance beyond ballet and contemporary including modern, musical theater, hip-hop, and jazz. 

Our goal each season is to offer our Rise City dancers quality performance opportunities and our programming the past few seasons includes our Spring Concert and our Holiday Spectacular at Georgia Tech’s Ferst Center for the Arts.

Name: Lara Danceworks
Description: Offering bespoke dance entertainment to add a little extra uniqueness to your event! Do you have an event coming up that requires entertainment? Lara Danceworks can create exactly what you want - be it Bollywood, Salsa, Musical Theatre or commercial, we've got you covered! Scared about your FIRST DANCE or just always dreamed of creating a super-special moment? We can choreograph a personalised dance for you as newlyweds that puts you at ease at your wedding and makes your first dance the dazzling spectacle it deserves to be! Get in touch now and let us share our passion with you and your guests!

Name: NANM, A Robenson Mathurin Dance Company
Description: NANM seeks to preserve and share Haitian culture while emphasizing Haiti’s significant contribution to Black and Latinx communities, as well as to the world, through the use of dance as a tool for expression and storytelling. Channeling the meaning of its name in Haitian Creole, soul, NANM critically engages themes of discrimination,  classism, immigration, and structural racism, and tasks its dancers with manifesting their own personal stories to connect their experiences to the themes that the company as a whole explores.  In 2022, NANM debuted as part of Haiti Cultural Exchange’s Lakou NOU Artist Residency Program, developing, executing, and presenting a year-long interrogation of the black Caribbean immigrant experience in Brooklyn, NY.  The project titled “Koulè M Idantite M” (My Skin, My Identity in English) invited black immigrant Crown Heights community members to engage in workshops and reflect on what it means to live, survive, and thrive in your own black skin.

Après une pause, l’association reprends ses activités en 2022, avec l'idée initiale de proposer des cours et des initiations auprès de publics novices ou débutant. 

C’est dans ce cadre amateur que des cours, des stages et présentation seront faites aux Forum des associations, à l'événement ”Courneuve Square”, dans les Maisons pour Tous, et à partir de 2023 à La Comète, Maison des pratiques Amateurs, les mercredis soirs.

Name: BLACBRIK
Description:
BlacBrik is a London-based dance-theatre company founded by choreographers Nahum McLean and Darius Drooh.
We create movement-driven stories that explore rhythm, identity, and human connection.

Our work fuses contemporary dance, funk, soul, and theatre to build worlds that feel raw, cinematic, and emotionally charged. From Don’t Step on My Shoes to new large-scale productions, BlacBrik is redefining what narrative dance can look and feel like on stage.

Beyond performance, we’re committed to education, collaboration, and community — using dance as a language for cultural exchange and creative innovation.

Name: Ladies With Flava
Description:
Fusion Dance Co. | Hip Hop & Latin Dance StylesTraining dancers from foundation to performance!Dallas, TX Community

Ladies With Flava is a dynamic dance company dedicated to cultivating Hip Hop and Latin dance culture through education, collaboration, and performance. We empower dancers of all levels by offering high-energy dance classes, engaging workshops, and community-driven programs that blend movement with Social-Emotional Learning (SEL).

Our mission is to create an inclusive space where artists can connect, grow, and express themselves authentically. Through performances, cultural events, and specialized dance programs, we honor the roots of street and Latin dance while pushing creative boundaries.

We collaborate with schools, organizations, and community leaders to bring dance education to diverse spaces, ensuring that movement remains a powerful tool for self-expression, confidence, and healing. Whether you're looking to train, perform, or simply vibe with a community that celebrates authenticity and passion—Ladies With Flava welcomes you!

Let’s build, move, and inspire together.

Name: Harmony Dance

Name: STEYsha School Of Irish Dance
Description:
STEYsha School of Irish Dance is the only Irish dance school in Romania, founded in 2011 by Mara CERNAT, TCRG - the only Romanian Irish dance teacher certified by the Dublin Irish Dance Commission, CLRG (www.clrg.ie).

STEYsha dancers have a rich history of participation in international Irish dance competitions up to World Championship level. Our record includes over 3,400 awards won at Irish dance competitions (feiseanna and Oireachtas). We have qualified for the 2022 (2 dancers), 2023 (3 dancers) and 2024 (3 dancers) World Irish Dance Championships. We participated in the World Championships in 2022 (Belfast, Northern Ireland) and 2024 (Glasgow, Scotland).

We also support performances at private and public events, festivals, TV appearances, corporate, business, and diplomatic events. In 2023 we staged the first Irish dance show with live music in Romania, Steps of Ireland. 

We teach modern and traditional Irish dance classes - we are 100% dedicated to this style - and classes are for children over 6 years old, teenagers and adults (upper age limit is not imposed).

We train our dancers for high-level competitive performance. At the same time, our students also learn and prepare for participation in Irish dance performances and shows. We also encourage, of course, participation in dance classes for the sheer enjoyment of movement, for the pastime

STEYsha School of Irish Dance is the soul of Irish dance in Romania thanks to the ideal combination of passion, desire, action, and quality of movement, and our dancers will also have contact with other facets of Irish culture: music (Irish music classes), language, history, legends, art, etc.

We have also won Silver in the Mega Crew Division, Indian Hip-Hop Championship 2016, collaborating with Synergy Dance Club of NIT Rourkela.

Name: Bbounce - Dance Studio
Description:
Bbounce Dance Studio has been committed to teaching dance since its establishment in 2012. Our founder, professional choreographer Raj Chiranth, set out to elevate his students' skills to the next level and has since cultivated a team of dedicated passionate professionals who share his vision.

Our studio offers a diverse range of dance sessions, including Bollywood, Hip Hop, Popping,     Freestyle , Dance fitness Zumba. We strive to provide our students with the highest quality of teaching and service to ensure they have the best learning experience possible.

If you're looking for an exceptional dance studio, we invite you to come and experience Bbounce with a free trial session.

Name: Estúdio PB - Academia de Dança
Description:
O ESTÚDIO PB - Academia de Dança, foi criado e tem direção da Professora Paula Barata, formada e certificada no mundo da dança, e com mais de 10 anos de experiência de ensino.
Estamos localizados em Vilar de Pinheiro, desde setembro de 2023.
Dedicamo-nos ao ensino certificado de dança, abrindo as portas para que bailarinos e bailarinas a partir dos dois anos e meio venham aprender a dançar connosco!
Contamos com uma vasta equipa de professores qualificados, e no próximo ano letivo oferecemos modalidades como:
• Baby Ballet
• Ballet Clássico
• Dança Contemporânea
• Dança Jazz
• Hip Hop
• Teatro Musical
• Barra no Chão
• Progressing Ballet Technique
• Fitness
• Danças de Salão
• Preparação coreográfica de eventos (casamentos, apresentações)
• Aula particulares
No ultimo ano lectivo dinamizamos o ensino da Dança, onde já passaram pelas nossas mãos mais de 100 alunos nas diversas modalidades.
O Estúdio PB é um novo projeto que tem como maior vontade crescer, com o sonho de marcar a memória
de quem vive a dança.
Desenhamos novos limites, com foco em novas oportunidades, contextos de aprendizagem e uma paixão
pela dança com valores.
Certos dos bons momentos que viveremos, estamos prontos para receber os sorrisos e sonhos daqueles
que connosco querem aprender e já nos são tão familiares e de braços abertos para quem até nós vem pela
primeira vez - que bom é sentir a vontade de dançar no nosso estúdio!

Offering dance floor rentals!

Name: Company of Collaborative Artists
Description:
Camille Moten Rennie formed the Company of Collaborative Artists (CoCA) in early 2021 as a personal mission to hold space for dance artists to continue to express their artistry and training in creative environments amidst a global pandemic. She felt called to address a collective need to move and process the restless energies, questions, ideas, and experiences of living through these contemporary times through the dancing body, and with community. From the very beginning outdoor rehearsal sketches in parks, boardwalks, and public sidewalk showings, to stage performances, community workshops, film shoots, festivals, and our 1st community gala, Camille's intention has remained the same: to keep coming together as dancers and to keep sharing art with all people. 

The mission of the Company of Collaborative Artists is to spread love and light internationally through dance arts and creative community. We strive to energize, express, and elevate our collective human experience by illuminating the beauty, power, and consciousness of the embodied creative. 

CoCA is a 501c3 nonprofit arts organization. Our company curates dance productions, movement classes, wellness workshops, and community-based events throughout the New Jersey tristate. 

For more information about our art work and opportunities to connect with us and support, please visit our website at www.cocamoves.com, or follow us on our socials at @cocamoves.

Our comprehensive platform is packed with expertly crafted courses, invaluable content, and a vibrant community, designed to serve every member of the dance teaching ecosystem—from associations to individual teachers and schools. Whether you’re looking to enhance your teaching skills, explore a variety of dance styles, or connect with like-minded professionals, Teach.Dance is your ultimate partner in elevating your dance teaching journey.

Description:
Le studio INNERBLOOM est un studio de pole fitness à Québec qui offre une variété de cours avec une approche axée sur l'empowerment féminin.

Name: Nexus SLO
Description:
Nexus SLO is a premier dance studio in San Luis Obispo, dedicated to connecting the community through the art of dance. We offer a diverse range of classes ranging from American Smooth/Rhythm ballroom styles to social dances such as Salsa, Bachata, Merengue, West Coast Swing, Country Swing and Two-Step, Argentine Tango, Hustle, Blues, and more! Our mission is to provide a warm and welcoming environment where individuals can enhance their physical and mental well-being, build lasting connections, and most importantly, have fun.

At Nexus, we believe that dance is a timeless tool for interpersonal communication that transcends language and time. Our goal is to authentically connect the community of San Luis Obispo and beyond through dance, serving as a warm and welcoming center point within the dance community.
We offer a variety of programs, including private lessons, group classes, dance fitness, and special events, all designed to meet the diverse ambitions of our students. Whether you're looking to improve physical health, build your self-confidence, or enhance emotional well-being, Nexus provides a supportive environment to help you achieve your goals.

Join us at Nexus SLO, where dancing connects us all.

Welcome to Reeler, the epitome of dance excellence tailored for MNCs and corporate brilliance! With 7 years of dedicated expertise, we specialize in crafting captivating choreographies for corporate events, cultural celebrations, and  wedding sangeet dances. Our vibrant Zumba classes, available both online and offline, seamlessly blend fun with fitness, offering a unique approach to corporate wellness. At Reeler, our commitment to precision, passion, and professionalism stands as the cornerstone of our dance philosophy. Description: Belly Dance Elysium is Adelaide’s leading school of oriental (belly) dance and also the only oriental (belly) dance school in Adelaide run by a dancer of Middle Eastern heritage. Guided by their feedback, we have continued to grow and evolve, employing innovative approaches to this ancient art form.

Name: The Regent Ballroom
Description:
The Regent Ballroom is Perth's newest ballroom, located in the heart of Northbridge. We teach ballroom, latin-american and other various partner & social dance styles, from beginners to elite DanceSport competitors. Whether you're looking to learn a new skill, that first dance for your wedding day or meet somebody new, there is a class at The Regent Ballroom for you. 
Principals Rosa Filippello and Riley White have been teaching Perth to dance for well over a decade and have a wealth of experience both locally and internationally. Come and meet the team and take your first steps with us at The Regent Ballroom!

Name: PROJEKTMOVE
Description: The name PROJEKTMOVE reflects my belief that movement is an ongoing journey - a project of self-discovery, growth, and transformation. The use of "Projekt" adds a creative and innovative edge, mirroring how I approach coaching with a blend of artistry and science. It represents not just physical movement but also the emotional and mental shifts we experience when we connect with our bodies. PROJEKTMOVE is about inspiring people to embrace movement as a way to thrive, to unlock their potential, and to live with greater confidence and vitality.

Name: Charity Gala "Augsburg tanzt 2023"
Description:
The "Benefizgala Augsburg tanzt 2023" was a unique event in the Bavarian "city of peace" Augsburg, where 80 young talents performed on the stage of the historic Parktheater to raise funds for Ukrainian cultural institutions. Supported by patron Claudia Roth MdB (German Government Commisioner of Culture & Media) and with a diverse programme of ballet, jazz, hip hop, modern, folklore, and Latin dance, "Augsburg tanzt" beckoned for culture and peace in Augsburg, Ukraine, and the entire world. 

Following its great success in the summer of 2023, "Augsburg tanzt" is now to become a permanent feature of Augsburg's cultural landscape to continue providing a stage for dance for peace and supporting social projects in the years to come. 

See you again next year, Augsburg!

Name: Pompano Dance Studio
Description:
From your child’s first dance class to their senior year solo, Pompano Dance Studio has a class for everyone. We welcome beginners of all ages and offer training through advanced levels.

Our dance instructors have a combined many years of experience that will bring fun and laughs to your next date night, wedding, or other event. We look forward to dancing with you soon!

Name: Workplace Boogie
Description:
Workplace Boogie is a high-energy, 6-week dance and performance program designed for modern workplaces. 

We bring together staff from across departments to learn one fun, easy-to-follow dance routine - culminating in a show-stopping live performance with other participating companies. 

A corporate dance-battle anyone? 

Brought to you by the team from Born to Boogie Dance Connection, our dance-driven wellbeing experience is purposefully designed to energise staff, activate connection across departments, and bring culture to life through movement and live performance. 

It's where Marketing meets IT meets HR meets Finance — turning strangers into showmates. And each program ends in a celebratory stage performance event where friends, family, and fellow staff can come and cheer on, to support their workplace performers.

Our program is bold, vibrant, joyful, and grounded in inclusive & wellbeing outcomes. It brings people together to feel energised, seen, and part of something uplifting and infectious - where the impact can't help but ripple through the workplace. 

Through a fun, shared creative challenge, Workplace Boogie boosts connection, encourages cross-team collaboration, breaks down silos, and will give staff something to laugh about for months.

Name: MST Dance Center

We are passionate about serving the community with a new approach to teaching the art of dance by creating unique authentic routines & instilling great technical training.

Name: An Dragan Ceilteach Irish Dancers
Description: At An Dragan Ceilteach Irish Dancers, we honor the tradition of Irish dance as we combine traditional and contemporary steps into our choreography. Our focus is on group performance, individual growth and friendships. We have recently relocated to Bluffdale, Utah.

Name: Dancing Danielle LLC
Description:
Introducing “Dancing Danielle" – your go-to destination for line dance instruction that caters to all skill levels and group sizes in the greater PNW.

At "Dancing Danielle," we specialize in providing exceptional line dance instruction for beginners, intermediates, and advanced dancers. Whether you're taking your very first steps on the dance floor or looking to master intricate choreography, Danielle, our experienced and dedicated instructor, is here to guide you every step of the way.

Our approach to dance instruction is tailored to your unique preferences and objectives. Danielle collaborates closely with each client to curate a personalized dance agenda, selecting songs and choreography that resonate with you. Our primary focus is your happiness and satisfaction, ensuring that every dance session is not only educational but also an enjoyable experience.

Whether you're organizing a small gathering of friends, a team-building event for your company, or a large-scale celebration, "Dancing Danielle" has the expertise and flexibility to cater to your needs. We are committed to making line dancing an inclusive and fun activity for everyone.

Join "Dancing Danielle" and let's dance our way to happiness, one step at a time with our expert instructor, Danielle.

We combine pole dance and acrobatics, choreography, and stretching with psychological practices - creating a space for personal transformation and harmony.

Description: The Ballroom Collective is founded by Adele Jang, Ashley Melville, and Mary Ida Spradlin to redefine ballroom through workshops, events, and education—uniting styles, communities, and dancers with purpose, power, and connection.

Name: Empower Dance Cheshire
Description: Welcome to Empower Dance! We are a well-being business specialising in dance, based in the heart of Cheshire. Our classes cater to all levels including those that have zero experience. Mental health is our core focus above all, dance comes second. Whether you're after a new social circle, wanting to improve your confidence, workout in a fun way or simply just after a good old dance - our classes are for you. Safe space always. We can't wait to meet you!

Name: Eternal Dancers
Description:
Welcome to Eternal Dancers, a place where we believe that dance is not just a hobby or a performance, but a way of life. Founded by Megan Bloom, a dance reconnection specialist and dance passion mentor with over 30 years of diverse dance experience, our mission is to help individuals of all backgrounds and abilities free their inner 'eternal dancer'.

At Eternal Dancers, we understand that dance has the power to heal, inspire, and transform lives. Whether you're a former dancer longing to reconnect with your passion, an occasional dancer looking to deepen your practice, an active dancer seeking personal growth, or someone who has never considered themselves a dancer but wants to explore the joy of movement, we are here to support you every step of the way.

Our one-of-a-kind powerful 8 week online course provides a flexible and accessible way for you to experience a holistic transformation as you free your inner dancer and develop a daily at home dance ritual, no matter where you are in the world. 

In personalized 1-on-1 coaching sessions, we can work together to unlock your unique dancer that yearns to express and help you overcome any obstacles that may be holding you back. At Eternal Dancers, we believe that dance is not just a form of artistic expression, but a powerful medium for personal growth and transformation. Dance becomes the vehicle through which we explore and address various aspects of life, including self-confidence, self-expression, resilience, and personal development.

In addition, we offer a wealth of daily resources to support your at-home dance movement practices. We strive to create a vibrant and supportive community where dancers of all levels can thrive.

Join us on this transformative journey and discover the joy, freedom, and self-expression that dance can bring to your life. Embrace your inner 'eternal dancer' and let your spirit soar. Together, we can create a world where dance knows no boundaries.

Name: Scarpette Rosse - Sassari
Description:
Scarpette Rosse nasce nel 2014 a Bosa come Scuola di danza diretta da Laura Deriu, la quale dal 2016 al 2020 collabora con la scuola di danza di Margherita Massidda, già operante sul territorio di Sassari e Sorso dal 2005.

Insieme fanno crescere una nuova realtà diventando nel 2020 direttrici artistiche associate della rinnovata Scuola di danza, musical e teatro Scarpette Rosse ASD e APS, la quale si propone di diventare un punto di riferimento per la danza e le arti sceniche proponendo corsi di studio a partire dai quattro anni, parallelamente a laboratori, stage e masterclasses con Maestri di rilievo nazionale ed internazionale e partecipazioni teatrali e performative in collaborazione con le più importanti realtà culturali del territorio.

Name: Dynamic District Dance Studio
Description:
Dynamic District Dance Studio is a vibrant dance studio with four studios located in St Arnaud, Donald, Stawell, and Ararat. We provide qualified teachers and excellent dance training in a safe, friendly and nurturing environment.

We cater for dancers of all abilities, including beginners and those who love to dance for recreational purposes, and also offer support and training for students who wish to pursue a career in this field. We have passionate teachers who are committed to providing extra support for students with extra needs, and are proud to support dancers of all abilities.

Classes we offer include Jazz, Tap, Classical Ballet, Hip-Hop, Contemporary Ballet, Musical Theatre, Aerial Arts, and Acrobatique, and for preschoolers we are licensed providers of Little Monkeys, READY SET DANCE, READY SET BALLET, READY SET MOVE, and READY SET ACRO programs. Annual concerts, exams, competitions, overseas trips, and other performance opportunities are also offered through Dynamic District.

Name: Chase Dance
Description:
Chase Dance, Perth's specialist in teaching wedding dance lessons, providing a safe and comfortable learning environment so you can enjoy your first dance with confidence.

You’re thinking…“The wedding day is almost here and we haven’t done anything about the wedding dance.” Don’t worry! We have everything you need to get you dancing confidently on your wedding day. We don’t know how to dance!

Absolutely everybody can dance! We’ll teach you how, with simplistic, easy to learn steps. We provide a safe and comfortable learning environment so together we can create your spectacular first dance.

Do we have enough time? It’s never too late to learn how to dance! Even if your wedding day is in less than a month’s time, we can teach you how to accomplish the impossible and get you feeling happy and confident by the time you hear your wedding song playing.

Will my partner like it? Yes! Within minutes you’ll both be laughing and enjoying yourselves. You’ll both quickly discover how much fun dancing is as you learn cool and impressive moves that will have you both feeling confident.

“Amanda has such a positive, vibrant energy so learning from her was such fun. The lessons were relaxed with lots of laughs. She really took time to cater the moves for our style….you really improve over the course of the lessons and it culminates with a routine that really does stay with you for life!”

We want to look good. You will look fantastic. Create a memory that will be treasured by all and last a lifetime. Having the time of your life, sharing your first dance together. A gift you can give to yourselves, a personalised wedding dance choreographed to your wedding song.

How much does it cost? When you’re feeling like there’s too many decisions to make, we’ll take the stress right out of it! We'll find the right wedding dance package to suit you and your budget.

Name: The LAB Dance Complex
Description: The LAB Dance Complex centers on inclusion, safety, equity, health, and exploration for people of all ages, abilities, and experience levels, racial and ethnic backgrounds, and gender identities, to express themselves through movement and the art of dance. The LAB prioritizes  students’ mental and emotional health and uses a body-positive teaching style. Our classes range from experimentation and discovery to developing classical technique and structuring movement to communicate. At the LAB we help our students realize their full potential and cultivate their own unique artistic expression.

Description:
Danzantes Del Valle's mission is to provide students cultural awareness through dance while teaching teamwork, discipline and creating community leaders. 

Our student's get an opportunity to learn dances and perform them to our community, participate in workshops and experience professional shows firsthand. Our dancers are not only performers but also cultural ambassadors that teach others through dance.

Name: Wild Rose Cloggers
Description:
We're a dynamic and diverse group of women spanning from 19 to 70-something years young! While we don't currently have any male dancers, we welcome all to join in on the fun. Our passion is clogging and we offer lessons in Bloomington, MN. We would be thrilled to put on a clogging show for you and your friends, and we also travel throughout the Twin Cities to perform at festivals, parades, community events, and fairs. Let us bring some toe-tapping entertainment to your next gathering!

Contact at us wildrosecloggers@gmail.com for more information!

Name: SHOWTIME DANCE
Description:
The joy of dancing, the elegance of movement, the creativity of art, health and sport are the core values of a dancer’s lifestyle..
We consider our mission to create conditions for fulfilling these values by organizing dance competitions, whose main motive is to expand and strengthen the dancing society. In this spirit, we strive to improve and develop our activities every year.
We started with a small competition with 32 competition choreographies and 13 years later we have regional qualifications in several countries, four-days long GRAND FINAL and more than 5000 dancers involved.

The students at Dancekids become more than classmates, they become friends, best friends, and family. They share experiences in class and on stage that will stay with them for a lifetime.

Name: Atlantic Canada Irish Dance Competition
Description: The Atlantic Canadian Irish Dance Championships will take place for the first time on April 2 & 3, 2022. CLRG grade exams will also be held on April 1, 2022. The ACIDC will be held in the heart of downtown Halifax and will consist of two, full-syllabus feiseanna at the spectacular Westin Nova Scotian. The ACIDC are run in partnership with Rising Tide Irish Dance Academy.

Name: Dykes Who Dance
Description:
Dykes Who Dance is a Queer-POC-founded salsa and bachata dance community. It's currently based in Brighton.

The initiative of Dykes Who Dance is that there was no queer-led Latin dance community in Brighton before, and we want to create that safe space for the LGBTQIA+ community.

Name: Shluv Dance Academy
Description: Welcome to Shluv Dance Academy! A cutting-edge online platform dedicated to empowering dancers and creators worldwide. Our mission is to inspire, educate, and foster a vibrant community within the dance industry, positioning Shluv Dance Academy as a dynamic hub of creativity, collaboration, and growth. Join us at shluvdance.com/

Name: 5678 Foundation
Description: The 5678 Foundation is dedicated to fostering the future of dance by supporting aspiring young dancers through a variety of initiatives. From recruiting students for scholarships to providing assistance with dance event tuition and registration fees, our foundation aims to eliminate financial barriers and empower talented individuals to pursue their passion for dance. Through strategic partnerships with dance schools, community centers, and performing arts organizations, we create opportunities for growth and development in the dance community. Our programs not only provide financial support but also mentorship and networking opportunities, ensuring that dancers have the tools and resources needed to thrive both on and off the stage.

Name: Dancing On The Go, LLC
Description: Dancing on the Go is a travel base dance/fitness program designed to encourage children of all ages along with adults to live a healthy lifestyle by incorporating dance and movement into their daily routine. This program is organized to help motivate individuals, by teaching them the foundation of dance education and fitness. It also allows children to participate in a learning environment, where they can express themselves, be creative, have fun, and build team work skills along with developing relationships. Dancing on the Go appeals to everyone, even if you do not have dance experience or never worked out a day in your life. The number one rule is to have fun! There is no judgment zone and this program is organized to help uplift individuals in their fitness and dance journey. The importance of Dancing on the Go is to provide individuals with an activity that they can enjoy and inspire them to do their very best by achieving their goals.

Name: Ingliska
Description:

Our group has been recognized as Tallinn’s Best Girls' Group and has performed widely across Estonia and in Finland. Our goal is to share the energy of Estonian folk culture and to take part in shaping its future by contributing to the ongoing conversation around our cultural heritage.

Description:
Hawiyya Dance Company

The group uses folk dance ‘Dabke’ and contemporary dance to create narrative works that explore themes such as resistance, oppression, displacement, social justice, individual and cultural identity.

Name: The Dance 100
Description:
The Dance 100 is a wellness-forward dance resource hub designed to support dancers at every stage—from passionate beginners to professionals rebuilding their foundation.

We help dancers unlock joyful, sustainable growth through mindset tools, guided practice, and intentional structure—without the pressure of industry timelines.

At the heart of our offerings is the 100 Days of Dance Journal, a self-guided tool to help dancers discover their unique voice, track progress, and cultivate confidence in and out of the studio.

Whether you're returning after a break, navigating inconsistent training, or building strong habits with limited resources, we’re here to help you dance with purpose and peace.

Our content and tools focus on:

Dancer mental health and motivation

Rebuilding missed technical foundations

Goal-setting and journaling as a tool for self-discovery

Encouragement rooted in faith and identity, not just performance

 We believe dancers thrive when joy comes first.

→ Explore our journal, blog, and free resources at [yourdomain.com].
→ Connect with us for collaborations or to feature our tools in your dance school, wellness platform, or mentorship program.

Name: ABC Studio & Activity Center
Description:
At ABC Studio & Activity Center in Bluffton, Indiana, we aim to offer high-quality instruction in a variety of dance styles, providing students of all ages with the tools to grow technically, artistically, and personally.

Our mission is to create a supportive and inspiring environment where every student can build confidence, creativity, and a love of movement. From beginner dancers to advanced performers, our programs are designed to challenge and nurture each student’s potential.

At ABC Studio & Activity Center, we are more than a studio — we are a community where students, families, and instructors grow together. With passionate instructors, engaging curriculum, and opportunities for performance and personal growth, we strive to make every class a rewarding experience.

Name: Ballet Folklórico de UCR
Description: Ballet Folklórico de UCR is a student-led organization that educates all UC Riverside undergraduate and graduate students on the knowledge of Mexican cultural dance. Since 1989, Ballet Folklorico de UCR has performed throughout Southern California, including cities such as Coachella, Los Angeles, Rialto, and Riverside. Under the leadership of our faculty advisor Dr. Xochitl Chavez from the Department of Music, Ballet Folklórico de UCR goal is to develop performance skills, increase the dance repertoire, while fostering cultural pride and educating participants on the richness of Mexican culture and dance. Our organization welcomes all UC Riverside students and the Riverside communities to participate in our dance troupe.

Name: The Dance Box
Description:
Our dance community is focused on the basics of dance emphasizing building a strong foundation for students, no matter their age or skill level. Our focus would be on teaching fundamental techniques and movements that are essential for all styles of dance. Here’s how we are structured:
1. Curriculum:
•	Basic Techniques: Teaching fundamental skills like posture, balance, flexibility, strength, and coordination. These are key for developing more advanced dance abilities.
•	Footwork: Breaking down the essential steps and rhythms for various dance styles (salsa, bachata, kizomba and semba).
•	Body Awareness: Understanding how to move the body properly to avoid injury and improve performance.
•	Music and Rhythm: Learning how to interpret music and rhythm, which is essential for syncing movements with sound.
•	Coordination & Timing: Exercises focused on timing, spatial awareness, and the ability to move with other dancers.
2. Levels of Training:
•	Beginner: Introduction to movement, simple steps, stretches, and building basic strength.
•	Intermediate: More complex movements, partnering, and improving musicality.
•	Advanced: Refining technique, learning intricate choreography, and preparing for performances.
3. Class Types:
•	Technique Classes: Aimed at improving specific dance skills.
•	Stretching and Flexibility: To enhance range of motion and reduce risk of injury.
•	Strength and Conditioning: Targeted exercises to build strength for better performance.
•	Rhythm and Timing Drills: For those new to dance, these classes help build a strong sense of timing and rhythm.
4. Instructor Approach:
•	Focus on patience and repetition, ensuring that all students master the basics before advancing.
•	Encourage a supportive, non-competitive environment where learning is prioritized over performance.
5. Environment:
•	A welcoming space with mirrors for general practice.
•	Smaller class sizes to provide more individual attention.
